promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு தொடக்க நல வாழ்வு மருத்துவ நடுவத்திலும், ஓர் உயிர் காக்கும் ஊர்தி (Ambulance) இருக்கும் அல்லது பத்தாயிரம் பேர் இருக்கக்கூடிய இடத்திற்கு ஓர் ஊர்தி இருக்கும். இதன் மூலம் உயிர்ப் பலியை வெகுவாகக் குறைக்க முடியும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 123
impact_mechanism: Aims to reduce emergency response times and fatalities by increasing the density and availability of ambulances across the state.

promise_components.component: Every primary health center will have an ambulance, or there will be one ambulance for every 10,000 people.
promise_components.analysis: The target based on population is 7.9 crore / 10,000 = 7,900 ambulances. The number of PHCs and the current ambulance fleet size are not in the reference data, so the number of new vehicles required and the total cost cannot be calculated. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The number of new ambulances required and the cost per vehicle (including equipment, staff, and operations) are unknown. The total cost cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: Expanding the ambulance fleet is a capital investment in critical public health infrastructure. It creates a permanent, structural improvement in the state's capacity to respond to medical emergencies, which directly impacts mortality rates.

promise_text_en: To cater to the poor and middle class, a government dental hospital will be established in every district capital.
promise_text_ta: ஏழை, நடுத்தர மக்களுக்கு ஏற்ற வகையில் மாவட்டத் தலைநகரங்கள்தோறும் ஒரு பல் மருத்துவமனைத் தொடங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 123
impact_mechanism: Increases access to affordable dental care by establishing public dental hospitals in every district.

promise_components.component: A government dental hospital will be established in every district capital.
promise_components.analysis: Using the 42 Health Unit Districts as a proxy for districts, this implies ~42 new facilities. The cost to build, equip, and staff a dental hospital is not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost involves capital expenditure for ~42 facilities plus recurring expenditure for staff and supplies. This data is not available, so the total cost cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: By establishing a network of public dental hospitals, this promise creates permanent infrastructure to address oral health needs. This is a structural solution to the problem of high-cost, private-sector-dominated dental care.
coverage_gap_note: Access may still be difficult for people living in rural areas far from the district capital.

promise_text_en: Based on the current division of Tamil Nadu into 42 Health Unit Districts (HUD), new government medical colleges will be established accordingly.
promise_text_ta: தற்போது தமிழகத்தைச் சுகாதார அடிப்படையில் 42 மாவட்டங்களாக (HUD) பிரித்துக் கொண்டு மருத்துவத்தை வழங்கி வருகிறார்கள். அதற்கேற்பப் புதிய அரசு மருத்துவக் கல்லூரிகள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 125
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase the number of doctors and improve tertiary healthcare access by establishing a medical college in every Health Unit District.

promise_components.component: New government medical colleges will be established to match the 42 Health Unit Districts.
promise_components.analysis: The target is 42 government medical colleges. The current number is not in the reference data, so the number of new colleges is unknown. The cost to establish a medical college is extremely high and not available. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost to establish even one medical college is very high. The total cost for an unknown number of new colleges is incalculable but would represent a massive capital and recurring expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a foundational investment in the state's healthcare capacity. Medical colleges not only produce doctors for the future but also function as advanced hospitals, improving healthcare access and quality in their regions for decades.

promise_text_en: Priority will be given to stem cell medical research. Stem cell research centers and stem cell banks will be established, and the growth of unregulated commercial research centers will be prevented.
promise_text_ta: குருத்தணு முறை மருத்துவ (ஸ்டெம்செல்) ஆய்வுக்கு முதன்மைத்துவம் அளிக்கப்படும். குருத்தணு ஆய்வு மையங்கள் தொடங்கப்படும். வணிக நோக்கில் முறையற்ற ஆய்வு மையங்கள் வளர்வது தடுக்கப்படும். குருத்தணு வைப்பகங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 125
impact_mechanism: Aims to position the state at the forefront of advanced medical science by investing in stem cell research and regulating the sector.

promise_components.component: Stem cell research centers and stem cell banks will be established.
promise_components.analysis: This requires significant capital and operational funding for high-tech labs and specialized scientists. The number of centers and scale of investment are not specified. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: The growth of unregulated commercial research centers will be prevented.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory function with administrative costs, not a direct spending program.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost to establish and operate state-of-the-art stem cell research centers is very high but not specified in the promise. The total cost cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a long-term investment in scientific infrastructure and human capital. By building a state-led R&D ecosystem, it aims to create a structural capacity for developing future medical treatments, rather than just delivering existing ones.
coverage_gap_note: Immediate benefits are limited to a very small number of patients; widespread benefits are likely decades away.

promise_text_en: From the day of joining service, rules for seniority, promotion, and salary hikes for all medical staff, from doctors to employees, will be finalized and announced. Promotions and benefits will be granted without delay based on performance monitoring.
promise_text_ta: மருத்துவர்கள் முதல் ஊழியர்கள் வரை பணியில் சேர்ந்த நாள் முதலே அவர்களுக்கான பணிமூப்பு, பதவி உயர்வு, ஊதிய உயர்வு விதிமுறைகள் முடிவு செய்து அறிவிக்கப்படும். ஊழியர்களின் பணித்திறன் கண்காணிக்கப்பட்டு அதன்படி தங்குதடையின்றி அவர்களுக்கான பதவி உயர்வு பலன்கள் கிடைத்தபடி இருக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 125
impact_mechanism: Improves public healthcare service quality by enhancing employee morale and career progression through standardized HR policies.

promise_components.component: Finalize and announce rules for seniority, promotion, and salary hikes for all medical staff.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative reform. Its cost is not directly calculable from the provided reference data as it pertains to internal government processes.

promise_components.component: Grant promotions and benefits based on performance monitoring without delay.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural change to expedite existing HR functions. Any fiscal impact would be indirect (e.g., from faster salary increases upon promotion) and cannot be estimated with available data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a governance and administrative reform with no direct new expenditure. The fiscal impact is negligible.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to fix systemic issues in human resource management for medical staff, such as unclear career paths and delays. It creates a permanent change in administrative rules rather than providing temporary relief.
coverage_gap_note: This policy only benefits government medical staff and does not affect employees in the private healthcare sector.

promise_text_en: Stress-inducing transfers in the medical department will be eliminated. Employees will be posted in hospitals near their homes, and punitive transfers will be completely abolished.
promise_text_ta: மருத்துவத் துறையில் இருப்பவர்களுக்கு மன உளைச்சலைத் தரும் இடமாற்றம் இருக்காது. அவர்கள் அருகில் உள்ள மருத்துவமனைகளிலேயே பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள். பழிவாங்கும் நோக்குடன் நடத்தப்பட்டு வந்த இடமாற்றங்கள் முற்றாக ஒழிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 125
impact_mechanism: Reduces employee hardship and potential corruption by reforming the transfer policy for medical department staff.

promise_components.component: Eliminate stress-inducing transfers and post employees in hospitals near their homes.
promise_components.analysis: This is a change in HR policy. The number of affected employees and the definition of 'near their homes' are not specified. No cost can be calculated.

promise_components.component: Completely abolish punitive transfers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance commitment to change management practices. It has no direct fiscal cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a policy change regarding employee transfers and has no direct budgetary outlay.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise addresses a root cause of employee dissatisfaction and potential corruption associated with the transfer system. By changing the policy, it creates a lasting improvement in working conditions.
coverage_gap_note: May create challenges in ensuring adequate staffing in remote or less desirable locations if not balanced with operational needs.

promise_text_en: A system will be implemented to ensure that spouses can work in the same town, avoiding situations where they are posted in different locations. A dedicated employee welfare division will be established for this purpose.
promise_text_ta: கணவர் ஓர் ஊரிலும், மனைவி ஓர் ஊரிலும் பணியாற்றுவதைத் தவிர்த்து, இருவரும் ஒரே ஊரில் பணியாற்றும் முறை கொண்டு வருவதோடு, துறை சார்ந்து ஊழியர் நலனுக்கான பிரிவு ஒன்றும் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 125
impact_mechanism: Improves work-life balance for government employees by creating a formal system to facilitate co-location for working spouses.

promise_components.component: Implement a system to ensure spouses can work in the same town.
promise_components.analysis: An administrative policy change affecting dual-government-employee households. The number of such households is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Establish a dedicated employee welfare division for this purpose.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new government unit. The cost depends on staffing and infrastructure, which is not specified and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of a new administrative division is unknown but likely small in the context of the overall budget. The primary change is procedural.
sustainability_reasoning: This institutionalizes a solution for a recurring hardship faced by government employees. Establishing a dedicated division makes the policy a permanent feature of the HR system.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is limited to households where both spouses are government employees.

promise_text_en: On par with allopathic medicine, priority will be given to traditional systems like Siddha, Ayurveda, Homeopathy, and Unani. Traditional medicine centers will be established in hilly regions.
promise_text_ta: ஆங்கில மருத்துவத்திற்கு இணையாக நம் மரபு சார்ந்த தமிழ்வழி மருத்துவம் (சித்த மருத்துவம்), ஆயுர்வேதம், ஒல்லியல் மருத்துவம் (ஓமியோபதி), யுனானி எனும் தொல் கிரேக்க மருத்துவத்திற்கும் முன்னுரிமை வழங்கப்படும். மக்கள் வாழும் மலைப் பகுதிகளில் மரபுவழி மருத்துவ நடுவம் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 125
impact_mechanism: Expands public healthcare options by establishing new infrastructure for traditional Indian medicine systems in underserved areas.

promise_components.component: Give priority to Siddha, Ayurveda, Homeopathy, and Unani on par with allopathic medicine.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy statement of intent. Its fiscal impact depends on subsequent budgetary allocations, which are not defined.

promise_components.component: Establish traditional medicine centers in hilly regions.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise. The number, size, and staffing levels of these centers are not specified, so a cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks specifics on the number and scale of the proposed centers, making a cost estimation impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise involves creating new, permanent healthcare infrastructure. While it expands service choice, it does not address a root cause of public health issues but rather adds alternative treatment modalities.
coverage_gap_note: The beneficiaries are limited to residents of hilly regions who prefer or require traditional medicine.

promise_text_en: Siddha, Homeopathy, Yoga, Touch Therapy, and Acupuncture branches will be expanded throughout Tamil Nadu, from primary health centers to the main state hospitals.
promise_text_ta: தொடக்க நல வாழ்வு மருத்துவ நடுவத்தில் இருந்து மாநிலத்தின் தலைமை மருத்துவமனைகள் வரையிலும் சித்த மருத்துவம், ஒல்லியல் மருத்துவம், ஓகம், தொடு மருத்துவம், புள்ளியியல் மருத்துவக் கிளைகள் தமிழகம் முழுதும் பரவலாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 125
impact_mechanism: Integrates traditional and alternative medicine into the mainstream public health system by adding dedicated branches to existing hospitals.

promise_components.component: Expand Siddha, Homeopathy, Yoga, Touch Therapy, and Acupuncture branches in all government hospitals, from primary health centers to main state hospitals.
promise_components.analysis: This implies adding new departments and staff across the state's entire public health network. The number of facilities and required personnel is unknown, making a cost calculation impossible. The scale is vast, covering facilities from PHCs up to state hospitals.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scope of expansion is too vaguely defined to estimate costs, but staffing thousands of facilities with practitioners of five different disciplines would be a major expense.
sustainability_reasoning: This aims to permanently embed alternative medicine within the state's public health infrastructure. It expands services rather than fixing a fundamental problem, making it a structural addition, not a root cause solution.
coverage_gap_note: The primary risk is the massive challenge of recruiting a sufficient number of qualified practitioners across five distinct disciplines to staff facilities statewide.

promise_text_en: In tourist areas with water bodies, waterfalls, and hills, traditional medicine centers will be established. These 'Natural Siddha Medical Farms' will be set up with large herbal farms, beauty cottages, and will offer traditional millet-based diets, oil baths, and naturopathy.
promise_text_ta: சுற்றுலா சார்ந்து எங்கெல்லாம் நீர்நிலைகள், அருவிகள், மலைப்பகுதிகள் இருக்கிறதோ அங்கெல்லாம் மரபுவழி மருத்துவத்திற்கான நடுவம் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும். அந்தப் பகுதியில் பெரிய அளவில் மூலிகைப் பண்ணைகளும், அழகுக் குடில்களும் அமைக்கப்படும். சிறுகூல மரபு (சிறுதானிய) உணவு முறையோடு, எண்ணெய்க் குளியல், இயற்கை மருத்துவம் என்ற ‘இயற்கை சித்த மருத்துவப் பண்ணை’ அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 127
impact_mechanism: Promotes medical tourism and the Siddha system by creating specialized, destination-based wellness centers.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Natural Siddha Medical Farms' in tourist areas with large herbal farms, beauty cottages, and traditional wellness services.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital-intensive project focused on tourism. The number of proposed 'farms' is not specified, and the cost for land, construction, and operations cannot be calculated from available data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks details on the number, size, and budget of these specialized farms.
sustainability_reasoning: This involves creating new, state-owned commercial and wellness infrastructure. It is not addressing a widespread public need but is instead creating a new, niche service aimed at tourism.
coverage_gap_note: This project benefits a very small segment of the population (tourists, wellness seekers) and does not address general public healthcare needs.

promise_text_en: A "Thirumoolar Medical Research City" will be established on a 500-acre area, equipped with world-class research laboratories. Arrangements will be made for top global medical researchers to conduct research and teach here.
promise_text_ta: 500 குறுக்கம் நிலப்பரப்பில் “திருமூலர் மருத்துவ ஆராய்ச்சி நகரம்“ உருவாக்கப்படும். உலகின் உயர்தர ஆராய்ச்சி கருவிகள் அனைத்தும் உள்ளடக்கிய ஆராய்ச்சிக்கூடங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். உலகின் தலைசிறந்த மருத்துவ ஆராய்ச்சியாளர்கள் இங்கு வந்து மருத்துவ ஆராய்ச்சி செய்ய, ஆய்வுப் பாடம் நடத்த வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 127
impact_mechanism: Aims to scientifically validate and globalize traditional medicine by creating a world-class research and development hub.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'Thirumoolar Medical Research City' on a 500-acre area with world-class laboratories.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale infrastructure project. The cost of acquiring 500 acres and building 'world-class' facilities is not specified and cannot be calculated, but it would be a significant capital outlay.

promise_components.component: Arrange for top global medical researchers to conduct research and teach here.
promise_components.analysis: This is a human resources goal dependent on the successful creation of the facility and offering competitive terms. No cost can be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. A project of this scale (500 acres, world-class labs) would likely cost thousands of crores, representing a very large share of the discretionary budget. It would be fiscally 'stressed' or 'central_dependent'.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root issue of a lack of modern scientific research and validation for Siddha medicine. If successful, it would create a permanent, high-value institution.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits of this research are long-term and uncertain, offering no immediate improvement to public health services for the general population.

promise_text_en: As the Union Government's AYUSH ministry continues to neglect Siddha medicine, a separate Ministry of Siddha Medicine will be established under the Tamil Nadu government to integrate its education, research, services, drug manufacturing, tourism, and global promotion.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றிய அரசின் Ayush அமைச்சகம் சித்த மருத்துவத்தைத் தொடர்ந்து புறக்கணித்து வரும் நிலையில் தமிழ்நாடு அரசின் கீழ் சித்த மருத்துவத்தின் கல்வி, ஆராய்ச்சி, மருத்துவ சேவை, மருந்து உருவாக்கம், சுற்றுலா மற்றும் உலகளாவிய பரவலை ஒருங்கிணைக்கும் வகையில் தனித்துவமான சித்த மருத்துவ அமைச்சகம் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 127
impact_mechanism: Elevates the political and administrative focus on Siddha medicine by creating a dedicated ministry within the state government.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate Ministry of Siddha Medicine under the Tamil Nadu government.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative restructuring. The cost involves salaries for a minister and a small secretariat. The number of staff is not specified, but the cost is typically low relative to the state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The direct administrative cost of a new ministry is relatively small and would be a negligible percentage of the discretionary budget. It is fiscally feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent change in the government's structure to address the perceived neglect of Siddha medicine. It provides a dedicated administrative and political body to champion the system.
coverage_gap_note: The creation of a ministry is a symbolic act; its actual impact depends on the budget, authority, and mandate it is subsequently given.

promise_text_en: Siddha medical units will be expanded in every district, and model Siddha hospitals will be established in other states to promote its benefits. All disappearing Siddha medical manuscripts will be published in both print and digital formats.
promise_text_ta: மாவட்டந்தோறும் சித்த மருத்துவப் பிரிவுகள் விரிவாக்கப்படுவதோடு மட்டுமல்லாமல் தமிழகத்தைத் தாண்டி மற்ற மாநிலங்களிலும் சித்த மருத்துவத்தின் மேன்மைகளை எடுத்துக்கூறி, மாதிரி சித்த மருத்துவமனைகள் அமைக்கப்படும். அழிந்து வரும் சித்த மருத்துவக் குறிப்புகள் அனைத்தும் புத்தகங்களாகவும் மின் புத்தகங்களாகவும் அச்சிடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 127
impact_mechanism: Promotes and preserves the Siddha system through infrastructure expansion, out-of-state promotion, and knowledge conservation.

promise_components.component: Expand Siddha medical units in every district.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'expand' is vague; the scale and cost cannot be determined.

promise_components.component: Establish model Siddha hospitals in other states.
promise_components.analysis: The number and location of these hospitals are not specified. This involves inter-state jurisdiction and its cost is incalculable.

promise_components.component: Publish all disappearing Siddha medical manuscripts in print and digital formats.
promise_components.analysis: A knowledge preservation project. The volume of manuscripts and cost of digitization are unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise contains multiple components with undefined scope (expansion, number of hospitals), making a cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise involves creating permanent infrastructure (hospitals) and preserving cultural heritage (manuscripts), which are structural changes. Preserving manuscripts addresses the root cause of knowledge loss.
coverage_gap_note: Establishing hospitals in other states is a logistically and legally complex initiative for a state government to undertake.

promise_text_en: Siddha hospitals and research centers will be established in the five capital cities.
promise_text_ta: சித்த மருத்துவமனைகள் மற்றும் ஆராய்ச்சி மையங்கள் ஐந்து தலைநகரங்களிலும் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 127
impact_mechanism: Increases access to Siddha medicine in major urban centers by building new, dedicated hospitals and research facilities.

promise_components.component: Establish Siddha hospitals and research centers in the five capital cities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise. The term 'five capital cities' is ambiguous, and the size and specifications of the 5 hospital-cum-research centers are not defined. A cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is dependent on the unspecified scale of the five proposed facilities and the interpretation of 'capital cities'.
sustainability_reasoning: This involves the creation of permanent health infrastructure. It expands the availability of a specific type of medical service, rather than addressing a root cause of a public health problem.
coverage_gap_note: The beneficiaries are primarily residents of the five chosen cities. The ambiguity of 'five capital cities' makes the geographic scope unclear.

promise_text_en: By making Siddha and integrated medicine a leading sector in the global market, Tamil Nadu will be transformed into a global medical hub, generating an annual income of ₹1 lakh crore and creating 1.5 million jobs within 10 years.
promise_text_ta: சித்த மற்றும் ஒருங்கிணைந்த மருத்துவத்தை உலக சந்தையில் முன்னணி துறையாக மாற்றி, 10 ஆண்டுகளில் ஆண்டுக்கு 1 இலட்சம் கோடி வருமானத்தையும், 15 இலட்சம் வேலைவாய்ப்புகளையும் உருவாக்கும் உலகளாவிய மருத்துவ நடுவமாக தமிழ்நாடு மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 127
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create a new economic sector by establishing Tamil Nadu as a global hub for Siddha and integrated medicine.

promise_components.component: Transform Tamil Nadu into a global medical hub for Siddha and integrated medicine.
promise_components.analysis: This is an aspirational goal. The cost of specific actions (e.g., infrastructure, marketing, R&D) is not provided and cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Generate an annual income of ₹1 lakh crore.
promise_components.analysis: This is a revenue target, not a cost. The feasibility of this target cannot be assessed with the data provided.

promise_components.component: Create 1.5 million jobs within 10 years.
promise_components.analysis: This is an employment target. The mechanism for creating these jobs is not detailed.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise specifies revenue and job targets, not government expenditure. The cost of the underlying programs to achieve these goals is not stated, so a fiscal impact cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: If successful, this would be a structural change by creating a new, high-value economic sector for the state. However, it is highly aspirational and depends on global market forces beyond the state's direct control.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are those employed in or investing in this new, specialized sector, not the general population.

promise_text_en: New, clean, and free lodging facilities will be established within the premises of major government hospitals. This will alleviate the difficulties and unnecessary expenses for relatives attending to inpatients.

impact_mechanism: This aims to elevate the cultural status of traditional sports through international advocacy.

promise_components.component: Make efforts to get more traditional Tamil sports recognized in international sports competitions.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy and diplomatic effort. The costs associated with such efforts are not specified and would likely be part of the operational budget of a government department. A precise cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct, calculable fiscal cost. Costs would be administrative and are likely to be low.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is about seeking external validation from international bodies, the success of which is not guaranteed. It is primarily a political signal of cultural promotion rather than a direct, material benefit or a fix for a domestic problem.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are the practitioners of the specific sports being promoted.

promise_text_en: Quality sports training grounds will be established in every panchayat, and coaches for all sports will be appointed at the panchayat level.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு ஊராட்சிகளிலும் தரம் வாய்ந்த விளையாட்டுப் பயிற்சித் திடல்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். அனைத்து விளையாட்டுகளுக்குமான பயிற்சியாளர்கள் ஊராட்சி அளவிலேயே அமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 133
impact_mechanism: This creates widespread, grassroots access to sports facilities and coaching in rural areas.

promise_components.component: Establish quality sports training grounds in every panchayat.
promise_components.analysis: The number of panchayats in Tamil Nadu is not provided in the reference data. The cost per training ground is also not specified. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Appoint coaches for all sports at the panchayat level.
promise_components.analysis: The number of panchayats, the number of coaches per panchayat, and their salaries are not specified in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified in the promise and cannot be estimated from the reference data. Given the scale (every panchayat), the cost would be extremely high.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented, this would create a permanent, decentralized infrastructure for sports at the most local level. It addresses the root cause of lack of access to facilities and coaching in rural areas.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is specific to panchayats, potentially leaving out urban and municipal areas.

promise_text_en: Excellent gymnasiums equipped with all types of equipment will be set up in all schools in all small villages.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துச் சிற்றூர்களிலும் உள்ள பள்ளிகள் அனைத்திலும் சிறந்த உடற்பயிற்சிக் கூடங்கள் அனைத்து வகையான கருவிகளுடன் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 133
impact_mechanism: This provides dedicated fitness infrastructure for students in rural government schools.

promise_components.component: Set up excellent gymnasiums with all equipment in all schools in all small villages.
promise_components.analysis: The number of schools in 'small villages' is not specified, though the total number of government schools is ~53,000. The cost to set up one 'excellent gymnasium' is not specified. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified in the promise and cannot be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates permanent physical assets (gyms) within schools, addressing the lack of fitness facilities for students. It is a long-term investment in student health and physical education.
coverage_gap_note: This promise excludes students in urban schools, private schools, and the general village population.

promise_text_en: Sports competitions will be conducted on a grand scale every year on the day of the Tamil festival (Pongal).
promise_text_ta: ஆண்டுதோறும் தமிழர் திருநாள் அன்று விளையாட்டுப் போட்டிகள் மிகப்பெரிய அளவில் நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 133
impact_mechanism: This promotes community engagement and sports participation through an annual cultural event.

promise_components.component: Conduct grand sports competitions every year on Pongal.
promise_components.analysis: The scale and cost of organizing 'grand' competitions (prizes, logistics, venues) are not specified. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified in the promise and cannot be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a recurring event that provides a platform for competition but does not change the underlying conditions for athlete development. It treats the symptom of low engagement with a periodic festival, rather than building year-round capacity.

promise_text_en: Awards named after Tamil warriors will be given to sportspersons who win in state, national, and international competitions.
promise_text_ta: மாநில, தேசிய மற்றும் உலக அளவில் விளையாட்டுப் போட்டிகளில் வெற்றி பெறும் விளையாட்டு வீரர்களுக்குத் தமிழ்ப் போராளிகள் பெயரில் விருதுகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 133
impact_mechanism: This provides a non-monetary incentive and formal recognition for successful athletes.

promise_components.component: Give awards named after Tamil warriors to winning sportspersons.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise for non-monetary or token awards. The number of winners per year and the cost of creating the awards are not specified. The fiscal impact is likely negligible.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is not specified, but is expected to be very low and absorbed into administrative budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: Giving awards recognizes success but does not create the conditions for it. It is a symbolic gesture of appreciation rather than a structural solution to the challenges athletes face in training and development.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to the small number of athletes who win major competitions.

promise_text_en: Government jobs will be provided to award-winning sportspersons according to their qualifications.
promise_text_ta: விருதுகள் பெற்ற விளையாட்டு வீரர்களுக்குத் தகுதிக்கேற்ற அரசு வேலை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 135
impact_mechanism: This promise creates a direct pathway to stable employment for a small, high-achieving group of athletes.

promise_components.component: Provide government jobs to award-winning sportspersons based on their qualifications.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'award-winning sportspersons' and the cost of government jobs (salaries, benefits) are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the fiscal cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the number of eligible athletes and the pay scales of the jobs offered.
sustainability_reasoning: This is structural for the individual beneficiaries as it provides a long-term, stable income source, addressing the financial precarity many athletes face post-career. However, it does not change the broader sports ecosystem for all.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes athletes who are not 'award-winning' or whose qualifications do not match available government posts.

promise_text_en: The government will bear all expenses for athletes selected for state, national, and international games, including accommodation, food, special training, and travel costs.
promise_text_ta: மாநில, தேசிய, உலக விளையாட்டிற்குத் தேர்வு செய்யப்பட்ட வீரர்களுக்கு தங்கும் வசதி, உணவுடன் கூடிய சிறப்புப் பயிற்சிகள், போக்குவரத்துச் செலவுகள் என அனைத்தையும் அரசு ஏற்றுக்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 135
impact_mechanism: This promise removes the financial barrier to participation in high-level sports by covering all associated costs.

promise_components.component: The government will bear all expenses for athletes selected for state, national, and international games.
promise_components.analysis: The number of athletes selected for these competitions annually and the per-athlete cost for accommodation, food, training, and travel are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the fiscal cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would be recurring and depend on the number of athletes and the scale of events.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of attrition in sports: the high cost of competing. By providing a financial support system, it enables talented individuals from all economic backgrounds to pursue sports at a high level.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes athletes who have not yet been selected for state, national, or international level games.

promise_text_en: Similar to medal-winning athletes, coaches will also receive awards and government assistance, named after Tamil warriors.
promise_text_ta: பதக்கங்களை வென்ற விளையாட்டு வீரர்களுக்கு வழங்குவது போல பயிற்சியாளர்களுக்கு விருதுகளும் அரசு உதவிகளும், தமிழ்ப் போராளிகள் பெயரில் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 135
impact_mechanism: This promise provides a financial incentive and recognition for coaches whose athletes achieve success.

promise_components.component: Coaches of medal-winning athletes will receive awards and government assistance.
promise_components.analysis: The number of eligible coaches and the monetary value of the 'awards' and 'assistance' are not specified or available in the reference data. Therefore, the fiscal cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is likely to be minor relative to the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides a reward for a successful outcome but does not address the underlying issues of coach development, stable career paths, or training infrastructure. It treats a symptom (lack of recognition) rather than the root problem.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes coaches whose athletes do not win medals, who may still be doing crucial developmental work.

promise_text_en: The government will bear the full medical expenses for any unexpected injuries sustained by athletes during training or competitions. A special medical unit will be established for this purpose.
promise_text_ta: பயிற்சியின் போதோ அல்லது விளையாட்டுப் போட்டிகளின் போதோ வீரர்களுக்கு எதிர்பாராத நேர்ச்சிகள் நடந்தால் அதற்கான முழு மருத்துவச் செலவையும் அரசே ஏற்கும். இதற்கென சிறப்பு மருத்துவப் பிரிவும் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 135
impact_mechanism: This promise provides a healthcare safety net for athletes, mitigating the financial risk of career-threatening injuries.

promise_components.component: The government will bear full medical expenses for athletes injured during training or competitions.
promise_components.analysis: The number of athletes, injury rates, and associated medical costs are not available in the reference data. The cost to establish and operate a 'special medical unit' is also not available. Therefore, the fiscal cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would involve both capital expenditure for the unit and recurring operational and treatment costs.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural reform that addresses a major risk in an athletic career. By ensuring access to quality medical care without cost, it allows athletes to train and compete with greater security, potentially lengthening careers and improving performance.
coverage_gap_note: This may exclude athletes injured outside of officially sanctioned training or competitions.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will completely stop the sale of alcohol and implement total prohibition.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முற்றிலுமாகத் தடுத்து நிறுத்தி முழுமையான மது விலக்கை அமல்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 137
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve public health and reduce social problems by eliminating the legal sale of alcohol.

promise_components.component: Completely stop the sale of alcohol and implement total prohibition.
promise_components.analysis: This is a revenue-side policy, not an expenditure. The reference data does not include state revenue from alcohol sales (TASMAC), so the significant revenue loss cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate revenue loss. This would result in the loss of a major state revenue stream, severely impacting the budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a fundamental policy shift that attempts to address the root cause of alcohol-related harm by eliminating legal supply. However, its success is contingent on managing massive fiscal losses and preventing the rise of a dangerous illicit liquor market.
coverage_gap_note: This policy risks creating a large, unregulated black market for illicit and potentially dangerous alcohol.

promise_text_en: Upon coming to power, the first act of the Naam Tamilar government will be to phase out and shut down all liquor shops within one year.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அதிகாரத்திற்கு வந்ததும் முதல் வேலையாக மதுக்கடைகளைப் படிப்படியாக ஓராண்டுக்குள்ளாக நிறுத்திவிடும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 139
impact_mechanism: This promise provides a specific timeline for implementing a total prohibition policy.

promise_components.component: Phase out and shut down all liquor shops within one year.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural component of implementing total prohibition. The reference data does not include state revenue from alcohol sales, so the fiscal impact of the phased shutdown cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate revenue loss. This details the timeline for the revenue loss associated with prohibition.
sustainability_reasoning: As a component of total prohibition, this is a structural change. The one-year timeline creates a rapid and severe fiscal shock for the state, making implementation challenging without alternative revenue sources.
coverage_gap_note: This policy risks creating a large, unregulated black market for illicit and potentially dangerous alcohol.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will completely ban tobacco and enact strict laws against those who sell it illegally.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு புகையிலையை முற்றிலுமாகத் தடை செய்வதுடன் சட்டத்திற்குப் புறம்பாக புகையிலை விற்பனை செய்பவர்களுக்கெதிராகக் கடுமையான சட்டங்களை உருவாக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 139
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve public health by eliminating the legal sale and use of tobacco products.

promise_components.component: Completely ban tobacco and enact strict laws against illegal sellers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a revenue-side policy. The reference data does not include state tax revenue from tobacco products, so the resulting revenue loss cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate revenue loss. This would result in the loss of a significant state revenue stream.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy attempts to address the root cause of tobacco-related diseases by eliminating legal supply. Like alcohol prohibition, its effectiveness is challenged by the difficulty of enforcement and the likely emergence of a large black market.
coverage_gap_note: This policy risks creating a large, unregulated black market for tobacco products.

promise_text_en: Rehabilitation centers will be established for those addicted to alcohol, providing counseling and training to help them recover and lead dignified lives.
promise_text_ta: குடிப்பழக்கத்திற்கு அடிமையாகி விட்டவர்களின் எதிர்கால நன்மையைக் கருத்தில் கொண்டு அவர்களுக்கான மறுவாழ்வு மையம் நிறுவுவதுடன் அவர்கள் குடிப்பழக்கத்திலிருந்து மீண்டு பெருமைமிக்க வாழ்வு வாழ்வதற்கான மன வள அறிவுரைகளையும் பயிற்சிகளையும் அளிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 139
impact_mechanism: This promise creates a support system to help individuals recover from alcohol addiction through medical and social intervention.

promise_components.component: Establish rehabilitation centers for those addicted to alcohol, providing counseling and training.
promise_components.analysis: The number of individuals requiring rehabilitation and the cost to build and operate such centers (including staffing with trained professionals) are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the fiscal cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would require significant capital and recurring expenditure for infrastructure and specialized personnel.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the health issue of addiction, a root cause of many social and economic problems for individuals and families. It provides a necessary public health service, especially if a prohibition policy is enacted, but is expensive and complex to scale effectively.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes individuals with addictions to substances other than alcohol.

promise_text_en: Female foeticide will be completely eradicated. The law banning sex determination via prenatal scans will be strictly enforced. Severe punishment will be given to hospitals and parents who violate this law.
promise_text_ta: பெண் கருக்கொலை முற்றிலும் ஒழிக்கப்படும். கருவில் ஊடுநோக்கி (Scan) மூலம் பாலின அறிவிப்புத் தடைச் சட்டம் முழுவீச்சாக நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும். இச்சட்டத்தை மீறும் மருத்துவமனைகளுக்கும், பெற்றோர்களுக்கும் கடும் தண்டனை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 141
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to prevent gender-biased sex selection by increasing the legal and punitive consequences for violators.

promise_components.component: Strictly enforce the law banning sex determination and impose severe punishment on violators.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise of stricter enforcement of an existing law (PCPNDT Act). The costs are administrative and judicial, which cannot be quantified from the reference data but would likely be absorbed into existing departmental budgets.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs are for enforcement and prosecution, likely representing a small increase in existing law enforcement budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: Strict enforcement of the law is a structural measure to combat female foeticide. However, the practice is driven by deep-seated social norms of son preference, making it very difficult to eradicate through punitive measures alone.
coverage_gap_note: This does not directly address the underlying societal preference for male children that drives the demand for illegal sex determination.

promise_text_en: Awareness campaigns will be conducted regarding the primacy of women in society.
promise_text_ta: சமூகத்தில் பெண்களின் முதன்மைத்தன்மை குறித்தும் விழிப்புணர்வுப் பரப்புரைகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 141
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to shift societal attitudes towards women through a public information campaign.

promise_components.component: Conduct awareness campaigns regarding the primacy of women in society.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of a government awareness campaign is not available in the reference data. Costs vary widely based on media channels and duration. Therefore, the fiscal cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the scale and media mix of the campaign.
sustainability_reasoning: An awareness campaign addresses a symptom (negative attitudes) but does not alter the structural conditions of gender inequality, such as economic disparity or safety concerns. Without accompanying material changes, its impact is likely to be minimal and short-lived.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will implement strict laws against the evils of compulsory dowry. Giving and receiving compulsory dowry is illegal. Those involved in this act will be denied government jobs and any other assistance or rights.
promise_text_ta: கட்டாயச் சீர் கொடுமைகளுக்கு எதிராக நாம் தமிழர் அரசு கடுமையானச் சட்டங்களை நடைமுறைப்படுத்தும். கட்டாயச் சீர் கொடுப்பதும், வாங்குவதும் சட்டத்திற்குப் புறம்பானது. இச்செயலில் ஈடுபடுபவர்களுக்கு அரசு வேலை உட்பட எந்த உதவிகளும், உரிமைகளும் வழங்கப்படமாட்டாது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 141
impact_mechanism: Deters the practice of dowry by linking involvement to the loss of government employment and other state-provided benefits.

promise_components.component: Implement strict laws against compulsory dowry.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and administrative change. The Dowry Prohibition Act, 1961 already makes giving and taking dowry illegal. The promise suggests stricter enforcement or new penalties.

promise_components.component: Those involved in giving or receiving compulsory dowry will be denied government jobs and other assistance or rights.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative penalty. Implementation would require a robust and legally defensible process to prove an individual's involvement in a dowry transaction, which is historically difficult.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a change to legal and administrative rules. Costs would be indirect, related to enforcement and potential legal challenges.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise attempts to create a strong, lasting disincentive against a deeply entrenched social norm. However, its success is entirely dependent on the state's ability to enforce it, a significant challenge for existing anti-dowry laws.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address the underlying socio-economic pressures and patriarchal attitudes that perpetuate the practice of dowry.

promise_text_en: Laws against sexual offenses will be strengthened, and such crimes will be completely stopped. The death penalty will be implemented for those who commit rape.
promise_text_ta: பாலியல் குற்றங்கள் ஆகியவற்றுக்கெதிரான சட்டங்கள் கடுமையாக்கப்பட்டு, இத்தகைய குற்றங்கள் முற்றிலுமாக தடுத்து நிறுத்தப்படும். பாலியல் வன்புணர்வில் ஈடுபடும் குற்றவாளிகளுக்கு மரண தண்டனை நிறைவேற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Aims to deter sexual offenses through the threat of harsher legal penalties, including capital punishment.

promise_components.component: Laws against sexual offenses will be strengthened.
promise_components.analysis: This is a vague commitment to legal reform. The specific nature of the strengthening is not defined.

promise_components.component: The death penalty will be implemented for those who commit rape.
promise_components.analysis: A state government cannot unilaterally mandate the death penalty. Sentencing is a judicial function, guided by Supreme Court precedents ('rarest of rare' cases), and criminal law is on the concurrent list, with the Indian Penal Code being a central act.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a proposed change to criminal law.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise focuses on punitive measures rather than prevention. The state's limited constitutional power to unilaterally mandate capital punishment makes this more of a political statement on being 'tough on crime' than a deliverable policy.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not address prevention, improving police investigation, judicial speed, or victim support systems.

promise_text_en: In educational institutions, special education on sexual awareness, health concepts, self-reliant lifestyle, self-defense arts, and life skills will be taught by experts.
promise_text_ta: கல்விக்கூடங்களில் பாலியல் விழிப்புணர்வு, உடல்நல கருத்துரைகள், தற்சார்பு வாழ்க்கை முறை, தற்காப்புக் கலைகள், வாழ்க்கைக் கல்வி ஆகியவை சிறந்த வல்லுநர்களைக் கொண்டு சிறப்புக் கல்வியாகக் கற்றுத்தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Aims to equip students with critical life skills and awareness by integrating new subjects into the formal education curriculum.

promise_components.component: Special education on sexual awareness, health, self-reliance, self-defense, and life skills will be taught by experts in educational institutions.
promise_components.analysis: This requires curriculum development and the hiring or training of 'experts' for educational institutions. Assuming this covers all ~53,000 government schools, the cost would depend on the number and salary of these experts. Cost cannot be calculated as salary data is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is dependent on the number of 'experts' to be hired and their remuneration, for which data is unavailable. 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.
sustainability_reasoning: Integrating these subjects into the school curriculum is a long-term investment in human capital. It addresses root causes of vulnerability and poor health by equipping the next generation with essential knowledge and skills from a young age.
coverage_gap_note: Implementation quality may vary, potentially creating a gap in the effectiveness of the education between urban and rural schools.

promise_text_en: 50% of job opportunities in all departments of the Tamil Nadu government will be reserved for women.
promise_text_ta: தமிழக அரசின் அனைத்துத் துறைகளிலும் பெண்களுக்குச் சரிபாதி வேலை வாய்ப்புகள் அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Directly increases women's representation in the public sector workforce by mandating a 50% reservation in recruitment.

promise_components.component: 50% of job opportunities in all departments of the Tamil Nadu government will be reserved for women.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change affecting government recruitment rules. Tamil Nadu already has a 30% reservation for women, so this would be an increase. This can be implemented via a government order.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. The total government salary expenditure does not change, only the gender composition of new employees.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy permanently alters the structure of public employment to enforce gender parity. It creates a durable pathway for women's economic empowerment and increases their participation in governance.
coverage_gap_note: The policy is limited to government jobs and does not affect the private sector, which constitutes the majority of the job market.

promise_text_en: Equal opportunities will be provided for women in the sports sector.
promise_text_ta: விளையாட்டுத் துறையில் பெண்களுக்கு சமவாய்ப்பு அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Aims to promote female participation in athletics by ensuring equal access to opportunities within the sports sector.

promise_components.component: Equal opportunities will be provided for women in the sports sector.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of principle. 'Equal opportunities' is not defined and could refer to funding, facilities, or coaching. Without specific, measurable actions, its impact cannot be assessed.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague to determine any financial commitment.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise lacks any specific, measurable, or time-bound commitments. While the sentiment is positive, it functions as a statement of principle rather than a concrete policy proposal, making its material impact uncertain.
coverage_gap_note: The lack of specific actions, targets, or funding commitments makes the promise's impact entirely dependent on future, unstated policies.

promise_text_en: Opportunities will be created for women in all fields including police, navy, special forces, aviation, software/hardware development, and the judiciary to ensure their empowerment.
promise_text_ta: காவல்படை, கடற்படை, சிறப்புக் காவல், வானூர்திப் போக்குவரத்து, மென்பொருள் / வன்பொருள் உருவாக்கம், நீதித்துறை என அனைத்திலும் வாய்ப்புகளை ஏற்படுத்தி, பெண்களின் பேராளுமை உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Aims to break gender stereotypes in employment by creating pathways for women into traditionally male-dominated fields.

promise_components.component: Opportunities will be created for women in all fields including police, navy, special forces, aviation, software/hardware development, and the judiciary.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad statement of intent. The state government has direct control over state police recruitment and some judicial appointments, but no control over central forces (navy, special forces) or the private sector (aviation, IT). The mechanism for 'creating opportunities' is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague and covers sectors outside the state government's direct financial or administrative control.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise lists multiple sectors, including several outside the state's jurisdiction, without specifying how opportunities will be created. This suggests it is more of an aspirational statement than a practical and deliverable program.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is silent on the specific mechanisms to be used, especially for sectors not controlled by the state government.

promise_text_en: Employment schemes will be created in the names of heroic Tamil women. For women, working hours will be reduced to six hours to help them care for their children and family. Provisions will also be made for them to work from home via computer.
promise_text_ta: தமிழினத்தின் வீர மங்கையர்கள் பெயரில் வேலைவாய்ப்புத் திட்டங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும். மேலும் பெண்களுக்கு அவர்களின் குழந்தைகள் மற்றும் குடும்பத்தைக் கவனிக்க, வேலை நேரம் ஆறு மணி நேரமாகக் குறைக்கப்படும். வீட்டிலிருந்தபடி கணினி வழியே பணிபுரியவும் வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Attempts to ease the 'double burden' on working women by reducing statutory working hours and promoting flexible work arrangements.

promise_components.component: Employment schemes will be created in the names of heroic Tamil women.
promise_components.analysis: This is a vague proposal with no details on the budget, scale, or nature of the employment to be created.

promise_components.component: For women, working hours will be reduced to six hours.
promise_components.analysis: This is a radical change to labor law. The state can legislate this for establishments under its purview, but it could have significant economic consequences, potentially affecting women's pay or employability.

promise_components.component: Provisions will be made for them to work from home via computer.
promise_components.analysis: The government can encourage this, but cannot mandate it for all jobs, particularly in the private sector.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of new employment schemes is not specified, and the massive economic impact of a mandatory 6-hour workday for women cannot be calculated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Reducing work hours addresses the symptom of time poverty faced by women but doesn't fix the root causes, such as lack of affordable childcare or unequal division of domestic labor. It could have unintended negative consequences on women's employment.
coverage_gap_note: Mandating shorter hours for women could inadvertently make them less attractive to hire, potentially reducing their overall employment opportunities.

promise_text_en: To ensure women can work without fear in government and private institutions, laws against sexual harassment will be strengthened. The data of women who file complaints will be kept confidential, and swift action will ensure their safety at the workplace.
promise_text_ta: அரசு மற்றும் தனியார் நிறுவனங்களில் பணிக்குச் செல்லும் பெண்களுக்குப் பணியிடத்தில் எந்த அச்சமுமின்றி வேலை செய்ய ஏதுவாக, பாலியல் வன்கொடுமைத் தடைச்சட்டங்கள் கடுமையாக்கப்படும். குற்ற முறையீடு அளிக்கும் பெண்களின் தரவுகள் கமுக்கமாக வைக்கப்படும். உரிய நடவடிக்கைகளை விரைவாக எடுப்பதன் மூலம் பணியிடத்தில் அவர்களின் பாதுகாப்பு உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Improves workplace safety by strengthening the legal and procedural framework for addressing sexual harassment.

promise_components.component: Laws against sexual harassment will be strengthened in government and private institutions.
promise_components.analysis: This involves amending existing laws (e.g., PoSH Act, 2013) or improving enforcement mechanisms. This is primarily a legal and administrative change.

promise_components.component: The data of women who file complaints will be kept confidential, and swift action will ensure their safety.
promise_components.analysis: This focuses on improving the process within existing structures like Internal Complaints Committees (ICCs) to build trust and encourage reporting.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. Costs are related to administrative and enforcement efforts, not direct expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: By improving the legal framework and enforcement process, the promise targets the systemic problem of workplace harassment. Creating a safer, more accountable work environment is a structural improvement that enables greater female labor force participation.
coverage_gap_note: Effectiveness hinges on the state's capacity to monitor thousands of individual employers and ensure compliance.

promise_text_en: Our government will ensure mandatory surveillance cameras in women's workplaces. Additionally, a wearable safety device will be provided, designed to send emergency alerts to family and police during times of distress.
promise_text_ta: பெண்களின் பணியிடங்களில் கட்டாயமாகக் கண்காணிப்புக் கருவிகள் இருப்பதை நமது அரசு உறுதி செய்யும். மேலும், அவர்கள் கைகளில் அணியக்கூடிய வகையில் பாதுகாப்புக் கருவி ஒன்று வழங்கப்படும். இடர் ஏற்படும் நேரங்களில் அந்தக் கருவியின் மூலம் குடும்பத்தினருக்கும், காவல்துறையினருக்கும் நெருக்கடிக்கால எச்சரிக்கை அனுப்பும்படி அது வடிவமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Aims to enhance women's safety through mandatory workplace surveillance and a government-provided personal emergency alert device.

promise_components.component: Ensure mandatory surveillance cameras in women's workplaces.
promise_components.analysis: This mandates a cost for employers and raises significant privacy concerns. The government's role would be enforcement.

promise_components.component: A wearable safety device will be provided, designed to send emergency alerts to family and police.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'provided' implies government funding. The target group is not specified. If provided to all ~3.95 crore women, the cost would be enormous. The cost of the device and the required backend monitoring infrastructure is unknown. 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of providing a wearable device to millions of women is unknown but would likely be extremely high, running into thousands of crores, plus recurring costs for monitoring infrastructure.
sustainability_reasoning: This approach is reactive, focusing on managing danger rather than preventing it. Surveillance and panic buttons are technological tools that address the symptoms of an unsafe environment, not the societal attitudes or conditions that create it.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is unclear on who is eligible for the device and raises major privacy concerns regarding both surveillance cameras and personal tracking devices.

promise_text_en: The denigration of women's rights in the media will be completely stopped through appropriate laws. The Naan Tamilar government considers the portrayal of women in a derogatory manner in films and television programs as a feminist disgrace. Strict legal measures will be taken to prevent this.
promise_text_ta: ஊடகங்களில் பெண்களின் உரிமைகளை இழிவுபடுத்துவது தகுந்த சட்டங்களின் மூலம் அறவே தடுக்கப்படும். திரைப்படங்களிலும், தொலைக்காட்சி நிகழ்ச்சிகளிலும் பெண்களை இழிவுபடுத்தும் போக்கை பெண்ணிய இழிவாக நாம் தமிழர் அரசு கருதுகிறது. கடும் சட்டங்கள் மூலம் இவற்றைத் தடுப்பதற்கான நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 143
impact_mechanism: Aims to influence societal attitudes towards women by legally regulating their portrayal in film and television.

promise_components.component: The denigration of women's rights in the media will be completely stopped through appropriate laws.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes state-level content regulation. This is legally complex as it intersects with freedom of speech (Article 19) and the role of the Central Board of Film Certification (CBFC), a central body.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a proposed legal and regulatory change.
sustainability_reasoning: While targeting a root cause (cultural representation), the proposed mechanism of state-level censorship is constitutionally and legally fraught. It is likely to be challenged and difficult to implement, making it more of a political statement than a viable policy.
coverage_gap_note: The promise risks being challenged as an infringement on freedom of speech and an overreach of state power into a domain largely governed by central bodies.

promise_text_en: All loans obtained by Women's Self-Help Groups will be waived.
promise_text_ta: மகளிர் தன்னுதவிக் குழுக்கள் பெற்றிருக்கின்ற அனைத்துக் கடன்களும் தள்ளுபடி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 145
impact_mechanism: This provides immediate debt relief to women in Self-Help Groups by eliminating their outstanding loan balances, freeing up household income.

promise_components.component: Waive all loans for Women's Self-Help Groups.
promise_components.analysis: There are ~4.7 lakh SHGs with ~63 lakh women members. The total outstanding loan amount is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total outstanding loan amount for 4.7 lakh SHGs is not provided in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a one-time debt waiver that provides immediate relief from a financial burden. However, it does not address the underlying economic conditions that led to the debt, nor does it create a sustainable path to higher income.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes women who are not part of SHGs, as well as the future credit needs of the beneficiary groups themselves, which may be impacted by the waiver.

promise_text_en: In the agro-based industries established by the Naan Tamilar government, employment opportunities will be provided to women from self-help groups based on their educational qualifications, or opportunities for work-from-home will be created.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு கட்டமைக்கும் வேளாண் பண்ணை சார்ந்த தொழிற் சாலைகளில் அவரவர் கல்வித் தகுதிக்கேற்ற வேலைவாய்ப்புகள் வழங்கப்படும் அல்லது வீட்டிலிருந்தபடியே வேலைகளைச் செய்யவும் வாய்ப்பு ஏற்படுத்தித் தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 145
impact_mechanism: This aims to create formal employment pathways for women in SHGs by linking their existing networks to new state-created industrial and remote work opportunities.

promise_components.component: Provide employment in new state-established agro-based industries to women from SHGs.
promise_components.analysis: This targets ~63 lakh women members of SHGs. The number of jobs to be created and the cost of establishing new industries are not specified.

promise_components.component: Create work-from-home opportunities for SHG women.
promise_components.analysis: This targets the same ~63 lakh SHG members. The nature, scale, and cost of these opportunities are not defined.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise is contingent on establishing new industries, the cost and scale of which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to create sustainable employment, which is a structural solution to economic precarity. Its success, however, is entirely contingent on the large-scale, successful establishment of new state-run industries.
coverage_gap_note: The promise excludes women who are not members of SHGs and may be limited to those with specific educational qualifications.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will ensure training and social acceptance for transgender men and women to live with dignity and excel in all fields. Government jobs matching their education, hostels, educational and vocational training, and employment training centers will be established.
promise_text_ta: திருநங்கைகளும், திருநம்பிகளும் தன்மானத்துடனும், சமுதாயத்தில் இயல்பாக வாழவும், எல்லாத் துறைகளிலும் பேராளுமை பெறவும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு பயிற்சி மற்றும் சமூக ஏற்பளிப்பை உறுதி செய்யும். கல்விக்கேற்ற அரசு வேலைகள் வழங்கப்படும். தங்கும் விடுதிகள், கல்வி மற்றும் தொழிற்கல்வி, வேலைவாய்ப்புப் பயிற்சி மையங்கள் அமைத்துக் கொடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 145
impact_mechanism: This seeks to improve the socio-economic status of transgender individuals through state-led affirmative action in employment and the creation of dedicated social infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Provide training, government jobs, hostels, and training centers for transgender men and women.
promise_components.analysis: The number of transgender people in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data. The scale of the infrastructure (hostels, centers) and the number of jobs are not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The beneficiary population size and the scale of the proposed infrastructure and programs are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: By providing education, training, jobs, and housing, this promise attempts to build a permanent support structure. This enables transgender individuals to achieve economic independence and social integration, addressing root causes of marginalization.

promise_text_en: Low-interest loans will be provided from the Tamil National Bank for transgender individuals to start businesses.
promise_text_ta: அவர்கள் தொழில் தொடங்க தமிழ்த்தேசிய வைப்பகத்தில் இருந்து குறைந்த வட்டியில் கடன் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 145
impact_mechanism: This facilitates entrepreneurship within the transgender community by providing access to affordable capital through a proposed state-run bank.

promise_components.component: Provide low-interest loans from a new 'Tamil National Bank' for transgender individuals to start businesses.
promise_components.analysis: This requires establishing a new bank. The number of potential beneficiaries (transgender population) is not in the reference data. The loan amounts and interest subsidy are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on establishing a new bank, which is a major undertaking, and the size of the loan portfolio, neither of which are specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Access to affordable credit is a fundamental enabler of entrepreneurship. This policy helps create independent, long-term income sources, addressing a root cause of economic marginalization.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes transgender individuals who do not wish to or are unable to become entrepreneurs.

promise_text_en: The government will provide free medical assistance, mental health counseling, and gender-affirming surgeries for transgender men and women.
promise_text_ta: திருநங்கைகள், திருநம்பிகளுக்கான மருத்துவ உதவிகள், மனவள அறிவுரைகள், மாற்றுப் பாலின அறுவை மருத்துவம் ஆகியவற்றை அரசே கட்டணமின்றி வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 145
impact_mechanism: This removes financial barriers to essential healthcare, including specialized gender-affirming procedures, for transgender individuals by making them free of cost.

promise_components.component: Provide free medical assistance, mental health counseling, and gender-affirming surgeries for transgender people.
promise_components.analysis: The size of the transgender population is not in the reference data. The unit costs for these specialized medical services are also not available, so a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The size of the beneficiary population and the unit costs for the specified medical services are not available.
sustainability_reasoning: Access to healthcare, including gender-affirming care, is a foundational need. By making it free, the state removes a major life obstacle and enables individuals to live with dignity, which is a structural improvement in their condition.

promise_text_en: The government will provide protection and ensure the livelihood of transgender individuals abandoned by their families. Strict legal action will be taken against families who abandon them.
promise_text_ta: குடும்பத்தினரால் கைவிடப்பட்ட திருநங்கைகள், திருநம்பிகளுக்கு அரசே பாதுகாப்பு வழங்கி அவர்களின் வாழ்வாதாரத்தை உறுதி செய்யும். புறக்கணிக்கும் குடும்பத்தினர் மீது கடும் சட்ட நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 145
impact_mechanism: This provides a social safety net and legal recourse for transgender individuals who face family abandonment, aiming to ensure their immediate welfare and deter future abandonment.

promise_components.component: Provide protection and ensure livelihood for transgender individuals abandoned by families.
promise_components.analysis: This implies state-run shelters and livelihood support. The number of beneficiaries is not in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Take strict legal action against families who abandon them.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative/enforcement measure with indirect administrative costs, not a direct expenditure program.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of individuals requiring shelter and livelihood support is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: While providing protection is a crucial emergency response, the promise reacts to the problem of abandonment rather than preventing it. The legal threat does not fix the underlying social stigma that causes family rejection.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not address the root cause of family rejection, which is societal transphobia.

promise_text_en: Begging and sex work among transgender individuals will be banned, and the Naan Tamilar government will ensure they lead a dignified life.
promise_text_ta: திருநங்கைகள் பிச்சையெடுப்பது, பாலியல் தொழிலில் ஈடுபடுவது ஆகியவை தடை செய்யப்பட்டு மதிப்புமிக்க வாழ்வினை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 145
impact_mechanism: This aims to eliminate specific forms of precarious work within the transgender community through a legal ban, combined with a commitment to provide dignified alternatives.

promise_components.component: Ban begging and sex work among transgender individuals.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative and enforcement action. Its success is entirely dependent on the provision of viable alternative livelihoods.

promise_components.component: Ensure they lead a dignified life.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad goal linked to other promises of jobs and training. Without those alternatives being available first, a ban would be punitive.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct cost is for enforcement. The primary cost is the funding for alternative livelihood programs mentioned in other promises, which is uncosted. The ban itself is not a direct spending item.
sustainability_reasoning: Banning survival strategies without first establishing and scaling up viable economic alternatives is not a sustainable solution. It addresses the visibility of the problem, not the problem itself, and risks being purely punitive.
coverage_gap_note: Risks penalizing individuals for their poverty if alternative livelihoods are not immediately and universally available to them.

promise_text_en: A separate ministry and a dedicated minister will be established for persons with disabilities. Furthermore, 5% of all local body positions in Tamil Nadu will be reserved for them.
promise_text_ta: மாற்றுத்திறனாளிகளுக்கென்று தனி அமைச்சகம் மற்றும் தனி அமைச்சர் உருவாக்கப்படும். மேலும் தமிழகத்தின் அனைத்து உள்ளாட்சிப் பதவிகளுக்கான இடப்பங்கீட்டில் 5% மாற்றுத்திறனாளிகளுக்காக ஒதுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 147
impact_mechanism: This aims to increase the political representation and administrative focus for persons with disabilities through a dedicated ministry and reserved seats in local government.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate ministry and a dedicated minister for persons with disabilities.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative restructuring with minor costs for staff and operations.

promise_components.component: Reserve 5% of all local body positions for them.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative change to electoral laws with no direct fiscal cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of a new ministry is a minor administrative expense, negligible in the context of the state budget. The reservation has no direct fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: A dedicated ministry ensures continuous policy focus and budget allocation. Political reservation in local bodies gives the community a direct voice in grassroots governance. Both are lasting structural changes.

promise_text_en: A commission will be established to scientifically identify and ensure the full implementation of the 4% reservation for persons with disabilities in Tamil Nadu government jobs, as mandated by the Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016.
promise_text_ta: மாற்றுத்திறனாளிகள் உரிமைச்சட்டம் 2016-ல் வழங்கப்பட்டுள்ள 4% இடப்பங்கீட்டை முழுமையாக நடைமுறைப்படுத்தும் வண்ணம் தமிழ்நாட்டு அரசின் கீழுள்ளப் பணியிடங்களை முழுமையாகவும், அறிவியல் நிலையிலும், ஆய்வு செய்து கண்டறியும் ஆணையம் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 147
impact_mechanism: This creates a dedicated oversight body to monitor and enforce existing job reservation quotas for persons with disabilities in state government employment.

promise_components.component: Establish a commission to ensure implementation of the 4% reservation for persons with disabilities in government jobs.
promise_components.analysis: The Rights of Persons with Disabilities Act, 2016 already mandates this reservation. The promise is to create a specific commission for enforcement, which has a minor administrative cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of establishing and running a commission is a minor administrative expense and is negligible in the overall budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This moves beyond simply having a law to creating a dedicated mechanism for its enforcement. A permanent commission ensures ongoing monitoring and accountability, which is a structural fix for a systemic failure of implementation.
coverage_gap_note: This does not address reservation and accessibility issues in the private sector.

promise_text_en: Public and private buildings will be made accessible for persons with disabilities with facilities like ramps, accessible toilets, elevators, parking, and special handrails on stairs. For new buildings, building permits will be revoked if plans do not include ramps and elevators.
promise_text_ta: பொதுமக்கள் பயன்படுத்தும் அரசு மற்றும் தனியார் கட்டடங்கள் மாற்றுத்திறனாளிகள் பயன்படுத்தும் வகையில், எளிமையாக அணுகத்தக்க வகையில் சாய்வுதளம், கழிவறை, மின்தூக்கி, வாகனம் நிறுத்துமிடம், படிகளில் சிறப்புக் கைப்பிடி போன்ற மற்ற வசதிகள் உருவாக்கப்படும். புதியதாகக் கட்டப்படும் கட்டடங்களில் சாய்வுதளம் மற்றும் மின்தூக்கி அமைப்பதற்கான வரைப்படத்தில் குறிப்பிடவில்லையெனில் கட்டட உரிமம் நீக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 147
impact_mechanism: This aims to enforce universal design principles in the built environment by mandating accessibility features, thereby removing physical barriers for persons with disabilities.

promise_components.component: Make existing public and private buildings accessible with ramps, accessible toilets, elevators, etc.
promise_components.analysis: Retrofitting all existing buildings is a massive undertaking. The number of buildings is unknown and the cost is incalculable from the data provided, but would be extremely high.

promise_components.component: For new buildings, revoke permits if plans do not include ramps and elevators.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory change to building codes. The cost of compliance is borne by the builder, not the state.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost to the state for retrofitting its own public buildings is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate' but would be substantial. The regulatory change for new buildings has minimal fiscal cost to the state.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the physical infrastructure of society, a root cause of exclusion. Mandating accessibility in construction creates a permanent change that enables participation for decades to come.
coverage_gap_note: The promise to retrofit all existing buildings is likely aspirational due to immense cost; a phased approach focusing on key public buildings would be more realistic.
