promise_text_en: A scheme will be created to provide driving licenses (through legal amendments if necessary) and special loan facilities for persons with disabilities to operate hand-controlled taxis and auto-rickshaws for their livelihood.
promise_text_ta: மாற்றுத்திறனாளிகள், மகிழுந்து (Taxi), தானி (Autorickshaw) போன்றவைகளைக் கைகளால் இயக்கி வாழ்வாதாரத்தை ஏற்படுத்திக் கொள்ளும் வண்ணம் முறைப்படி சட்டத்திற்கு உட்பட்டு அல்லது திருத்தப்பட்டு ஓட்டுநர் உரிமம் மற்றும் சிறப்புக் கடன் வசதிக்கான திட்டம் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 147
impact_mechanism: Enables self-employment for persons with disabilities by providing licenses and capital for specialized vehicles.

promise_components.component: Provide driving licenses for hand-controlled taxis and auto-rickshaws for persons with disabilities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and administrative change. The direct fiscal cost is negligible.

promise_components.component: Provide special loan facilities for persons with disabilities to operate these vehicles.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of a loan scheme depends on the number of beneficiaries, loan amounts, and interest subvention rates. The number of eligible persons with disabilities who would apply is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of the loan facility cannot be estimated as the number of beneficiaries and loan details are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise creates a new, sustainable income-generating opportunity for persons with disabilities by removing legal barriers and providing access to capital. It is a structural fix for economic exclusion, enabling self-reliance.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes persons with disabilities whose conditions prevent them from driving, even with modified vehicles.

promise_text_en: Assistance will be provided for severely disabled individuals (including those with intellectual disabilities) to establish community living homes or plots according to their preference.
promise_text_ta: கடுமையாகப் பாதிக்கப்பட்ட மாற்றுத்திறனாளிகள் (மனவளர்ச்சி உட்பட) அவர்களின் விருப்பத்திற்கேற்ப கூட்டாக வாழக்கூடிய (Community Living) வீடுகளோ அல்லது மனைகளோ அமைத்துக் கொள்ள உதவிகள் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 147
impact_mechanism: Provides housing security and supported living environments for severely disabled individuals through direct assistance for homes or plots.

promise_components.component: Provide assistance for severely disabled individuals to establish community living homes or plots.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'severely disabled individuals' requiring this assistance is not available in the reference data. The form and value of 'assistance' (e.g., cash grant, land value, construction cost) are not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of beneficiaries and the cost of assistance per person or home are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating permanent housing solutions tailored to the needs of the severely disabled, this addresses a fundamental need for shelter and supported care. This is a structural intervention for a group often facing homelessness or inadequate institutional care.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not specify if it covers the significant ongoing operational and staffing costs of community homes.

promise_text_en: A separate Disability Management Department will be established in every district headquarter hospital for the disabled, senior citizens, those with rare diseases, and those with non-conventional disabilities. Workshops to create and repair assistive devices for the disabled will be set up in each district.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத் தலைமை மருத்துவமனையில் இயலாமை உடையோர், மூத்தக் குடிமக்கள், அரிதான நோய்களால் பாதிக்கப்பட்டோர், அமைப்புச் சாரா இயலாமை (NON-CONVENTIONAL DISABILITY) உள்ளவர்களுக்கான தனி மருத்துவத்துறை (Disability Management Department) அமைக்கப்படும். மாற்றுத்திறனாளிகளுக்கான உதவிக் கருவிகளை உருவாக்கி, சீராக்கம் செய்வதற்கானப் பணிமனை ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 147
impact_mechanism: Improves access to specialized healthcare and assistive technology for disabled and other vulnerable groups by creating dedicated infrastructure at the district level.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate Disability Management Department in every district headquarter hospital.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts in Tamil Nadu is not provided in the reference data. The capital and recurring costs (staff, equipment) for each new department are also not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

promise_components.component: Set up workshops to create and repair assistive devices in each district.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts is not in the reference data, and the cost to establish and operate each workshop is not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of units (districts) and the cost per unit for both departments and workshops are not available.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise creates permanent, decentralized infrastructure for healthcare and assistive technology. This is a structural improvement to the public health system, addressing a systemic gap in service delivery for disabled and elderly populations.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address the challenge of reaching those in remote rural areas far from district headquarters.

promise_text_en: The single state-run special school for children with intellectual disabilities like Autism will be expanded to one school per district. Similarly, shelters will be created for destitute adults with intellectual disabilities. Early Intervention (E.I.) centers, currently at the district level, will be expanded to the block level with more centers being established.
promise_text_ta: Autism போன்ற பாதிப்புக்குள்ளான அறிவுசார் வளர்ச்சிக்குறைபாடுடைய குழந்தைகளுக்கான, அரசு சிறப்புப் பள்ளி மாநிலத்திற்கே ஒன்றுதான் உள்ளது. இது மாவட்டத்துக்கு ஒரு பள்ளி என்று உருவாக்கப்படும். இதைப்போலவே, வயது வந்த, ஆதரவற்ற, மனவளர்ச்சி குன்றியோருக்குப் காப்பகங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும். அறிவுசார் வளர்ச்சிக் குறைபாடுடைய குழந்தைகளைத் தொடக்க நிலையிலேயே கண்டறிந்து, பயிற்சி கொடுக்க உதவும் ஈ.ஐ. (E.I) நிலையங்கள் மாவட்ட அளவில் உள்ளன. இதனை வட்ட அளவில் கொண்டு வந்து மேலும் பல நிலையங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 147
impact_mechanism: Expands specialized educational and care infrastructure for individuals with intellectual disabilities across their lifespan.

promise_components.component: Expand the state-run special school for children with intellectual disabilities to one school per district.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts is not in the reference data, and the cost to build and staff a new special school is not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

promise_components.component: Create shelters for destitute adults with intellectual disabilities.
promise_components.analysis: The number of potential beneficiaries and the cost per shelter are not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

promise_components.component: Expand Early Intervention (E.I.) centers from the district level to the block level.
promise_components.analysis: The number of blocks in Tamil Nadu is not in the reference data, and the cost per new center is not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise involves significant capital and recurring expenditure, but the number of required units (schools, shelters, centers) and the cost per unit are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This proposes building a comprehensive, permanent infrastructure for education and care for a highly vulnerable population from childhood to adulthood. It is a structural solution to a systemic failure in providing specialized services.
coverage_gap_note: Implementation is heavily dependent on the availability of a large number of highly specialized educators and caregivers, which is a major bottleneck.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will urge the Union government to declare all individuals under the age of 18 as children in all laws, as defined by the United Nations. A separate ministry for the welfare of children and the elderly will be established.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு, ஒன்றிய நாடுகள் அவை (ஐ.நா.) வரையறுத்துள்ள 18 அகவைக்குக் கீழ் உள்ளவர்களை அனைத்துச் சட்டங்களிலும் சிறார்களாக அறிவிக்க ஒன்றிய அரசை வலியுறுத்தும். சிறார் மற்றும் முதியோர் நலனுக்கெனத் தனி அமைச்சகம் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 149
impact_mechanism: Aims to strengthen child and elderly welfare through legal advocacy at the Union level and by creating a dedicated state-level administrative body.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union government to declare all individuals under 18 as children in all laws.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy action directed at the central government. It has no direct fiscal cost to the state.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate ministry for the welfare of children and the elderly.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative restructuring. The cost of establishing and running a new ministry is not specified in the reference data, so the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of a new ministry is not specified, but administrative reorganizations are typically a minor and feasible part of the state's committed expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a new ministry is an administrative change, not a programmatic one. Its impact depends on future budgets and schemes, which are not detailed. The advocacy component has no guaranteed outcome, making this promise primarily a signal of intent.
coverage_gap_note: A new ministry does not guarantee new or better-funded programs for the target groups.

promise_text_en: Child labor will be completely eradicated. With a mandate that children must study, our government will create all necessary opportunities for them to stay in school without interruption.
promise_text_ta: சிறார் வேலைக்குச் செல்வது முற்றாக ஒழிக்கப்படும். உறுதியாகப் படித்தாக வேண்டும் என்ற உத்தரவுடன், தடையின்றித் தங்கிப் படிப்பதற்கான அனைத்து வாய்ப்புகளையும் நமது அரசு ஏற்படுத்தித் தரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 149
impact_mechanism: Aims to eliminate child labor by enforcing school attendance and creating supportive conditions for children to remain in education.

promise_components.component: Completely eradicate child labor.
promise_components.analysis: This is an aspirational goal, not a specific, costable action. It implies stricter enforcement of existing laws.

promise_components.component: Create all necessary opportunities for them to stay in school without interruption.
promise_components.analysis: This is a vague commitment. The cost of 'all necessary opportunities' is undefined and cannot be calculated. Existing schemes like the Mid-day meal scheme already support this goal.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague to quantify. The cost of 'creating all necessary opportunities' is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise states a laudable goal but offers no new, concrete mechanism to achieve it beyond the vague 'create opportunities.' Existing laws and schemes already target this, making this statement primarily political signalling without a clear, new implementation plan.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not specify how it will address the root economic cause of child labor, which is household poverty.

promise_text_en: Mandatory training on child laws, rights, and psychology will be provided to teachers, officials, police personnel, and others across various sectors of society. A law will be enacted to impose severe punishment on those who commit sexual offenses against children.
promise_text_ta: சமூகத்தின் பல்வேறு தளங்களில் உள்ள ஆசிரியர்கள், அதிகாரிகள், காவல் துறையினர் உள்ளிட்ட அனைவருக்கும் சிறார் சட்டங்கள், உரிமைகள், அவர்களின் உளவியல் குறித்துக் கட்டாயப் பயிற்சி அளிக்கப்படும். சிறுவர்கள் மீதான பாலியல் குற்றங்களைச் செய்வோருக்குக் கடுமையான தண்டனை என்ற சட்டம் இயற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 149
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve child protection by increasing awareness among key professionals and strengthening legal deterrents against abuse.

promise_components.component: Provide mandatory training on child laws, rights, and psychology to teachers, officials, and police personnel.
promise_components.analysis: The number of personnel to be trained across all sectors is not available in the reference data. The cost per person for training is also not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

promise_components.component: Enact a law to impose severe punishment on those who commit sexual offenses against children.
promise_components.analysis: Legislative action has minimal direct fiscal cost. The central POCSO Act already provides for severe punishments.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of the large-scale, multi-departmental training program cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Training and punishment are reactive measures that improve the system's response to child abuse. They are necessary for managing the issue and providing justice but do not address the root societal causes that lead to abuse in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: A state law on a subject with a strong existing central law (POCSO) may face legal and jurisdictional challenges.

promise_text_en: The government will pay special attention to and protect the needs and welfare of vulnerable children.
promise_text_ta: பாதிப்புக்குள்ளான குழந்தைகளின் தேவைகள் மற்றும் நலனில் அரசு தனிக்கவனம் செலுத்திப் பேணிக் காக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 149
impact_mechanism: This is a general statement of intent to prioritize the welfare of vulnerable children.

promise_components.component: The government will pay special attention to and protect the needs and welfare of vulnerable children.
promise_components.analysis: This is a non-specific, non-measurable statement of principle. It does not contain a concrete action or program, so no fiscal analysis is possible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. No specific expenditure is promised.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a purely aspirational statement with no concrete policy, program, or funding attached. It signals a political priority but has no material substance or actionable commitment.

promise_text_en: 'Anbuthalir' will be established for the welfare of special needs children, abandoned children, children forced into labor due to poverty, and children of migrant workers. The Naam Tamilar government will support them until they are well-settled in high-paying jobs and will provide government protection and assistance in all areas.
promise_text_ta: சிறப்புக் குழந்தைகள், கைவிடப்பட்டக் குழந்தைகள், மீளா வறுமையில் வாழ்விழந்து வேலைக்குச் செல்லும் சிறார்கள், இடம்பெயரும் தொழிலாளர்களின் குழந்தைகள் ஆகியோரின் நலனுக்காக, ‘அன்புத்தளிர்’ அமைக்கப்படும். இங்கிருந்தபடியே இவர்கள் படித்து உயர் பணிகளில் தங்களைத் தக்க வைத்துக் கொள்ளும் வரை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு துணையாக இருக்கும். சிறார்களுக்கான அனைத்துத் தளங்களிலும் அரசு பாதுகாப்பு உதவிகளை வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 151
impact_mechanism: Provides comprehensive, long-term state support for various categories of vulnerable children, from care and education through to employment.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Anbuthalir' for special needs, abandoned, child laborers, and migrant children, supporting them until they are settled in high-paying jobs.
promise_components.analysis: The number of beneficiaries across these diverse and overlapping categories is not available in the reference data. The cost of providing comprehensive, long-term support (housing, health, education, skilling, job placement) per child until adulthood and employment is not specified. Therefore, the cost is 'data unavailable — cannot calculate'.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scope is vast and beneficiary numbers are unknown, making any estimate impossible. The potential cost is extremely high.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to replace a missing or broken family support structure with a state-guaranteed one, from childhood through to economic independence. This is a deep, structural intervention designed to alter the life trajectories of the most vulnerable children.
coverage_gap_note: The guarantee of 'high-paying jobs' for every individual in the program may be an over-promise and difficult to deliver universally.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government aims to create a state with no abandoned children. Strict action will be taken against parents who abandon their children, and all their government benefits and rights, including family cards and identity cards, will be suspended.
promise_text_ta: கைவிடப்பட்ட குழந்தைகளே இல்லாத நிலையை உருவாக்குவதுதான் நாம் தமிழர் அரசின் நோக்கம். குழந்தைகளைக் கைவிடும் பெற்றோர்கள் மீது கடுமையான நடவடிக்கை எடுப்பதுடன், அவர்களுக்கான குடும்ப அட்டை, அடையாள அட்டை உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்து அரசு உதவிகள் மற்றும் உரிமைகள் நிறுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 151
impact_mechanism: Aims to deter child abandonment through punitive measures against parents, including the suspension of government benefits.

promise_components.component: Take strict action against parents who abandon their children, including suspending their government benefits and rights (family cards, identity cards).
promise_components.analysis: This is a punitive policy with no direct fiscal cost to the state. The number of parents who might be affected is not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct cost. This is a regulatory and punitive measure.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy punishes the act of abandonment but does not address the root causes, such as extreme poverty, lack of support for raising a child with disabilities, or social stigma. It treats a symptom of deeper socio-economic distress rather than preventing it.
coverage_gap_note: This punitive approach may punish desperate individuals without offering the support needed to care for their child, potentially driving the act underground.

promise_text_en: Counseling centers for children's physical and mental health will be established. Through these, children will be given training for mental fortitude and self-confidence. Medical facilities will be arranged if necessary. Special attention will be given to differently-abled children.
promise_text_ta: சிறுவர்களின் உடல் நலன், மன நலன் குறித்த அறிவுரை மையங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். அதன்மூலம் சிறார்களுக்கு மன உறுதி, தன்னம்பிக்கைப் பயிற்சிகள் அளிக்கப்படும். தேவையெனில் மருத்துவ வசதிகளும் ஏற்பாடு செய்து தரப்படும். மாற்றுத்திறனாளி சிறார்கள் மீது தனிக்கவனம் செலுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 151
impact_mechanism: Improves child well-being by providing access to mental and physical health support, including specialized care for differently-abled children.

promise_components.component: Establish counseling centers for children's physical and mental health.
promise_components.analysis: The number of centers is not specified. If one center is established per government school, that would be ~53,000 centers. The cost to build and staff these centers is not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Provide training for mental fortitude and self-confidence.
promise_components.analysis: The number of children targeted is not specified, but could be all ~89 lakh government school students. The cost of trainers and materials is not in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise lacks specific numbers for centers, staff, or target beneficiaries, making a cost estimation impossible. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative aims to build a permanent support system for children's mental and physical health, addressing a structural gap in the current public health and education systems. It's not a temporary fix but a long-term investment in human capital.
coverage_gap_note: Children in private schools are not explicitly covered.

promise_text_en: Just as it is important to educate children, it is essential to raise them without inferiority complexes, with self-confidence, physical health, and psychological strength. All necessary infrastructure for this will be established in schools.
promise_text_ta: பிள்ளைகளுக்கு அறிவூட்டுவது எவ்வளவு முதன்மையோ, அதைப்போலவே தாழ்வுமனப்பான்மையற்ற, தன்னம்பிக்கையுள்ள, உடல் நலத்தோடும், உளவியல் வலிமையோடும் வளர்த்தெடுப்பதும் இன்றியமையாதது. அதற்கு வேண்டிய அனைத்துக் கட்டமைப்புகளும் பள்ளிகளில் அமைத்துக் கொடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 151
impact_mechanism: Enhances the learning environment by upgrading school infrastructure to support students' holistic development.

promise_components.component: Establish all necessary infrastructure in schools for self-confidence, physical health, and psychological strength.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'all necessary infrastructure' is vague. The cost would depend on the specific infrastructure added to each of the ~53,000 government schools. This data is not available. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The scope of 'all necessary infrastructure' is undefined, making a cost estimation impossible. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Building permanent infrastructure in schools is a structural improvement. It provides a lasting resource for current and future students to support their physical and mental well-being, addressing a foundational need.
coverage_gap_note: Children in private schools would not benefit from these infrastructure upgrades.

promise_text_en: For children with learning disabilities, special classes will be created and training will be provided by expert teachers. Opportunities for this will be created in all schools.
promise_text_ta: கற்றல் குறைபாடு உள்ள குழந்தைகளுக்குத் தனி வகுப்புகளை உருவாக்கி, தேர்ந்த ஆசிரியர்களால் பயிற்சி அளிக்கப்படும். அதற்கான வாய்ப்புகள் அனைத்துப் பள்ளிகளிலும் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 151
impact_mechanism: Improves educational equity by providing targeted support to students with learning disabilities through specialized instruction.

promise_components.component: Create special classes for children with learning disabilities in all schools, with training by expert teachers.
promise_components.analysis: This implies creating classes in ~53,000 government schools and hiring or training a significant number of special education teachers. The number of children with learning disabilities and the cost of expert teachers are not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The number of students with learning disabilities and the cost of hiring/training expert teachers are unknown. A cost estimation is not possible. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating permanent special education roles and classes within the school system is a structural change. It addresses the root cause of educational inequality for students with learning disabilities by providing tailored, ongoing support.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to government schools, and its effectiveness depends on accurately identifying all children with learning disabilities.

promise_text_en: Separate libraries will be established in all schools, and arrangements will be made to screen intellectual documentaries once a month.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துப் பள்ளிகளிலும் தனி நூலகங்கள் அமைக்கவும், மாதம் ஒரு முறை அறிவுசார் ஆவணப்படங்கள் திரையிடவும் ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 151
impact_mechanism: Enhances the educational environment by providing access to books and curated media content within schools.

promise_components.component: Establish separate libraries in all schools.
promise_components.analysis: This applies to ~53,000 government schools. The cost of building/designating a room, stocking it with books, and potentially hiring a librarian for each school is not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Arrange to screen intellectual documentaries once a month.
promise_components.analysis: This requires projection equipment and content licensing for ~53,000 schools. The cost for this is not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of building/stocking ~53,000 libraries and purchasing screening equipment and content licenses is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Libraries are permanent infrastructure that supports learning for years. This is a structural investment in the educational quality of schools, not a temporary benefit.
coverage_gap_note: Does not cover students in private schools. The quality of the library collection and its management will determine the actual benefit.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will cherish and protect the elderly. New schemes will be introduced for their welfare, and all their needs will be met by the government. A separate ministry for the welfare of children and the elderly will be established.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முதியோர்களைப் போற்றிப் பாதுகாக்கும். அவர்களின் நலன் காக்கப் புதியத் திட்டங்கள் கொண்டு வரப்பட்டு அவர்களுக்கான அனைத்துத் தேவைகளையும் அரசே செய்து கொடுக்கும். சிறார் மற்றும் முதியோர் நலனுக்கெனத் தனி அமைச்சகம் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 153
impact_mechanism: Centralizes and elevates the focus on welfare for children and the elderly by creating a dedicated ministry and promising new support schemes.

promise_components.component: Introduce new welfare schemes for the elderly, meeting all their needs.
promise_components.analysis: 'New schemes' and 'all their needs' are undefined. The number of elderly people is not in the reference data. The cost is incalculable. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate ministry for the welfare of children and the elderly.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative change. The cost involves salaries for a minister and staff, plus office expenses. The exact cost is not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of 'new schemes' is completely undefined. The administrative cost of a new ministry is relatively small but not specified. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: The primary actionable item is creating a ministry, which is a change in government structure, not a direct benefit to citizens. The promise of 'new schemes' is too vague to be considered structural or symptomatic; it's a statement of intent without a mechanism.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is too vague to identify coverage gaps.

promise_text_en: Individuals who have completed 65 years of age will be provided with a lifetime travel pass to travel to their desired destinations within Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: 65 அகவை நிரம்பியவர்கள், தமிழ்நாட்டிற்குள் விருப்பப்பட்ட இடங்களுக்குச் சென்று வர, ஆயுட்கால பயண அட்டை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 153
impact_mechanism: Increases mobility and reduces cost of living for senior citizens by providing free travel on all state-run buses.

promise_components.component: Provide a lifetime travel pass for individuals aged 65+ to travel on state-run buses within Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: The number of individuals aged 65+ is not available in the reference data. The cost would depend on how many elderly people use this service and how many trips they take. Without the number of beneficiaries, a cost cannot be calculated. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The number of eligible beneficiaries (age 65+) is not in the reference data, so the potential cost cannot be estimated. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a recurring subsidy that eases the financial burden of travel for the elderly. While beneficial, it doesn't alter their underlying economic condition or income sources; it treats a symptom of financial hardship.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is limited to travel on the ~21,000 state-run buses and does not cover private buses or other modes of transport.

promise_text_en: Special medical schemes will be introduced for the elderly. Upon receiving a phone call, a medical team will visit their homes to provide medicines and appropriate advice. All advanced medical treatments will be provided at government hospitals.
promise_text_ta: முதியோர் மருத்துவத்திற்காகச் சிறப்புத் திட்டங்கள் கொண்டு வரப்படும். தொலைபேசியில் தகவல் கொடுத்தால் மருத்துவக் குழு வீடு தேடி வந்து மருந்து, மாத்திரை கொடுத்துத் தகுந்த அறிவுரைகளை வழங்கும். அரசு மருத்துவமனையில் உயர் மருத்துவம் அனைத்தும் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 153
impact_mechanism: Improves healthcare access for the elderly, especially those with mobility issues, by delivering medical services directly to their homes.

promise_components.component: A medical team will visit homes upon receiving a phone call to provide medicines and advice.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a fleet of vehicles, medical teams, a call center, and a medicine supply chain. The number of elderly people and the cost per visit are not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: All advanced medical treatments will be provided at government hospitals.
promise_components.analysis: This may imply free or subsidized access. The cost depends on the number of elderly requiring such treatments and the cost of those treatments, which is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise requires establishing a new, large-scale mobile healthcare service. The number of potential beneficiaries and the cost per visit/treatment are unknown, making a cost estimate impossible. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative establishes a new system for healthcare delivery (home visits), fundamentally changing how the elderly access primary and urgent care. It's a structural solution to the problem of access, not just a subsidy.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness will depend on the capacity of the service to meet demand, especially in remote rural areas.

promise_text_en: The number of seats for the postgraduate medical course (MD Geriatric Care) will be increased in medical colleges. Specialized doctors for the elderly will be created.
promise_text_ta: மருத்துவக் கல்லூரிகளில் முதியோர்களுக்கான முதுநிலை மருத்துவப் படிப்புக்கு (MD Geriatric Care) இடங்கள் கூடுதலாக ஒதுக்கப்படும். முதியோர்களுக்கான தனிச் சிறப்பு மருத்துவர்கள் உருவாக்கப்படுவர்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 153
impact_mechanism: Addresses the shortage of doctors specializing in elderly care by increasing the training capacity in state medical colleges.

promise_components.component: Increase the number of seats for the postgraduate medical course (MD Geriatric Care) in medical colleges.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision. The number of seats to be added is not specified. The cost to expand faculty and infrastructure is not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of expanding PG medical seats is not specified and cannot be estimated from the given data. However, it is typically managed within departmental budgets and is not a massive new expenditure. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Training more specialists is a fundamental, structural solution. It builds the state's capacity to care for its aging population for decades to come, addressing the problem at its source.
coverage_gap_note: The impact will take several years to materialize as it takes time to train doctors.

promise_text_en: 'Anbucholai' will be established for abandoned elderly people. All facilities, including medical care, will be provided there. Those who wish can do work of their choice; otherwise, they can rest.
promise_text_ta: கைவிடப்பட்ட முதியோர்களுக்காக, ‘அன்புச்சோலை’ அமைக்கப்படும். அங்கு அவர்களுக்கான மருத்துவம் உட்பட அனைத்து வசதிகளும் அளிக்கப்படும். விரும்புபவர்கள் தங்களுக்கு விருப்பமான வேலைகளைச் செய்யலாம்; இல்லையெனில் ஓய்விலேயே இருக்கலாம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 155
impact_mechanism: Provides a social safety net for destitute elderly individuals by establishing residential care homes with all necessary facilities.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Anbucholai' (homes) for abandoned elderly people with all facilities, including medical care.
promise_components.analysis: The number of homes, their capacity, and the number of abandoned elderly people are not specified in the reference data. The cost of construction, staffing, and operations is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The number of homes and the number of beneficiaries are not defined, so a cost estimate is impossible. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: These homes are a crucial safety net, treating the symptom of elderly abandonment. However, they do not address the societal or economic factors that lead to elders being abandoned in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: The promise's impact depends entirely on the number and capacity of the homes built, which is not specified.

promise_text_en: To maintain the physical and mental well-being of the elderly at Anbucholai, wellness programs such as yoga, meditation (Agathavam), music/folk art training, and horticulture training will be organized.
promise_text_ta: அன்புச் சோலையில் முதியோர்களின் உடல் மற்றும் மன நலனைப் பேண ஓகம், அகத்தவம் (தியானம்), இசை / நாட்டுப்புறக் கலைப் பயிற்சி, இயற்கைத் தோட்டக்கலைப் பயிற்சி போன்ற நலவாழ்வு நிகழ்ச்சிகள் ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 155
impact_mechanism: Improves the quality of life for residents of 'Anbucholai' homes by providing activities that support their physical and mental well-being.

promise_components.component: Organize wellness programs like yoga, meditation, music/art training, and horticulture at Anbucholai.
promise_components.analysis: This is an operational component of the 'Anbucholai' promise (Promise 8). The cost would involve hiring instructors and purchasing materials. Since the scale of the Anbucholai homes is unknown, this cost cannot be calculated. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: This is part of the operational cost of the 'Anbucholai' homes from the previous promise. The cost is unquantifiable as the scale of the homes is not defined. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: These programs are designed to make life better for those already in a symptomatic care system (the old age homes). They improve the quality of the treatment but do not address the underlying condition of abandonment.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is entirely dependent on the successful implementation of the 'Anbucholai' homes from the previous promise.

promise_text_en: To pass on the experience of the elderly to children and the younger generation, monthly learning events (storytelling, craft training, sharing life lessons) will be conducted. The government will utilize those who are good storytellers and drama artists, with their consent.
promise_text_ta: முதியோர்களின் பட்டறிவையும் சிறார்களுக்கும், இளைய தலைமுறையினருக்கும் கடத்த வேண்டி, மாதம் ஒருமுறை கற்றல் நிகழ்ச்சிகள் (கதை சொல்லல், கைவினைப் பயிற்சி, வாழ்க்கைப் பாடங்களைப் பகிர்தல்) நடத்தப்படும். நல்ல கதை சொல்லிகளாகவும், நாடகக் கலைஞர்களாகவும் உள்ளவர்களை அவர்களின் விருப்பத்துடன் அரசு பயன்படுத்திக் கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 155
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve inter-generational social cohesion and reduce elderly isolation through structured community events.

promise_components.component: Conduct monthly learning events for children/youth featuring elderly storytellers and artists.
promise_components.analysis: This is a programmatic promise. The cost is dependent on the number of events, venues, and any honorarium paid to artists and storytellers. The reference data does not contain information to estimate these costs.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scale of the program is not defined, so a cost cannot be calculated. It could range from minimal (volunteer-based) to a moderate recurring expense.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the symptom of social isolation among the elderly and a perceived disconnect between generations. It does not address the underlying economic or health issues that are the root causes of hardship for many elderly people.
coverage_gap_note: Participation is voluntary and location-dependent, so it will not reach all elderly or youth.

promise_text_en: A home-like environment, similar to a family structure, will be created for the elderly living in Anbucholai. Gardens, public spaces, and recreation halls will be established. 24-hour caregivers and a health monitoring system will ensure safety.
promise_text_ta: அன்புச் சோலையில் வசிக்கும் முதியோர்களுக்குக் குடும்ப அமைப்பு போன்ற வீட்டுச் சூழல் உருவாக்கப்படும். தோட்டம், பொது இடங்கள், பொழுதுபோக்கு அரங்குகள் அமைக்கப்படும். 24 மணி நேரமும் பேணிக் காக்கும் ஊழியர்கள் மற்றும் உடல்நலக் கண்காணிப்பு அமைப்பு மூலம் பாதுகாப்பும் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 155
impact_mechanism: Seeks to improve the quality of life for residents of specific state-run elderly homes by upgrading infrastructure and services.

promise_components.component: Create a home-like environment in 'Anbucholai' homes with gardens, recreation halls.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure for construction/renovation. The number of 'Anbucholai' homes and their current state is not in the reference data, so cost cannot be estimated.

promise_components.component: Provide 24-hour caregivers and a health monitoring system.
promise_components.analysis: This involves recurring expenditure on salaries and technology. The number of residents, required caregiver-to-resident ratio, and salary levels are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks specifics on the number of homes, residents, or staffing levels, making a cost estimation impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides genuine relief and better living conditions for the residents of these specific homes. However, it only treats the symptom of inadequate elder care for a few, not the societal or economic reasons why institutional care is needed.
coverage_gap_note: This promise only benefits the small number of elderly people residing in these specific 'Anbucholai' homes, not the wider elderly population.

promise_text_en: For the memory and stress-related issues of the elderly, special counseling and medical programs through music, arts, etc., will be introduced.
promise_text_ta: முதியோர்களின் நினைவாற்றல் மற்றும் மன அழுத்த சிக்கல்களுக்காகச் சிறப்பு அறிவுரைகளை மற்றும் இசை, கலைகள் முதலியவற்றின் வழியே மருத்துவத் திட்டங்கள் அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 155
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve mental health and well-being for the elderly by introducing specialized therapeutic programs.

promise_components.component: Introduce special counseling and medical programs for elderly memory and stress issues.
promise_components.analysis: This is a healthcare service promise. The cost depends on the number of beneficiaries, the number of trained therapists required, and the program's intensity. No data is available to estimate these figures.

promise_components.component: Utilize music, arts, etc., as therapeutic methods.
promise_components.analysis: This requires specialized professionals like art and music therapists, who may be in short supply. The cost of hiring or training them is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scale and delivery mechanism of the programs are not defined, so a cost cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise offers therapeutic interventions to manage the symptoms of stress and cognitive decline in the elderly. It does not address the root causes of these issues, such as financial insecurity, loneliness, or lack of accessible primary healthcare.
coverage_gap_note: Access to such specialized programs is often limited to urban areas, potentially leaving out the rural elderly.

promise_text_en: All rights will be denied to those who abandon their parents. In the future, children who abandon their parents will be denied all rights, government benefits, and employment opportunities, including family cards, identity cards, and electricity connections.
promise_text_ta: பெற்றோரைக் கைவிடுவோருக்கு அனைத்து உரிமைகளும் மறுக்கப்படும். இனிவரும் காலத்தில் பெற்றோரைக் கைவிடும் பிள்ளைகளுக்கு குடும்ப அட்டை, அடையாள அட்டை, மின் இணைப்பு உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்து உரிமைகளும், அரசு சலுகைகளும், வேலைவாய்ப்புகளும் மறுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 155
impact_mechanism: Attempts to deter the abandonment of parents through punitive measures that strip non-compliant children of their rights and access to services.

promise_components.component: Children who abandon their parents will be denied all rights, government benefits, and employment opportunities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a punitive legal and administrative measure, not a fiscal one. Its implementation would face significant legal challenges as it likely violates fundamental rights guaranteed by the Constitution. Defining and proving 'abandonment' would require a massive and complex quasi-judicial machinery.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost, but would incur significant administrative and legal expenses to implement and defend in court.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is legally and constitutionally questionable and practically unenforceable on a large scale. It serves as strong political signalling but is not a workable policy to ensure elder welfare; it does not address the complex reasons for family breakdown.
coverage_gap_note: This punitive approach offers no support to elderly individuals whose children are unable, rather than unwilling, to support them.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will change the situation of farmers, who feed the world, from living in poverty.
promise_text_ta: உலகிற்கு உணவிடும் உழவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை வறுமையில் உழலும் நிலையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மாற்றியமைக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 157
impact_mechanism: Expresses a high-level goal to alleviate farmer poverty through unspecified government action.

promise_components.component: Change the situation of farmers from living in poverty.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent, not a specific, measurable policy. It lacks any detail on the mechanism, budget, or target beneficiaries to allow for analysis.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a broad goal, not a specific promise with a cost attached.
sustainability_reasoning: While the goal addresses the root cause of farmer distress (poverty), the promise itself is pure political rhetoric without a concrete, analyzable plan. It is a statement of ambition, not a policy.

promise_text_en: In memory of our great father, Ayya Nammalvar, separate organic farming colleges will be established in every district. Students trained there will be sent by the government for special training to countries that excel in organic farming, such as Bhutan, Australia, and Switzerland.
promise_text_ta: நம் பெரிய தகப்பன் ஐயா நம்மாழ்வார் அவர்களின் நினைவாக இயற்கை வழி வேளாண்மைக்கு என்று தனியாக இயற்கை வேளாண் கல்லூரிகள் ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் உருவாக்கப்படும். அதில் பயிற்சி பெறும் மாணவர்கள் இயற்கை வேளாண்மையில் சிறந்து விளங்கும் Bhutan, Australia, Switzerland போன்ற நாடுகளுக்குச் சென்று சிறப்புப் பயிற்சி பெற அரசு சார்பில் ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 159
impact_mechanism: Aims to build long-term capacity in sustainable agriculture by creating specialized educational institutions and providing international exposure.

promise_components.component: Establish separate organic farming colleges in every district.
promise_components.analysis: Tamil Nadu has 38 districts. The cost to establish 38 new specialized colleges would be extremely high, involving land acquisition, construction, and faculty recruitment. No data is available to estimate this cost.

promise_components.component: Send trained students for special training to countries like Bhutan, Australia, and Switzerland.
promise_components.analysis: The cost for international travel, tuition, and living expenses is not specified, nor is the number of students. This would be a significant recurring expense.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The capital and recurring costs for establishing 38 colleges and funding international training are not specified but would be substantial, likely running into thousands of crores.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in education and specialized skills is a structural approach to transforming the agricultural sector. It aims to build human capital for a new farming paradigm, which creates lasting change if implemented successfully.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are the students, not the current generation of farmers who face immediate challenges.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will also operate with the goal of 100% organic farming.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசும் 100% இயற்கை வேளாண்மையையே இலக்காகக் கொண்டு செயல்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 159
impact_mechanism: Proposes a fundamental shift in the state's agricultural policy towards complete ecological sustainability.

promise_components.component: The government will operate with the goal of 100% organic farming.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy goal to transform the entire agricultural sector, affecting all 83 lakh farmer households. A transition of this scale would require massive investment in training, certification, and supply chains, and could risk short-term drops in yield. The economic impact is not quantifiable with the given data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The costs associated with subsidies, training, certification, and potential yield-loss compensation for a statewide transition are unknown but would be immense.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural promise as it seeks to fundamentally change the entire mode of agricultural production in the state. It addresses root causes of environmental degradation and input dependency associated with conventional farming.
coverage_gap_note: A rapid transition could bankrupt small and marginal farmers who lack the capital to withstand initial yield drops or invest in new methods.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will declare agriculture as a government service and make farmers government employees.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு வேளாண்மையை அரசுப்பணியாக அறிவித்து, உழவர்களை அரசு ஊழியர்களாக மாற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 159
impact_mechanism: Seeks to provide absolute income security to farmers by converting them from private producers into salaried government employees.

promise_components.component: Declare agriculture as a government service and make farmers government employees.
promise_components.analysis: There are approximately 83 lakh farmer households in Tamil Nadu. Providing a salary to one person per household, even at a conservative rate based on MGNREGS wages (₹294/day for 300 days = ₹88,200/year), would have a massive fiscal impact. Total estimated minimum cost: 83 lakh farmers × ₹88,200/year = ₹73,206 crore/year.

fiscal_cost_note: Estimated annual cost: ₹73,206 crore. This represents approximately 56.3% of the state's discretionary budget of ₹1.3 lakh crore. This is a conservative estimate; actual costs including benefits would be higher.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a radical structural change, replacing market-based farm income with a fixed government salary. It directly addresses the root cause of farmer income volatility and insecurity by completely altering the economic basis of agriculture.
coverage_gap_note: The promise excludes landless agricultural laborers, who are also a critical part of the rural economy.

promise_text_en: Certain chemical fertilizers like Ammonium Nitrate, Monocrotophos, Chlorpyriphos, Acephate, and Endosulfan, identified as highly harmful by the World Health Organization and the European Union but not yet fully banned in India, will be completely banned under the Naam Tamilar government. Farmers will be trained to use and produce organic fertilizers as an alternative.
promise_text_ta: உலக நலவாழ்வு நிறுவனம் மற்றும் ஐரோப்பிய ஒன்றியம் ஆகியவற்றால் பெருந்தீங்கானவை எனக் கண்டறியப்பட்ட, ஆனால் இந்தியாவில் இன்னும் முழுமையாகத் தடை செய்யப்படாத சில வேதி உரங்களான Ammonium Nitrate, Monocrotophos, Chlorpyriphos, Acephate மற்றும் Endosulfan போன்ற வேதி உரங்கள் நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சியில் முழுமையாகத் தடை செய்யப்பட்டு, அதற்கு மாற்றாக இயற்கை உரங்களைப் பயன்படுத்த மற்றும் உருவாக்க உழவர்கள் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படுவர்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 159
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve soil health and reduce environmental pollution by banning specific harmful agrochemicals and promoting organic alternatives.

promise_components.component: Completely ban certain highly harmful chemical fertilizers and pesticides.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory action with no direct fiscal cost. The primary challenge is enforcement and managing the transition.

promise_components.component: Train farmers to use and produce organic fertilizers as an alternative.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a large-scale training program targeting up to 83 lakh farmer households. The cost per farmer for training is not available in the reference data, so the total cost is unquantifiable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The ban itself has no cost, but the cost for the associated mass training program cannot be calculated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural intervention that changes the rules governing agricultural inputs. By banning harmful substances and promoting alternatives, it aims to create a more sustainable agricultural ecosystem, addressing a root cause of environmental damage.
coverage_gap_note: Farmers heavily reliant on these specific chemicals may suffer crop losses if effective and affordable alternatives are not made available at scale.

promise_text_en: A separate board will be established for farmers to resolve their issues. This welfare board, composed of farmers, will decide the price for agricultural produce.
promise_text_ta: உழவர்களுக்கென தனியாக வாரியம் அமைக்கப்படும். அவர்களின் சிக்கல்கள் தீர்க்கப்படும். உழவர்கள் விளைவிக்கும் பொருள்களுக்கு உழவர்களைக் கொண்டு அமைக்கப்பட்ட நலவாரியமே அவற்றிற்கான விலையை முடிவு செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 159
impact_mechanism: Attempts to shift pricing power from markets and buyers to agricultural producers via a state-sanctioned board.

promise_components.component: A welfare board composed of farmers will be established to decide the price for agricultural produce.
promise_components.analysis: This measure seeks to replace market-based price discovery with administered pricing set by producers. This would be a fundamental change to the agricultural market. While there is no direct cost to establish the board, it creates a massive contingent liability for the government, which may be forced to procure produce at the board-set price if private buyers refuse.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The direct cost is low, but the potential indirect fiscal impact is enormous and unpredictable. If the government has to act as a buyer of last resort at prices set by the board, the liability could be many thousands of crores.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is structural because it fundamentally alters the mechanism of price discovery in the agricultural economy. It directly addresses the root cause of low farm-gate prices by attempting to give pricing power to farmers.
coverage_gap_note: This could lead to significant food price inflation, which would disproportionately harm poor urban and rural consumers.

promise_text_en: The government and others must purchase produce at the price set by the farmers' welfare board. The Naam Tamilar government will also implement all necessary changes for their welfare.
promise_text_ta: அந்த விலையில் தான் அரசும், மற்றவர்களும் வாங்க வேண்டும். மேலும் அவர்களின் நலனுக்குண்டான அனைத்து மாற்றங்களையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு செயல்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 159
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase farm income by giving a farmer-led board the power to set mandatory procurement prices.

promise_components.component: A farmers' welfare board will set the price for agricultural produce.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change to create a new price-setting body. The cost of the board itself is minimal.

promise_components.component: The government and other private entities must purchase produce at this set price.
promise_components.analysis: This establishes a new, mandatory pricing regime. The financial impact is the difference between the board-set price and the market price, multiplied by the total quantity procured. The price and quantity are unknown, so the cost cannot be calculated. Mandating private purchase is legally and economically complex.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is dependent on the price set by the new board and the quantity procured by the government, neither of which is specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This attempts to fundamentally alter the price discovery mechanism in agriculture, shifting power to farmers. While it addresses a root cause (low farmgate prices), its implementation is fraught with risk, as it could severely distort the market and may be legally unenforceable against private buyers.
coverage_gap_note: This focuses on farm owners (~83 lakh households) and does not directly benefit landless agricultural laborers.

promise_text_en: Insurance will be provided for the cultivation of national crops such as paddy, wheat, sugarcane, cotton, pulses, oilseeds, and millets.
promise_text_ta: நெல், கோதுமை, கரும்பு, பருத்தி, பருப்பு வகைகள், எண்ணெய் வித்துகள், தினைப் பயிர்கள் (சிறு கூலங்கள்) ஆகிய தேசியப் பயிரினங்களைப் பயிரிடும்போது அதற்குக் காப்பீடு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 161
impact_mechanism: This promise reduces financial risk for farmers by providing insurance against crop failure for major national crops.

promise_components.component: Insurance will be provided for the cultivation of paddy, wheat, sugarcane, cotton, pulses, oilseeds, and millets.
promise_components.analysis: This implies a crop insurance scheme. The cost to the state would be its share of the premium subsidy. The total sum insured, premium rates, and subsidy percentage are not specified in the promise or reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The annual cost depends on farmer enrollment, acreage, premium rates, and claim ratios, none of which are available.
sustainability_reasoning: Crop insurance is a crucial risk mitigation tool that provides a financial safety net against crop loss. However, it treats the symptom (income shock) rather than the root causes of crop failure like water scarcity, climate change, or soil degradation.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to specified 'national crops' and excludes farmers cultivating horticultural products, vegetables, and fruits.

promise_text_en: A heritage seed bank will be established in the name of 'Nel' Jayaraman to preserve our traditional seeds. Seeds will be provided free of cost to farmers who undertake organic farming.
promise_text_ta: நம் மரபு விதைகளைப் பாதுகாக்கும் வகையில் ஐயா நெல் செயராமன் பெயரில் மரபு விதைகளுக்கான வைப்பகம் அமைக்கப்படும். இயற்கை வேளாண்மை செய்ய முன்வரும் வேளாண் குடிகளுக்கு விதைகள் விலையின்றி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 161
impact_mechanism: This promise promotes agricultural biodiversity and organic farming by establishing a seed bank and providing free traditional seeds.

promise_components.component: A heritage seed bank will be established in the name of 'Nel' Jayaraman.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital and operational costs for infrastructure, staff, and seed collection/preservation. These costs are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Seeds will be provided free of cost to farmers who undertake organic farming.
promise_components.analysis: The cost depends on the number of organic farmers and the price of heritage seeds, neither of which is available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost to establish the seed bank and the scale of the free seed distribution program are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative addresses the root causes of biodiversity loss and farmer dependence on commercial seeds. By preserving and distributing heritage seeds, it fosters a more resilient and self-sufficient agricultural system, representing a long-term structural investment.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are farmers who are willing and able to adopt organic farming with traditional seeds, which may be a small subset.

promise_text_en: The government will jointly cultivate sugarcane with farmers. The procurement price will be determined by the farmers and a welfare board established for them, and the government will purchase at that price.
promise_text_ta: கரும்பு விளைவிக்கும் உழவர்களோடு அரசும் சேர்ந்து பயிரிடும். உழவர்களும், அவர்களைக் கொண்டு அமைக்கப்பட்ட நலவாரியமும் சேர்ந்து தீர்மானிக்கும் விலையிலேயே அரசும் வாங்கிக்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 161
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to give sugarcane farmers control over their crop's value chain through joint cultivation and price-setting power.

promise_components.component: The government will jointly cultivate sugarcane with farmers.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'jointly cultivate' is undefined. It could imply cost-sharing, profit-sharing, or other models. The financial implications are not quantifiable.

promise_components.component: The procurement price will be determined by the farmers and a welfare board, and the government will purchase at that price.
promise_components.analysis: This shifts pricing power from the government/mills to a farmer-led board. The fiscal impact would be the difference between this new price and the current price, multiplied by the procurement volume. The new price is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of 'joint cultivation' is undefined, and the new procurement price is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This proposes a fundamental restructuring of the sugarcane sector, giving farmers unprecedented control. It addresses the root issue of pricing power but carries high risk of making the sugar industry economically unviable if prices are set without regard to market realities.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is exclusively for sugarcane farmers.

promise_text_en: The government will provide necessary assistance and advice to farmers who undertake research in organic farming.
promise_text_ta: இயற்கை வழி வேளாண்மையில் ஆய்வு மேற்கொள்ளும் உழவர்களுக்கு, தேவையான உதவிகளையும், அறிவுரைகளையும் அரசு வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 161
impact_mechanism: This promise encourages grassroots innovation in sustainable agriculture by providing state support to farmer-researchers.

promise_components.component: The government will provide necessary assistance and advice to farmers who undertake research in organic farming.
promise_components.analysis: This implies providing technical support via extension services and possibly small grants. The number of farmers conducting 'research' is likely very small, so the cost would be minimal, but it cannot be quantified with the available data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. While the cost is expected to be low, no specific figures for grants or personnel are available.
sustainability_reasoning: Supporting farmer-led research fosters the development of locally adapted, sustainable agricultural solutions. This is a structural investment in knowledge and innovation, addressing the need for more resilient farming systems.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefit is for a very small niche of innovator farmers, though the knowledge generated could have wider benefits.

promise_text_en: Agriculture is not merely a profession but our culture and way of life. Therefore, the Naam Tamilar government will hold farmers in high esteem.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண்மை என்பது தொழில் அல்ல நமது பண்பாடு, வாழ்வியல். அதனால் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உழவர்களைப் பெரிதும் மதித்துப் போற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 161
impact_mechanism: This promise is a symbolic gesture of respect towards farmers with no tangible change mechanism.

promise_components.component: The Naam Tamilar government will hold farmers in high esteem.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of value and intent with no specific, measurable action or financial implication.

fiscal_cost_note: ₹0. This is a non-financial, rhetorical promise.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise offers symbolic recognition but includes no policy, program, or resource allocation. It does not address any of the material or structural challenges faced by farmers, such as debt, price volatility, or climate risks.

promise_text_en: A special coastal security force named "Neithal Padai" (Coastal Force) will be established to protect Tamil Nadu's fishermen.
promise_text_ta: தமிழக மீனவர்களைப் பாதுகாப்பதற்காகத் தனியே ஒரு சிறப்புக் கடலோரக் காவல்படை, “நெய்தல் படை” என்ற பெயரில் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 162
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve fishermen's safety by creating a dedicated state-level force for coastal security.

promise_components.component: A special coastal security force named 'Neithal Padai' will be established to protect Tamil Nadu's fishermen.
promise_components.analysis: This requires significant capital expenditure for vessels and equipment, plus recurring revenue expenditure for salaries, training, and maintenance. The size and scope of the force are not defined, so costs cannot be estimated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the force's size, equipment, and operational mandate, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing a permanent security institution is a structural response to the persistent physical threats faced by fishermen at sea. It is a long-term investment in the state's security infrastructure rather than a temporary relief measure.

promise_text_en: A government job will be provided to the families of fishermen who were killed by the Sri Lankan navy or died in natural disasters. They can opt to join the fisheries department.
promise_text_ta: சிங்களக் கடற்படையால் கொல்லப்பட்ட, இயற்கைப் பேரிடரில் இறந்த மீனவக் குடும்பங்களுக்கு அரசு வேலை. அவர்கள் விரும்பினால் மீன்வளத் துறையிலும் சேரலாம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 163
impact_mechanism: This promise provides long-term financial security to the family of a deceased fisherman through compassionate government employment.

promise_components.component: A government job will be provided to the families of fishermen who were killed by the Sri Lankan navy or died in natural disasters.
promise_components.analysis: This creates a long-term liability for the government in the form of salary and pension for each job provided. The number of such deaths per year is not available in the reference data, so the annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of beneficiaries per year is unknown, and each appointment represents a multi-decade financial commitment.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a social security measure that provides critical, life-altering support to a family after a tragedy. It treats the symptom (loss of income for the family) but does not prevent the root cause (the fisherman's death).
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is limited to deaths from Sri Lankan navy action or natural disasters, excluding other causes like accidents or illness.

promise_text_en: Appropriate compensation will be provided to the families of fishermen who go missing at sea, and to those who are permanently disabled due to attacks by the Sri Lankan navy or during fishing activities.
promise_text_ta: கடல்தொழிலில் காணாமல் போனோர் குடும்பங்களுக்கு உரிய இழப்புத்தொகை, சிங்களக் கடற்படை தாக்குதல் மற்றும் கடல்தொழிலின்போது, படுகாயமேற்பட்டு உடல் உறுப்பு நிலையாகப் பாதிக்கப்பட்டவர்களுக்கு உரிய இழப்புத்தொகை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 163
impact_mechanism: This promise provides a financial cushion to fishermen and their families following a catastrophic event like disappearance or permanent disability.

promise_components.component: Appropriate compensation will be provided to the families of fishermen who go missing at sea.
promise_components.analysis: The compensation amount is not defined as 'appropriate'. The number of fishermen who go missing annually is not in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Appropriate compensation will be provided to those who are permanently disabled due to attacks by the Sri Lankan navy or during fishing activities.
promise_components.analysis: The compensation amount is not defined. The number of such disability cases per year is not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The compensation amount and the number of annual beneficiaries are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a relief measure that alleviates the immediate financial hardship resulting from a tragedy. Like insurance, it addresses the consequences of risk but does not reduce the risk itself.
coverage_gap_note: Does not cover fishermen who suffer temporary disability or major financial losses without physical harm, such as the seizure of a boat.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will reserve six legislative assembly constituencies in coastal districts exclusively for fishermen candidates to contest.
promise_text_ta: கடலோர மாவட்டங்களில் மீனவர்கள் மட்டுமே போட்டியிட ஆறு சட்டமன்றத் தொகுதிகளை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ஒதுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 165
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase the political power of the fishing community by guaranteeing their representation in the state legislature.

promise_components.component: Reserve six legislative assembly constituencies in coastal districts exclusively for fishermen candidates to contest.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and constitutional matter, not a financial one. The Indian Constitution allows for reservation based on caste (SC/ST), not occupation. Implementing this would require a constitutional amendment, which is beyond the power of a state government.

fiscal_cost_note: ₹0. This promise has no direct fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: While the promise targets a structural root cause—political under-representation—it is practically undeliverable by a state government. It requires a constitutional amendment, making the promise symbolic and a form of political signalling rather than a feasible policy proposal.

promise_text_en: Following the Mandal Commission's recommendation, a resolution will be passed in the legislative assembly to classify the fishing community as a maritime-based Scheduled Tribe. The government will fight with the Union government to secure this justice for the fishing community.
promise_text_ta: மீனவ மக்களைக் கடல் மரபுசார் பழங்குடியினர் இனத்தில் சேர்க்க வேண்டும் என்று மண்டல் ஆணையம் பரிந்துரைத்திருந்தது. அதனை ஏற்று நாம் தமிழர் அரசும் சட்டமன்றத்தில் தீர்மானம் நிறைவேற்றும். ஒன்றிய அரசுடன் போராடி மீனவ மக்களுக்கான நீதியைப் பெற்றுத் தரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 165
impact_mechanism: Aims to provide access to affirmative action benefits like reservations and constitutional protections by changing the community's official classification.

promise_components.component: Pass a resolution in the legislative assembly to classify the fishing community as a maritime-based Scheduled Tribe.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative action within the state's power. The fiscal cost is negligible.

promise_components.component: Lobby the Union government to secure this classification.
promise_components.analysis: The power to grant Scheduled Tribe status rests with the Union government and Parliament. This is a political lobbying effort with an uncertain outcome.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible administrative and legislative costs. The promise does not involve direct financial outlay from the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: If successful, this would be a permanent change in the legal and social status of the community, providing access to long-term structural benefits. However, its success is entirely dependent on the Union government.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is specific to the fishing community and does not address similar demands from other marginalized groups.

promise_text_en: The Katchatheevu agreement will be revoked, and legal action will be taken to restore the fishing rights of our fishermen.
promise_text_ta: கச்சத்தீவு ஒப்பந்தம் நீக்கப்பட்டு, நமது மீனவர்களின் மீன்பிடி உரிமையை நிலைநாட்ட நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். அதற்கான சட்ட நடவடிக்கையும் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 165
impact_mechanism: Seeks to restore access to traditional fishing grounds near Sri Lanka, aiming to increase catch and reduce the risk of arrest by foreign navies.

promise_components.component: The Katchatheevu agreement will be revoked.
promise_components.analysis: Revoking an international treaty is not within the power of a state government. This is a matter of foreign policy, handled exclusively by the Union government.

promise_components.component: Legal action will be taken to restore fishing rights.
promise_components.analysis: The state can file cases in Indian courts to pressure the Union government, but courts are generally reluctant to direct foreign policy.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible costs associated with legal filings. This is a political and diplomatic promise, not a fiscal one.
sustainability_reasoning: While it addresses a root cause (loss of access), the state government lacks the constitutional authority to implement it. It functions as a political statement and pressure tactic rather than a deliverable policy.
coverage_gap_note: Primarily benefits fishermen operating in the Palk Strait, not the entire fishing community of Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: A demand for a separate ministry for fisheries at the Union government level will be strongly pursued and obtained, for the welfare of fishermen from all states.
promise_text_ta: மீனவர்களின் நலனுக்கென்று தனி அமைச்சகம் வேண்டும் என்ற கோரிக்கை (மற்ற மாநில மீனவர்களுக்காகவும்) ஒன்றிய அரசிடம் வலியுறுத்திப் பெறப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 165
impact_mechanism: Aims to create a dedicated central government body to elevate the political and policy focus on fisheries nationwide.

promise_components.component: A demand for a separate ministry for fisheries at the Union government level will be strongly pursued.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political lobbying effort directed at the Union government. A Department of Fisheries already exists at the central level; this seeks to upgrade it to a full ministry.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero fiscal cost to the Tamil Nadu state budget. This is a demand placed on the Union government.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a new ministry is a structural change in the machinery of the Union government. It could lead to more focused policies and budgets for the sector, addressing the root cause of policy neglect.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are for the entire Indian fishing community, not exclusively for Tamil Nadu fishermen.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will not only file cases but also formally approach the courts to compel the Indian government to take legal action against the Sri Lankan navy for attacks on fishermen.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு வழக்குப்பதிவு செய்வதோடு ‘இலங்கைக் கடற்படை மீது இந்திய அரசு நடவடிக்கை எடுக்க வேண்டும்’ என்று முறையாக நீதிமன்றத்தை அணுகி, சட்ட நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 167
impact_mechanism: Uses domestic legal channels to compel the Indian government to take international action against attacks on its citizens.

promise_components.component: Formally approach the courts to compel the Indian government to take legal action against the Sri Lankan navy.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal strategy to force a diplomatic and foreign policy response from the Union government. The success is uncertain as courts typically avoid interfering in foreign policy matters.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible costs for legal fees. The promise has no significant financial implications for the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the symptom (attacks) rather than the root cause (unresolved maritime boundary and fishing rights). It is a political gesture intended to show action, but unlikely to produce a sustainable solution, which requires diplomacy.
coverage_gap_note: Focuses on fishermen affected by the Sri Lankan navy, primarily in the Palk Strait region.

promise_text_en: Authority will be sought and obtained from the Union government for the state to relax central control during natural disasters, enabling faster rescue operations.
promise_text_ta: இயற்கைப் பேரிடர் காலகட்டங்களில் இந்தக் கட்டுப்பாட்டைத் தளர்த்த வேண்டும் என ஒன்றிய அரசிடம் வலியுறுத்தி மாநில அரசுக்கான அதிகாரம் பெறப்படும். உடனடி மீட்பு நடவடிக்கைக்கு இது ஏற்றதாக இருக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 167
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve disaster response effectiveness by decentralizing authority and reducing procedural delays from the central government.

promise_components.component: Authority will be sought from the Union government for the state to relax central control during natural disasters.
promise_components.analysis: This requires lobbying the Union government to amend central laws or rules, such as the Disaster Management Act, 2005, to grant more autonomy to states.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero fiscal cost. This is a demand for a change in administrative and legal frameworks, not a spending program.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of ineffective disaster response—centralized, slow decision-making. A change in the legal framework would be a permanent, structural improvement to governance.

promise_text_en: Fishermen's residential areas will be upgraded with improved facilities. A scheme will be introduced to provide a house for every homeless fishing family.
promise_text_ta: மீனவர்களின் குடியிருப்புகள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட வசதிகளுடன் கட்டித் தரப்படும். வீடற்ற ஒவ்வொரு மீனவக் குடும்பத்திற்கும் ஒரு வீடு என்ற திட்டம் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 167
impact_mechanism: Provides a foundational asset (a house) to improve the living standards and social security of the most vulnerable fishing families.

promise_components.component: Fishermen's residential areas will be upgraded with improved facilities.
promise_components.analysis: Cost is dependent on the number of areas and scope of upgrades. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: A scheme will be introduced to provide a house for every homeless fishing family.
promise_components.analysis: The number of homeless fishing families and the unit cost per house are not available in the reference data. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The number of beneficiaries and unit costs are not specified, making a fiscal estimate impossible. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing housing is a structural intervention that addresses the root cause of homelessness and provides a permanent asset, which can have lasting positive effects on health, education, and economic stability.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is limited to homeless families within the fishing community, excluding other poor households.

promise_text_en: The government guarantees that fishermen will not be displaced from coastal areas for any reason, and no project that requires their displacement will be permitted.
promise_text_ta: எந்தக் காரணத்தைக் கொண்டும் மீனவர்கள் கடலோரப் பகுதிகளில் இருந்து அப்புறப்படுத்தப்படமாட்டார்கள் என்றும், மீனவர்களை அப்புறப்படுத்திவிட்டுக் கொண்டு வரப்படும் எந்தத் திட்டத்திற்கும் அனுமதி கிடையாது என்றும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி அளிக்கிறது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 167
impact_mechanism: Protects traditional livelihoods and community stability by granting fishermen security of tenure against development-induced displacement.

promise_components.component: The government guarantees that fishermen will not be displaced from coastal areas for any reason.
promise_components.analysis: This is a strong policy commitment that could conflict with existing land acquisition laws and the state's eminent domain powers.

promise_components.component: No project that requires their displacement will be permitted.
promise_components.analysis: This gives the community a de facto veto over certain types of coastal development, including potentially strategic central government projects.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero direct fiscal cost, but carries a high potential opportunity cost by restricting industrial, tourism, or infrastructure projects. This is a policy decision, not a spending item.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root threat of displacement, which destroys livelihoods and communities. By guaranteeing security of place, it provides a foundational element for sustainable community life, though it may face legal and political challenges.
