coverage_gap_note: Protects fishing communities but may conflict with broader economic development goals for other sections of the population.

promise_text_en: The government will take steps to lift the ban on catching sea cucumbers. Fishermen will be permitted to cultivate and farm them.
promise_text_ta: கடல் அட்டை மீதான தடையை நீக்க நமது அரசு நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும். மீனவர்களே அவற்றை வளர்த்துப் பெருக்கிக்கொள்ள அனுமதிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 167
impact_mechanism: Seeks to create a new income stream for fishermen by legalizing a previously banned marine harvesting activity.

promise_components.component: The government will take steps to lift the ban on catching sea cucumbers.
promise_components.analysis: Sea cucumbers are protected under Schedule I of the central Wildlife (Protection) Act, 1972. The state government cannot lift the ban; it can only lobby the Union government.

promise_components.component: Fishermen will be permitted to cultivate and farm them.
promise_components.analysis: This would be contingent on the lifting of the primary legal ban.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero fiscal cost. This is a request for a legal/regulatory change from the Union government.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a regulatory barrier that is a root cause of lost income potential. If the law is changed, it creates a permanent new economic opportunity, though success depends entirely on central government action and ecological considerations.

promise_text_en: Measures will be taken to establish cage-net farms in the sea for cultivating species such as sea cucumber, crab, oyster, seaweed, sea turtle, lobster, and reef fish.
promise_text_ta: கடலுக்குள் கூண்டு வலைகள் கொண்ட பண்ணைகள் அமைத்து அதற்குள்ளாகத் தடை செய்யப்பட்ட கடல் அட்டை, நண்டு, சிப்பி, கடல்பாசி, கடல் ஆமை, சிங்கி, பாறை மீன் ஆகியவற்றை வளர்ப்பதற்கான நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 167
impact_mechanism: Promotes diversification of income sources for fishermen through aquaculture, reducing reliance on increasingly unpredictable wild catch.

promise_components.component: Measures will be taken to establish cage-net farms in the sea for cultivating various species.
promise_components.analysis: This implies a government scheme involving capital subsidy, technical support, and training. The scale, number of farms, and cost per unit are not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise lacks specifics on the number of farms or the level of government support, making a fiscal estimate impossible. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural intervention that builds alternative livelihood assets (aquaculture farms) and skills. It addresses the root cause of income instability from capture fisheries by creating a new, potentially more stable, production system.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to fishermen who have the capacity, location, and willingness to adopt aquaculture practices.

promise_text_en: The ban on our fishermen fishing in the 21 islands around Ramanathapuram will be lifted. The right to fish will be secured by negotiating with the Union government.
promise_text_ta: இராமநாதபுரம் மற்றும் அதைச் சுற்றியுள்ள 21 தீவுகளில் நமது மீனவர்கள் மீன்பிடிக்கத் தடை விதிக்கப்பட்டிருக்கிறது. ஒன்றிய அரசுடன் பேச்சு நடத்தி அந்தத் தடையை நீக்கச் செய்து மீன்பிடிக்கும் உரிமை கேட்டுப் பெறப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 169
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase the available fishing area for a specific group of fishermen by removing existing environmental restrictions.

promise_components.component: The ban on our fishermen fishing in the 21 islands around Ramanathapuram will be lifted.
promise_components.analysis: These islands are part of the Gulf of Mannar Marine National Park, a protected area under central government environmental laws. The state cannot unilaterally lift the ban.

promise_components.component: The right to fish will be secured by negotiating with the Union government.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political lobbying effort with the Union Ministry of Environment, Forest and Climate Change.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero fiscal cost. This is a demand for a regulatory change from the Union government.
sustainability_reasoning: While it addresses a root cause (access restrictions), lifting a ban in a National Park is legally and politically very difficult and faces strong opposition. It is more of a political statement of intent than a likely policy outcome.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is geographically specific to fishermen in the Ramanathapuram region.

promise_text_en: Fishermen will be given priority in admissions to fisheries colleges, maritime training institutes, and tourism boat departments.
promise_text_ta: மீன்வளக் கல்லூரி, மீனவர் பயிற்சி நிலையம், கடற்சார் பயிற்சி நிலையம், சுற்றுலாப் படகுத்துறை போன்றவற்றில் மீனவர்களுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 169
impact_mechanism: Improves access to specialized higher education for a specific community, potentially leading to better-skilled professionals in the maritime sector.

promise_components.component: Priority in admissions to fisheries colleges, maritime training institutes, and tourism boat departments for fishermen.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change involving admission criteria, likely through a reservation or priority quota system. The direct financial cost is administrative and negligible. The number of beneficiaries depends on the number of available seats and applicants from the fishing community, which is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a policy change regarding admission criteria. The cost is administrative and negligible.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy creates a permanent advantage for the fishing community in accessing specialized education, which can lead to long-term improvements in their economic and social standing within the maritime sector. It's a structural change to the admissions process.
coverage_gap_note: Does not benefit fishermen not seeking higher education in these specific fields.

promise_text_en: The government will provide, at its own expense, training in advanced fishing techniques, processing technology, organic fish farming, and ornamental fish farming to youth from the fishing community, and will also arrange for their employment.
promise_text_ta: மீனவர் சமுதாய இளைஞர்களுக்கு மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட மீன்பிடித்தொழில் பயிற்சி, பதப்படுத்தும் தொழில்நுட்பப் பயிற்சி, இயற்கை மீன் வளர்ப்பு, வண்ண மீன் வளர்ப்பு சார்ந்த பயிற்சிகள் அனைத்தும் அரசு செலவில் அளிப்பதோடு, வேலைவாய்ப்பிற்கான ஏற்பாட்டையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசே செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 169
impact_mechanism: Provides free vocational training and employment assistance to youth from the fishing community to modernize their skills and improve employability.

promise_components.component: Provide free training in advanced fishing techniques, processing technology, organic fish farming, and ornamental fish farming to youth from the fishing community.
promise_components.analysis: The cost depends on the number of youths trained and the cost per trainee. The reference data does not provide the number of youths in the fishing community or the cost of such training programs. Therefore, a cost estimate is not possible.

promise_components.component: Arrange for their employment after training.
promise_components.analysis: This is a commitment with high variability in success and cost, dependent on market conditions and the quality of training. No data is available to quantify the cost or success rate.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of targeted youth and the cost per trainee for these specialized programs are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: By providing skills for modern, high-value fishing and aquaculture, this promise equips the community's youth for better income opportunities. This is a structural investment in human capital, addressing the root cause of low income from traditional methods.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to youth who participate in the training; older fishermen or those not interested in these specific fields are excluded.

promise_text_en: Similar to the one for farmers, a separate bank for fishermen, "Neithal Vaippagam" (Coastal Bank), will be established. It will function as a branch of the Tamil Desiya Vaippagam and provide low-interest loans to fishermen.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண் பெருங்குடி மக்களுக்கு இருப்பது போல், மீனவர்களுக்குத் தனியாக வைப்பகம் (நெய்தல் வைப்பகம்) அமைக்கப்படும். அது தமிழ்த்தேசிய வைப்பகத்தின் ஒரு கிளையாகச் செயல்படும். இந்த ‘நெய்தல் வைப்பகம்’ குறைந்த வட்டியில் மீனவர்களுக்குக் கடன் அளிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 169
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated financial institution to provide low-interest credit to fishermen, addressing their specific capital needs.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate bank for fishermen, 'Neithal Vaippagam', to provide low-interest loans.
promise_components.analysis: Establishing a bank requires significant capital infusion and licensing from the Reserve Bank of India, which is a central subject. The state government cannot unilaterally create a bank. The cost of capitalization is not specified and cannot be estimated from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The capital required to establish a bank is not specified. This promise also requires regulatory approval from the RBI, a central body, making it dependent on the Union Government.
sustainability_reasoning: Lack of access to formal, low-cost credit is a root cause of indebtedness and inability to invest in better equipment. A dedicated bank directly tackles this structural problem, but its creation is outside the state's sole authority.
coverage_gap_note: Implementation is contingent on approval from the central government's Reserve Bank of India.

promise_text_en: To honor the ancient primary occupation of Tamils, Rameswaram will be declared the capital of the Neithal (coastal) region. A museum showcasing the art and culture of the coastal people and new colleges related to the maritime industry will be established there.
promise_text_ta: தமிழர்களின் மூத்த முதன்மைத் தொழிலாக இருக்கும் மீன்பிடித்தொழிலில் ஈடுபடும் மீனவர்களின் பண்பாட்டைப் போற்றும் வகையில் இராமேசுவரம் நெய்தல் நிலத்தின் தலைநகராக அறிவிக்கப்படும். இங்கு நெய்தல் நிலத்து மக்களின் கலை பண்பாடுகளை அறிந்து கொள்ளும் வகையில் கண்காட்சியகமும், கடல்தொழில் சார்ந்த புதிய கல்லூரியும் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 169
impact_mechanism: Aims to boost regional identity and economic activity in Rameswaram through symbolic designation and investment in cultural and educational infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Declare Rameswaram the capital of the Neithal (coastal) region.
promise_components.analysis: This is a symbolic act with no direct fiscal cost.

promise_components.component: Establish a museum showcasing the art and culture of the coastal people in Rameswaram.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of building and operating a museum is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Establish new colleges related to the maritime industry in Rameswaram.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of establishing and operating new colleges is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of land, construction, and operation for a new museum and colleges is not specified. The 'capital' designation is symbolic and has no direct cost.
sustainability_reasoning: Declaring a regional capital is an act of political symbolism. While new colleges are structural, the overall promise is framed around identity and honor, not solving a core problem like income or safety. It manages perception more than material conditions.
coverage_gap_note: The symbolic designation offers no material benefit to fishermen in other coastal districts.

promise_text_en: Fishing licenses issued to hundreds of foreign companies with mechanized boats will be revoked.
promise_text_ta: நூற்றுக்கணக்கான அயல்நாட்டு நிறுவனங்களின் இயந்திரப் படகுகளுக்கு வழங்கப்பட்ட மீன்பிடி உரிமங்கள் திரும்பப் பெறப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 169
impact_mechanism: Aims to reduce competition for marine resources by removing foreign-owned mechanized boats from Tamil Nadu's fishing waters.

promise_components.component: Revoke fishing licenses issued to hundreds of foreign companies with mechanized boats.
promise_components.analysis: The authority to license and regulate foreign fishing vessels in India's Exclusive Economic Zone (EEZ) rests with the Union Government, not the state government. A state government cannot unilaterally revoke such licenses.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state. However, this is a matter of central jurisdiction (Union Government), not state. The state government lacks the legal authority to implement this promise.
sustainability_reasoning: Since the state government does not have the authority to revoke licenses granted by the Union Government for fishing in the EEZ, this promise cannot be implemented. It is a statement of political intent rather than a feasible policy action.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is legally unenforceable by a state government.

promise_text_en: Tamil fishermen will be provided with new fishing training and boats that are on par with international fishing companies.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ் மீனவர்களுக்குப் பன்னாட்டு மீன்பிடி நிறுவனங்களுக்கு இணையான புதிய மீன்பிடித் தொழிற்பயிற்சியும், மீன்பிடி படகுகளும் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 169
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve the competitiveness and safety of Tamil fishermen by providing them with modern equipment and the skills to use it.

promise_components.component: Provide new fishing training to Tamil fishermen.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of training is not specified and the number of beneficiaries is unknown, so cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide boats that are on par with international fishing companies.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of a modern deep-sea fishing vessel is extremely high. Providing such boats to a significant portion of the fishing population is likely fiscally impossible for the state. The cost per boat and the number of boats are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of 'boats on par with international fishing companies' is not specified and is extremely high. Providing these to a large number of fishermen would likely exceed the state's entire discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets a root cause but the immense, unstated cost of providing internationally comparable boats to a large population makes it more of an aspirational goal than a realistic policy. Its likely undeliverability makes it a form of political signalling.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is vague on how many fishermen would receive these boats and based on what criteria.

promise_text_en: Nuclear power plants, thermal power plants, and commercial ports that harm the fishing industry and rights of coastal people will be completely blocked. Contracts for industries affecting public welfare will be revoked, and permits for new such industries will be denied. Fishery-welfare-related infrastructure will be established in coastal districts.
promise_text_ta: கடலோர மக்களின் மீன்பிடித் தொழில், உரிமைகள் பாதிக்கக்கூடிய அணு உலை, அனல் மின் உலைகள், வணிகத் துறைமுகங்கள் ஆகியவை முழுவதும் தடுக்கப்படும். மக்கள் நலனைப் பாதிக்கும் தொழிற்சாலைகளுக்கான ஒப்பந்தங்கள் திரும்பப் பெறப்படும். மேலும் புதிய தொழிற்சாலைகளுக்கான அனுமதியும் மறுக்கப்படும். கடலோர மாவட்டங்களில் மீனவர் நலத்தொழில் சார்ந்த கட்டமைப்புகள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 171
impact_mechanism: Protects coastal ecosystems and traditional livelihoods by preventing the establishment or continuation of large industrial projects deemed harmful.

promise_components.component: Completely block nuclear power plants, thermal power plants, and commercial ports that harm the fishing industry.
promise_components.analysis: Blocking projects with central government approval and revoking existing contracts would lead to major legal and financial liabilities for the state government.

promise_components.component: Establish fishery-welfare-related infrastructure in coastal districts.
promise_components.analysis: The type and scale of infrastructure are not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of revoking existing contracts could be extremely high due to legal penalties and compensation claims. The cost of new welfare infrastructure is not specified and cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise to revoke contracts of existing, operational power plants and ports is practically undeliverable due to immense legal and financial repercussions. It functions as a powerful political signal to a specific voter base but is not a realistic governance strategy.
coverage_gap_note: This policy could negatively impact industrial development and power generation for the entire state.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will under no circumstances permit the Hydrocarbon project proposed by the Union Government in the coastal areas of Thoothukudi, Kanyakumari, and Dhanushkodi. A resolution will be passed in the legislative assembly and legal action will be pursued to ban this project.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றிய அரசால் முன்மொழியப்பட்டுள்ள தூத்துக்குடி, கன்னியாகுமரி, தனுசுகோடி கடற்பகுதிகளில் நீரகக்கரிமத் (Hydrocarbon) திட்டத்தை எக்காரணம் கொண்டும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அனுமதிக்காது. இதனை எதிர்த்து சட்டமன்றத் தீர்மானம் இயற்றுவதோடு தகுந்த சட்ட நடவடிக்கையிலும் ஈடுபட்டு இத்திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு தடை செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 171
impact_mechanism: Prevents potential environmental damage and displacement of livelihoods in specific coastal areas by using state legislative and legal powers to stop a centrally proposed project.

promise_components.component: Under no circumstances permit the Hydrocarbon project proposed by the Union Government in specific coastal areas.
promise_components.analysis: A state government can deny state-level permits and clearances, creating significant hurdles for a project. However, the Union Government has overriding powers for resources on the Union List, which can lead to legal and political conflict.

promise_components.component: Pass a resolution in the legislative assembly and pursue legal action to ban the project.
promise_components.analysis: A resolution is a political statement without legal force on the Union Government. Legal action is a standard recourse.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost, other than legal fees for litigation. The main action is regulatory (denying permits) and political (passing a resolution).
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to prevent a permanent, irreversible change to the coastal ecosystem and the livelihoods dependent on it. By using state powers to block the project, it seeks to maintain the existing socio-ecological structure.
coverage_gap_note: This may conflict with national energy security goals and could lead to the project being relocated.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will not permit any project that acquires the sea and affects fishermen and the marine environment, including the Kattupalli Adani port.
promise_text_ta: கடலினைக் கையகப்படுத்திக் கட்டப்படும் காட்டுப்பள்ளி அதானி துறைமுகம் உட்பட மீனவர்களையும் கடல் சூழலையும் பாதிக்கும் எந்தத் திட்டத்தையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அனுமதிக்காது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 171
impact_mechanism: Protects a specific coastal ecosystem and fishing livelihoods by using state powers to deny permission for a port expansion project.

promise_components.component: Will not permit any project that acquires the sea and affects fishermen and the marine environment, including the Kattupalli Adani port.
promise_components.analysis: The state government has significant authority to grant or deny permissions such as Environmental Clearance and Coastal Regulation Zone (CRZ) clearance, which are necessary for such a project. This makes the promise implementable.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a regulatory decision to deny permits for a specific industrial project.
sustainability_reasoning: Blocking the port expansion is a permanent decision that preserves the existing environmental and social structure of the area. It's a direct intervention to prevent what would be an irreversible change, thus addressing the root threat.
coverage_gap_note: This decision may be challenged legally by the project proponents and could have implications for industrial growth and port capacity in the state.

promise_text_en: The practice of leasing fishing rights in water bodies like lakes, ponds, and dams to private individuals will be stopped. Leases will be granted exclusively to fishermen's associations, women's groups, and traditional fishermen.
promise_text_ta: ஏரி, கண்மாய், குளம், அணைகள் உள்ளிட்ட நீர்நிலைகளில் வளர்க்கப்படும் மீன்களைத் தனி ஆட்களிடம் குத்தகை விடுவது தடுக்கப்படும். மீனவச் சங்கங்களுக்கும், பெண்கள் குழுக்களுக்கும், மரபுசார் மீனவர்களுக்கும் மட்டுமே குத்தகை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 171
impact_mechanism: Empowers local fishing communities and women's groups by giving them exclusive rights to inland fishing, potentially increasing their income and control over local resources.

promise_components.component: Stop leasing fishing rights in inland water bodies to private individuals and grant them exclusively to fishermen's associations, women's groups, and traditional fishermen.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change regarding the leasing of state-controlled assets. It redirects economic opportunity from private contractors to community-based groups. The number of water bodies or potential revenue impact is not available in reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No significant fiscal cost. This is a change in leasing policy. There may be a negligible impact on state revenue from lease fees, but this cannot be quantified with available data.
sustainability_reasoning: By shifting leasing rights from private individuals to community groups, this policy structurally alters who benefits from local resources. It creates a sustainable income source and strengthens community control, addressing the root cause of economic exclusion.
coverage_gap_note: The success of this policy depends on the capacity of the community groups to manage the fisheries effectively.

promise_text_en: To stop fishermen from buying overpriced nets, catamarans, and fishing equipment from private companies, the government will establish its own factory to produce these items and sell them to fishermen at a fair price. Youth from the fishing community will be given priority for employment in this factory.
promise_text_ta: மீனவர்களுக்குத் தேவையான அனைத்து வகை வலைகள், கட்டுமரம், படகு கட்டும் கருவிகள், மீன்பிடிக் கருவிகள், மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட கடற்சார் தொழிற் கருவிகள் என அனைத்தையும் தனியாரிடம் அதிக விலை கொடுத்து வாங்குவதைத் தடுக்க, நாம் தமிழர் அரசு, அவற்றைச் சொந்தமாக உருவாக்கம் செய்யும் தொழிற்சாலையைத் தொடங்கி, நம் மீனவர்களுக்கு உரிய விலைக்கு வழங்கும். இந்தத் தொழிற்சாலையில் மீனவ இளைஞர்களுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 171
impact_mechanism: Reduces input costs for fishermen by providing equipment at a fair price through a state-owned enterprise.

promise_components.component: Establish a government factory to produce fishing nets, catamarans, and equipment.
promise_components.analysis: The capital cost to establish a factory and the required production capacity are not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Sell equipment to fishermen at a fair price.
promise_components.analysis: The number of fishermen is not provided in the reference data. The definition of 'fair price' and the implied subsidy per item are unknown. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Give employment priority to youth from the fishing community.
promise_components.analysis: This is a non-financial commitment. The number of jobs to be created is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The capital expenditure for the factory and the annual operational subsidy are unknown and cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to create a permanent, state-run alternative to the private market for fishing equipment. If successful, it would structurally alter the input cost economics for fishermen, addressing a root cause of low profitability.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not specify if it covers inland fishermen or only coastal fishermen.

promise_text_en: In many coastal areas of Tamil Nadu, from Uvari and Periyathalai to Ennore, which are affected by sea erosion, groynes (breakwaters) will be constructed for the welfare of fishermen. This will protect coastal fishing villages and landing centers.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் கடலோரப் பகுதிகளான உவரி, பெரியதாழை தொடங்கி எண்ணூர் வரை பல இடங்கள் கடல் அரிப்பால் பாதிப்பிற்குள்ளாகி இருக்கிறது. இந்த இடங்களில் மீனவர்களின் நலன் வேண்டி தூண்டில் வளைவுப் பாலம் அமைக்கப்படும். கடலோர மீனவ ஊர்களும், இறக்குமதி நிலையங்களும் இதன்மூலம் பாதுகாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 171
impact_mechanism: Protects coastal villages and fishing infrastructure from sea erosion through the construction of physical barriers (groynes).

promise_components.component: Construct groynes (breakwaters) in coastal areas affected by sea erosion from Uvari to Ennore.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital-intensive infrastructure project. The total length of coastline requiring protection and the cost per kilometer for groyne construction are not available in the reference data. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of large-scale marine construction is highly variable and cannot be estimated without detailed engineering and geographical surveys.
sustainability_reasoning: Groynes are a permanent infrastructure solution designed to mitigate the physical and economic damage from sea erosion. This addresses the root environmental threat to coastal livelihoods and settlements.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is geographically specific ('from Uvari... to Ennore'), potentially leaving out other erosion-prone coastal areas in Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: The government will implement a scheme to provide fishermen with real-time satellite data on the location of abundant fish stocks. This technology will also be used to help locate fishermen who go missing during natural disasters.
promise_text_ta: செயற்கைக்கோள் உதவியுடன் எங்கெங்கு மீன்வளம் அதிகமாக இருக்கிறது என்ற தகவல்களைப் பெற்று உடனுக்குடன் மீனவர்களுக்கு வழங்கும் திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு செயல்படுத்தும். பேரிடர்க் காலங்களில் காணாமல் போவோரையும் இதன் மூலம் அறிந்து கொள்ள வாய்ப்பு ஏற்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 173
impact_mechanism: Increases fishing efficiency and safety by providing real-time data on fish location and enabling tracking during emergencies.

promise_components.component: Provide fishermen with real-time satellite data on abundant fish stock locations.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of satellite data access, developing a dissemination platform, and the number of fishermen/boats to be covered are not available. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Use the technology to help locate missing fishermen.
promise_components.analysis: This requires equipping boats with transponders. The cost per unit and the number of boats are unknown. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost would include technology development, satellite data subscription fees, and potentially hardware subsidies, none of which can be estimated from the data provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides a permanent technological upgrade to the fishing industry's operational capacity. It addresses the root problems of information asymmetry for catch efficiency and the lack of safety infrastructure for tracking at sea.
coverage_gap_note: May not be accessible to fishermen without compatible technology (e.g., smartphones, specific receivers) or the training to use it effectively.

promise_text_en: All salt pan industries in Thoothukudi will be upgraded. A state-owned enterprise will also enter the salt industry, with employment priority given to women from the fishing community to create new job opportunities.
promise_text_ta: தூத்துக்குடியில் உள்ள உப்புத் தொழிற்சாலைகள் அனைத்தும் மேம்படுத்தப்படும். அரசு நிறுவனமும் உப்பளத் தொழிலில் ஈடுபடும். அதில் மீனவப் பெண்களுக்கு முன்னுரிமை வழங்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் அந்தப் பகுதி மக்களுக்கு புதிய வேலைவாய்ப்பை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதிப்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 173
impact_mechanism: Modernizes a regional industry and creates employment for a targeted group through direct state intervention and investment.

promise_components.component: Upgrade all salt pan industries in Thoothukudi.
promise_components.analysis: The number of salt pans and the cost of 'upgrading' per unit are not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Establish a state-owned enterprise in the salt industry.
promise_components.analysis: The capital investment required to launch a new state-owned enterprise is unknown. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Give employment priority to women from the fishing community.
promise_components.analysis: A non-financial commitment. The number of potential jobs is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise involves significant but unspecified capital expenditure for a new SOE and potential grants for upgrading private industries.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing a new state-owned enterprise and facilitating an industry-wide upgrade are long-term structural changes. It addresses underlying issues of industrial stagnation and lack of diversified employment in the region.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are geographically concentrated in the Thoothukudi region.

promise_text_en: The government will establish cold storage facilities in primary coastal areas for fish preservation and will set up workshops to produce ice for fishermen, which will be provided at a fair price.
promise_text_ta: முதன்மைக் கடலோரப் பகுதிகளில் மீன்களைப் பதப்படுத்தி வைக்கும் குளிரூட்டிக் கூடங்கள், கடலுக்குச் செல்லும் மீனவர்களுக்குத் தேவையான பனிக்கட்டிகளை உருவாக்கிக் கொடுக்கும் தொழிற்கூடங்கள் அனைத்தையும் அரசே அமைத்து உரிய விலையில் மீனவர்களுக்கு வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 173
impact_mechanism: Reduces post-harvest losses and input costs for fishermen by providing state-subsidized cold chain infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Establish cold storage facilities in primary coastal areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of facilities and the capital cost per facility are not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Set up workshops to produce ice for fishermen at a fair price.
promise_components.analysis: The number of workshops, their capital cost, and the annual subsidy on ice (difference between 'fair price' and production cost) are unknown. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This promise requires significant capital expenditure for construction and recurring revenue expenditure for subsidies, neither of which can be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a permanent infrastructure investment that addresses a critical gap in the fisheries value chain. Lack of cold storage is a root cause of spoilage and depressed prices, so fixing this creates lasting change.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are dependent on the geographic placement of the facilities; some coastal villages might be left out.

promise_text_en: The government will procure fish directly from fishermen, similar to paddy procurement from farmers. Exports will be regulated to increase fishermen's income. Artificial shrimp farms that destroy water sources and soil fertility will be completely banned.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண்குடிகளிடம் இருந்து நெல் கொள்முதல் செய்வதைப்போல், பிடிக்கப்படும் மீன்களை அரசே கொள்முதல் செய்யும். வெளி மாநிலங்கள் மற்றும் வெளிநாடுகளுக்கான ஏற்றுமதிகளை முறைப்படுத்தி, மீனவர்களுக்கு கூடுதல் வருவாய் கிடைக்கும் வகையில் திட்டங்கள் கொண்டு வரப்படும். மக்களின் குடிநீர் ஆதாரங்களையும் மண்ணின் வளங்களையும் அழிக்கின்ற செயற்கை இறால் பண்ணைகள் முற்றிலுமாகத் தடை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 173
impact_mechanism: Guarantees a minimum price for fish and protects the environment by having the state act as a direct buyer and regulator.

promise_components.component: Government will procure fish directly from fishermen, similar to paddy procurement.
promise_components.analysis: The volume and value of Tamil Nadu's annual fish catch are not in the reference data. Procuring a highly perishable and diverse commodity like fish is logistically and financially far more complex than paddy. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Regulate exports to increase fishermen's income.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory statement. The mechanism is not specified and its impact is not quantifiable.

promise_components.component: Completely ban artificial shrimp farms.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory action with no direct fiscal cost, but with significant economic impact on the shrimp farming industry.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. A state-wide fish procurement scheme would require an enormous budget for purchasing, logistics, and cold chain infrastructure, making it fiscally unviable without massive funding that cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: A state procurement system would fundamentally alter the fish market, addressing the root cause of price volatility. A ban on shrimp farms is a permanent regulatory change addressing environmental degradation.
coverage_gap_note: The ban on artificial shrimp farms would negatively impact the owners and workers in that specific aquaculture sector.

promise_text_en: In addition to coastal fishermen, the welfare of inland fishermen who work in village lakes, ponds, and rivers will also be protected.
promise_text_ta: கடலோரப் பகுதி மீனவர்களைத் தவிர்த்து சிற்றூர்களில் ஏரி, குளம், ஆறுகளில் மீன்பிடித்தொழில் செய்து வரும் மீனவர்களின் நலனும் பாதுகாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 173
impact_mechanism: Extends a statement of support and inclusion to inland fishermen.

promise_components.component: The welfare of inland fishermen who work in village lakes, ponds, and rivers will also be protected.
promise_components.analysis: This is a vague statement of intent. It does not commit to any specific, measurable action, scheme, or budget. The number of inland fishermen is not available. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague to have an associated cost.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is a political signal of inclusion towards a specific group. It lacks any concrete mechanism, funding, or deliverable action, and therefore provides no material benefit or structural change as stated.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is entirely non-specific and offers no tangible benefits as written.

promise_text_en: Fuel will be provided to fishermen at its production cost, and coastal fishing hamlets will be declared as Panchayats.
promise_text_ta: உருவாக்க விலைக்கே மீனவர்களுக்கான எரிபொருள் வழங்கப்படுவதோடு, கடலோர மீனவச் சிற்றூர்கள் ஐம்பேராயமாக (பஞ்சாயத்தாக) அறிவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 173
impact_mechanism: Reduces a major operational cost for fishermen and grants administrative autonomy to their hamlets.

promise_components.component: Provide fuel to fishermen at its production cost.
promise_components.analysis: The definition of 'production cost' is ambiguous. The total annual fuel consumption by Tamil Nadu's fishing fleet is not available in the reference data, so the massive subsidy cannot be calculated. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Declare coastal fishing hamlets as Panchayats.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative reform. The number of new Panchayats to be created is unknown, so the administrative cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The fuel subsidy component would be extremely expensive and likely fiscally unsustainable for the state, but cannot be quantified. The administrative cost of creating new panchayats is also unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: The fuel subsidy is a symptomatic treatment for high operating costs, as it doesn't address the underlying energy dependence. Declaring hamlets as Panchayats, however, is a structural governance reform that addresses a lack of local autonomy.
coverage_gap_note: The fuel subsidy primarily benefits boat owners, not necessarily the wage-earning fishing laborers.

promise_text_en: The dominance of foreign investment in domestic trade will be curtailed, with priority given to domestic production. Businesses that operate without foreign investment will receive tax concessions.
promise_text_ta: உள்நாட்டு வணிகத்தில் அயல்நாட்டார் முதலீட்டு ஆதிக்கம் கட்டுப்படுத்தப்படும். உள்நாட்டு உருவாக்கங்களுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும். தொடக்கத்தில் இருந்தே அயல்நாட்டார் முதலீடில்லாமல் செயல்படும் வணிக நிறுவனங்களுக்கு வரிகளில் சலுகை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 175
impact_mechanism: Aims to protect domestic businesses from foreign competition through regulatory and fiscal measures.

promise_components.component: Curtail the dominance of foreign investment in domestic trade.
promise_components.analysis: Foreign Direct Investment (FDI) is primarily a Union Government subject. A state government has very limited legal power to 'curtail' it.

promise_components.component: Provide tax concessions to businesses that operate without foreign investment.
promise_components.analysis: The potential revenue loss from state tax concessions is unknown as the number of eligible businesses and the size of the concession are not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The fiscal impact would be in the form of foregone tax revenue, which cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government lacks the primary jurisdiction over foreign investment policy, making the core of the promise undeliverable. It is primarily a political statement about economic sovereignty rather than a feasible policy action.
coverage_gap_note: This policy could inadvertently harm domestic businesses that rely on foreign capital for growth and employment.

promise_text_en: The Merchant Welfare Board will be revived and made functional. To protect small traders from usurious lending, a 'Traders' Depository' (Vaniga Vaippagam) will be established at the constituency level to provide loans.
promise_text_ta: வணிகர் நல வாரியத்தைப் புதுப்பித்துச் செயல்முறைக்குக் கொண்டு வருவோம். கந்து வட்டிக் கொடுமையிலிருந்து சிறு வணிகர்களைப் பாதுகாத்திடத் தொகுதி வாரியாக வணிக வைப்பகம் தொடங்கப்பட்டு அவர்களுக்குக் கடன் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 175
impact_mechanism: Provides institutional support and access to affordable credit for small traders, protecting them from predatory lending.

promise_components.component: The Merchant Welfare Board will be revived and made functional.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action. The operational budget for the board is not specified.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'Traders' Depository' (Vaniga Vaippagam) at the constituency level to provide loans.
promise_components.analysis: This requires setting up new lending institutions in all 234 assembly constituencies. The capitalisation required for these institutions and their loan books is not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise requires a very large but unspecified capital outlay to establish a state-wide network of lending institutions, plus an annual operational budget for the welfare board.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of business failure for small traders: the lack of access to affordable, formal credit. Establishing permanent local lending institutions would be a structural solution to this problem.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness depends on the loan terms (interest rates, collateral) which are not specified; if not competitive, traders may not use the service.

promise_text_en: All businesses operating illegally and without proper authorization will be shut down. Information about their operators will be collected and appropriate action will be taken.
promise_text_ta: முறையான அனுமதியில்லாமலும் சட்டத்திற்குப் புறம்பாகவும் நடத்தப்பட்டு வரும் வணிக நிறுவனங்கள் அனைத்தும் முடக்கப்படும். அவர்களின் பின்னணி குறித்த தகவல்களைச் சேகரித்துத் தகுந்த நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 175
impact_mechanism: Enhances state revenue and ensures fair competition by enforcing existing business regulations and closing unauthorized operations.

promise_components.component: All businesses operating illegally and without proper authorization will be shut down.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory enforcement action. The number of such businesses is not available in the reference data, so a quantitative analysis is not possible.

promise_components.component: Information about their operators will be collected and appropriate action will be taken.
promise_components.analysis: This is a standard enforcement procedure. Data on the number of operators is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a regulatory function, not a direct spending program. Costs would be for strengthening enforcement, but are not specified. It could potentially increase state revenue. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy aims to formalize the economy and ensure regulatory compliance, which is a structural change. It tackles the root cause of lost tax revenue and unfair competition from the informal sector.
coverage_gap_note: This could negatively impact individuals whose livelihoods depend on the informal sector without providing an alternative.

promise_text_en: To honor traders who pay taxes regularly, they will be felicitated with the title 'Highest Taxpayer to the Government'. The best traders will be selected annually and honored with the 'Nalvanigar' (Good Trader) award.
promise_text_ta: ஆண்டுதோறும் முறையாக வரி கட்டும் வணிகர்களைப் பெருமைப்படுத்த அவர்களுக்கு “அதிக அளவில் அரசுக்கு வரி செலுத்தியோர்” என்று பட்டம் வழங்கி சிறப்பிக்கப்படும். சிறந்த வணிகர்கள் ஆண்டுதோறும் தேர்வு செய்யப்பட்டு அவர்களுக்கு ‘நல்வணிகர்' என்ற விருது வழங்கிப் பெருமைபடுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 175
impact_mechanism: Encourages tax compliance among traders through public recognition and awards, rather than purely punitive measures.

promise_components.component: Honor traders who pay taxes regularly with the title 'Highest Taxpayer to the Government'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a non-financial incentive. The cost is minimal, related to organizing felicitation events.

promise_components.component: The best traders will be selected annually and honored with the 'Nalvanigar' (Good Trader) award.
promise_components.analysis: This is a recognition-based scheme with negligible financial cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for awards and ceremonies would be negligible in the context of the state budget. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a recognition scheme that provides a positive incentive but does not alter the fundamental economic or regulatory structures that lead to tax evasion. It manages perceptions rather than fixing the underlying problem.

promise_text_en: While fees will be collected for utilities like gas, electricity, and water used by commercial establishments, the double tariff system will be abolished. The same rates as for domestic consumption will be applied.
promise_text_ta: வணிக நிறுவனங்கள் பயன்படுத்தும் எரிகாற்று உருளை, மின்சாரம், குடிநீர் போன்றவைகளுக்குக் கட்டணம் பெறப்படும். ஆனால் இரட்டிப்புக் கட்டணத்தை நீக்கிவிட்டு, வீட்டுப் பயன்பாட்டிற்கான கட்டணமே உறுதிபடுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 175
impact_mechanism: Reduces the operational costs for commercial establishments by lowering their utility bills to domestic rates.

promise_components.component: The double tariff system for utilities like gas, electricity, and water used by commercial establishments will be abolished, applying the same rates as for domestic consumption.
promise_components.analysis: This would cause a significant revenue loss for state utility providers. Data on the number of commercial establishments, their consumption, and the tariff difference is not available in the reference data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: This would result in a substantial revenue loss for state-owned utility companies, likely requiring a large subsidy from the state budget. The amount is incalculable with available data. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy shifts the financial burden from businesses to the state's utility providers. It alleviates a cost symptom for one group by creating a structural financial problem for another, rather than addressing the overall cost of utility provision.
coverage_gap_note: This could harm domestic consumers if it leads to financial instability and poorer service from utility companies.

promise_text_en: Adequate security will be provided to all commercial establishments to prevent threats, theft, and robbery by anti-social elements.
promise_text_ta: சமூகக் குற்றவாளிகளின் மிரட்டல்கள், திருட்டு, கொள்ளை நிகழ்வுகள் ஏதும் நடக்காமல் அனைத்து வணிக நிறுவனங்களுக்கும் தகுந்த பாதுகாப்பு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 175
impact_mechanism: Improves the business environment by increasing safety and reducing losses from crime through enhanced policing.

promise_components.component: Adequate security will be provided to all commercial establishments to prevent threats, theft, and robbery.
promise_components.analysis: This is a core function of the state police. 'Adequate' is not defined, but it implies increased police presence in commercial areas. The cost would be part of the police budget. No specific numbers are available.

fiscal_cost_note: Costs would be part of the Home Department's budget. Without specifics on what 'adequate security' entails (e.g., new personnel, equipment), the cost is incalculable. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to alter the security environment for businesses, a fundamental condition for their operation. If implemented as a permanent enhancement of police services, it addresses the root cause of insecurity.

promise_text_en: To prevent encroachment on roads and sidewalks, efforts will be undertaken to declare specific areas in each locality as designated 'Vending Zones'.
promise_text_ta: சாலைகளையும் நடைபாதைகளையும் வன்கவர்பு செய்யப்படுவதைத் தவிர்க்க, ஒவ்வொரு பகுதியிலும் குறிப்பிட்ட இடங்களை ‘விற்பனை மண்டலங்களாக’ அறிவித்திட முயற்சிகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 175
impact_mechanism: Organizes street vending to reduce traffic congestion and pedestrian obstruction while providing vendors with legitimate spaces to operate.

promise_components.component: Efforts will be undertaken to declare specific areas in each locality as designated 'Vending Zones'.
promise_components.analysis: This aligns with the Street Vendors Act, 2014, and requires local bodies to demarcate zones. Costs are primarily administrative and for minor infrastructure.

fiscal_cost_note: Costs are administrative (surveys, planning) and for minor infrastructure, falling on local bodies. The total cost is not specified and difficult to estimate. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating designated, legal spaces for vending, this policy addresses the core issue of encroachment and the precarious legal status of vendors. It's a structural solution that aims to balance multiple urban needs.
coverage_gap_note: Vendors who are not allocated a spot or who prefer high-traffic areas outside these zones would be left out or displaced.

promise_text_en: All street vendors will be officially registered and provided with identity cards. This will help prevent illegal encroachments and ensure that eligible vendors receive government welfare benefits.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து நடைபாதை வணிகர்களையும் முறைப்படி பதிவு செய்து அவர்களுக்கு அடையாள அட்டைகளை வழங்கிட நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் சட்டத்திற்குப் புறம்பான வன்கவர்புகளைத் தவிர்க்கலாம் மற்றும் தகுதியுள்ள வணிகர்களுக்கு அரசின் நலத்திட்டங்கள் சென்றடைவதை உறுதி செய்யலாம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 177
impact_mechanism: Formalizes the status of street vendors, enabling them to access social security and preventing harassment, while helping authorities manage urban spaces.

promise_components.component: All street vendors will be officially registered and provided with identity cards.
promise_components.analysis: This is a key provision of the Street Vendors Act, 2014. The cost is administrative (surveys, printing cards, database management). The number of street vendors is not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is administrative and relatively low. The exact cost is incalculable without knowing the number of vendors. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Legal recognition via registration and ID cards is a fundamental, structural change. It shifts vendors from being 'illegal encroachers' to recognized economic actors with rights, addressing the root of their precarity.
coverage_gap_note: The process might miss transient or seasonal vendors.

promise_text_en: Government-run Amma Unavagams, many of which are in disrepair, will be identified and renovated. Some roadside food vendors will be employed in these canteens, securing their income and ensuring the smooth operation of the canteens across Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: அரசினால் கொண்டுவரப்பட்ட அம்மா உணவகங்கள் பெரும்பாலான இடங்களில் போதிய பேணுதலின்றி உள்ளன. அவை அடையாளம் காணப்பட்டுச் சீர் செய்யப்படும். சாலையோர உணவுக் கடைகள் நடத்தும் சிலரை அரசின் அம்மா உணவகங்களில் பணியில் ஈடுபடுத்தி அவர்களுக்கான வருவாயை உறுதி செய்வதோடு, அரசின் உணவகங்கள் எவ்வகைத் தடையுமின்றிச் சீராக இயங்குவதைத் தமிழ்நாடு முழுவதும் உறுதி செய்திட முடியும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 177
impact_mechanism: Revitalizes a subsidized food program for the urban poor while providing stable employment to some street vendors.

promise_components.component: Government-run Amma Unavagams in disrepair will be identified and renovated.
promise_components.analysis: This involves a one-time capital expenditure for renovation. The number of canteens needing repair is not specified.

promise_components.component: Some roadside food vendors will be employed in these canteens.
promise_components.analysis: This provides a formal employment opportunity for a subset of vendors. The number to be employed is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Costs include a one-time renovation cost and recurring operational costs including salaries. The number of canteens and vendors is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a targeted intervention. It fixes broken infrastructure and provides jobs for a small group, which are symptomatic treatments. It doesn't address why the canteens fell into disrepair or the systemic precarity of street vending.
coverage_gap_note: Only 'some' roadside vendors will be employed, leaving the vast majority in their current situation.

promise_text_en: Food stall owners will be given proper waste management training. A system of fines or incentives will be introduced to ensure they maintain cleanliness around their stalls.
promise_text_ta: உணவுக் கடை வைத்திருப்பவர்களுக்கு முறையான கழிவு மேலாண்மைப் பயிற்சிகள் வழங்கப்படும். அவர்கள் தங்கள் கடைகளைச் சுற்றியுள்ள இடத்தைத் தூய்மையாக வைத்திருப்பதை உறுதி செய்ய தண்டத்தொகை அல்லது ஊக்கத்தொகை முறை கொண்டுவரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 177
impact_mechanism: Improves public hygiene by equipping food vendors with proper waste disposal practices, enforced by incentives or penalties.

promise_components.component: Food stall owners will be given proper waste management training.
promise_components.analysis: This is a public health initiative. The cost involves developing training materials and conducting sessions. The number of food stall owners is not in the reference data.

promise_components.component: A system of fines or incentives will be introduced to ensure cleanliness.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement mechanism that could be revenue-neutral.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for training would be relatively low, managed by local bodies. The system of fines could be revenue-neutral or positive. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy aims to change behavior and establish a new norm for cleanliness through education and enforcement. This is a structural approach to a specific public health and sanitation problem.

promise_text_en: Evicting the poor and denying them social space is not aesthetics; it is emptiness, a new form of untouchability. The Naam Tamilar government's stance is that urban aesthetics lies in an inclusive urban structure that embraces all people.
promise_text_ta: ஏழை எளிய மக்களை வெளியேற்றும், அவர்களுக்கான சமூக வெளியைத் தடுக்கும் நடவடிக்கை அழகியல் அல்ல, அது வெறுமை, புதிய தீண்டாமை. அனைத்து மக்களையும் உள்ளடக்கிய நகரக் கட்டமைப்பே நகரின் அழகியல் என்பது நாம் தமிழர் அரசின் நிலைப்பாடாக இருக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 177
impact_mechanism: This is a statement of principle guiding urban planning to prioritize social inclusion over exclusionary beautification projects.

promise_components.component: The government's stance is that urban aesthetics lies in an inclusive urban structure that embraces all people, not in evicting the poor.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy declaration or a statement of philosophy. It has no direct, measurable action or cost. It is a guiding principle for future actions.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a statement of intent that would influence future spending decisions on urban development. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a philosophical stance, not a concrete policy. While it points towards a structural change in thinking, by itself it has no mechanism for implementation or enforcement. It's about communicating a value system.

promise_text_en: The practice of humans manually handling human waste will be completely eradicated. Sanitation workers will be provided with advanced automated machinery.
promise_text_ta: இனியும் மாந்தக் கழிவை மாந்தர்களே அகற்றும் முறை முற்றிலுமாக மாற்றப்படும். அவர்களுக்கு மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட தானியங்கி இயந்திரக் கருவிகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 179
impact_mechanism: Aims to end the illegal and inhumane practice of manual scavenging by providing sanitation workers with modern, automated equipment.

promise_components.component: The practice of humans manually handling human waste will be completely eradicated.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise to enforce the existing Prohibition of Employment as Manual Scavengers and their Rehabilitation Act, 2013.

promise_components.component: Sanitation workers will be provided with advanced automated machinery.
promise_components.analysis: This requires capital investment in machinery. The number of workers or municipalities needing this equipment is not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is for purchasing specialized machinery for all municipalities. The total cost is significant but incalculable without data on existing equipment and needs. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Replacing a dangerous manual practice with mechanization is a fundamental, structural change. It addresses the problem at its technological and infrastructural root, aiming for permanent eradication.
coverage_gap_note: The policy must also include robust rehabilitation and alternative livelihood components for those displaced by mechanization.

promise_text_en: Technologies like 'HomoSEP', developed by IIT Madras, will be utilized for cleaning septic tanks.
promise_text_ta: இந்திய தொழிற்நுட்பக் கழகம் (IIT Madras) உருவாக்கியுள்ள 'HomoSEP' போன்ற கருவிகள் கழிவுநீர்த் தொட்டிகளைத் தூய்மைப்படுத்தப் பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 179
impact_mechanism: Reduces worker fatalities and improves dignity by replacing manual septic tank cleaning with a technological solution.

promise_components.component: Utilize technologies like 'HomoSEP' for cleaning septic tanks.
promise_components.analysis: This is a technology adoption policy. The cost is dependent on the number of units procured and the scale of deployment across the state. Reference data does not contain the number of septic tanks or the unit cost of 'HomoSEP' machines, so a fiscal estimate is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would be a capital expenditure, with costs depending on the number of units purchased and the scope of the rollout.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses the root cause of manual scavenging fatalities by introducing a specific technological alternative. It's a permanent shift in operational procedure rather than a temporary relief measure.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is specific to septic tank cleaning and does not cover other forms of hazardous sanitation work like sewer entry.

promise_text_en: The practice of employing only individuals from a specific community as sanitation workers is condemnable and will be completely banned.
promise_text_ta: ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட இனக்குழுவைச் சார்ந்தவர்களை மட்டும் தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர்களாகப் பயன்படுத்தி வரும் முறை கண்டனத்திற்குரியது. இது முற்றிலும் தடை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 179
impact_mechanism: Aims to break the caste-based linkage to sanitation work through a legal ban on discriminatory hiring practices.

promise_components.component: The practice of employing only individuals from a specific community as sanitation workers will be completely banned.
promise_components.analysis: This is a social reform and anti-discrimination policy. It carries no direct fiscal cost but requires significant political will and a robust enforcement mechanism to overcome deeply entrenched societal practices.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a regulatory and enforcement promise.
sustainability_reasoning: This directly targets the root cause of indignity and oppression in sanitation work, which is its historical and ongoing association with specific castes. A successful ban would be a fundamental structural change.
coverage_gap_note: A legal ban alone may not be sufficient without parallel efforts to provide alternative livelihoods and change social mindsets.

promise_text_en: High salaries will be offered for sanitation work, recognizing it as a primary and essential service. Employees will be recruited through a formal notification process, thereby making the role of a sanitation engineer a respected government job.
promise_text_ta: தூய்மைப் பணிக்கு உயர்ந்த ஊதியம் அளிக்கப்படும். மற்ற தொழில்களைவிட இத்தொழில் முதன்மையானது. எனவே அதற்கு முதன்மைத்தன்மை அளிக்கப்படும். முறையான அறிவிப்பு மூலம் ஊழியர்கள் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள். இதன்மூலம் தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர் பணி பெருமைக்குரிய அரசுப் பணியாகக் கருதப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 179
impact_mechanism: Improves the economic status and social dignity of sanitation workers by formalizing their employment within the government.

promise_components.component: Offer high salaries for sanitation work and recruit through a formal notification process.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a formal government cadre for sanitation workers with enhanced pay. The term 'high salaries' is not defined, and the number of sanitation workers to be recruited is not available in the reference data, making a cost estimate impossible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would be a recurring salary expenditure, but the number of workers and the proposed salary levels are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: By making sanitation work a formal, well-paid government job, this promise addresses the root causes of economic precarity and social stigma. It changes the nature of the employment relationship itself.
coverage_gap_note: The promise may not cover all sanitation workers, particularly those employed by private contractors or in informal settings.

promise_text_en: The dumping of toxic industrial waste into water bodies and public spaces will be completely stopped. A special monitoring committee will be established for this purpose. To prevent fatalities, sanitation workers will be provided with full protective gear.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் உள்ள ஆறுகள் உள்ளிட்ட நீர் நிலைகள் மற்றும் பொது இடங்களில் தொழிற்சாலை நச்சுக்கழிவுகள் கலப்பது முழுவதுமாகத் தடுக்கப்படும். இதற்கென்று தனிக் கண்காணிப்புக் குழு அமைக்கப்படும். உயிர்ச் சேதத்தை தவிர்க்க இதற்கென்று முழுப் பாதுகாப்புடன் கூடிய உடைகள் தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர்களுக்கு அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 179
impact_mechanism: Protects public health and worker safety through stricter environmental enforcement and provision of safety equipment.

promise_components.component: Stop the dumping of toxic industrial waste into water bodies and public spaces via a special monitoring committee.
promise_components.analysis: This is an environmental regulation and enforcement measure. The cost is primarily administrative for the functioning of the committee.

promise_components.component: Provide full protective gear to sanitation workers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a worker safety measure. The total cost depends on the number of sanitation workers and the cost per set of gear, neither of which is available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of the monitoring committee is administrative, while the cost for protective gear cannot be estimated without knowing the number of workers.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses root causes by aiming to prevent pollution at its source and mitigating occupational hazards through equipment. These are systemic changes, not temporary fixes.
coverage_gap_note: The promise focuses on preventing future dumping but does not specify plans for remediating existing contaminated sites.

promise_text_en: When collecting waste, significant attention will be given to segregating it into biodegradable, non-biodegradable, and chemical categories. Proper handling will reduce the unnecessary workload on sanitation engineers and simplify recycling.
promise_text_ta: குப்பைகளைச் சேகரிக்கின்ற பொழுது மக்கும் தன்மையுடையது, மக்காதது, வேதிக்கலப்பு கொண்டது என தரம் பிரித்து எடுக்கும் முறையில் மிகைக் கவனம் செலுத்தப்படும். இதனை முறையாகக் கையாளும்போதுதான் தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர்களின் தேவையற்ற வேலைப்பளு குறைக்கப்பட்டு, கழிவுகள் மறுசுழற்சி செய்வது எளிமையாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 181
impact_mechanism: Improves the efficiency of the entire waste management chain by mandating waste segregation at the point of collection.

promise_components.component: Give significant attention to segregating waste into biodegradable, non-biodegradable, and chemical categories during collection.
promise_components.analysis: This is a waste management process reform. It requires a large-scale public awareness campaign and potentially new infrastructure (e.g., segregated bins for ~2.0 crore ration-card households). The costs for such a campaign and infrastructure are not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs for a statewide public awareness campaign and potential distribution of segregated bins are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Waste segregation at source is a fundamental change to the waste management system. It addresses the root problem of mixed waste, which complicates recycling and disposal and increases the burden on workers.
coverage_gap_note: Successful implementation often requires an enforcement mechanism with penalties for non-compliance, which is not mentioned.

promise_text_en: All sanitation workers, including those under the National Urban Livelihoods Mission (NULM), who are not permanent employees in corporations, municipalities, and panchayats, will be made permanent government employees with time-scale pay. The concept of contract sanitation workers will be abolished.
promise_text_ta: தேசிய நகர்ப்புற வாழ்வாதார இயக்கத்தின் (NULM) கீழ் பணிபுரியும் பணியாளர்கள் உட்பட மாநகராட்சி, நகராட்சி மற்றும் ஊராட்சி மன்றங்களில் பணி நிலைப்படுத்தப்படாமல் இருக்கும் தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர்கள் அனைவரும் காலமுறை ஊதியம் பெறும் நிலையான அரசு ஊழியர்களாக மாற்றப்படுவார்கள். ஒப்பந்தத் தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர்கள் என்பதே இருக்கக்கூடாது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 181
impact_mechanism: Provides job security and improved pay for contract sanitation workers by regularizing their employment.

promise_components.component: Make all non-permanent sanitation workers in local bodies permanent government employees with time-scale pay.
promise_components.analysis: This promise aims to abolish contract work for sanitation services in government bodies. The number of contract workers under corporations, municipalities, and panchayats is not available in the reference data, so the significant fiscal impact on salary and pension budgets cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Regularizing a large workforce would create a substantial and permanent increase in the state's salary and pension expenditure, likely straining the discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of precarity and low wages for contract workers by changing their employment status to permanent and secure. It is a fundamental shift in their relationship with the state as an employer.
coverage_gap_note: This would not cover sanitation workers employed by fully private entities not under contract with government bodies.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will reverse the handover of Chennai Corporation zones (specifically zones 5 and 6) to private companies. The privatization of sanitation work will be completely abolished.
promise_text_ta: சென்னை மாநகராட்சியின் மண்டலங்கள் (குறிப்பாக மண்டலம் 5 மற்றும் 6) தனியார் நிறுவனங்களுக்குத் தாரைவார்க்கப்படுவதை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு திரும்பப் பெறும். தூய்மைப்பணி தனியார்மயமாக்கப்படுவது முற்றிலும் ஒழிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 181
impact_mechanism: Reverses the privatization of a core public service, bringing sanitation work back under direct government management.

promise_components.component: Reverse the handover of Chennai Corporation zones to private companies and abolish sanitation work privatization.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy reversal to de-privatize sanitation services. The fiscal impact is unknown, as it would involve costs of potential contract termination and the operational expenses of running the service directly, compared against the current cost of private contracts. No data is available for this comparison.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The net financial effect is unknown and depends on contract clauses and the relative efficiency of public vs. private provision.
sustainability_reasoning: This changes the service provider but does not inherently fix the root problems of sanitation work (low pay, poor conditions, lack of mechanization). While ideologically significant, whether a public or private entity provides the service is a question of delivery model, not a solution in itself.
coverage_gap_note: Shifting to public provision does not automatically guarantee better service or better working conditions without other structural reforms.

promise_text_en: All fabricated cases filed against sanitation workers, lawyers, and social activists who peacefully protested for their rights in Chennai in August 2025 will be immediately withdrawn.
promise_text_ta: 2025ஆம் ஆண்டு ஆகத்து மாதம் சென்னையில் நடைபெற்ற தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர்கள் போராட்டங்களின்போது, அமைதியான முறையில் உரிமைகளைக் கோரிய தூய்மைப் பொறியாளர்கள், வழக்கறிஞர்கள் மற்றும் சமூக ஆர்வலர்கள் மீது தொடுக்கப்பட்டுள்ள அனைத்துப் புனைவு வழக்குகளும் உடனடியாகத் திரும்பப் பெறப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 181
impact_mechanism: Provides legal relief to a specific group of protestors by using the state's executive power to withdraw pending cases.

promise_components.component: Withdraw all fabricated cases filed against sanitation workers, lawyers, and activists from the August 2025 protest.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action that can be executed by the state government. It has no direct fiscal cost and serves as a political gesture to a specific group.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a one-time action addressing the consequences of a specific past event. It provides relief to the individuals involved but does not address the underlying grievances that led to the protest in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: The relief is limited to individuals involved in a single, specified protest.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will put a stop to the various malpractices in the member registration process of the Unorganized Workers' Welfare Board.
promise_text_ta: அமைப்புச் சாராத் தொழிலாளர் நலவாரியத்தில் உறுப்பினர் சேர்க்கையில் பல்வேறு முறைகேடுகள் நடந்து வருகிறது. நாம் தமிழர் அரசு இந்த முறைகேடுகளைத் தடுத்து நிறுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 183
impact_mechanism: Improves access to welfare benefits for unorganized workers by reforming the governance of the registration board.

promise_components.component: Stop malpractices in the member registration process of the Unorganized Workers' Welfare Board.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance reform promise aimed at improving the integrity and accessibility of an existing welfare system. It involves administrative oversight and anti-corruption measures, with no major direct fiscal cost.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. Costs are administrative and related to improved governance.
sustainability_reasoning: Tackling corruption and malpractice in a welfare delivery system is a structural reform. It addresses a root cause of exclusion, ensuring that the intended beneficiaries can access the system as designed.
coverage_gap_note: This improves access to registration but does not address the quantum or adequacy of the benefits provided by the board.

promise_text_en: Interference from ruling parties will be banned, and measures will be taken to ensure the welfare board operates autonomously. Membership registration rules will be simplified. Offices for unorganized worker registration will be opened in major towns within each district, not just at the district headquarters.
promise_text_ta: ஆளுங்கட்சிகளின் தலையீட்டிற்குத் தடை கொண்டு வரப்பட்டு, நல வாரியம் தன்னுரிமையுடன் இயங்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். உறுப்பினர் சேர்க்கை விதிமுறைகள் எளிதாக இருக்கும். மாவட்டத்தின் தலைநகரங்களில் மட்டுமின்றி அந்த மாவட்டங்களில் உள்ள முதன்மையான ஊர்கள்தோறும் அமைப்புச் சாரா உறுப்பினர் சேர்க்கைக்கான அலுவலகம் திறக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 183
impact_mechanism: Enhances access to welfare for unorganized workers by increasing the autonomy and physical reach of the welfare board.

promise_components.component: Ensure the Unorganized Workers' Welfare Board operates autonomously, free from political interference.
promise_components.analysis: A governance reform with no direct fiscal cost, but requires significant political will to relinquish control.

promise_components.component: Simplify membership registration rules.
promise_components.analysis: An administrative reform to reduce barriers to entry for workers. No direct fiscal cost.

promise_components.component: Open registration offices in major towns within each district.
promise_components.analysis: An infrastructure and accessibility improvement. This has a fiscal cost for setting up and staffing new offices, but the number of 'major towns' is not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. While governance reforms are cost-free, the expense of opening and staffing new offices across multiple towns is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Ensuring autonomy, simplifying rules, and decentralizing access are all structural reforms. They address fundamental barriers (political, bureaucratic, geographic) that prevent workers from accessing welfare systems.
coverage_gap_note: While improving access, the promise does not address the financial sustainability or benefit levels of the welfare board itself.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will organize special camps to connect all unorganized workers with the welfare board, ensuring that welfare schemes reach them fully and quickly.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு சிறப்புத் தங்ககங்கள் (முகாம்கள்) அமைத்து, அனைத்து அமைப்புச் சாராத் தொழிலாளர்களையும் நலவாரியத்துடன் இணைத்து, அவர்களுக்கான நலத் திட்டங்கள் முழுமையாகவும் விரைவாகவும் சென்றடைவதை உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 184
impact_mechanism: Improves access to existing welfare schemes by actively enrolling unorganized workers through dedicated camps.

promise_components.component: Organize special camps to connect all unorganized workers with the welfare board.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action. The number of unorganized workers is not available in the reference data, so the scale and cost of the camps cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is administrative and depends on the number of unorganized workers, which is data unavailable.
sustainability_reasoning: This improves the delivery of existing relief measures. It does not address the root causes of precarious employment or low wages for unorganized workers.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes workers in the organized sector or those not officially classified as 'unorganized' who may still face precarious conditions.

promise_text_en: To ensure security in old age for the working class, a suitable pension amount necessary for their livelihood will be provided. This pension will be credited directly to the workers' bank accounts without any intermediaries.
promise_text_ta: உழைக்கும் வகுப்பினரின் முதுமைக்காலப் பாதுகாப்பை உறுதி செய்யும் வகையில், அவர்களின் வாழ்வாதாரத்திற்குத் தேவையான தகுந்த ஓய்வூதியத் தொகை முறையாக வழங்கப்படும். இடைத்தரகர்களின் குறுக்கீடு இன்றி, இந்த ஓய்வூதியத் தொகை நேரடியாகத் தொழிலாளர்களின் வைப்பகக் கணக்கிலேயே வரவு வைக்கப்படுவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 184
impact_mechanism: Establishes a direct income floor for the working class in old age through a new pension scheme.

promise_components.component: Provide a suitable pension amount to the working class, credited directly to bank accounts.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is undefined. The terms 'working class' and 'suitable pension amount' are not specified. The number of beneficiaries and the pension value are unknown, so no calculation is possible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vaguely worded to estimate the number of beneficiaries or the total financial outlay.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented, a universal or broad-based pension creates a permanent social safety net, which is a structural solution to old-age poverty. However, its vagueness makes it a statement of intent rather than a concrete plan.
coverage_gap_note: The ambiguous term 'working class' could exclude significant portions of the population, such as informal agricultural laborers or the long-term unemployed.

promise_text_en: The disparity in marriage assistance amounts between construction workers and other unorganized sector workers will be completely eliminated. All unorganized workers will receive sufficient marriage assistance to cover their wedding expenses.
promise_text_ta: கட்டுமானத் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும் ஏனைய அமைப்புச் சாரா வாரியத் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும் இடையே நிலவும் திருமணப் பொருளுதவித் திட்ட தொகை ஒதுக்கீடு இடைவெளி, முழுமையாகக் களையப்படும். உழைக்கும் வகுப்பைச் சார்ந்த அனைத்து அமைப்புச் சாராத் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும், அவர்களது இல்லத் திருமணத்திற்குப் போதிய செலவினங்களை எதிர்கொள்ளும் வகையில் அதற்கான திருமணப் பொருளுதவி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 184
impact_mechanism: Equalizes a specific welfare benefit (marriage assistance) across different categories of unorganized workers.

promise_components.component: Eliminate disparity in marriage assistance amounts between construction workers and other unorganized sector workers.
promise_components.analysis: Data on existing marriage assistance schemes, the number of unorganized workers, their marriage rates, and the proposed 'sufficient' amount are not available in the reference data. No calculation is possible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. There is no data available to estimate the number of potential beneficiaries or the required financial outlay.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides a one-time cash transfer for a specific life event. While helpful, it alleviates a symptom (wedding expenses) rather than addressing the root cause of low savings or income.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to unorganized workers who are getting married and does not assist with other major life expenses.

promise_text_en: Proper and adequate compensation schemes will be implemented. In case of accidental death at the workplace, uniform compensation will be provided to construction workers and other categories of workers without any disparity.
