promise_text_ta: முறையான மற்றும் போதுமான இழப்பீட்டுத் திட்டங்கள் செயல்படுத்தப்படும். பணியிடங்களில் ஏற்படும் நேர்ச்சிகளினால் உயிரிழக்கும் கட்டுமானத் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு, மற்ற பிரிவு தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும் நேர்ச்சி மரணங்களுக்கான உரிய இழப்பீட்டுத் தொகைகள் வேறுபாடு இன்றி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 184
impact_mechanism: Provides financial security to families of deceased workers by standardizing compensation for workplace fatalities.

promise_components.component: Provide uniform compensation for accidental death at the workplace for construction and other workers.
promise_components.analysis: The promise of 'proper and adequate' compensation is not quantified. The number of workplace fatalities per year is not available in the reference data, so the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The annual number of incidents and the proposed compensation amount are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a reactive measure that provides crucial financial relief after a tragedy. It does not address the root causes of workplace accidents, such as inadequate safety protocols or enforcement.
coverage_gap_note: This promise focuses on fatalities and may not cover non-fatal injuries or occupational diseases, which are more common.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will ensure proper stable income and social security for stone quarry workers. Considering their working conditions, high-quality medical facilities, provident funds, and uninterrupted higher education opportunities for their children will be streamlined through the Tamil Nadu Construction Workers Welfare Board.
promise_text_ta: கல் உடைக்கும் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு முறையான நிலையான வருவாய் மற்றும் சமூகப் பாதுகாப்பு வசதிகள் கிடைப்பதை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும். குறிப்பாக, இவர்களது பணிச் சூழலைக் கருத்தில் கொண்டு, உயர் மருத்துவ வசதிகள், வருங்கால வைப்புத் தொகை மற்றும் பிள்ளைகளுக்கான தடையற்ற உயர்கல்வி வாய்ப்புகள் தமிழ்நாடு கட்டுமானத் தொழிலாளர்கள் நல வாரியத்தின் மூலம் செம்மைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 185
impact_mechanism: Improves social security and welfare for stone quarry workers by integrating them into an existing welfare board and providing dedicated services.

promise_components.component: Provide stable income, social security, medical facilities, provident funds, and education for children of stone quarry workers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of stone quarry workers is not available in the reference data. The costs for providing these comprehensive services (medical, PF, education) are not specified and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of beneficiaries and the cost of the comprehensive services promised are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to create a comprehensive support system including income security, social safety nets (provident fund), and inter-generational mobility (education). These are structural interventions that address root causes of poverty.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are narrowly targeted at stone quarry workers, excluding workers in other hazardous industries.

promise_text_en: To maintain environmental balance, the operation of stone quarries will be regulated, and their numbers will be gradually reduced to conserve natural resources. When this is done, affected workers will be provided with alternative employment opportunities and proper rehabilitation plans to ensure their livelihoods are not affected.
promise_text_ta: சுற்றுச்சூழல் சமநிலையைப் பேணும் பொருட்டு, கற்சுரங்கங்களின் (குவாரிகளின்) செயல்பாடுகள் முறைப்படுத்தப்படுவதோடு, இயற்கை வளங்களைப் பாதுகாக்கும் நோக்கில் கற்சுரங்கங்களின் எண்ணிக்கை படிப்படியாகக் குறைக்கப்படும். அவ்வாறு குறைக்கப்படும்போது தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு, அவர்களின் வாழ்வாதாரம் எவ்வகையிலும் பாதிக்காமல் மாற்றுத் தொழில் வாய்ப்புகளும், உரிய மறுவாழ்வுத் திட்டங்களும் செய்து தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 185
impact_mechanism: Mitigates the economic impact of environmental regulation on workers by providing a 'just transition' pathway.

promise_components.component: Regulate and reduce the number of stone quarries while providing affected workers with alternative employment and rehabilitation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy for a 'just transition'. The number of workers who would be affected by quarry closures is not in the reference data. The cost of 'alternative employment' and 'rehabilitation' cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scale of the industrial change and the cost of retraining and re-employing the workforce are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: A just transition plan is a structural approach to managing economic change caused by policy shifts. It addresses the root problem of job loss by creating new pathways for livelihoods, rather than just providing temporary relief.
coverage_gap_note: The success of this promise is entirely dependent on the availability and quality of 'alternative employment', which is often difficult to create.

promise_text_en: Housing will be built for all tea estate workers across Tamil Nadu. Their educated children will be given priority in administrative jobs. All facilities, including healthcare and clean drinking water, will be provided in their residential areas. Quality schools will be established in the region for the workers' children.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு முழுதும் உள்ள தேயிலைத்தோட்ட தொழிலாளர்களுக்குச் சொந்தக் குடியிருப்புகள் கட்டித்தரப்படும். உயர்கல்வி பயின்ற தொழிலாளர்களின் பிள்ளைகளுக்கு நிருவாகப் பணிகளில் முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும். தொழிலாளர்களின் குடியிருப்புப் பகுதிகளில் மருத்துவம், தூய குடிநீர் உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்து வசதிகளும் செய்து கொடுக்கப்படும். தொழிலாளர் பிள்ளைகளின் கல்விக்காக தரமான பள்ளிகள் அப்பகுதியில் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 185
impact_mechanism: Improves living standards and opportunities for tea estate workers through direct provision of housing, jobs, and social infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Build housing for all tea estate workers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of tea estate workers is not available in the reference data, so the number of housing units required cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Give priority in administrative jobs to their educated children.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision, not a direct fiscal cost. The number of available jobs or eligible children is unknown.

promise_components.component: Provide healthcare, clean water, and quality schools in their residential areas.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of building and staffing new schools and healthcare facilities cannot be calculated without knowing the size of the beneficiary population.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This involves major capital expenditure on housing, schools, and healthcare, but the number of beneficiaries is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing housing, education, and healthcare access are foundational developmental interventions. They address the root causes of poverty and lack of opportunity in historically marginalized communities.
coverage_gap_note: Job priority for one group's children could be seen as discriminatory and may face legal challenges from other communities.

promise_text_en: The 'Syndicate' system in cooperative auction centers will be abolished, which will increase revenue for both the government and the workers. Adulteration in tea powder sales will be completely eliminated, and quality production methods will be introduced.
promise_text_ta: கூட்டுறவு ஏல மையங்களில் 'கூட்டமைப்பு' (Syndicate) முறை ஒழிக்கப்படும். இதனால் அரசுக்கும் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும் வருவாய் கூடும். தேயிலைத்தூள் விற்பனையில் கலப்படங்கள் முழுதுமாக ஒழிக்கப்பட்டு, தரமான உருவாக்க முறை கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 185
impact_mechanism: Increases revenue for tea producers by tackling market collusion and improving product quality.

promise_components.component: Abolish the 'Syndicate' system in cooperative auction centers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory and enforcement action. The cost is administrative and likely low. The potential revenue increase is not quantifiable from the given data.

promise_components.component: Eliminate adulteration in tea powder and introduce quality production methods.
promise_components.analysis: This involves strengthening food safety and agricultural extension services. The cost is administrative.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise involves administrative and enforcement actions with a low direct fiscal cost but an unquantifiable potential revenue benefit.
sustainability_reasoning: Addressing market failure (collusion) and improving product quality are structural reforms. They aim to fix the underlying mechanics of the market to ensure producers receive a fairer price for their goods.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to tea producers who participate in the cooperative auction system.

promise_text_en: Tea estate workers living in landslide-prone areas will be relocated to safer locations. This will prevent the loss of life that occurs annually due to landslides.
promise_text_ta: நிலச்சரிவு ஏற்படக்கூடியப் பகுதிகளில் வசிக்கும் தேயிலைத் தோட்டத் தொழிலாளர்கள் பாதுகாப்பான இடத்தில் குடியமர்த்தப் படுவார்கள். இதன் மூலம் ஒவ்வோர் ஆண்டும் நிலச்சரிவின் மூலம் நிகழும் உயிரிழப்புகள் தவிர்க்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 185
impact_mechanism: Prevents loss of life by physically relocating communities from areas with a recurring natural hazard.

promise_components.component: Relocate tea estate workers living in landslide-prone areas to safer locations.
promise_components.analysis: The number of workers living in such high-risk zones is not available in the reference data. The cost of land acquisition and construction for relocation cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of people requiring relocation and the associated costs for land and new housing are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a permanent solution to a recurring, life-threatening problem. By moving people out of harm's way, it structurally eliminates the risk of death from landslides in that location.
coverage_gap_note: Relocation must be paired with livelihood support to be successful, as moving people away from their workplace can create new economic problems.

promise_text_en: Accepting the long-standing demands of the Home Guard, their incentive pay will be increased to improve their economic status.
promise_text_ta: ஊர்க்காவல் படையினரின் நீண்டகாலக் கோரிக்கைகளை ஏற்று, அவர்களின் பொருளாதார நிலையை மேம்படுத்தும் வகையில் தகுந்த ஊக்கத்தொகை உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 186
impact_mechanism: Increases the income of Home Guard members through a direct pay raise.

promise_components.component: Increase incentive pay for Home Guard members.
promise_components.analysis: The number of Home Guard members in Tamil Nadu and their current pay structure are not available in the reference data. The quantum of the proposed increase is also not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of beneficiaries and the size of the pay increase are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a direct cash benefit that addresses the symptom of low pay. It does not change the structural nature of their employment, role, or overall compensation system.

promise_text_en: The right to form unions to protect employees' rights and present their demands will be legally granted. It will be ensured that no retaliatory action is taken against employees involved in union activities.
promise_text_ta: ஊழியர்களின் உரிமைகளைப் பாதுகாக்கவும், தங்களின் கோரிக்கைகளை முன்வைக்கவும் சங்கம் அமைக்கும் உரிமை சட்டமுறையில் வழங்கப்படும். சங்க நடவடிக்கைகளில் ஈடுபடும் ஊழியர்கள் மீது எவ்வகைப் பழிவாங்கும் நடவடிக்கைகளும் மேற்கொள்ளப்படாது என்பது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 186
impact_mechanism: Strengthens labor rights and collective bargaining power by legally reinforcing protections for union activities.

promise_components.component: The right to form unions will be legally granted.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative promise. The right to form trade unions is already a fundamental right under Article 19(1)(c) of the Constitution of India and is governed by the Trade Unions Act, 1926. This promise appears to reinforce existing legal frameworks.

promise_components.component: It will be ensured that no retaliatory action is taken against employees involved in union activities.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement promise. It would require strengthening the state's labor department and judicial mechanisms to handle disputes and penalize employers for unfair labor practices. No numerical analysis is possible.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is primarily administrative for enforcement and cannot be calculated from the provided data. It is expected to be a minor part of the discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to alter the fundamental power dynamics between employers and employees by strengthening legal protections. If enforced, it creates a lasting change in working conditions and empowers collective bargaining.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes self-employed individuals and those in sectors where unionization is not prevalent or practical.

promise_text_en: To counter the dominance of private companies, the Tamil Nadu government itself will launch an advanced ride-hailing mobile app called 'Ula'. Instead of the high commission fees charged by private companies, only a minimal administrative fee will be collected.
promise_text_ta: தனியார் நிறுவனங்களின் ஆதிக்கத்தை எதிர்கொள்ளும் வகையில், தமிழக அரசே ‘உலா’ என்கிற மேம்பட்ட ஊர்தி ஓட்டும் மென்பொருளை (Mobile App) அறிமுகப்படுத்தும். இதில் தனியார் நிறுவனங்கள் பெறக்கூடிய அதிகப்படியான சேவைக் கட்டணங்களுக்கு மாற்றாக, மிகக் குறைந்த அளவிலான நிருவாகக் கட்டணம் மட்டுமே பெறப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 186
impact_mechanism: Reduces the commission burden on ride-hailing drivers by creating a state-owned platform, potentially increasing their net income.

promise_components.component: The Tamil Nadu government will launch a ride-hailing mobile app called 'Ula'.
promise_components.analysis: This requires significant capital investment in technology development, marketing, and operations to create a platform competitive with established private players.

promise_components.component: Only a minimal administrative fee will be collected from drivers.
promise_components.analysis: This is the core value proposition for drivers. The financial viability of the platform would depend on whether this 'minimal fee' can cover the substantial operational costs of a large-scale tech service. Cost data is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of developing, launching, and sustaining a competitive tech platform is unknown but would be substantial.
sustainability_reasoning: It attempts to create a permanent, alternative market structure for ride-hailing services, directly challenging the high-commission model of private aggregators. Its success is uncertain, but the intent is to fix a systemic issue for drivers.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to drivers and users in urban and semi-urban areas where such services are viable.

promise_text_en: As per the long-standing demand of the Tamil Nadu Building Engineers Federation, a "Building Engineers' Welfare Board" will be established. They will be given due approval and contracts in the construction works of the Tamil Nadu government.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு கட்டடப் பொறியாளர்கள் கூட்டமைப்பு சார்பான நீண்ட நாள் கோரிக்கையான, "கட்டடப் பொறியாளர் நல வாரியம்" அமைக்கப்படும். அவர்களுக்குத் தமிழக அரசின் கட்டுமானப் பணிகளில் உரிய ஏற்பிசைவும், குத்தகைப் பணிகளும் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 186
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated institutional body to represent the interests of building engineers and potentially channel government work to them.

promise_components.component: A 'Building Engineers' Welfare Board' will be established.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new government body with administrative staff and an operational budget. The number of potential beneficiaries (building engineers) is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: They will be given due approval and contracts in government construction works.
promise_components.analysis: This suggests a policy of preferential treatment in public procurement. This could conflict with existing transparent tendering laws and regulations that mandate open competition.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs include setting up and running the board, plus any welfare schemes. The financial impact of altering procurement rules is also unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise establishes a board for a specific professional group, which functions more as political patronage than a solution to a widespread societal problem. The component promising contracts may not be legally tenable under fair procurement laws.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes all other professionals, laborers, and stakeholders in the vast construction sector.

promise_text_en: A comprehensive social security scheme will be implemented for gig workers, ensuring fair wages for their labor. It will include accident insurance, pensions, and legal protection against unfair dismissal.
promise_text_ta: தற்காலிகச் சேவைத் தொழிலாளர்களின் உழைப்பிற்கேற்ற முறையான ஊதியத்தை உறுதி செய்யும். நேர்ச்சிக் காப்பீடு, ஓய்வூதியம் மற்றும் முறையற்ற பணி நீக்கங்களுக்கு எதிரான சட்டப் பாதுகாப்பு ஆகியவற்றை உள்ளடக்கிய ஒரு விரிவான சமூகப் பாதுகாப்புத் திட்டத்தை இவர்களுக்காகச் செயல்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 187
impact_mechanism: Provides a social safety net for a vulnerable segment of the workforce currently lacking labor protections and benefits.

promise_components.component: A comprehensive social security scheme will be implemented for gig workers.
promise_components.analysis: This would require a new legislative framework and a significant, recurring budget for benefits like insurance and pensions. The number of gig workers in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: It will include fair wages, accident insurance, pensions, and legal protection against unfair dismissal.
promise_components.analysis: Defining and enforcing 'fair wages' in a platform-based economy is complex. The cost of providing insurance and pensions is incalculable without beneficiary numbers and scheme details.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of gig workers and the per-beneficiary cost for pensions and insurance are unknown. This would likely be a major new recurring expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of precarity in the gig economy by creating a formal, legal safety net. It aims to fundamentally change the working conditions and long-term security for this growing group of workers.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness depends on a clear and inclusive definition of 'gig worker', which might exclude some forms of informal labor.

promise_text_en: The 'Inner Line Permit' system, which is in practice in states like Arunachal Pradesh, Nagaland, Mizoram, and Manipur, will be implemented in Tamil Nadu by the Naam Tamilar party.
promise_text_ta: அருணாச்சலப் பிரதேசம், நாகாலாந்து, மிசோரம் மற்றும் மணிப்பூர் ஆகிய மாநிலங்களில் நடைமுறையில் உள்ள ‘உள்நுழைவு அனுமதிச் சீட்டு' (Inner Line Permit) முறையைத் தமிழ்நாட்டிலும் நாம் தமிழர் கட்சி நடைமுறைப்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 187
impact_mechanism: Restricts the entry and movement of Indian citizens from other states into Tamil Nadu through a permit system.

promise_components.component: The 'Inner Line Permit' (ILP) system will be implemented in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative and constitutional matter, not a state policy decision. The ILP system restricts the fundamental right to move freely and reside anywhere in India (Article 19). It can only be implemented by the Central Government, typically for security reasons in border areas.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a legislative proposal that the state government has no power to enact. It is therefore uncosted and fiscally irrelevant as a state promise.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is legally and constitutionally undeliverable by a state government. It infringes upon the fundamental rights of Indian citizens and falls under the exclusive domain of the Union Government. It serves only as political signalling.
coverage_gap_note: This policy is exclusionary and targets Indian citizens from other states.

promise_text_en: A separate registry will be created for every person from another state entering Tamil Nadu, recording their address, employer, and duration of stay. This will prevent them from obtaining voting rights, thereby securing the political power of Tamils and fully ensuring employment for Tamils under the 'Tamil Nadu jobs for Tamils' policy.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்திற்குள் நுழையும் ஒவ்வொரு வெளிமாநிலத்தவருக்கும் தனி தரவுத்தளம் (Registry) உருவாக்கப்பட்டு, வருபவர்களின் முகவரி, பணிபுரியும் நிறுவனம் மற்றும் தங்கும் காலம் ஆகியவைப் பதிவு செய்யப்படும். இதன் மூலம், வெளிமாநிலத்தவருக்கு வாக்குரிமை வழங்கப்படுவதைத் தடுத்து, தமிழர்களின் அரசியல் அதிகாரத்தை நிலைநாட்டவும், 'தமிழ்நாட்டு வேலை தமிழர்களுக்கே' என்ற கொள்கையின் கீழ் வேலைவாய்ப்பை முழுமையாக உறுதிப்படுத்தவும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 187
impact_mechanism: Aims to control the political rights of internal migrants by creating a surveillance registry and unconstitutionally denying them voting rights.

promise_components.component: A separate registry will be created for every person from another state entering Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This would require a massive and costly state-wide surveillance and administrative apparatus.

promise_components.component: This will prevent them from obtaining voting rights.
promise_components.analysis: This is unconstitutional. The Election Commission of India, under central law, determines voter eligibility based on residency ('ordinarily resident'), not state of origin. A state government cannot override this.

fiscal_cost_note: The proposal is unconstitutional, making fiscal analysis moot. The cost of the proposed registry would be enormous but cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: The core component of denying voting rights is unconstitutional and cannot be implemented by a state government. The promise is legally void and functions as nativist political rhetoric.
coverage_gap_note: This policy targets and aims to disenfranchise Indian citizens from other states.

promise_text_en: Only individuals from other states who have lived in Tamil Nadu for 15 years will be given a proper family card and voting rights. Only after that will they be granted the right to purchase property in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: 15 ஆண்டுகள் தமிழ்நாட்டில் வாழும் பிற மாநிலத்தவர்களுக்கு மட்டுமே முறையான குடும்ப அட்டையும், வாக்காளர் உரிமையும் அளிக்கப்படும். அதன்பிறகு தான் அவர்கள் தமிழ்நாட்டிற்குள் சொத்து வாங்கும் உரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 187
impact_mechanism: Aims to restrict the civil, political, and economic rights of internal migrants by imposing a long-term residency requirement.

promise_components.component: Only individuals from other states who have lived in Tamil Nadu for 15 years will be given a proper family card and voting rights.
promise_components.analysis: This is unconstitutional. Voting rights are based on being 'ordinarily resident' as per the Representation of the People Act, not a 15-year waiting period. State governments cannot set such conditions.

promise_components.component: Only after 15 years will they be granted the right to purchase property in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is unconstitutional. The right to acquire, hold, and dispose of property is a constitutional right for all citizens (Article 300-A), and states cannot discriminate based on state of origin.

fiscal_cost_note: This promise is legally impossible to implement, so it has no fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is fundamentally unconstitutional and would be struck down by any court. It is a legally impossible proposal that serves only as political signalling.
coverage_gap_note: This policy targets and aims to disenfranchise and dispossess Indian citizens from other states.

promise_text_en: A proper database of migrant workers involved in various construction and development projects in Tamil Nadu will be created. A robust 'Migrant Worker Regulation Act' will be implemented.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் பல்வேறு கட்டுமான மற்றும் உருவாக்கப் பணிகளில் ஈடுபட்டுள்ள பிற மாநிலத் தொழிலாளர்கள் குறித்த முறையான தரவுத்தளம் (Database) உருவாக்கப்படும். ஒரு சீரிய ‘புலம்பெயர் தொழிலாளர் ஒழுங்குமுறைச் சட்டம்’ நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 187
impact_mechanism: Improves the state's ability to monitor migrant worker conditions and enforce labor laws through formal registration and regulation.

promise_components.component: A proper database of migrant workers involved in various projects will be created.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative task to improve governance and welfare delivery. It would require a dedicated portal and field staff for registration.

promise_components.component: A robust 'Migrant Worker Regulation Act' will be implemented.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative action to strengthen protections for migrant workers, potentially building on the existing central Inter-State Migrant Workmen Act, 1979. This focuses on welfare and rights, not exclusion.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost would be administrative, for setting up the database and enforcement machinery. This is not calculable from the data but is expected to be a manageable expense.
sustainability_reasoning: Unlike exclusionary promises, this focuses on regulation and welfare. Creating a formal database and legal framework is a structural change that addresses the vulnerability of migrant workers and enables better policy intervention and rights protection.
coverage_gap_note: Effectiveness depends on reaching highly mobile workers in the informal sector who may evade registration.

promise_text_en: Work hours will be set to 6 hours for female police officers and 8 hours for male police officers.
promise_text_ta: பெண் காவலர்களுக்கு 6 மணி நேர வேலை! ஆண் காவலர்களுக்கு 8 மணி நேர வேலை!
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 188
impact_mechanism: Improves the work-life balance and reduces occupational stress for police personnel by shortening their daily work shifts.

promise_components.component: Work hours will be set to 6 hours for female police officers.
promise_components.analysis: To maintain 24/7 coverage, moving from a standard 8-hour shift (3 shifts/day) to a 6-hour shift (4 shifts/day) would require a 33% increase in personnel for those roles.

promise_components.component: Work hours will be set to 8 hours for male police officers.
promise_components.analysis: This standardizes an 8-hour shift, which is often not the reality on the ground due to staff shortages. Enforcing this would require a significant increase in the total police force to cover all duties and emergencies.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would require hiring thousands of new police officers, leading to a very large and permanent increase in the state's salary and pension expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: It addresses the real symptom of overwork in the police force. However, without a clear and funded plan to massively increase recruitment, it is fiscally unsustainable and difficult to implement, making it more of a statement of intent than a viable plan.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address other systemic issues like inadequate housing, political interference, or slow promotions.

promise_text_en: The current situation where the police department acts as a tool for politicians and promotions are not based on honesty and competence will be immediately changed. The Naam Tamilar government will give priority in promotions to those who work honestly.
promise_text_ta: தற்போது காவல்துறை அரசியலாளர்களின் ஏவல் துறையாக இருக்கிறது. நேர்மை, ஆளுமைத் திறமைக்கு ஏற்ற பதவி உயர்வு இல்லை. இந்த நிலை உடனடியாக மாற்றி அமைக்கப்படும். நாம் தமிழர் அரசு, நேர்மையாகப் பணியாற்றுபவர்களுக்குப் பதவி உயர்வில் முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 189
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve police effectiveness, accountability, and public trust by insulating the force from political influence and promoting officers based on merit.

promise_components.component: The situation where the police department acts as a tool for politicians will be immediately changed.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance reform promise. It aligns with Supreme Court directives in the Prakash Singh case regarding police reforms, which call for fixed tenures for police chiefs and statutory state security commissions to ensure operational autonomy.

promise_components.component: Priority in promotions will be given to those who work honestly and competently.
promise_components.analysis: This requires establishing transparent, objective criteria for promotions and performance reviews, managed by an independent police establishment board, as recommended by reform committees.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a governance reform with no direct fiscal cost. Implementation depends entirely on political will, not budget allocation.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the root causes of corruption and inefficiency in policing: political interference and patronage-based promotions. Successful implementation would be a fundamental, lasting reform of a key state institution.

promise_text_en: The police-to-population ratio is currently 1 per 600 people in Tamil Nadu, against a global standard of 1 per 450. The Naam Tamilar government will improve this ratio to 1:450 by recruiting new police personnel accordingly.
promise_text_ta: 450 பேருக்கு ஒரு காவலர் இருக்க வேண்டும் என்பது உலகளாவிய அளவு கோலாகப் பார்க்கப்படுகிறது. ஆனால் தமிழகத்தில் 600 பேருக்கு ஒரு காவலர் என்ற நிலை உள்ளது. நாம் தமிழர் அரசு 450 பேருக்கு ஒரு காவலர் என்று தரத்தை உயர்த்தும். அதற்கேற்ப புதிய காவலர்களைப் பணியில் அமர்த்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 189
impact_mechanism: Improves public safety and state capacity by increasing the number of police officers relative to the population.

promise_components.component: Increase the police-to-population ratio from 1:600 to 1:450.
promise_components.analysis: Current estimated force (at 1:600 for 7.9 cr population) = 7.9 cr / 600 = 1,31,667. Target force (at 1:450) = 7.9 cr / 450 = 1,75,556. New recruits required = 1,75,556 - 1,31,667 = 43,889. The cost of salaries and training is not available in the reference data, so a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise requires hiring approximately 44,000 new personnel. The recurring salary, pension, and training costs cannot be estimated as police salary data is unavailable.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a potential deficit in state capacity for maintaining law and order. Increasing the number of police is a structural change, though its effectiveness depends on training and management.

promise_text_en: To protect law and order in the state capital, additional staff will be recruited under a new structure.
promise_text_ta: மாநிலத் தலைநகரத்தின் சட்டம் ஒழுங்கை பாதுகாக்கப் புதிய கட்டமைப்புடன் கூடுதல் ஊழியர்கள் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 191
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve law and order in the state capital by increasing police presence and resources.

promise_components.component: Recruit additional staff for a new police structure in the state capital.
promise_components.analysis: The number of additional staff is not specified. The cost of salaries and training is not available in the reference data, so a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of new recruits and their associated salary costs are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a symptom (perceived lack of safety in the capital) by adding manpower. It does not address the root causes of crime or systemic policing issues across the state.
coverage_gap_note: This promise focuses only on the state capital, potentially neglecting law and order needs in other districts.

promise_text_en: Three separate police wings will be established: one for public event security, one for law and order, and one for crime prevention and investigation.
promise_text_ta: பொது நிகழ்ச்சிகளுக்கான பாதுகாப்பு, சட்டம் ஒழுங்கு, மற்றும் குற்றத் தடுப்பு மற்றும் புலனாய்வு என மூன்று தனித்தனி காவல் பிரிவுகள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 191
impact_mechanism: Seeks to improve police efficiency and effectiveness through specialization of functions.

promise_components.component: Establish three separate police wings: public event security, law and order, and crime prevention/investigation.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative reorganization of the existing police force. It does not inherently require new recruitment or specified new expenditure. Any associated costs for retraining or minor logistical changes cannot be estimated from the available data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost specified. This is primarily an administrative reform, and costs would likely be absorbed within the existing police budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural change to the organization of policing. Specialization can lead to deeper expertise and more effective outcomes in crime investigation and public order management if implemented correctly.

promise_text_en: Criminal investigations must generally be completed within 30 days.
promise_text_ta: பொதுவாகக் குற்றப்புலனாய்வு உசாவுதலைக் குறைந்தது 30 நாட்களுக்குள் முடிக்க வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 191
impact_mechanism: Aims to expedite the justice process by setting a mandatory timeline for police investigations.

promise_components.component: Mandate that criminal investigations must generally be completed within 30 days.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural directive, not a fiscal promise. It has no direct cost. Its success is contingent on having adequate police staffing, forensic resources, and legal support, which are addressed in other promises but not costed here.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a performance target for the police force.
sustainability_reasoning: Without a corresponding, funded increase in personnel, training, and forensic capacity, a simple deadline is a target that is likely to be missed. It signals intent but does not provide the means to achieve the outcome.

promise_text_en: Shift-based work will be mandated by law for the police, with an 8-hour shift system for male officers and a 6-hour system for female officers.
promise_text_ta: காவலர்களுக்கு சுழற்சி முறைப் பணி சட்டமாக்கப்படும். ஆண் காவலர்கள் எட்டு மணி நேரமும், பெண் காவலர்கள் ஆறு மணி நேரமும் பணிபுரியும்படி சுழற்சி முறை அமல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 191
impact_mechanism: Improves police welfare and work-life balance by legally mandating shorter, fixed work shifts.

promise_components.component: Mandate an 8-hour shift system for male police officers.
promise_components.analysis: Implementing 8-hour shifts for 24/7 coverage requires 3 shifts per day. This would likely require a significant increase in personnel compared to a 12-hour shift system. The exact number of new recruits needed cannot be calculated without data on current shift patterns and the number of male officers.

promise_components.component: Mandate a 6-hour shift system for female police officers.
promise_components.analysis: Implementing 6-hour shifts for 24/7 coverage requires 4 shifts per day. This would require a doubling of personnel compared to a 12-hour shift system. The number of new recruits needed cannot be calculated without data on the number of female officers.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This promise implies a massive increase in police recruitment to maintain 24/7 coverage with shorter shifts, far exceeding other recruitment promises. The cost cannot be calculated as salary data and current male/female officer counts are unavailable.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural reform of police working conditions, addressing the root cause of officer stress and fatigue. However, its fiscal implications are enormous and could make it unsustainable without a massive budget reallocation.

promise_text_en: Vacancies will be filled, which will confirm the creation of approximately 25,000 new job opportunities for police officers.
promise_text_ta: காலிப் பணியிடங்கள் நிரப்பப்படும். இதனால் சற்றொப்ப 25,000 காவலர்களுக்கான புதிய வேலை வாய்ப்புகள் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 191
impact_mechanism: Increases state capacity and provides employment by recruiting a specific number of new police officers.

promise_components.component: Create approximately 25,000 new job opportunities for police officers.
promise_components.analysis: This involves recruiting 25,000 new personnel. The cost of salaries, benefits, and training for these officers cannot be calculated as police salary data is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The recurring salary cost for 25,000 new officers cannot be estimated without police pay scale data.
sustainability_reasoning: Increasing the size of the police force is a structural change that directly impacts state capacity. It addresses the problem of understaffing, though the number may be insufficient to meet other promised goals like the 1:450 ratio.
coverage_gap_note: This number (25,000) is insufficient to meet the promise of a 1:450 police-to-population ratio (which requires ~44,000 new recruits).

promise_text_en: Police will be given two weeks of mandatory leave per year on a rotational basis. To combat mental fatigue and stress, appropriate mental wellness and physical fitness training will be provided.
promise_text_ta: காவலர்களுக்கு ஆண்டிற்கு இரண்டு கிழமை (வாரம்) கட்டாய விடுப்பு சுழற்சி முறையில் அளிக்கப்படும். காவலர்களுக்கு ஏற்படும் மன அயர்ச்சி மற்றும் மன அழுத்தம் ஆகியவற்றைப் போக்க, தகுந்த மனவளப் பயிற்சியும், உடல் நலப் பயிற்சியும் அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 191
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve police effectiveness and well-being by addressing mental and physical fatigue.

promise_components.component: Provide two weeks of mandatory rotational leave per year for police.
promise_components.analysis: This is a human resources policy. Its implementation requires a larger 'reserve' force to cover for officers on leave, which has an indirect cost via increased overall staffing needs. This cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide appropriate mental wellness and physical fitness training.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of developing and delivering these training programs cannot be estimated from the available reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The primary cost is the indirect one of needing more staff to cover for those on leave. The direct cost of training programs is also unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of poor police performance and misconduct: burnout and stress. By mandating leave and providing wellness support, it structurally improves the human capital of the police force.

promise_text_en: The government will facilitate an annual vacation trip for police officers and their families.
promise_text_ta: காவலர்கள் மற்றும் அவரது குடும்பத்தினர் ஆண்டுக்கு ஒருமுறை மனநிறைவுடன் சுற்றுலாச் செல்வதற்கு அரசு வழிவகை செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 192
impact_mechanism: Boosts morale and provides a welfare benefit to police personnel and their families.

promise_components.component: Facilitate an annual vacation trip for police officers and their families.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'facilitate' is ambiguous. Assuming it involves a state subsidy or full payment, the cost cannot be calculated. Data on the number of police personnel (~1.32 lakh), their family sizes, and the cost per trip are not available.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost depends on the number of beneficiaries (police and families) and the per-trip subsidy, neither of which can be determined from reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a welfare benefit that provides temporary relief and a morale boost. It is a symptomatic treatment for low morale but does not address the underlying structural causes like long hours, low pay, or poor working conditions.

promise_text_en: State police personnel will be paid salaries on par with central police forces. Housing and other welfare schemes will also be made equivalent to those for central police force employees.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றியக் காவல் படையில் இருப்பவர்களுக்கு இணையாக மாநிலக் காவல் பணியில் உள்ளவர்களுக்கும் ஊதியம் வழங்கப்படும். வீட்டு வசதிகள் உட்பட மற்ற நலத் திட்டங்கள் அனைத்தும் ஒன்றியக் காவல் படை ஊழியர்களுக்கு இணையாக வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 192
impact_mechanism: Improves the financial security and living standards of state police by aligning their compensation with central government counterparts.

promise_components.component: Pay state police personnel salaries on par with central police forces.
promise_components.analysis: This would involve a significant recurring expenditure. The cost cannot be calculated as the current state police salary, central police salary, and the gap between them are not provided in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Make housing and other welfare schemes equivalent to those for central police force employees.
promise_components.analysis: This involves both capital expenditure (for housing) and recurring expenditure (for other schemes). The cost cannot be calculated as data on the current state of welfare schemes and their central equivalents is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is likely the most fiscally significant promise in this list, involving a substantial, permanent increase in the state's salary and pension bill. The exact amount is incalculable with the given data but would be very high.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of low morale and potential corruption by fundamentally changing the compensation structure. It makes a career in the state police more attractive and financially secure, which is a long-term structural improvement.

promise_text_en: Old police quarters will be renovated, and new quarters will be built in every district as needed. These residential complexes will be equipped with commercial complexes, playgrounds, gyms, pharmacies, and indoor auditoriums.
promise_text_ta: காவலர்களுக்கான பழைய குடியிருப்புகள் அனைத்தும் மறு சீரமைப்புச் செய்யப்பட்டு, மேலும் புதிய குடியிருப்புகள் மாவட்டந்தோறும் கட்டித்தரப்படும். வணிக வளாகங்கள், விளையாட்டுத் திடல், உடற்பயிற்சிக்கூடம், மருந்தகம், உள் அரங்குகள் என அனைத்தும் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 192
impact_mechanism: Improves the living conditions and welfare of police personnel by upgrading and building new residential facilities.

promise_components.component: Renovate old police quarters and build new ones as needed in every district.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale capital expenditure project. The cost cannot be calculated as the number of quarters to be renovated or built, and the per-unit construction/renovation cost, are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Equip residential complexes with commercial complexes, playgrounds, gyms, pharmacies, and auditoriums.
promise_components.analysis: This adds significant cost to the housing projects. These costs are also incalculable without specific project details.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a major capital expenditure promise. The total cost, spread over several years, would be substantial but cannot be estimated from the given data.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing safe, modern housing is a structural improvement to the welfare and living conditions of the police force. It addresses a fundamental need and can help improve morale and retention over the long term.
coverage_gap_note: The term 'as needed' is vague and could lead to inequitable allocation of new housing across different districts.

promise_text_en: Transfers and promotions will be transparent, based on digitized service records. Departmental inquiries will be resolved promptly without delay.
promise_text_ta: பணியிட மாற்றங்கள், பதவி உயர்வு ஆகியன வெளிப்படைத்தன்மையோடு இருக்கும். அதற்கேற்ற காவலர்களின் பணிக் குறிப்பேட்டுப் பதிவுகள் கணினியில் பதியப்படும். துறை சார்ந்த முறையீடுகள் உடனுக்குடன் வினவி முடிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 192
impact_mechanism: Improves governance and morale within the police force by establishing clear, merit-based career progression and accountability rules.

promise_components.component: Transfers and promotions will be transparent, based on digitized service records.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural reform. The cost involves a one-time effort to digitize records and establish a transparent system. Data unavailable to calculate cost.

promise_components.component: Departmental inquiries will be resolved promptly without delay.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative reform to improve internal accountability and reduce backlogs. It has no direct fiscal cost but requires strong administrative will.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct annual cost. This is a procedural and administrative reform. There would be a one-time cost for digitization, but data is unavailable to calculate this.
sustainability_reasoning: This reform targets the underlying administrative procedures that can lead to inefficiency, corruption, and low morale. If implemented fully, it creates a more transparent and accountable system for the long term.

promise_text_en: Exclusive hospitals for the Tamil Nadu police force will be established in every district, on par with those for the military.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகக் காவல்துறையினருக்கும் தனி மருத்துவமனைகள் மாவட்டந்தோறும் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 192
impact_mechanism: Improves the health and well-being of police personnel and their families by providing dedicated, high-quality healthcare infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Exclusive hospitals for the Tamil Nadu police force will be established in every district, on par with those for the military.
promise_components.analysis: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would require capital expenditure to build hospitals in every district and significant recurring operational expenditure for staffing and maintenance. The number of districts is not provided in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would involve capital expenditure for building hospitals and significant recurring operational expenditure for staffing, equipment, and maintenance. This is a very high-cost promise.
sustainability_reasoning: While providing healthcare is a positive welfare measure, it is a service that addresses a need rather than a structural reform of the police institution. It manages a welfare symptom rather than fixing a systemic problem within policing itself.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is exclusive to police personnel, while other government employees and the general public rely on the existing public health system.

promise_text_en: Many new graduate youths will be recruited to the police force as non-uniformed officers. They will be given international-standard intelligence and investigation training.
promise_text_ta: பல புதிய பட்டதாரி இளைஞர்கள் காவலர் பணிக்குப் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள். இவர்களுக்குச் சீருடை ஏதும் இருக்காது. இவர்களுக்குப் பன்னாட்டுத் தரத்தில் உளவுப் புலனாய்வுப் பயிற்சிகள் அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 193
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve the quality of police intelligence and investigation by recruiting specialized, highly-trained civilian staff.

promise_components.component: Many new graduate youths will be recruited to the police force as non-uniformed officers.
promise_components.analysis: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The term 'many' is not a specific number, so the cost of salaries cannot be estimated.

promise_components.component: They will be given international-standard intelligence and investigation training.
promise_components.analysis: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of 'international-standard' training is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is dependent on the number of recruits and the cost of training, neither of which is specified.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating a new cadre of specialized civilian officers, this reform fundamentally alters the force's capabilities in key areas. This is a long-term investment in institutional capacity to address modern crime.

promise_text_en: Police in every area must conduct monthly interactions with the local public.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு பகுதியிலும் உள்ள காவலர்கள், அந்தப் பகுதி மக்களுடன் மாதந்தோறும் கலந்துரையாடல் நடத்த வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 193
impact_mechanism: Aims to build trust and improve community relations by mandating regular, direct engagement between police and the public.

promise_components.component: Police in every area must conduct monthly interactions with the local public.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural mandate. The direct fiscal cost is minimal, primarily involving the allocation of on-duty personnel time and minor logistical arrangements.

fiscal_cost_note: No significant direct fiscal cost. This is a procedural change requiring allocation of on-duty police time.
sustainability_reasoning: This changes the process of how police are expected to engage with the community. If enforced and monitored, it can create a lasting shift from a reactive to a more community-oriented policing model.

promise_text_en: The current khaki police uniform will be replaced with a new blue uniform.
promise_text_ta: இப்போது காவலர்கள் பயன்படுத்தி வரும் பழுப்பு (Khaki) வண்ணத்திலான சீருடையை மாற்றி, புதிய நீல வண்ணத்திலான சீருடைகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 193
impact_mechanism: Changes the visual identity of the police force, potentially to signal a shift in policing style or to appear more approachable.

promise_components.component: The current khaki police uniform will be replaced with a new blue uniform.
promise_components.analysis: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. This involves a one-time cost to procure and distribute new uniforms for the entire police force. The size of the TN police force and the cost per uniform are not available.

promise_text_en: Surveillance cameras will be installed inside and outside police stations. Police will be issued uniforms with small, advanced surveillance devices (body cameras).

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 195
impact_mechanism: Increases accountability and transparency in police conduct by creating an objective record of interactions both inside stations and during public encounters.

promise_components.component: Surveillance cameras will be installed inside and outside police stations.
promise_components.analysis: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the number of police stations and cameras per station.

promise_components.analysis: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the size of the police force and the cost per body camera, plus significant ongoing costs for data storage and management.

promise_text_en: A deadline will be enforced to ensure resolutions for every public petition within a specified number of days.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு முறையீட்டு விண்ணப்பம் மீதும் குறிப்பிட்ட நாள்களுக்குள் தீர்வுகள் கிடைக்கும்படி காலக்கெடு உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 195
impact_mechanism: Improves government responsiveness and service delivery by creating a time-bound accountability framework for addressing citizen grievances.

promise_components.component: A deadline will be enforced to ensure resolutions for every public petition within a specified number of days.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural reform, similar to a Right to Services Act. The direct fiscal cost is minimal, but it may require process re-engineering and additional staff to handle the workload and meet deadlines.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct annual cost. This is a procedural reform. May have indirect costs related to system upgrades or additional staffing to clear backlogs, but data is unavailable to estimate this.
sustainability_reasoning: By mandating a timeline, this promise alters the standard operating procedure for all government departments. It creates a new, enforceable public right and changes the incentive structure for officials.

promise_text_en: The process for filing complaints will be simplified, allowing submissions via email, to the Village Administrative Officer, or through a mobile app.
promise_text_ta: முறையீட்டைச் சிற்றூர் நிருவாக அதிகாரியிடமோ அல்லது காவல் நிலைய மின் அஞ்சல் முகவரிக்கோ அனுப்பும்படி வழிவகை செய்யப்படும். மேலும் முறையீட்டை கைப்பேசிச் செயலி வாயிலாக அனுப்பவும் வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 195
impact_mechanism: Increases access to justice and grievance redressal by creating multiple, low-barrier channels for citizens to file complaints.

promise_components.component: The process for filing complaints will be simplified, allowing submissions via email, to the Village Administrative Officer, or through a mobile app.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural and technological reform. It involves developing a mobile app and backend systems. The cost of app development is not available but is typically a one-time expense with ongoing maintenance.

fiscal_cost_note: No significant direct annual cost. Involves a one-time cost for developing a mobile app and backend IT systems, for which data is unavailable. Ongoing costs for maintenance would be minimal.
sustainability_reasoning: This reform permanently lowers the barrier to entry for grievance redressal. By creating digital and hyper-local access points, it changes the infrastructure of how citizens interact with the state.

promise_text_en: Police will be trained in training centers on new global trends in investigation, methods of public interaction, and human rights interventions.
promise_text_ta: காவல் துறையினருக்கும் பயிற்சி மையங்களில் உலகளவில் ஏற்பட்டுள்ள புதிய புலனாய்வு வினாவுதல் போக்குகள், பொது மக்களை அணுகும் வகைகள், மனித உரிமைகளின் தலையீடுகள் அனைத்தும் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 195
impact_mechanism: Aims to professionalize the police force and improve its conduct by upgrading training curricula with modern, rights-based content.

promise_components.component: Police will be trained in training centers on new global trends in investigation, methods of public interaction, and human rights interventions.
promise_components.analysis: This is a reform of the police training curriculum. Costs would involve developing new training modules and running the training sessions. Data is not available to quantify this.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs depend on the scale of training and curriculum development. However, this would likely be an operational expense within the existing police training budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Reforming the training curriculum is a structural change that affects every new recruit and can be used for in-service training. It is a long-term investment in the human capital of the police force.

promise_text_en: Special attention will be paid to female police officers. Immediate action will be taken on all complaints, including sexual harassment. The quality of residential areas for unmarried female police officers will be upgraded.
promise_text_ta: பெண் காவலர்களின் பணியில் தனிக்கவனம் செலுத்தப்படும். பாலியல் சீண்டல்கள் உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்து முறையீடுகளின் மீதும் உடனடி நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். திருமணமாகாப் பெண் காவலர்களுக்கான குடியிருப்புப் பகுதிகளின் தரம் உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 196
impact_mechanism: Improves the working conditions and safety for female police officers, addressing gender-specific challenges within the force.

promise_components.component: Immediate action will be taken on all complaints, including sexual harassment.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural and administrative commitment to enforce existing laws and policies. It has no direct fiscal cost but requires strong institutional will.

promise_components.component: The quality of residential areas for unmarried female police officers will be upgraded.
promise_components.analysis: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. This involves capital expenditure to renovate or build new residential facilities. The number of facilities or cost of upgrades is not available.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of upgrading residential facilities is unknown. The commitment to act on complaints is a procedural matter with no direct fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: By addressing both physical infrastructure (housing) and institutional culture (harassment), this promise targets the systemic issues that hinder the retention and well-being of female officers. This is a structural reform for gender equity.
coverage_gap_note: This promise focuses on unmarried female officers' residences, potentially leaving out the housing needs of married female officers.

promise_text_en: Police will work without political interference. They will serve for at least three years in one post, and unnecessary transfers will not occur.
promise_text_ta: அரசியல் தலையீடின்றிக் காவலர்கள் பணியாற்றுவார்கள். ஒரு பணியிடத்தில் குறைந்தது மூன்று ஆண்டுகள் வேலை செய்வார்கள். தேவையற்ற இடமாற்றம் இருக்காது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 196
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve police effectiveness and reduce corruption by ensuring operational autonomy and stable postings.

promise_components.component: Police will work without political interference.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance reform policy, not a fiscally quantifiable promise. Its implementation depends on political will and establishing robust oversight mechanisms.

promise_components.component: Police will serve for at least three years in one post, and unnecessary transfers will not occur.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change aimed at providing tenure stability, in line with Supreme Court directives (Prakash Singh case). It has no direct fiscal cost.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a governance and administrative reform policy.
sustainability_reasoning: This reform targets the systemic issue of political control over law enforcement, which can lead to lasting improvements in governance and rule of law. It addresses the root cause of politicized policing rather than its symptoms.

promise_text_en: Police stations, vehicles, communication equipment, and forensic tools will all be upgraded to international standards.
promise_text_ta: காவல் நிலையங்கள், ஊர்திகள், தொலைத்தொடர்புக் கருவிகள், தடயவியலுக்கான கருவிகள் உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்தும் பன்னாட்டுத் தரத்திற்கு மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 197
impact_mechanism: Improves police operational capacity and crime-solving efficiency through better equipment and infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Police stations, vehicles, communication equipment, and forensic tools will be upgraded to international standards.
promise_components.analysis: This requires significant capital expenditure. The term 'international standards' is subjective and unquantified. The number of police stations, vehicles, and existing equipment status are not in the reference data, so a cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of police stations and vehicles, and the cost to upgrade them to 'international standards' are not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing better equipment is a necessary operational upgrade but does not address the root causes of crime or systemic issues within policing like training, accountability, or community trust. Equipment depreciates and requires continuous investment.

promise_text_en: Police personnel accused of bribery and corruption will be permanently dismissed if there is sufficient evidence.
promise_text_ta: கையூட்டு, ஊழல் ஆகிய குற்றச்சாட்டுகளுக்கு ஆளாகும் காவல்துறையினர் மீது தகுந்த ஆதாரங்கள் இருப்பின் நிலையான பணி நீக்கம் செய்யப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 197
impact_mechanism: Deters corruption within the police force by creating a severe, career-ending penalty for bribery.

promise_components.component: Police personnel accused of bribery and corruption will be permanently dismissed if there is sufficient evidence.
promise_components.analysis: This is a change in service rules with no direct fiscal cost. The key challenge is the definition and process for determining 'sufficient evidence' outside of a judicial conviction, which is likely to face legal challenges.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a punitive administrative policy.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating a zero-tolerance policy with a severe consequence, it aims to alter the institutional culture and incentive structure regarding corruption. This is a structural change, though its implementation is legally complex.

promise_text_en: A separate 'Mental Reformation Center' will be started for police personnel who commit crimes. Suspended officers must attend daily classes at this center to be reinstated.
promise_text_ta: குற்றங்களில் ஈடுபடும் காவல் துறையினருக்கு என்று தனியாக ‘மனச் சீர்திருத்த மையம்’ ஒன்று தொடங்கப்படும். பணி இடைநீக்கத்திற்கு உள்ளாகும் காவல் துறையினர் மனச் சீர்திருத்த வகுப்பில் தினமும் சென்று கலந்து கொள்ள வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 197
impact_mechanism: Attempts to rehabilitate errant police officers through mandatory re-education rather than just suspension.

promise_components.component: A separate 'Mental Reformation Center' will be started for police personnel who commit crimes.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new institution with costs for infrastructure, staff, and curriculum. The number of suspended officers is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Suspended officers must attend daily classes at this center to be reinstated.
promise_components.analysis: This makes the 'reformation' program a mandatory part of the disciplinary process.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of potential attendees (suspended officers) and the cost to establish and operate such a center are not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a reactive measure that deals with individual officers after misconduct has occurred. It does not address the systemic issues in recruitment, training, or oversight that may lead to such behavior in the first place.

promise_text_en: If an officer is found guilty of a second offense, they will be immediately dismissed. For the next five years, no government assistance or rights will be provided to any of their family members.
promise_text_ta: இரண்டாவது முறையாக குற்றச்சாட்டுகளுக்கு ஆளாகி, வினாவுதலில் அது நிறுவப்பட்டால், காவலர்கள் உடனடியாகப் பணி நீக்கம் செய்யப்படுவார்கள். அவர்களின் குடும்பத்தைச் சேர்ந்த யாவர்க்கும் அடுத்த ஐந்தாண்டுகளுக்கு எந்த அரசு உதவிகளும், உரிமைகளும் வழங்கப்படாது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 197
impact_mechanism: Creates an extreme deterrent against repeat offenses by police officers by extending punishment to their families.

promise_components.component: If an officer is found guilty of a second offense, they will be immediately dismissed.
promise_components.analysis: This is a stringent 'two-strikes' policy for police conduct.

promise_components.component: For the next five years, no government assistance or rights will be provided to any of their family members.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes collective punishment, which violates fundamental principles of justice and is almost certainly unconstitutional. It would be struck down by courts.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a punitive policy whose most severe component is legally unenforceable.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise to punish an offender's family is legally and ethically indefensible, making it unenforceable. It serves primarily as political signalling of a 'tough' stance rather than a viable policy.

promise_text_en: If the accused are acquitted by the court, the case should not be closed. The search for the real culprits must continue.
promise_text_ta: குற்றம் சாட்டப்பட்டவர்கள் நீதிமன்றத்தால் விடுவிக்கப்பட்டால் வழக்கை அதோடு முடித்துக் கொள்ளக்கூடாது. உண்மையான குற்றவாளிகளைத் தேடிக் கண்டுபிடிக்க வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 197
impact_mechanism: Aims to ensure justice is served by not closing a case prematurely due to a failed prosecution or acquittal.

promise_components.component: If the accused are acquitted by the court, the case should not be closed. The search for the real culprits must continue.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural change in police work. Keeping cases open indefinitely after an acquittal has resource implications, requiring continued allocation of police time and effort. The number of such cases is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the number of acquittals and the police resources dedicated to re-investigation, which are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy alters the procedural framework to prevent miscarriages of justice from becoming the final word. It prioritizes finding the truth over administrative closure, which is a structural change in the justice delivery process.

promise_text_en: If an accused person is acquitted by the court, the government will provide them with due compensation. Half of this compensation amount will be deducted from the salary of the investigating officer.
promise_text_ta: நீதிமன்றத்தால் விடுவிக்கப்பட்ட குற்றம் சாட்டப்பட்டவருக்கு, அரசு உரிய இழப்பீட்டை வழங்கும். இழப்பீட்டில் பாதித் தொகை, வழக்கை நடத்திய வினாவுதல் அதிகாரியின் சம்பளத்தில் இருந்தே பிடித்தம் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 199
impact_mechanism: Deters wrongful prosecution by creating a financial penalty for the investigating officer and providing restitution to the acquitted person.

promise_components.component: If an accused person is acquitted by the court, the government will provide them with due compensation.
promise_components.analysis: This creates a new financial liability for the state. The amount of 'due compensation' is not defined.

promise_components.component: Half of this compensation amount will be deducted from the salary of the investigating officer.
promise_components.analysis: This punitive measure is legally questionable and would likely be struck down in court. It could create a chilling effect on police filing cases.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of acquittals and the amount of 'due compensation' are not provided. The net cost to the state would be half the total compensation paid.
sustainability_reasoning: The mechanism of deducting compensation from an officer's salary is legally fraught and likely unenforceable. It serves as a strong political statement against police misconduct but is not a viable or sustainable policy.

promise_text_en: Only officers whose mother tongue is Tamil will be appointed to the primary posts in the government.
promise_text_ta: தமிழைத் தாய்மொழியாகக் கொண்ட அதிகாரிகள் மட்டுமே அரசின் முதன்மைப் பதவிகளில் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 199
impact_mechanism: Prioritizes linguistic identity in public administration through a discriminatory recruitment policy.

promise_components.component: Only officers whose mother tongue is Tamil will be appointed to the primary posts in the government.
promise_components.analysis: This policy is almost certainly unconstitutional. Article 16 of the Constitution prohibits discrimination in public employment on grounds of place of birth or residence. It would be immediately struck down by the courts.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a recruitment policy that is legally unenforceable.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is in direct conflict with the Constitution of India's guarantees of equality. It cannot be implemented legally, making it a purely symbolic gesture for political mobilization.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes all Indian citizens whose mother tongue is not Tamil from 'primary posts', which is unconstitutional.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will bring a legal amendment to abolish the death penalty for everyone except those convicted of sexual assault.
promise_text_ta: பாலியல் வன்புணர்வுக் குற்றத்தில் ஈடுபட்டுக் குற்றம் உறுதி செய்யப்பட்டவரைத் தவிர வேறு எவருக்கும் மரணதண்டனை கிடையாது என்று நாம் தமிழர் அரசு சட்டத்திருத்தம் கொண்டு வரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 199
impact_mechanism: Changes the state's penal code to reflect a different ethical stance on capital punishment.

promise_components.component: Bring a legal amendment to abolish the death penalty for everyone except those convicted of sexual assault.
promise_components.analysis: Criminal law, including the Indian Penal Code which prescribes the death penalty, is largely under the purview of the Parliament of India. A state government lacks the legislative competence to unilaterally abolish the death penalty for major crimes.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost. This is a legal policy change that the state government does not have the power to enact.
sustainability_reasoning: The power to abolish the death penalty for crimes under the Indian Penal Code rests with the Parliament of India, not a state legislature. This promise cannot be fulfilled by the state government alone, making it a political statement of intent.

promise_text_en: We propose the principle that 'punishment is extra labor'. Accordingly, prisoners will be engaged in productive work such as on agricultural farms, weaving, and animal husbandry.
promise_text_ta: ‘தண்டனை என்பது கூடுதல் உழைப்பு' என்கிற கோட்பாட்டினை நாம் முன்வைக்கிறோம். இதன்படி, சிறையாளிகள் வேளாண் பண்ணைகள், நெசவு மற்றும் கால்நடை வளர்ப்புப் போன்ற ஆக்க அடிப்படையில் உருவாக்கப் பணிகளில் ஈடுபடுத்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 199
impact_mechanism: Aims to make prisons productive and provide rehabilitative work for inmates.

promise_components.component: Prisoners will be engaged in productive work such as on agricultural farms, weaving, and animal husbandry.
promise_components.analysis: This is an expansion of existing prison industry programs. Implementation requires capital investment for farms and workshops, but could potentially generate revenue. The reference data lacks prisoner population numbers to estimate scale or cost.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of prisoners and the capital cost for setting up work enterprises are not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy focuses on managing the incarcerated population. While providing work and skills can aid in rehabilitation and reduce recidivism, it does not address the societal factors that contribute to crime in the first place.

promise_text_en: A general amnesty will be granted to all prisoners who have served more than ten years of their sentence.
promise_text_ta: பத்தாண்டுகளுக்கும் மேலாக சிறை தண்டனைப் பெற்றுவரும் அனைவருக்கும் விடுதலை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 200
impact_mechanism: Reduces prison overcrowding and offers a second chance to long-serving inmates through executive clemency.

promise_components.component: Grant a general amnesty to all prisoners who have served more than ten years of their sentence.
promise_components.analysis: The number of prisoners in Tamil Nadu who have served more than ten years is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the number of beneficiaries and the potential cost savings from reduced incarceration cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This measure would likely result in cost savings for the state's prison system, but the exact amount is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a one-time act of clemency that provides relief to individuals but does not reform the judicial or penal systems that lead to long-term incarceration. Its primary impact is political and humanitarian signalling.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes prisoners who have served less than ten years, regardless of the nature of their crime or their conduct in prison.

promise_text_en: The amnesty for prisoners serving over 10 years will not apply to those convicted of sexual offenses, violence against children, honor killings, being contract killers, corruption, or drug trafficking.
promise_text_ta: பாலியல் குற்றத்தில் ஈடுபட்டவர்கள், சிறுவர் சிறுமியர் மீதான வன்முறைகளில் ஈடுபட்டவர்கள், ஆணவக் கொலைகளில் ஈடுபட்டவர்கள், கூலிப்படையாகச் செயல்பட்டவர்கள், கையூட்டு ஊழலில் சிக்கிய ஊழியர்கள், அரசியலாளர்கள், போதைப் பொருட்களை கடத்துவோர் ஆகியோருக்கு மட்டும் இந்த விதிமுறை பொருந்தாது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 200
impact_mechanism: Narrows the scope of a prisoner amnesty to ensure that those convicted of heinous crimes remain incarcerated, addressing public safety concerns.

promise_components.component: The amnesty for prisoners serving over 10 years will not apply to those convicted of specific serious crimes (e.g., sexual offenses, honor killings, corruption).
promise_components.analysis: This is a qualifying clause for the general amnesty promise. The number of prisoners convicted of these specific crimes is not available in the reference data, so the number of individuals excluded from the amnesty cannot be quantified.

fiscal_cost_note: Not applicable. This is a non-financial, legal clarification that limits the scope of another promise. It does not have a direct fiscal cost but reduces the potential cost savings of the amnesty.
sustainability_reasoning: This clause refines the political message of the amnesty promise, balancing clemency with public safety concerns. It does not represent a structural change to the justice system.
coverage_gap_note: This promise itself defines a coverage gap for the broader amnesty promise.

promise_text_en: Strict action will be taken against those who commit land fraud or encroach on government lands, water bodies, and forest areas. A change will be made so that bail is not granted to these accused until the case is concluded.
promise_text_ta: நில மோசடி, அரசு நில வன்கவர்பு, நீர் ஆதார இடங்கள் மற்றும் வனப்பகுதிகளை வன்கவர்பு செய்பவர்கள் மீது கடும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். அந்த வழக்கு முடியும் வரை பிணை வழங்காது என்ற மாற்றத்தையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு கொண்டு வரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 200
impact_mechanism: Deters illegal occupation of public lands by increasing the legal penalty and making bail significantly harder to obtain for offenders.

promise_components.component: Take strict action against land fraud and encroachment on government lands, water bodies, and forest areas.
promise_components.analysis: This implies enhanced enforcement, the cost of which is not specified and cannot be calculated from reference data.

promise_components.component: Change the law so that bail is not granted to these accused until the case is concluded.
promise_components.analysis: This is a significant legal reform. Its implementation would depend on legislative action and could face judicial review. There is no direct fiscal cost, but it has major implications for the legal process.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The primary cost would be in increased enforcement and legal administration, which is not quantifiable from the data provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise attempts to change the legal framework to create a powerful deterrent against a specific, harmful crime. If the 'no bail' provision is implemented and upheld, it would fundamentally alter the risk for potential encroachers.
coverage_gap_note: The promise focuses on future offenses and may not address the complex issue of resolving past or existing encroachments.

promise_text_en: All roads will be fully digitized and fitted with advanced surveillance equipment.
promise_text_ta: சாலைகள் அனைத்தும் முழுமையாக எண்ணியல்மயமாக்கப்பட்டு (Digitization), மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட கண்காணிப்புக் கருவிகள் பொருத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 201
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve traffic management and law enforcement through a comprehensive, technology-based monitoring system.

promise_components.component: All roads will be fully digitized and fitted with advanced surveillance equipment.
promise_components.analysis: The total length of roads in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data. The cost per kilometer for digitization and surveillance equipment is also not provided. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would be a massive infrastructure project likely costing tens of thousands of crores, far exceeding the discretionary budget for any single year.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the symptoms (traffic violations, crime) with a technological monitoring solution rather than tackling root causes like driver education, road design, or urban planning. It manages the problem through surveillance.
coverage_gap_note: In a phased rollout, minor rural roads would likely be the last to receive coverage, if at all.

promise_text_en: Traffic police will no longer have to work in the sun; they will perform their monitoring duties from air-conditioned rooms set up on roadsides.
