promise_text_en: The JSW Steel project to mine iron ore in the Kavuthi-Vediyappan hills of Tiruvannamalai was temporarily halted due to public protests. When the Naam Tamilar government comes to power, action will be taken to ensure this project is never implemented.
promise_text_ta: திருவண்ணாமலை பகுதியில் இரும்புத் தாதுக்கள் கொண்ட கவுந்தி - வேடியப்பன் மலைகளை உடைத்து தாதுக்களை வெட்டி எடுக்க ஜிண்டால் நிறுவனம் கொண்டுவர முயன்ற திட்டத்தை எதிர்த்து மக்கள் போராடியதன் விளைவாக தற்காலிகமாக நிறுத்தப்பட்டது. நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சி அமையும்போது அந்தத் திட்டம் ஒருபோதும் வராமல் இருக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 225
impact_mechanism: This promise responds to local opposition by preventing a specific industrial project from being implemented.

promise_components.component: Take action to ensure the JSW Steel iron ore mining project in Kavuthi-Vediyappan hills is never implemented.
promise_components.analysis: This is a specific executive action targeting a single project. The reference data does not contain information on the project's potential investment, employment, or revenue, so a quantitative analysis of the economic trade-off is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost is the foregone investment, tax revenue, and potential royalties from this specific project. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This action addresses a high-profile, localized issue driven by public protest. It is a reactive measure against a single project rather than a systemic policy change for evaluating all such projects, making it more of a political signal.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes potential workers and ancillary businesses that would have benefited from the project's construction and operation.

promise_text_en: All existing mineral resource contracts awarded to private companies will be cancelled by the Naam Tamilar government. New laws with severe penalties will be enacted to combat the plunder of mineral resources.
promise_text_ta: கனிம வளங்கள் தனியார்களுக்கு கொடுக்கப்பட்டிருக்கும் ஒப்பந்தங்கள் அனைத்தையும் நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சி நீக்கம் செய்யும். கனிமவளக் கொள்ளைக்கு எதிராகக் கடும் தண்டனைகளுடன் கூடிய புதிய சட்டங்கள் இயற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 227
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to halt perceived resource exploitation by nationalizing the mining sector through the cancellation of all private contracts.

promise_components.component: Cancel all existing mineral resource contracts awarded to private companies.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major legal and regulatory action. The number, value, and terms of existing contracts are not available in the reference data, so the direct financial and legal liabilities cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Enact new laws with severe penalties to combat the plunder of mineral resources.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative action. The fiscal impact is indeterminate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost would include extensive litigation, potential compensation for contract termination, and loss of all private sector investment and revenue in mining. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This represents a radical and permanent restructuring of the mining sector, shifting it from a private-led to a state-controlled model. It addresses the 'root cause' as defined by the promise (private exploitation) by eliminating the private sector's role entirely.
coverage_gap_note: This policy would eliminate the entire private mining industry and its associated employment and investment from the state.

promise_text_en: The framework for the government itself to extract minerals, based on the needs of the people, will be strengthened.
promise_text_ta: மக்களின் தேவைக்கேற்ற கனிமங்களை அரசே எடுத்துக் கொள்ளும்படியான கட்டமைப்புகள் வலுப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 227
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to replace private mining with a state-run model by building government capacity for mineral extraction.

promise_components.component: Strengthen the framework for the government itself to extract minerals.
promise_components.analysis: This policy implies creating or expanding a state-owned enterprise for mining. This would require significant capital investment and development of technical expertise. The reference data does not contain information on the state's current capacity in this area.

fiscal_cost_note: This would require massive capital expenditure for machinery, technology, and skilled personnel. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This proposes a new, permanent state-centric model for the entire mining sector. It is a fundamental change in the state's economic role, moving from regulator to operator, and thus represents a structural shift.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will enhance Tamil Nadu's waste management system by incorporating world-class technologies from Japan and South Korea.
promise_text_ta: சப்பான் மற்றும் தென்கொரியாவின் இத்தகைய உலகத்தரம் வாய்ந்த தொழில்நுட்பங்களை உள்ளடக்கி, தமிழ்நாட்டின் கழிவு மேலாண்மையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மேம்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 230
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve public health and environmental quality by upgrading the state's waste processing infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Enhance Tamil Nadu's waste management system by incorporating world-class technologies from Japan and South Korea.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital investment and technology adoption policy. The specific technologies and their costs are not defined, so a fiscal analysis is not possible. It targets the technological deficit in waste processing.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of acquiring and implementing advanced waste management technology is substantial but not specified. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in modern, long-lasting infrastructure is a structural solution. It creates a permanent improvement in the state's capacity to process waste, addressing the root cause of pollution from inadequate waste treatment.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits may be concentrated in urban areas where such large-scale plants are typically built, potentially leaving out remote rural areas.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will transform waste into an economic resource. People who turn in plastic waste to the government will be incentivized with benefits such as travel concession cards.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு குப்பைகளை ஒரு பொருளாதார மூலமாக மாற்றுகிறது. நெகிழிக் கழிவுகளை அரசிடம் ஒப்படைக்கும் மக்களுக்குப் பயணச் சலுகை அட்டைகள் போன்றவை வழங்கி ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 230
impact_mechanism: This promise creates a behavioral incentive for recycling by allowing citizens to exchange plastic waste for a tangible benefit.

promise_components.component: Incentivize people who turn in plastic waste with benefits such as travel concession cards.
promise_components.analysis: This creates a 'waste-for-value' scheme. The cost depends on the redemption rate (e.g., kg of plastic per concession) and public participation, neither of which can be determined from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost is the value of travel concessions issued. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This scheme provides a positive incentive to manage a symptom (plastic waste) more effectively. However, it does not address the root cause, which is the overproduction and consumption of single-use plastics.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes individuals who do not use public transport or lack access to waste turn-in centers.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government's 'Cycling Parks' and 'Industrial Integration' initiatives will be implemented. Under this model, waste from one industry will become the raw material for another, achieving a 'Zero Waste' goal. This will be used to generate electricity, natural gas, and high-quality organic fertilizers.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசின் “சுழற்சிப் பூங்கா” (Cycling Parks) மற்றும் “தொழில்துறை ஒருங்கிணைப்பு” (Industrial Integration) சிறந்த மாற்றாக விளங்கும். இதில் ஒரு தொழிற்சாலையின் கழிவு மற்றொரு தொழிற்சாலையின் மூலப்பொருளாக மாற்றப்பட்டு கழிவுகளற்ற (Zero Waste) இலக்கு எட்டப்படும். கழிவிலிருந்து மின்சாரம், இயற்கை எரிகாற்று மற்றும் வேளாண்மைக்கான உயர்தர இயற்கை உரங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 230
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to eliminate industrial waste by redesigning industrial ecosystems based on circular economy principles.

promise_components.component: Implement 'Cycling Parks' and 'Industrial Integration' where waste from one industry becomes raw material for another.
promise_components.analysis: This describes a policy of promoting industrial symbiosis to achieve a 'Zero Waste' goal and generate value-added products like energy and fertilizer. This is a complex, long-term industrial planning strategy.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost involves significant investment in industrial planning, infrastructure, and incentives to co-locate industries. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy aims to re-engineer the industrial production model to eliminate waste by design. This is a fundamental, root-cause solution that creates a permanently sustainable industrial framework if successfully implemented.
coverage_gap_note: Implementation would likely be confined to new or existing industrial parks and special economic zones, not the entire state's industrial base.

promise_text_en: Segregation of waste at the source, such as homes and commercial establishments, will be the starting point of overall waste management. It will be mandatory to segregate and store biodegradable, non-biodegradable, and electronic/hazardous waste separately.
promise_text_ta: கழிவுகள் உருவாகும் இடங்களான வீடுகள் மற்றும் வணிக நிறுவனங்களிலேயே அவற்றைத் தரம் பிரிப்பது ஒட்டுமொத்த கழிவு மேலாண்மையின் தொடக்கப் புள்ளியாகும். மக்கும் குப்பை, மக்காக் குப்பை மற்றும் மின்னணு / கேடு தரவல்ல குப்பைகள் என தனித்தனியாகப் பிரித்துச் சேமிப்பது கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 231
impact_mechanism: This promise improves the efficiency of the entire waste management chain by ensuring waste is properly sorted at its point of origin.

promise_components.component: Make it mandatory for homes and commercial establishments to segregate waste at the source.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory measure. The primary challenge is not legislation but ensuring mass compliance through awareness and enforcement. The direct cost to the government is for administration and enforcement.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost to the government for enforcement and awareness campaigns is likely low, but cannot be calculated from reference data. The primary cost is borne by citizens and businesses.
sustainability_reasoning: Source segregation is a foundational requirement for any effective recycling and waste processing system. Mandating it addresses the problem of mixed waste, which is a root cause of system failure, creating a permanent improvement if enforced.
coverage_gap_note: Effective enforcement might be challenging in informal settlements and remote rural areas.

promise_text_en: The municipal administration will collect segregated waste from every household. Informal waste pickers and self-help groups will be integrated, provided with identity cards, and organized at the ward level to create local employment opportunities.
promise_text_ta: நகராட்சி நிருவாகம் ஒவ்வொரு வீட்டிற்கும் சென்று தரம் பிரிக்கப்பட்ட கழிவுகளைச் சேகரிக்கும். இதில் தற்போதைய 'முறைசாராத் தொழிலாளர்கள்' (Waste Pickers) மற்றும் உதவிக்குழுக்கள் ஒருங்கிணைக்கப்பட்டு அடையாள அட்டைகள் வழங்கப்படும். வட்டம் (Ward) வாரியாக இவர்களை ஒருங்கிணைப்பதன் மூலம் உள்ளூர் அளவில் வேலைவாய்ப்புகளையும் உருவாக்க முடியும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 231
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve waste collection efficiency while providing stable livelihoods and social dignity to informal workers.

promise_components.component: Integrate informal waste pickers and self-help groups into the formal municipal waste collection system.
promise_components.analysis: This policy formalizes the informal sector's role in waste management. It would involve providing identity, organization, and potentially a formal wage or fee structure to these workers. The number of informal waste pickers is not in the reference data, but there are ~63 lakh women in SHGs who could be involved.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost would include wages/fees for the formalized workers, training, and equipment. The number of workers to be integrated is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy creates a permanent, formal structure for last-mile waste collection. It addresses the root causes of both inefficient collection and the precarious, unsafe livelihoods of informal waste pickers, creating a more equitable and efficient system.
coverage_gap_note: The program may not reach all informal workers, particularly those who are transient or not part of established networks.

promise_text_en: Sanitation workers involved in solid waste management will be provided with personal protective equipment including uniforms, reflective jackets, gloves, raincoats, proper footwear, and masks.
promise_text_ta: திடக்கழிவு மேலாண்மைப் பணியில் ஈடுபடும் தூய்மைப் பணியாளர்களுக்குச் சீருடை, ஒளிரும் மேலாடை, கையுறைகள், மழையாடைகள், முறையான காலணிகள் மற்றும் முகக்கவசங்கள் உள்ளிட்ட தனிமாந்தர் பாதுகாப்புப் கருவிகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 231
impact_mechanism: Improves occupational health and safety for sanitation workers by providing essential protective gear against workplace hazards.

promise_components.component: Provide personal protective equipment (uniforms, jackets, gloves, raincoats, footwear, masks) to sanitation workers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of sanitation workers in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data. The unit cost for the specified equipment is also not available. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost depends on the number of workers and procurement costs, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides necessary protection against daily hazards, which is a crucial safety measure. However, it addresses the symptoms of unsafe work conditions rather than the root causes, such as the nature of waste or the employment status of workers.
coverage_gap_note: The promise may exclude informal or contractual sanitation workers if not explicitly included in the implementation design.

promise_text_en: Instead of centralizing waste in one place, a decentralized processing system will be adopted at the ward or zonal level. Measures will be taken to compost and perform bio-methanation of vegetable and food waste near local markets and residential areas.
promise_text_ta: கழிவுகளை ஓரிடத்தில் குவித்து வைப்பதற்கு மாற்றாக, அந்தந்த வட்டம் அல்லது மண்டல அளவிலேயே தூய்மையாக்கும் 'பரவலாக்கப்பட்ட முறை' (Decentralized Processing) பின்பற்றப்படும். காய்கறி மற்றும் உணவுக் கழிவுகளை உள்ளூர்ச் சந்தைகள் மற்றும் குடியிருப்புப் பகுதிகளுக்கு அருகிலேயே உரமாக்கவும் (Composting) உயிரிமீத்தேனாக்கம் செய்யவும் (Bio-methanation) நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 231
impact_mechanism: Reduces landfill burden and transportation costs by processing organic waste locally, closer to the source of generation.

promise_components.component: Adopt a decentralized waste processing system at the ward or zonal level.
promise_components.analysis: The number of wards/zones, the volume of waste to be processed, and the capital/operational cost of composting or bio-methanation units are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Establish composting and bio-methanation facilities near markets and residential areas.
promise_components.analysis: Cost analysis is not possible as data on the number of required facilities and their cost is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would require significant capital expenditure for infrastructure, the scale of which is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to fundamentally change the current centralized waste management model. By processing waste at a local level, it addresses the root causes of overflowing landfills and high transportation emissions.

promise_text_en: Bio-mining technology will be used to scientifically clear legacy waste dumps that have accumulated over many years, reclaiming the land.
promise_text_ta: பல ஆண்டுகளாகக் கொட்டி வைக்கப்பட்டுள்ள பழைய குப்பை மேடுகளை (Legacy Waste) அறிவியல் முறையில் அகற்ற உயிரியல் கழிவு மீட்பு (Bio Mining) தொழில்நுட்பம் பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 231
impact_mechanism: Reclaims valuable urban and peri-urban land and removes long-term sources of soil and water pollution by clearing legacy landfills.

promise_components.component: Use bio-mining technology to scientifically clear legacy waste dumps.
promise_components.analysis: The number, area, and volume of legacy dumps in Tamil Nadu are not available in the reference data. The cost of bio-mining per ton or per hectare is also not available. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Bio-mining is a high-cost, technology-intensive process, and the total expenditure would be substantial but is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a remedial action to clean up the results of past systemic failures. While necessary and beneficial, it addresses a symptom (the dump) rather than the root cause (the system that created the dump).

promise_text_en: Electricity and natural fertilizer will be generated from biodegradable waste through anaerobic digestion. Efforts will be made to create a circular economy where the waste from one industry becomes the raw material for another.
promise_text_ta: மக்கும் கழிவுகளிலிருந்து காற்றற்ற செரிப்பு மூலம் மின்சாரமும் இயற்கை உரமும் உருவாக்கலாம். ஒரு தொழிற்சாலையின் கழிவை மற்றொரு தொழிற்சாலைக்கு மூலப்பொருளாக மாற்றி, கழிவுகளே இல்லாத ஒரு பொருளாதாரச் சுழற்சியை (Circular Economy) உருவாக்க முயற்சிகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 231
impact_mechanism: Creates economic value from waste and reduces reliance on fossil fuels and chemical fertilizers by converting waste into energy and promoting industrial symbiosis.

promise_components.component: Generate electricity and natural fertilizer from biodegradable waste through anaerobic digestion.
promise_components.analysis: The volume of available biodegradable waste and the cost of setting up anaerobic digestion plants are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Create a circular economy where industrial waste becomes a raw material for other industries.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad policy goal with no specific financial metrics. Costing is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This represents a long-term economic vision involving significant public and private investment, which is not quantified.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to redesign the linear 'take-make-dispose' economic model into a circular one. It addresses the root cause of waste by treating it as a resource, which is a fundamental systemic change.

promise_text_en: E-waste will be classified based on its hazardous and valuable properties. A formal collection system and a strengthened manufacturer 'Take-back' system will be established. Collected items will be sorted and their parts scientifically dismantled.
promise_text_ta: மின்னணுக் கழிவுகள் அவற்றின் கேடுதரவல்ல மற்றும் மதிப்புமிக்க பண்புகளின் அடிப்படையில் வகைப்படுத்தப்படும். இதற்காக முறையான சேகரிப்பு மற்றும் உருவாக்குவோரின் திரும்பப்பெறும் (Take-back) அமைப்புகள் வலுப்படுத்தப்பட்டு, சேகரிக்கப்பட்ட பொருட்கள் தரம் பிரிக்கப்பட்டு, அவற்றின் பாகங்கள் அறிவியல் முறையில் பிரித்தெடுக்கப்படும் (Dismantling).
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 233
impact_mechanism: Prevents environmental contamination from hazardous materials in e-waste by establishing a regulated and safe disposal pathway.

promise_components.component: Establish a formal collection system and strengthen manufacturer 'Take-back' for e-waste.
promise_components.analysis: The volume of e-waste generated and the cost of establishing a statewide collection and dismantling infrastructure are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs would be distributed among the government (for regulation), producers (under Extended Producer Responsibility), and consumers, but are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent, formal system to manage a growing and hazardous waste stream. It addresses the root problem of e-waste being disposed of improperly through informal or general channels.

promise_text_en: Energy will be recovered from non-recyclable residual e-waste using technology. Informal workers in this sector will be identified and integrated into the formal system.
promise_text_ta: மறுசுழற்சி செய்ய முடியாத எஞ்சிய கழிவுகளிலிருந்து தொழில்நுட்பங்கள் வழியே “ஆற்றல் மீட்பு” செய்யப்படும். இத்துறையில் நீண்டகாலமாக ஈடுபட்டுள்ள முறைசாராத் தொழிலாளர்கள் கண்டறியப்பட்டு, அவர்கள் முறையான துறையுடன் ஒருங்கிணைக்கப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 233
impact_mechanism: Provides formal employment to informal workers and ensures final disposal of non-recyclable hazardous materials through waste-to-energy technology.

promise_components.component: Recover energy from non-recyclable residual e-waste.
promise_components.analysis: The volume of non-recyclable e-waste and the cost of appropriate energy recovery technology are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Identify and integrate informal workers into the formal e-waste management system.
promise_components.analysis: The number of informal workers in this sector is not available in the reference data. Costs for training, formalization, and social security are unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise involves capital-intensive technology and significant social program costs, neither of which are quantified.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses two root causes: the lack of a final disposal solution for some e-waste, and the precarious and unsafe livelihood of informal workers. Integrating them creates a more just and complete system.

promise_text_en: Biomedical waste will be segregated at the source in hospitals and labs according to its nature. It will be stored in secure on-site locations with proper color-coding and labeling indicating the type of waste.
promise_text_ta: மருத்துவமனைகள் மற்றும் ஆய்வகங்களில் உயிர்மருத்துவக் கழிவுகள் உருவாகும் இடத்திலேயே அவற்றின் தன்மைக்கேற்ப தனித்தனியாகத் தரம் பிரிக்கப்படும். இவை வளாகத்திற்குள்ளேயே பாதுகாப்பான இடங்களில் சேமிக்கப்பட்டு, கழிவின் வகையைக் குறிக்கும் வகையில் முறையான வண்ணக் குறியீடுகள் மற்றும் அடையாளங்கள் (Labelling) இடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 233
impact_mechanism: Protects public health and prevents environmental contamination by enforcing strict handling protocols for hazardous biomedical waste at its source.

promise_components.component: Ensure segregation, secure storage, and proper labeling of biomedical waste at hospitals and labs.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory enforcement promise. The primary cost is borne by healthcare facilities. The cost to the state for monitoring and enforcement is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. State costs for enforcement are likely modest, but the system-wide compliance cost for healthcare providers is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This reinforces existing regulations to tackle the problem at its origin. Proper segregation at the source is the most critical step in preventing the spread of infection and contamination from biomedical waste.
coverage_gap_note: Enforcement may be weaker in small, unregistered clinics, particularly in remote areas.

promise_text_en: Liquid waste will be scientifically managed by classifying it based on its physical and chemical properties. Pre-treatment and filtration methods will be implemented in water treatment plants to remove large pollutants at the source.
promise_text_ta: வெளியேற்றப்படும் நீர்மக்கழிவுகளை அவற்றின் இயற்பியல் மற்றும் வேதியியல் பண்புகளின் அடிப்படையில் முறையாக வகைப்படுத்தி அறிவியல் முறையில் மேலாண்மையை உறுதிப்படுத்துவோம். நீர் தூய்மையாக்க நிலையங்களில் முன் தூய்மையாக்கம் (Pre-treatment) மற்றும் வடிகட்டுதல் முறைகளைப் புகுத்தி, பெரிய அளவிலான கழிவுகளைத் தொடக்கத்திலேயே தடுத்து நிறுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 233
impact_mechanism: Improves the quality of water in rivers and lakes by removing pollutants from wastewater before it is discharged.

promise_components.component: Scientifically manage liquid waste by classifying it and implementing pre-treatment and filtration at the source.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad policy directive. Data on the number of industrial and municipal discharge points, volume of liquid waste, and cost of treatment technologies is not available. Therefore, a cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This implies a massive, long-term investment program for both public and private sectors, with no specified budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of water pollution by treating contaminants at the point of generation, rather than attempting the more difficult and expensive task of cleaning up entire water bodies later.

promise_text_en: Instead of large centralized facilities, pre-treatment and primary treatment plants will be established locally to achieve self-sufficiency in local water management.
promise_text_ta: பெரிய மையப்படுத்தப்பட்ட நிலையங்களுக்கு மாற்றாக, அந்தந்தப் பகுதிகளிலேயே முன்தூய்மையாக்கம் மற்றும் முதல்நிலைச் தூய்மையாக்கல் (Primary Treatment) நிலையங்களை அமைத்து, உள்ளூர் நீர் மேலாண்மையில் தற்சார்பு நிலையை எட்டுவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 234
impact_mechanism: Enhances water security and management efficiency by creating localized treatment systems, reducing reliance on large, distant infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Establish local pre-treatment and primary treatment plants instead of large centralized facilities.
promise_components.analysis: This outlines a shift in infrastructure strategy. The number, size, and cost of proposed local plants are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would be a major capital works program with an unspecified budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This represents a fundamental change in the design of water infrastructure, moving from a centralized to a decentralized model. It addresses root issues of inefficiency, high pumping costs, and lack of local water recycling.

promise_text_en: Real-time electronic display boards will be installed at every treatment plant to show the quality of discharged water, the amount of residual sludge, and its disposal method, ensuring public oversight.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு தூய்மையாக்க நிலையத்தின் வாயிலிலும், அங்கிருந்து வெளியேற்றப்படும் நீரின் தரம், எஞ்சியிருக்கும் கசடுகளின் அளவு மற்றும் அவை நிலைப்படுத்தப்பட்டு அகற்றப்படும் முறை ஆகியவற்றை விளக்கும் நிகழ்நேர மின்னணுத் தகவல் பலகைகளை நிறுவுவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 234
impact_mechanism: Increases public accountability and transparency in the operation of water treatment facilities by providing real-time performance data.

promise_components.component: Install real-time electronic display boards at every treatment plant showing water quality and sludge disposal data.
promise_components.analysis: The number of water treatment plants in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data. The cost per display board and associated sensors is also not available. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. While the cost is likely manageable relative to the overall budget, the exact figure cannot be determined from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a transparency measure. While it can create public pressure for better performance, it does not in itself fix an underperforming plant. Its primary effect is signalling and accountability, not direct material change.

promise_text_en: Air pollutants will be pre-treated and processed within the premises where they are generated, before being released into the atmosphere, using technologies like scrubbers, electrostatic precipitators, and filters.
promise_text_ta: உருவாகும் காற்றுகள் வளிமண்டலத்தில் பரவுவதற்கு முன்பே, அவை வெளியேறும் அந்தந்த வளாகத்திற்குள்ளேயே முன் தூய்மையாக்கல் மற்றும் தொடக்கநிலைக் காற்றுப் பதப்படுத்துதல் செய்யப்படும். இதில் புகையை நனைத்துத் தூய்மைப்படுத்தும் (Scrubbers), துகள்களை ஈர்க்கும் மின்நிலை வீழ்படிவாக்கிகள் (Electrostatic Precipitators) மற்றும் வடிகட்டிகள் போன்றவை பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 234
impact_mechanism: Reduces air pollution at the source by mandating that industrial emissions are cleaned before release.

promise_components.component: Mandate industrial facilities to pre-treat air pollutants using technologies like scrubbers, electrostatic precipitators, and filters.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory policy imposing costs on polluting industries, not a direct expenditure from the state budget. The state's role is enforcement through its pollution control board. The number of affected facilities and the cost of compliance are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost to the state is for increased monitoring and enforcement, which is not calculable from the provided data. The primary financial burden falls on private industries.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy targets the root cause by requiring a change in industrial processes to prevent pollution at its source, rather than dealing with its effects after the fact. It creates a permanent change in operational standards for industries.
coverage_gap_note: This promise does not address non-industrial sources of air pollution, such as vehicular emissions, construction dust, or agricultural burning.

promise_text_en: Treated air will be released through pollution stack chimneys equipped with sensors to monitor emissions in real-time and ensure they are within permissible limits.
promise_text_ta: தூய்மையாக்கப்பட்ட காற்றுகள் மாசுக்கட்டுப்பாட்டுப் புகைபோக்கிகள் (Pollution stack chimneys) வழியாக வெளியேற்றப்படும். இந்தப் புகைபோக்கிகளில் பொருத்தப்பட்டுள்ள உணரிகள் (Sensors), வெளியேறும் காற்றின் தரத்தை நிகழ்நேரத்தில் (Real-time) கண்காணித்து, அது அனுமதிக்கப்பட்ட அளவில்தான் இருக்கிறதா என்பதை உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 235
impact_mechanism: Enhances environmental compliance and transparency by requiring real-time, sensor-based monitoring of industrial air emissions.

promise_components.component: Equip pollution stack chimneys with sensors for real-time emissions monitoring.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory mandate where the cost of purchasing and installing sensors is borne by the industrial facility owners. The state's role is to establish the infrastructure to receive and process the data. The cost to industry is not calculable from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost to the state for setting up a data monitoring portal is likely low. The main cost is externalized to the private sector.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent system for monitoring and accountability. Real-time data enables swift enforcement and discourages non-compliance, addressing the problem of inadequate oversight.
coverage_gap_note: Effectiveness depends on the integrity of the sensors and the state's willingness to act on the data without political interference.

promise_text_en: The administration will provide color-coded bins to households and educate them on the benefits of waste segregation.
promise_text_ta: வீடுகளுக்கே சென்று தரம் பிரிப்பதன் நன்மைகளை விளக்குவதுடன், அதற்கான முறையான வண்ணக் குப்பைத் தொட்டிகளை (Color-coded bins) அரசு நிருவாகமே வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 235
impact_mechanism: Facilitates waste recycling and proper disposal by providing households with the basic tools and knowledge for segregation at source.

promise_components.component: Provide color-coded bins to households.
promise_components.analysis: This would involve distributing bins to approximately 2.0 crore ration-card households. The cost per bin is not available in the reference data, so a total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Educate households on the benefits of waste segregation.
promise_components.analysis: This involves an information campaign. The cost for such a campaign is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of providing bins to 2.0 crore households is unknown as the per-unit price is not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Segregation at the source is a foundational requirement for an efficient and sustainable waste management system. This promise provides the physical infrastructure (bins) and knowledge needed to enable this behavioral shift.
coverage_gap_note: The promise targets households, but may not initially cover commercial establishments, which are also significant waste generators.

promise_text_en: If waste is not properly segregated, after initial warnings, collection will be refused. Furthermore, fines and additional service charges will be imposed based on the 'Polluter Pays Principle'.
promise_text_ta: ஒருவேளை கழிவுகள் முறையாகத் தரம் பிரிக்கப்படாமல் வழங்கப்பட்டால், விதிமீறல்கள் தொடர்ந்தால், தரம் பிரிக்கப்படாத குப்பைகளை வாங்க மறுக்கப்படும். மேலும், 'மாசுபடுத்துபவரே அதற்கான விலையைக் கொடுக்க வேண்டும்' (Polluter Pays Principle) என்ற உலகளாவிய கொள்கையின் அடிப்படையில், தண்டங்கள் மற்றும் கூடுதல் சேவைக் கட்டணங்கள் விதிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 237
impact_mechanism: Creates a financial disincentive for non-compliance with waste segregation rules through penalties and refusal of service.

promise_components.component: Refuse collection of unsegregated waste after initial warnings.
promise_components.analysis: This is a service-based enforcement policy. It has no direct cost and relies on the existing waste collection workforce to implement.

promise_components.component: Impose fines and additional service charges based on the 'Polluter Pays Principle'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory enforcement mechanism that could generate revenue for the state or local bodies. It requires an administrative framework for levying and collecting fines.

fiscal_cost_note: This policy has no direct fiscal cost and may be revenue-positive if fines are collected effectively. The primary cost is administrative.
sustainability_reasoning: This measure uses economic principles to enforce behavioral change, making segregation a financial necessity for households. It addresses the root cause of poor segregation, which is the lack of direct consequences for non-compliance.
coverage_gap_note: Refusing waste collection could lead to illegal dumping and public health hazards if not managed carefully. It is also politically difficult to implement.

promise_text_en: Real-time monitoring data from every treatment facility will be openly published on the internet for public access and scrutiny.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு தூய்மையாக்கும் நிலையத்திலும் நிறுவப்பட்டுள்ள நிகழ்நேரக் கண்காணிப்புத் தரவுகள் (Real-time data monitoring) வெளிப்படையாக இணையத்தில் வெளியிடப்படுவதன் வழியே பொதுமக்களின் பார்வைக்குக் கொண்டுவரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 237
impact_mechanism: Increases public accountability and empowers citizen oversight of environmental regulations by making compliance data transparent.

promise_components.component: Publish real-time monitoring data from every treatment facility on the internet for public access.
promise_components.analysis: This is a transparency policy. It requires the creation and maintenance of a public web portal to display data collected from monitoring systems (as mentioned in Promise 1).

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost is low, limited to the development and maintenance of a public-facing website or data dashboard.
sustainability_reasoning: While it doesn't directly reduce pollution, it creates a permanent structural change by institutionalizing transparency. This allows media, researchers, and the public to hold polluters and regulators accountable, addressing the root problem of opaque governance.

promise_text_en: A list of essential, non-replaceable plastic items will be created. A permanent ban will be imposed on all other types of plastic products. Manufacturing and sales will be prohibited, with strict penalties for violations.
promise_text_ta: மிக இன்றியமையாத, மாற்றுக்கு வழியற்ற நெகிழிப் பொருள்களின் பட்டியல் உருவாக்கப்படும். அவை தவிர, எல்லா வகையான நெகிழிப் பொருள்களுக்கும் நிலையான தடை விதிக்கப்படும். உருவாக்கம் மற்றும் விற்பனை அனுமதிக்கப்படாது. மீறினால் கடும் நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 238
impact_mechanism: Aims to drastically reduce plastic pollution by prohibiting the production and sale of most plastic items.

promise_components.component: Create a list of essential, non-replaceable plastic items and ban all others.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory action. The primary cost is economic, borne by the plastic manufacturing and retail industries. The definition of 'essential' will be critical.

promise_components.component: Prohibit manufacturing and sales with strict penalties.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a significant enforcement effort from state agencies to conduct inspections and prosecute violators.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost is for enforcement activities, which cannot be calculated from the reference data. The indirect economic impact on industry and employment would be significant.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy addresses the root cause of plastic pollution by attempting to stop it at the source of production and sale. A comprehensive ban fundamentally alters the market for single-use goods.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness is highly dependent on controlling cross-border smuggling and the scope of the 'essential items' exemption list.

promise_text_en: A dedicated Plastic Eradication Board will be established. Its mission will be to progressively halt the production and sale of plastics, and to collect and recycle existing plastic materials.
promise_text_ta: நெகிழி ஒழிப்பிற்கான தனி வாரியம் அமைக்கப்படும். வாரியத்தின் நோக்கம், நெகிழி உருவாக்கம் மற்றும் விற்பனையைப் படிப்படியாக நிறுத்துவது, ஏற்கனவே பயன்படுத்தப்பட்ட நெகிழிப் பொருள்களைச் சேகரித்து மறுசுழற்சி செய்வதாகும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 238
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated government body to coordinate and drive the state's policy on plastic reduction and recycling.

promise_components.component: Establish a dedicated Plastic Eradication Board.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new government entity with staff, offices, and an operational budget. The cost is dependent on the size and scope of the board.

promise_components.component: The board's mission will be to halt plastic production/sale and manage collection/recycling.
promise_components.analysis: This defines the board's mandate, which consolidates responsibilities that may currently be spread across different departments.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of establishing and operating a new government board is not specified and cannot be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing a permanent institution with a specific mandate to tackle the plastics problem is a structural approach. It ensures continuous focus and policy momentum beyond ad-hoc initiatives.
coverage_gap_note: There is a risk the board could become bureaucratic and ineffective if not given sufficient authority and resources.

promise_text_en: Strict checkpoints will be established at state borders to prevent goods with banned plastic packaging from entering from neighboring states.
promise_text_ta: அண்டை மாநிலங்களிலிருந்து கொண்டு வரப்படும் பொருள்களில், தடை செய்யப்பட்ட நெகிழிப் பொதிகள் (Packaging) இருந்தால், அவற்றை எல்லையிலேயே தடுத்து நிறுத்த கடுமையான ஆய்வுச் சாவடிகள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 238
impact_mechanism: Attempts to enforce a state-level plastic ban by preventing the inflow of banned goods from other states.

promise_components.component: Establish strict checkpoints at state borders to prevent entry of goods with banned plastic packaging.
promise_components.analysis: This is a logistical and enforcement action requiring significant manpower and infrastructure at all entry points to the state. It would involve inspecting commercial freight.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost for staffing and equipping numerous border checkpoints is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This measure treats a symptom (inflow of plastics) of a larger problem (lack of a national ban and continued production elsewhere). It does not address the root cause, which is the production of these plastics in neighboring states and the demand within TN.
coverage_gap_note: Completely sealing a state border to specific goods is practically impossible and may disrupt legitimate interstate commerce.

promise_text_en: A Plastic Eradication Research Centre will be established to research methods for converting recycled plastic into useful products and for digesting plastic using microorganisms, with the ultimate goal of completely eradicating plastics and polymers.
promise_text_ta: நெகிழி ஒழிப்புக்கென ஆராய்ச்சி நடுவம் தொடங்கப்படும். அதில், மறுசுழற்சி செய்யப்பட்ட நெகிழியைப் பயன்பாட்டுப் பொருள்களாக மாற்றுவது எப்படி என்ற ஆய்வுகளையும், நுண்ணுயிரிகளைக் கொண்டு நெகிழியை எப்படிச் செரிப்பது போன்ற ஆராய்ச்சிகளும் மேற்கொண்டு, நெகிழி மற்றும் குழைமங்களை முற்றாக ஒழிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 238
impact_mechanism: Fosters long-term solutions to plastic waste by investing in scientific research for advanced recycling and degradation methods.

promise_components.component: Establish a Plastic Eradication Research Centre.
promise_components.analysis: This involves a capital and operational investment in a new scientific institution, including infrastructure, equipment, and salaries for researchers.

promise_components.component: The centre will research plastic-to-product conversion and microbial digestion of plastics.
promise_components.analysis: This defines a long-term R&D agenda aimed at finding a technological solution to the problem of existing and future plastic waste.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of establishing and running a specialized scientific research centre is significant but not specified or calculable from the data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural investment in finding a permanent, scientific solution to the material's persistence in the environment. It addresses the root technical problem of how to safely and effectively dispose of plastic waste.
coverage_gap_note: Scientific breakthroughs are not guaranteed, and any viable solutions may take many years or decades to develop and scale.

promise_text_en: Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) will be enforced in industrial development. A company's responsibility will not end with production; it must also ensure that the product is handled in an environmentally safe manner at the end of its life.
promise_text_ta: தொழில்துறை வளர்ச்சியில் உருவாக்குபவர் பொறுப்பு (EPR) நீட்டிக்கப்படும். ஒரு பொருளை உருவாக்கம் செய்வதுடன் ஒரு நிறுவனத்தின் கடமை முடிந்துவிடுவதில்லை. அந்தப் பொருள் அதன் வாழ்நாள் முடிவில் சுற்றுச்சூழலுக்குப் பாதிப்பில்லாத வகையில் கையாளப்படுவதையும் அந்த நிறுவனம் உறுதி செய்ய வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 238
impact_mechanism: Shifts the financial and logistical burden of post-consumer waste management from the public to the producers of goods.

promise_components.component: Enforce Extended Producer Responsibility (EPR) in industrial development.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory policy making companies responsible for the end-of-life management of their products. National EPR rules already exist; this promise focuses on stricter state-level enforcement. The cost is borne by producers.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost to the state is low, mainly for strengthening the enforcement capacity of the pollution control board. The primary cost is on private sector producers.
sustainability_reasoning: EPR is a core principle of a circular economy. By making producers responsible for waste, it creates a powerful financial incentive to design products with less packaging, and that are easier to recycle, addressing a root cause of the waste crisis.
coverage_gap_note: Enforcement is complex, especially for products from the unorganized sector or those sold through informal supply chains.

promise_text_en: Real-time Online Monitoring Systems will be made mandatory to track industrial waste. The entire path from the point of generation to the treatment facility will be monitored via GPS technology to completely prevent illegal dumping.
promise_text_ta: தொழிற்சாலைகளிலிருந்து வெளியேறும் கழிவுகளைக் கண்காணிக்க நிகழ்நேர இணையவழி கண்காணிப்பு அமைப்புகள் (Real-time Online Monitoring Systems) கட்டாயமாக்குவோம். கழிவுகள் உருவாகும் இடத்திலிருந்து அவை தூய்மையாக்கும் நிலையங்களுக்குச் சென்றடையும் வரை உள்ள முழுப் பாதையையும் GPS தொழில்நுட்பங்கள் வழியே கண்காணிப்பதன் மூலம், சட்டத்திற்குப் புறம்பாகக் கொட்டப்படுவது முற்றிலுமாகத் தடுக்க முடியும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 239
impact_mechanism: Deters illegal dumping of industrial waste by increasing the probability of detection through mandatory real-time tracking technology.

promise_components.component: Mandate real-time online monitoring systems for industrial waste.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory measure imposing technology adoption on industries. The cost to the state involves creating a central monitoring portal and enforcement staff. Costs are not quantifiable from reference data.

promise_components.component: Track waste transport from generation to treatment via GPS.
promise_components.analysis: This requires industries to fit GPS on vehicles, with data feeding into a government system. The mechanism aims to prevent diversion and illegal dumping en route. No data available to estimate the number of vehicles or industries.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Involves state expenditure on IT infrastructure and personnel, plus mandated costs for private industries. Not quantifiable from reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent, technology-based oversight system that changes the operational realities and incentives for industries handling waste. It is a fundamental shift in enforcement capability, addressing the root cause of insufficient monitoring.
coverage_gap_note: May not cover very small or informal industrial units that operate outside the formal regulatory net.

promise_text_en: We will take initiatives to establish an 'Industrial Symbiosis' system, where the waste of one industry becomes the raw material for another.
promise_text_ta: தொழிற்சாலையின் கழிவை மற்றொரு தொழிற்சாலைக்கு மூலப்பொருளாக மாற்றும் தொழில்துறை கூட்டறவு (Industrial symbiosis) முறையை ஏற்படுத்துவதற்கான முன்னெடுப்புகளை மேற்கொள்வோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 239
impact_mechanism: Reduces industrial waste and creates economic value by facilitating a circular economy where one firm's waste becomes another's raw material.

promise_components.component: Establish an 'Industrial Symbiosis' system.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy initiative to create a network or market for industrial by-products. It requires government facilitation, possibly through a digital platform and incentives. The direct cost is administrative and promotional.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The primary costs are administrative, for staff and potentially a digital platform to connect industries. These are not quantifiable from reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative aims to alter the linear 'take-make-dispose' industrial model, which is a root cause of waste generation. By creating a system for waste-to-resource exchange, it fosters a long-term, sustainable change in industrial ecology.
coverage_gap_note: Primarily benefits industries located in clusters where such material exchanges are logistically and economically viable.

promise_text_en: All waste management exchanges between the government and industries will be published on a public data portal. Information on which industries produce how much waste, how it is treated, and their compliance with EPR norms will be made directly accessible to the public.
promise_text_ta: அரசு மற்றும் தொழிற்சாலைகளுக்கு இடையே நடக்கும் கழிவு மேலாண்மைப் பரிமாற்றங்கள் அனைத்தையும் ஒரு பொதுத் தகவல் தளத்தில் வெளியிடுவோம். எந்தெந்தத் தொழிற்சாலைகள் எவ்வளவு கழிவுகளை உருவாக்குகின்றன, அவை எவ்வாறு தூய்மையாக்கப்படுகின்றன மற்றும் EPR நெறிகளை எவ்வாறு பின்பற்றுகின்றன என்ற தகவல்கள் மக்கள் நேரடியாகக் காண வகை செய்வோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 239
impact_mechanism: Increases public and regulatory scrutiny on industrial polluters by making their waste generation and compliance data transparent and accessible.

promise_components.component: Publish all waste management exchanges and compliance data on a public data portal.
promise_components.analysis: This is a transparency measure. The primary cost is the development and maintenance of a public-facing website/database. This is a relatively low-cost IT project for a state government.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost for IT development and maintenance is expected to be minor within the state's discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: A public data portal institutionalizes transparency, creating a permanent tool for public oversight. It empowers citizens, journalists, and researchers to hold both government and industry accountable on an ongoing basis.
coverage_gap_note: The impact is dependent on the public's capacity and willingness to access and act upon the provided data.

promise_text_en: Companies that intentionally violate environmental norms will face severe penalties based on the 'Polluter Pays Principle'. The licenses of industries involved in repeated violations will be revoked and heavy fines will be imposed.
promise_text_ta: சுற்றுச்சூழல் நெறிகளைத் திட்டமிட்டு மீறும் நிறுவனங்கள் மீது ‘மாசுபடுத்துபவரே அதற்கான விலையைக் கொடுக்க வேண்டும்’ (Polluter Pays Principle) என்ற உலகளாவிய நீதிக் கொள்கையின்படி கடுமையான தண்டங்கள் விதிக்கப்படும். தொடர் விதிமீறல்களில் ஈடுபடும் தொழிற்சாலைகளின் உரிமங்கள் திரும்பப்பெற்று கடும் தண்டனைகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 239
impact_mechanism: Deters environmental non-compliance by increasing the financial and operational cost of violations through stricter enforcement of the 'Polluter Pays Principle'.

promise_components.component: Impose severe penalties and heavy fines on environmental norm violators.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory enforcement policy. It does not have a direct cost to the state and may generate revenue through fines.

promise_components.component: Revoke licenses of industries involved in repeated violations.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action that strengthens the deterrent effect of the law. Its effectiveness depends on the political will to enforce it against powerful interests.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This policy is a potential revenue generator for the state through fines.
sustainability_reasoning: Enshrining the 'Polluter Pays Principle' with severe, consistently applied consequences creates a permanent deterrent. It structurally alters the cost-benefit analysis for potential polluters, shifting the economic burden of pollution from the public to the perpetrator.
coverage_gap_note: Enforcement may be applied unevenly, potentially targeting smaller firms more aggressively than larger, more influential ones.

promise_text_en: Surveillance cameras will be installed in all government offices to ensure transparent administration. It will be ensured that everyone from ministers' offices to the lowest-level employees operates within this transparent administrative system.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து அரசு அலுவலகங்களிலும் கண்காணிப்புக் கருவிகள் பொருத்தப்பட்டு, வெளிப்படையான நிருவாகம் உறுதி செய்யப்படும். அமைச்சர்கள் அலுவலகம் தொடங்கி, கடைநிலை ஊழியர்கள் வரையிலும் இந்த வெளிப்படையான நிருவாக முறைமைக்குள் இயங்குவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 242
impact_mechanism: Deters petty corruption and improves bureaucratic accountability by creating a visual record of interactions in government offices.

promise_components.component: Install surveillance cameras in all government offices, including ministers' offices.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale infrastructure project for transparency. The cost involves procurement, installation, and maintenance of cameras and data storage across thousands of state government offices. The number of offices is not in reference data, so cost is incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost would be significant, involving hardware, software, and data management for a vast number of government offices statewide. Not quantifiable with available data.
sustainability_reasoning: While cameras may deter visible misconduct, they do not address the root causes of corruption, such as opaque procedures, low salaries, or a culture of impunity. Corrupt activities can be displaced to unmonitored locations or channels.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address corruption that occurs outside of physical offices, such as in high-level policy-making, digital transactions, or large-scale procurement.

promise_text_en: A "Bribery and Corruption Eradication Commission" will be established. A Chief Commissioner at the state level and a Deputy Commissioner in each district headquarters will be appointed. A structure will operate under them with independent authority.
promise_text_ta: “கையூட்டு ஊழல் ஒழிப்பு ஆணையம்” அமைக்கப்படும். மாநில அளவில் தலைமை ஆணையரும், மாவட்டத் தலைநகரங்களில் ஒரு துணை ஆணையரும் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள். இவர்களின் கீழ் ஒரு கட்டமைப்பு தனித்த அதிகாரத்தோடு இயங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 242
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated, empowered body to investigate and act against corruption, aiming to increase the effectiveness of anti-graft efforts.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'Bribery and Corruption Eradication Commission' with independent authority.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new government body with a state-level Chief Commissioner and district-level Deputy Commissioners. The cost is administrative (salaries, offices, operations) and is not quantifiable from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Involves recurring administrative costs for salaries, offices, and operations for a new state-wide commission. Not quantifiable from reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: The creation of a new, supposedly independent commission is a structural change to the state's governance framework for anti-corruption. It addresses the systemic weakness of having enforcement agencies that may lack true independence.
coverage_gap_note: Its actual independence and effectiveness are contingent on its legal framework and the political will to shield it from interference.

promise_text_en: The Bribery and Corruption Eradication Commission will be empowered to identify those who engage in corruption and bribery and take actions such as demoting them by one level or transferring them to another department.
promise_text_ta: ஊழல் செய்பவர்களை, கையூட்டு பெறுபவர்களை அடையாளம் கண்டு, அவர்கள் அத்துறையில் இருந்து ஒரு படி தகுதி குறைப்பது, வேறு துறைக்கு மாற்றுவது போன்ற நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்க இந்த ஆணையத்திற்கு அதிகாரம் அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 242
impact_mechanism: Gives the proposed anti-corruption commission specific administrative powers to penalize corrupt officials, creating a more immediate deterrent.

promise_components.component: Empower the commission to demote corrupt officials by one level or transfer them.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural change granting administrative powers to a new body. Its implementation would require amending existing civil service rules and could face legal challenges from employee unions.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a change in administrative and legal powers, not a budgetary item.
sustainability_reasoning: By giving an independent body the power to impose direct career consequences, it changes the incentive structure for government employees. This is a fundamental change to the accountability system, addressing the impunity that often protects corrupt officials.
coverage_gap_note: These administrative penalties might be insufficient for serious cases of corruption, which would still require separate criminal prosecution.

promise_text_en: In every small village, local youth will be trained, and it will be ensured that all government services are provided online through the e-Sevai portal.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு சிற்றூரிலும் உள்ளூர் இளைஞர்களுக்குப் பயிற்சி அளித்து அனைத்து அரசுச் சேவைகளும் இசேவை மூலம் இணையத்தளம் வழியாக வழங்கப்படுவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 242
impact_mechanism: Improves access to government services and reduces opportunities for petty corruption by making services available online at the village level through trained local youth.

promise_components.component: Train local youth in every small village to provide all government services online via the e-Sevai portal.
promise_components.analysis: This is an expansion of the existing e-Sevai program to ensure last-mile service delivery. Costs include training and potentially hardware/connectivity support. The number of 'small villages' is not in reference data, so a total cost is incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Costs include a state-wide training program and potential subsidies for hardware and internet for new centers in thousands of villages. Not quantifiable from reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This builds permanent infrastructure and human capital at the village level, structurally improving the state-citizen interface. It addresses root causes of corruption and poor service related to physical distance and the digital divide.
coverage_gap_note: Does not directly address the digital literacy gap for citizens who wish to use services themselves, or affordability of service fees.

promise_text_en: Corruption in government recruitment, transfers, and medical staff selection due to the interference of external agencies will be prevented, and a fair administration will be ensured.
promise_text_ta: அரசுப்பணி ஆட்சேர்ப்பு, இடமாற்றங்கள், மருத்துவப் பணியாளர் தேர்வில் வெளி முகமைகளின் தலையீடு ஆகியவற்றில் நிலவும் ஊழலைத் தடுத்து நேர்மையான நிருவாகம் உறுதிப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 242
impact_mechanism: Aims to ensure a merit-based and fair system for public sector employment and placement by eliminating external and political interference.

promise_components.component: Prevent corruption and interference by external agencies in government recruitment, transfers, and medical staff selection.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent to improve governance and enforce existing rules. It does not propose a specific, new, or measurable mechanism to achieve this goal.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a promise of better governance and enforcement of existing rules.
sustainability_reasoning: While the promise identifies a valid root cause (political interference), it lacks a concrete mechanism for how this will be prevented. Without a new law, institution, or enforceable process, it remains a statement of good intention rather than a structural reform.
coverage_gap_note: Lacks a specific mechanism, so its practical coverage is zero until a concrete policy is formulated.

promise_text_en: To prevent corruption, the 'Right to Services Act' will be enacted immediately. Complete autonomy will be given to anti-corruption investigation agencies.
promise_text_ta: ஊழலைத் தடுக்கும் வகையில் ‘சேவை உரிமைச் சட்டம்’ (Right to Services) உடனடியாக இயற்றப்படும். ஊழல் தடுப்பு உசாவும் (விசாரணை) அமைப்புகளுக்கு முழுமையான தன்னாட்சி அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 242
impact_mechanism: Creates a legal right for citizens to receive time-bound government services and strengthens the independence of anti-corruption bodies.

promise_components.component: Enact the 'Right to Services Act'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major legislative reform that makes timely service delivery a legal entitlement for citizens, with penalties for derelict officials. It requires significant administrative setup for monitoring and appeals.

promise_components.component: Give complete autonomy to anti-corruption investigation agencies.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance reform aimed at insulating investigative bodies from political control, thereby strengthening their effectiveness. Its success depends on the legal framework and political will.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The Right to Services Act would have administrative costs for implementation and oversight. Granting autonomy has no direct cost but requires immense political will.
sustainability_reasoning: A Right to Services Act fundamentally alters the citizen-state relationship by making officials legally accountable for timely service. Independent investigative agencies are a cornerstone of a functional anti-corruption framework. Both are deep, structural reforms.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness of the Act depends on citizens' awareness of their rights and their ability to use the appeal process.

promise_text_en: A law will be enacted to protect the identity of whistleblowers who report corruption charges and ethical violations.
promise_text_ta: ஊழல் குற்றச்சாட்டுகள், நெறிமீறல்கள் குறித்து முறையீடு அளிப்பவர் பெயர் வெளியே தெரியாதவாறு காப்பதற்கான சட்டம் இயற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 242
impact_mechanism: Encourages reporting of corruption by legally protecting individuals who expose it from retaliation.

promise_components.component: A law will be enacted to protect the identity of whistleblowers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative action. The cost involves drafting, passing, and enforcing the law. The financial cost cannot be calculated from the provided data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is administrative and legal, not a large-scale expenditure that can be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to create a permanent legal framework that changes the risk-reward calculation for reporting corruption. It addresses the root cause of fear of reprisal, which often prevents wrongdoing from being exposed.

promise_text_en: To prevent loss of life and livelihood due to ecological corruption, a 'Zero Tolerance' policy will be adopted against environment-related corruption.
promise_text_ta: சூழலியல் ஊழலினால் ஏற்படும் உயிர், வாழ்வாதார இழப்புகளைத் தடுத்திட சுற்றுச்சூழல் சார்ந்த ஊழலுக்கு எதிராக ‘சுழிய பொறுத்தல்தன்மை' (Zero Tolerance) கடைபிடிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Deters environmental crimes by signaling and enforcing strict penalties against corruption in this sector.

promise_components.component: A 'Zero Tolerance' policy will be adopted against environment-related corruption.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy declaration. Its effectiveness depends entirely on the specific enforcement mechanisms, which are not detailed. The financial cost is related to enforcement and cannot be calculated from the provided data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is in enforcement (investigations, prosecutions), which cannot be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: A 'policy' without a specific new law or enforcement body is a statement of intent. While it addresses a real problem, the term 'Zero Tolerance' is often used for political signaling and is difficult to translate into concrete, sustained action without more detail.

promise_text_en: Illegal stone quarries will be shut down immediately. Adequate protection will be provided to activists and affected people who have filed complaints about this.
promise_text_ta: சட்டத்திற்குப் புறம்பாக இயங்கும் கற்சுரங்கங்கள் உடனடியாக மூடப்படும். இதுகுறித்து முறையீடு அளித்த ஆர்வலர்கள் மற்றும் பாதிக்கப்பட்ட மக்களுக்கு உரிய பாதுகாப்பு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Halts illegal resource extraction and protects citizens who report it through direct state enforcement action.

promise_components.component: Illegal stone quarries will be shut down immediately.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement action. The cost involves police and administrative resources to identify and close illegal operations. This cost cannot be quantified from the reference data.

promise_components.component: Adequate protection will be provided to activists and affected people who have filed complaints.
promise_components.analysis: This requires providing security, the cost of which depends on the number of individuals and the threat level, and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Enforcement and protection costs are part of existing departmental budgets, but the incremental cost for this specific initiative is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Shutting down existing illegal quarries provides immediate relief but does not fix the underlying regulatory and corruption issues that allow them to emerge. It treats the symptom (the illegal quarry) rather than the systemic cause.
coverage_gap_note: This action does not address the systemic corruption or regulatory loopholes that enable illegal quarrying to begin with.

promise_text_en: All information and actions related to natural resources and mining leases will be made 100% transparently available on the website with reports.
promise_text_ta: இயற்கை வளங்கள் மற்றும் சுரங்கக் குத்தகைகள் குறித்த அனைத்துத் தகவல்கள் மற்றும் நடவடிக்கைகள் அனைத்தும் அறிக்கைகளுடன் இணையதளத்தில் 100% வெளிப்படையாகக் கொண்டுவரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Reduces corruption in mining by making all lease information and related actions publicly accessible online.

promise_components.component: All information and actions related to natural resources and mining leases will be made 100% transparently available on a website.
promise_components.analysis: This is a transparency initiative. The cost is primarily for developing and maintaining a web portal, which is an administrative expense that cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is administrative (IT development and maintenance) and cannot be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent system of public oversight for a sector prone to corruption. By making opacity difficult, it addresses a root cause of cronyism and illegal resource allocation.

promise_text_en: The findings from the reports of the local financial audit committee will be presented to the people in a public meeting at the end of the year.
promise_text_ta: உள்ளூர் குவையத் (நிதி) தணிக்கைக் குழுவின் அறிக்கைக் கண்டெடுப்புகள் ஆண்டு இறுதியில் ஒரு பொதுக்கூட்டத்தில் மக்களிடம் முன்வைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Increases local government accountability by mandating public disclosure and discussion of audit findings.

promise_components.component: The findings from local financial audit committee reports will be presented to the people in a public meeting at the end of the year.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural change to enhance social audits. The direct financial cost is minimal, involving the organization of public meetings, and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is a minimal administrative expense for organizing meetings.
sustainability_reasoning: This institutionalizes a new, recurring process of public accountability for local government spending. It addresses the root problem of a lack of citizen oversight over local finances.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness is dependent on the level of citizen awareness and participation, which may vary across regions.

promise_text_en: Shortcomings in the Tamil Nadu Tender Transparency Act and its rules will be rectified, and ethical violations between government employees and contractors will be prevented.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு ஒப்பந்தங்கள் வெளிப்படைத்தன்மைச் சட்டம் மற்றும் நெறிகளில் உள்ள குறைபாடுகளைக் களைந்து, அரசு ஊழியர் - ஒப்பந்ததாரர் இடையிலான நெறி மீறல்கள் தடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Reduces corruption in public procurement by strengthening the legal framework that governs government tenders.

promise_components.component: Shortcomings in the Tamil Nadu Tender Transparency Act and its rules will be rectified.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative and regulatory reform. The cost is administrative and related to the legislative process, which cannot be calculated from the reference data.

promise_components.component: Ethical violations between government employees and contractors will be prevented.
promise_components.analysis: This is the stated goal of the reform, not a separate, costable action.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Legislative and administrative costs are not quantifiable from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Amending the Act to close loopholes is a structural reform. It targets the legal framework, which is a root cause of how procurement corruption occurs, creating a more robust and permanent system.

promise_text_en: It will be publicly announced that government work will be completed within a specified timeframe, and appropriate action will be taken against officials who cause delays.
promise_text_ta: இந்த வேலை கொடுக்கப்பட்ட காலத்திற்குள் உறுதியாக முடிக்கப்படும் என்று வெளிப்படையாக மக்களுக்கு தெரிவிக்கப்படும். தாமதப்படுத்தும் அதிகாரிகள் மீது உரிய நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Improves service delivery and reduces petty corruption by creating public pressure on officials to meet deadlines.

promise_components.component: It will be publicly announced that government work will be completed within a specified timeframe.
promise_components.analysis: This is a service delivery guarantee, similar to a 'Right to Service' Act. The cost is administrative and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

promise_components.component: Appropriate action will be taken against officials who cause delays.
promise_components.analysis: This is the enforcement part of the guarantee. Costs are administrative and related to disciplinary proceedings, which cannot be quantified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is administrative, for setting up tracking systems and for enforcement, and cannot be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented as a formal system with legal backing (like a Right to Service Act), this creates a permanent change in bureaucratic accountability. It addresses the root causes of inefficiency and 'speed money' corruption.

promise_text_en: The Right to Information Act will be further simplified. Information on which office and official to approach for information will be made publicly available.
promise_text_ta: தகவல் அறியும் உரிமைச் சட்டம் இன்னும் எளிதாக மாற்றி அமைக்கப்படும். எந்த அலுவலகத்தில் எவரிடம் எப்படித் தகவல் கேட்பது என்ற விண்ணப்பம் வெளிப்படையாக மக்களுக்கு அறிவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Increases the use and effectiveness of the RTI Act by making it easier for citizens to navigate the process.

promise_components.component: The Right to Information Act will be further simplified.
promise_components.analysis: This implies procedural changes or amendments to make the act more user-friendly. The cost is administrative and cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Information on which office and official to approach for information will be made publicly available.
promise_components.analysis: This is a low-cost administrative action involving creating guides and updating websites. The cost cannot be quantified from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is a minimal administrative expense.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses procedural barriers that limit the effectiveness of a key transparency law. Improving accessibility is a structural change that makes the existing framework more robust and sustainable for public use.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will strengthen the "Right to Information Act," which has the power to monitor the work of government offices.
promise_text_ta: அரசு அலுவலக வேலைகளைக் கண்காணிக்கும் அதிகாரம் படைத்த “தகவல் பெறும் உரிமைச் சட்டத்தை” நாம் தமிழர் அரசு வலிமைப்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Enhances government accountability by increasing the power and reach of the Right to Information Act.

promise_components.component: The Naam Tamilar government will strengthen the 'Right to Information Act'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent. 'Strengthen' is not defined and could mean many things (e.g., faster replies, fewer exemptions, stronger penalties). Without specifics, it is not possible to analyze the action or cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague to estimate any cost.
sustainability_reasoning: The term 'strengthen' is a political statement without a concrete, measurable action. It signals support for the RTI Act but does not commit to a specific reform, making it primarily a promise for political optics.

promise_text_en: Commissioners in the RTI department will be disqualified if they do not perform their duties correctly, shirk responsibility, or misuse their position.
promise_text_ta: இந்தத் துறையில் உள்ள ஆணையர் நீதிபதிகளைப் போன்றவர்கள், தங்கள் பணியைச் சரியாக செய்யாவிட்டாலோ, பொறுப்பைத் தட்டிக்கழித்தாலோ, பதவியைத் தவறாகப் பயன்படுத்தினாலோ தகுதிக் குறைப்பு செய்யப்படுவர்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Improves the functioning of the RTI Commission by creating a mechanism to hold commissioners accountable for performance.

promise_components.component: Commissioners in the RTI department will be disqualified if they do not perform their duties correctly, shirk responsibility, or misuse their position.
promise_components.analysis: This requires establishing a new legal or procedural mechanism for removal based on performance criteria. The cost is administrative/legal and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is administrative and legal, not a quantifiable budget item.
sustainability_reasoning: This would structurally change the rules governing the Information Commission, a key oversight body. It addresses the root cause of an ineffective commission, though it carries a risk of political misuse if not carefully designed.
coverage_gap_note: The grounds for disqualification are subjective and could be misused to undermine the commission's independence.

promise_text_en: All departments will be interconnected online, and a facility will be created to download all forms.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துத் துறைகளும் இணையம் மூலமாக இணைக்கப்பட்டு படிவங்கள் அனைத்தும் பதிவிறக்கம் செய்து கொள்ளும் வசதி ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 243
impact_mechanism: Reduces friction and improves citizen access to government services by digitizing processes and information.

promise_components.component: All government departments will be interconnected online.
promise_components.analysis: This is a standard e-governance initiative to improve inter-agency efficiency and data sharing. Implementation requires significant capital investment in hardware, software, and cybersecurity, plus operational costs for maintenance and training. No data is available to quantify the cost.

promise_components.component: A facility will be created to download all government forms.
promise_components.analysis: This component aims to increase transparency and reduce the need for physical visits to government offices. The cost is primarily for web development and maintenance, which is minor in the context of the state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of a state-wide digital infrastructure overhaul is significant but cannot be estimated from the provided reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Digital transformation of government services is a fundamental change that creates a permanent, more efficient, and transparent infrastructure. It addresses the root causes of bureaucratic delay and opacity, shifting the paradigm of citizen-state interaction.
coverage_gap_note: Citizens without digital literacy or internet access would be excluded unless physical service centers (e-Sevai maiyams) are maintained and strengthened.

promise_text_en: Government employees who cause unnecessary delays in public services will be punished, and compensation will be provided to those affected, with the amount deducted from the concerned employee's salary.
