promise_components.component: Form a committee of intellectuals to lobby for lifting the LTTE ban, justice for genocide, and a referendum.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new government committee. Costs would include remuneration for members, travel expenses for lobbying, and operational overhead. These costs are not specified and cannot be estimated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Not calculable. The cost depends on the size, compensation, and operational budget of the committee, none of which are specified.
sustainability_reasoning: While a committee is a concrete step, its ability to influence the Union Government and international bodies on these sensitive issues is highly questionable. The action serves more as a political signal than a practical tool for achieving the stated goals.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will strive in every possible way to achieve a 'Separate Tamil Eelam Socialist Republic'.
promise_text_ta: 'தனித் தமிழீழ சமனியக் குடியரசை' அடைய அனைத்து வகையிலும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 263
impact_mechanism: This promise declares a foreign policy objective as a goal of the state government.

promise_components.component: Strive in every possible way to achieve a 'Separate Tamil Eelam Socialist Republic'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of a foreign policy goal. Under the Indian Constitution, foreign relations are the exclusive domain of the Union Government. A state government has no authority or means to pursue the creation of a separate state in another country.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct financial cost to the state budget. This is a political declaration.
sustainability_reasoning: This is an aspirational political statement completely outside the constitutional mandate and power of a state government. It has no practical implementation mechanism.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will urge the Union Government to grant Indian citizenship to Eelam Tamil refugees. They will be allowed to stay in Tamil Nadu as long as they wish.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு, ஈழத்தமிழர்களுக்கு இந்தியக் குடியுரிமையை ஒன்றிய அரசிடம் வலியுறுத்திப் பெற்றுத்தரும். ஈழ உறவுகள் விரும்பும் வரை இங்கே இருக்கலாம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 266
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide legal security and permanent residency for Eelam Tamil refugees in Tamil Nadu.

promise_components.component: Urge the Union Government to grant Indian citizenship to Eelam Tamil refugees.
promise_components.analysis: Advocacy directed at the Union Government. Granting citizenship is a central subject under the Citizenship Act, 1955. The state can only recommend and lobby.

promise_components.component: Allow them to stay in Tamil Nadu as long as they wish.
promise_components.analysis: This is a state-level policy decision regarding residency for refugees. The financial implications for social services are not calculable as the number of refugees is not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The advocacy component has no cost. The cost of indefinite stay is not calculable as refugee numbers and potential welfare entitlements are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Achieving citizenship or secure long-term residency is a fundamental, life-altering change for refugees. It addresses the root cause of their statelessness and legal precarity, providing a permanent solution.

promise_text_en: All restrictions imposed on refugees will be completely removed. They will be given the freedom to travel and seek employment, similar to the rights of Tibetan and Bangladeshi refugees.
promise_text_ta: ஏதிலிகள் மீது திணிக்கப்பட்டிருந்த கட்டுப்பாடுகள் அனைத்தும் முற்றாக நீக்கப்படும். திபெத், வங்கதேச ஏதிலிகளைப் போல் விரும்பிய வேலைகளுக்குச் சென்று வர வாய்ப்பு ஏற்படுத்தித் தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 267
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to grant economic and personal freedom to refugees by removing administrative and legal barriers.

promise_components.component: Completely remove all restrictions imposed on refugees.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy and administrative action to remove rules that may limit movement (e.g., reporting to local police) and access to the formal job market. It does not involve direct financial outlay.

promise_components.component: Give them the freedom to travel and seek employment.
promise_components.analysis: This is a change in regulations to grant rights similar to citizens. The implementation would be through government orders and administrative circulars.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct financial expenditure. This is a legislative and administrative action to grant rights and remove restrictions.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of refugee hardship: the lack of freedom and economic opportunity. Granting the right to work and travel freely is a lasting change that enables self-sufficiency.

promise_text_en: Shops will be allocated for Eelam Tamil refugees in the tourist areas of Tamil Nadu's hill regions, similar to the provisions made for Tibetan and Bangladeshi refugees.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டு மலைப்பகுதிச் சுற்றுலாத்தலங்களில், திபெத் ஏதிலிகளுக்கும், வங்கதேச ஏதிலிகளுக்கும் கடைகள் ஒதுக்கப்பட்டிருப்பதைப் போல இங்கு ஈழத்தமிழ் உறவுகளுக்கும் கடைகள் ஒதுக்கித் தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 267
impact_mechanism: This promise provides a direct livelihood opportunity to a subset of refugees through asset allocation.

promise_components.component: Allocate shops for Eelam Tamil refugees in the tourist areas of Tamil Nadu's hill regions.
promise_components.analysis: This involves providing commercial real estate. The cost would depend on whether shops are newly constructed or existing government properties are allocated. The number of shops and beneficiaries are not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Not calculable. The number of shops, their construction or acquisition cost, and the number of beneficiaries are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: While providing a shop is a significant benefit for the recipient, it is a form of targeted relief for a few. It treats the symptom of unemployment for some but does not structurally address the economic integration of the entire refugee population.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits only a small, selected group of refugees who can secure a shop, and is limited to specific geographic areas.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will continuously pressure the Government of India to sign international refugee conventions.
promise_text_ta: இந்தியாவும் உலகளாவிய ஏதிலிகளுக்கான ஒப்பந்தங்களில் கையெழுத்திட வேண்டும் என்று நாம் தமிழர் அரசு தொடர்ந்து அழுத்தங்களைக் கொடுத்துச் செய்து முடிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 267
impact_mechanism: This promise involves using the state's political platform to advocate for a national policy change on international law.

promise_components.component: Continuously pressure the Government of India to sign international refugee conventions.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political advocacy action. Signing international treaties is a sovereign function of the Union Government. The state government's role is limited to persuasion and passing resolutions.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct financial cost to the state budget. This is a political advocacy action.
sustainability_reasoning: The act of 'pressuring' the Centre is a political gesture. While the goal itself is structural (adopting an international legal framework), the state's action has no guaranteed impact and serves primarily as a statement of its position.

promise_text_en: All refugee camps and special detention centers in Tamil Nadu will be permanently closed. After formal registration, Eelam refugees will be housed in government residences or arrangements will be made for them to stay in places of their choice.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் உள்ள ஏதிலிகள் தங்ககங்கள், சிறப்புத் தங்குமிடங்கள் அனைத்தும் முற்றாக மூடப்படும். ஏதிலிகளாக தமிழ்நாடு வரும் ஈழ உறவுகள், முறைப்படி பதிவுகளுக்குப் பிறகு அரசுக் குடியிருப்புகளில் தங்க வைக்கப்படுவார்கள். பிறகு அவர்கள் விரும்பிய இடங்களில் சென்று தங்கிக்கொள்ள ஏற்பாடு செய்து கொடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 267
impact_mechanism: Improves the living conditions and grants freedom of movement for Eelam refugees by shifting them from camps to regular housing.

promise_components.component: All refugee camps and special detention centers in Tamil Nadu will be permanently closed.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision to decommission existing infrastructure. The number of camps is not specified in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Eelam refugees will be housed in government residences or allowed to stay in places of their choice after formal registration.
promise_components.analysis: The number of Eelam refugees requiring housing is not available in the reference data. The cost of providing government residences cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of providing housing is unknown as the number of beneficiaries is not in the reference data. Therefore, the total fiscal impact cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: This represents a permanent, one-time change in the legal and residential status of a specific population, moving them from a state of temporary confinement to a more permanent and integrated living arrangement. It addresses the root problem of their living conditions.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is specific to Eelam refugees and does not apply to other migrant or refugee groups.

promise_text_en: The surveillance and interrogation methods used by the 'Q' branch police and revenue officials on Eelam Tamils in refugee camps will be abolished.
promise_text_ta: ஏதிலிகள் தங்குமிடத்தில் இருக்கும் ஈழத்தமிழர்கள் மீது, ‘குற்றத் தடுப்புப் பிரிவு’ (கியூ பிரிவு) காவலர்களின் கண்காணிப்பு, வினாவுதல் முறைகளும், வருவாய்த்துறை அதிகாரிகளின் வினாவுதல் முறைகளும் நீக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 267
impact_mechanism: Increases personal freedom and reduces state-sponsored harassment for Eelam refugees by changing security protocols.

promise_components.component: The surveillance and interrogation methods used by the 'Q' branch police on Eelam Tamils will be abolished.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative and policy change concerning police procedure. It does not have a direct financial cost but involves issuing new standing orders.

promise_components.component: The surveillance and interrogation methods used by revenue officials on Eelam Tamils will be abolished.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative and policy change concerning the procedures of revenue officials. It does not have a direct financial cost.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a policy change with no significant direct fiscal cost. The cost is negligible.
sustainability_reasoning: Abolishing specific surveillance protocols is a permanent change in state procedure. It structurally alters the relationship between the state security apparatus and the refugee community, addressing a root cause of harassment.
coverage_gap_note: This does not address potential surveillance on other groups or the general citizenry.

promise_text_en: Eelam Tamils will be provided with all necessary facilities to live with equal rights as Tamil Nadu Tamils in all spheres, including education, healthcare, and employment.
promise_text_ta: கல்வி, மருத்துவம், வேலைவாய்ப்பு என அனைத்திலும் தமிழ்நாட்டுத் தமிழர்களைப் போல் சம உரிமையுடன் வாழ அனைத்து வசதிகளும் செய்து கொடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 267
impact_mechanism: Aims to integrate Eelam Tamils into mainstream society by granting them legal parity in access to public services and employment.

promise_components.component: Eelam Tamils will be provided with equal rights as Tamil Nadu Tamils in education.
promise_components.analysis: The number of Eelam Tamil students is not available in the reference data, so the marginal cost of their inclusion in the public education system cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Eelam Tamils will be provided with equal rights as Tamil Nadu Tamils in healthcare.
promise_components.analysis: The number of Eelam Tamils is not available in the reference data, so the marginal cost of their inclusion in the public healthcare system cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Eelam Tamils will be provided with equal rights as Tamil Nadu Tamils in employment.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and policy change. The implementation may require legislative changes and coordination with the central government regarding work permits, and has no direct state fiscal cost.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is too broad to be costed. The number of beneficiaries and the specific entitlements are not defined. The fiscal impact cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: Granting equal rights is a fundamental, structural change. It addresses the root causes of exclusion and lack of opportunity by changing their legal status, which would enable long-term self-sufficiency and social integration.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is specific to Eelam Tamils and does not cover other migrant or refugee populations.

promise_text_en: A welfare board for Eelam refugees will be established. A separate fund will be created to provide them with assistance for various schemes, such as starting small businesses, building houses, and marriage aid.
promise_text_ta: ஈழ உறவுகளுக்கான நல வாரியம் உருவாக்கப்படும். ஈழத் தமிழர்கள் இங்கே சிறுதொழில் செய்ய, வீடு கட்டிக்கொள்ள, திருமண உதவி பெற என்று பல்வேறு திட்டங்களுக்குத் தனியாக குவையம் (நிதியம்) அமைக்கப்பட்டு அவர்களுக்கு உதவிகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 267
impact_mechanism: Provides targeted financial support and a dedicated administrative body to address the specific economic needs of Eelam refugees.

promise_components.component: A welfare board for Eelam refugees will be established.
promise_components.analysis: This involves an administrative cost for setting up and running a new government board. The exact cost is not calculable but would be a recurring expense.

promise_components.component: A separate fund will be created to provide assistance for small businesses, housing, and marriage aid.
promise_components.analysis: The size of the fund and the value of assistance per beneficiary are not specified. The number of potential beneficiaries is also not in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of the assistance fund is unspecified and therefore cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: While the board itself is a permanent institution, its described function is to disburse aid. This provides relief from financial hardship (a symptom) but does not fix the underlying issues of legal status or employment rights that cause the hardship.

promise_text_en: It is a matter of sorrow that the Tamil language is not in its prime in its own land. The Naam Tamilar government has a duty to restore it.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ் மொழி நம் மண்ணில் செம்மையற்று நிற்கிறது என்பதே வருத்தமான ஒன்று. இதை மீட்க வேண்டிய கடமையில் இருக்கிறது நாம் தமிழர் அரசு.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 269
impact_mechanism: This is a statement of political values and does not contain a mechanism for tangible change.

promise_components.component: It is a matter of sorrow that the Tamil language is not in its prime in its own land. The Naam Tamilar government has a duty to restore it.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of principle and intent, not a specific, measurable commitment. It cannot be analyzed for cost or impact.

fiscal_cost_note: There is no fiscal cost associated with a statement of intent.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a preamble that expresses a political position. It does not propose any action, policy, or program, and therefore has no material effect or sustainability.

promise_text_en: A new department, the 'Tamil Revival Department', will be created and made operational to end the suffering of the language in our land.
promise_text_ta: தனித்த ‘தமிழ் மீட்சித் துறை’ என்ற புதிய துறையை ஏற்படுத்திச் செயல்படுத்தும். மொழி நம் மண்ணில் செம்மையற்றுக் கிடக்கும் துன்பம் இனியும் தொடராது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 271
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated government body to focus on policies and programs related to the promotion of the Tamil language.

promise_components.component: A new department, the 'Tamil Revival Department', will be created and made operational.
promise_components.analysis: This involves the administrative cost of establishing and staffing a new government department. The exact cost is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data, but it would be a recurring annual expense.

fiscal_cost_note: The exact cost of a new department is not calculable without a proposed staffing pattern, but it would represent a recurring administrative expense. The cost is uncosted but likely feasible within the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a new department is a bureaucratic action and a form of political signalling. By itself, it does not address any root cause; its impact depends entirely on the specific, yet-to-be-defined policies it would implement.

promise_text_en: It is our dream to have 'Tamil everywhere, Tamil in everything'. The Naam Tamilar government will transform Tamil into the language of governance, authority, culture, usage, worship, and law.
promise_text_ta: எங்கும் தமிழ், எதிலும் தமிழ் என்பது நமது கனவு. தமிழை ஆட்சிமொழி, அதிகார மொழி, பண்பாட்டு மொழி, பயன்பாட்டு மொழி, வழிபாட்டு மொழி, வழக்காடு மொழி என நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மாற்றியமைக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 271
impact_mechanism: Aims to elevate the status and usage of the Tamil language by mandating its use across all major domains of public life.

promise_components.component: Transform Tamil into the language of governance, authority, culture, usage, worship, and law.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad, aspirational goal. Making Tamil the language of law would require extensive translation and changes to court procedures, some of which are under central jurisdiction. Mandating a language of worship is largely outside government purview.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for activities like translating the entire body of law and retraining personnel across all sectors is massive and cannot be calculated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented, this would be a fundamental and permanent alteration of the linguistic functioning of the state. It addresses the perceived marginalization of the language by attempting to enforce its use in all high-status domains.
coverage_gap_note: This policy could marginalize non-Tamil speaking linguistic minorities within the state.

promise_text_en: With the help of learned scholars, we will implement methods to nurture Tamil literary education comprehensively, from school level up to the doctoral level.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ் இலக்கியக் கல்வியைப் பள்ளிக்கல்வி முதலே முழுமையாகத் தொடங்கி முனைவர் பட்டம் வரையிலும் வளர்த்தெடுப்பதற்கான வழிமுறைகளைக் கற்றறிந்தச் சான்றோர்களின் உதவியுடன் நடைமுறைப்படுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 273
impact_mechanism: Strengthens the academic and educational foundation of the Tamil language by improving curriculum and instruction at all levels.

promise_components.component: Implement methods to nurture Tamil literary education comprehensively, from school level up to the doctoral level.
promise_components.analysis: This is a general commitment to improve education. The cost depends on the specific 'methods' used, such as curriculum reform, teacher training, or university grants, which are not specified. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost cannot be calculated as the specific programs, investments, and number of beneficiaries are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in the educational system is a structural approach. Improving curriculum and instruction from school to university builds long-term human capital and institutional capacity, addressing the root cause of language proficiency and scholarship.

promise_text_en: Priority will be given to Tamil medium education with scholarships, and an order will be issued by the Naam Tamilar government giving priority in employment in Tamil Nadu only to those who have studied in the Tamil language.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்வழிக் கல்விக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிப்பதோடு, கல்விக்கான உதவித் தொகையும், கூடவே தமிழ் மொழியில் படித்தவர்களுக்கு மட்டுமே தமிழகத்தில் வேலைவாய்ப்பில் முன்னுரிமை என்ற ஆணையையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அறிவிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 273
impact_mechanism: Creates a strong economic incentive to choose Tamil medium education by linking it directly to scholarships and preferential treatment in employment.

promise_components.component: Priority will be given to Tamil medium education with scholarships.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of scholarships cannot be calculated as the number of Tamil medium students and the scholarship amount are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: An order will be issued giving priority in employment in Tamil Nadu only to those who have studied in the Tamil language.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change with no direct fiscal cost, but it would likely face significant legal challenges on grounds of equality and non-discrimination.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of the scholarship component is unknown and cannot be calculated. The employment preference policy has no direct cost but carries significant legal risks.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy attempts to structurally re-engineer the labor market to create a direct economic advantage for Tamil medium education. It addresses the root economic incentives that often favor English medium, though its legal viability is highly questionable.
coverage_gap_note: This policy would actively disadvantage and exclude job seekers who were educated in other mediums.

promise_text_en: Primary school teachers will be extensively trained in pure Tamil speech and musical songs, which they will then teach to students.
promise_text_ta: தனித்தமிழ்ப் பேச்சுப் பயிற்சி, இசைப்பாடல் பயிற்சி ஆகியவை தொடக்கக் கல்வி ஆசிரியர்களுக்குப் பெருமளவில் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படும். அவர்கள் மாணவ மாணவிகளுக்குக் கற்றுத் தருவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 273
impact_mechanism: Improves the quality of language instruction at the foundational primary school level by upskilling the existing teacher workforce.

promise_components.component: Primary school teachers will be extensively trained in pure Tamil speech and musical songs.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a large-scale teacher training program. The number of primary school teachers in the ~53,000 government schools is not available in the reference data, so the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost cannot be calculated without knowing the number of primary school teachers to be trained and the cost per teacher for the program.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in teacher training is a structural improvement to the education system. A better-trained teacher has a long-term, cascading impact on student learning for years, addressing the quality of language acquisition at its root.
coverage_gap_note: The promise appears to be limited to government school teachers, excluding those in the private sector.

promise_text_en: We will implement a system where all government documents, records, and files, from the Village Secretariat (VAO) to the Chief Secretariat, are maintained only in Tamil. Officials from other states working in Tamil Nadu must learn Tamil.

promise_text_en: A grand memorial named 'Abode of Historical Heroes, a Path for Future Generations' will be built in Kanyakumari, featuring the history of our ancestors, Siddhars, sages, Chera, Chola, Pandya kings, and martyrs of language, border, and Eelam liberation struggles.

promise_text_ta: மலையடிவாரங்களில் தமிழர்மறை திருக்குறள் ஓதும் பள்ளிகள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 279
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to promote specific cultural-religious education by establishing new, specialized schools.

promise_components.component: Establish schools for chanting Thirukkural at the foothills of mountains.
promise_components.analysis: The number of schools to be established, the number of teachers and students, and the associated capital and operational costs are not specified. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated from the provided reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise involves capital expenditure for new schools and recurring expenditure for staff. The scale is undefined, so the cost cannot be estimated. Therefore, it is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative promotes a specific cultural text but does not address broader educational challenges like quality, access, or employability. Its impact is limited to a small, self-selecting group and serves primarily as a cultural statement.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to those interested in and able to access these specific schools, excluding the general student population.

promise_text_en: A memorial will be built to honor the memory of Veerappan, who was the forest guardian of the Tamils.
promise_text_ta: தமிழர்களின் வனக்காவலராக இருந்த ஐயா வீரப்பனாருக்கு, அவர் நினைவைப் போற்றும் வகையில் நினைவகம் கட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 279
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to honor a controversial figure through the construction of a public memorial.

promise_components.component: Build a memorial to honor Veerappan.
promise_components.analysis: This is a one-time capital expenditure for a memorial. The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the provided reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Annual cost is not applicable as this is a capital project. The total project cost is unstated. Therefore, it is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Building a memorial provides no material benefit or structural change. It is a highly controversial political statement intended to appeal to a particular group by honoring a controversial figure.

promise_text_en: Separate memorials will be built for martyrs Abdul Rauf, Muthukumar, and Sengodi, who sacrificed their lives for the liberation of the race.
promise_text_ta: இன விடுதலைக்குத் தன்னுயிரை ஈகம் செய்த ஈகைத் தமிழன் அப்துல் ரவூப், வீரத்தமிழன் முத்துக்குமார் மற்றும் வீரத்தங்கை செங்கொடிக்குத் தனித்தனியே நினைவகம் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 279
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to commemorate specific individuals by building public memorials in their honor.

promise_components.component: Build separate memorials for martyrs Abdul Rauf, Muthukumar, and Sengodi.
promise_components.analysis: This involves one-time capital expenditure for three separate memorials. The cost for each is not specified and cannot be estimated from the provided reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Annual cost is not applicable as this is a capital project. The total project cost for three memorials is unstated. Therefore, it is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Like other memorial promises, this serves to honor specific individuals and ideologies. It does not address any underlying socio-economic problems or create lasting change for the population.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will establish a new Tamil University in Madurai, which will serve as the coordinating headquarters for all Tamil universities, focusing on the retrieval of arts, culture, language, history, and archaeology, and offering research studies.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மதுரையில் புதிதாகத் தமிழ்ப் பல்கலைக்கழகம் உருவாக்கும். இப்பல்கலைகழகம் அனைத்துத் தமிழ்ப் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களுக்கும் ஒருங்கிணைப்புத் தலைமையிடமாக இருக்கும். கலை, பண்பாடு, மொழி வளர்ச்சி, தமிழின வரலாற்று ஆய்வு, தொல்லியல் குறித்த அனைத்தையும் மீட்டெடுக்கும் வகையிலும், ஆய்வு மேற்படிப்புகள் அனைத்தும் கற்கும் வகையிலும் செயல்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 279
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create a new higher education institution to advance research and study in specific cultural fields.

promise_components.component: Establish a new Tamil University in Madurai for research in arts, culture, language, history, and archaeology.
promise_components.analysis: This involves significant one-time capital expenditure and recurring annual operational costs for a new university. The specific budget is not provided, so the cost cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of establishing and running a university is substantial but unstated. It would likely involve several hundred crores in capital costs and significant annual recurring costs. Therefore, it is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: A university is a permanent institution that builds capacity for research, education, and cultural preservation. If successful, it creates a lasting infrastructure for knowledge and skill development, addressing the root need for advanced study in these areas.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in the higher education sector and do not directly address primary/secondary education or vocational training needs.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will build a historical memorial hall at the site of the Perungamanallur massacre (the Jallianwala Bagh of the South) to honor and record their heroic struggle.
promise_text_ta: தென்னகத்து சாலியன் வாலாபாக் படுகொலை எனப் பேசப்பட்ட 'பெருங்காமநல்லூர்' படுகொலை நடந்த இடத்தில் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு வரலாற்று நினைவு மண்டபம் எழுப்பும். அவர்களின் வீரப் போராட்டத்தைப் போற்றிப் பதிவு செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 279
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to commemorate a historical event by constructing a memorial hall.

promise_components.component: Build a historical memorial hall at the site of the Perungamanallur massacre.
promise_components.analysis: This is a one-time capital expenditure for a memorial hall. The cost is not specified and cannot be estimated from the provided reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Annual cost is not applicable as this is a capital project. The total project cost is unstated. Therefore, it is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: The memorial serves to honor a historical event and its victims, which has cultural and emotional value. However, it does not alter the present-day material conditions of any group or address a systemic problem.

promise_text_en: January 25th, the memorial day for Tamil martyrs, will be promoted to be observed as World Language Day.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ் ஈகையர்களின் நினைவு நாளான சனவரி 25ஐ உலக மொழி நாளாகக் கடைப்பிடிக்க வலியுறுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 281
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to gain international recognition for a day of cultural significance through diplomatic advocacy.

promise_components.component: Promote January 25th to be observed as World Language Day.
promise_components.analysis: This is a diplomatic and advocacy effort aimed at international bodies like the UN or UNESCO. The direct financial cost is negligible, limited to administrative and promotional expenses. Success is not dependent on state budget.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible direct fiscal cost. The promise is about advocacy, not expenditure. It can be absorbed within existing administrative budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims for international recognition, which is a form of cultural signalling. It has no impact on the daily lives, economic status, or access to services for the people of Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: Similar to how the national leader deposited 500 rupees for children named in Tamil in Tamil Eelam, the practice of giving children Tamil names will be encouraged.
promise_text_ta: தமிழீழத்தில் தமிழில் பெயர் வைத்தப் பிள்ளைகளுக்குத் தேசியத் தலைவர், தமிழீழத் தேசிய வைப்பகத்தில் பிள்ளைகளின் பெயரிலேயே 500 உருபாய் நிலையான வைப்புத்தொகை வைத்தார். அதுபோலத் தமிழில் பெயர் வைக்க ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 281
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to promote a cultural practice (giving Tamil names) through a potential small financial incentive.

promise_components.component: Encourage giving children Tamil names, possibly with a financial incentive.
promise_components.analysis: The promise references a past practice of a ₹500 deposit. If revived, the total cost would depend on the annual number of births in Tamil Nadu and the take-up rate. This data is not available in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: If a financial incentive is provided, the total cost cannot be estimated as the annual number of births is not in the reference data. Therefore, it is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: A small, one-time financial incentive is unlikely to be a primary driver for naming choices. The main effect is symbolic, reinforcing a cultural value without addressing any material need.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes families who do not have newborns or choose not to use designated 'Tamil' names.

promise_text_en: New Tamil technical terms will be created to suit contemporary times. A committee of Tamil scholars will be formed for this purpose, and the usage of such terms will be taught to students from their school days.
promise_text_ta: நிகழ் காலத்திற்கேற்ப புதிய தமிழ்க் கலைச்சொற்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும். இதற்கென்று தமிழ் அறிஞர்கள் குழு அமைக்கப்படும். பள்ளிப் பருவத்தில் இருந்தே இத்தகைய மொழிப் பயன்பாடு மாணவர்களுக்குப் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 281
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to modernize the Tamil language for contemporary use by creating and standardizing new technical terms within the education system.

promise_components.component: Form a committee of scholars to create new Tamil technical terms.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of forming a committee (sitting fees, administrative support) is negligible and part of routine government expenditure.

promise_components.component: Teach the new terms to students from their school days.
promise_components.analysis: Integrating new terms requires curriculum and textbook revisions and potentially teacher training across ~53,000 government schools. The specific cost is not defined but would be an administrative expense within the education budget.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct cost of the committee is minimal. Downstream costs for curriculum changes are not specified but can be absorbed into the regular education department budget over time.
sustainability_reasoning: By systematically developing and integrating modern technical vocabulary, this promise strengthens the language's capacity to function in contemporary education and professional life. This is a foundational, structural effort for linguistic development.
coverage_gap_note: Initial benefits are within the education system; wider public adoption of new terms is a long-term challenge.

promise_text_en: The Thaipusam festival for our ancestor Lord Murugan, the ancient deity of the Tamils and the head of the Kurinji land, will be celebrated as the 'Thirumurugan Peruvizha' (Grand Festival of Thirumurugan).
promise_text_ta: தமிழரின் மூத்த இறையோனாகவும் குறிஞ்சி நிலத் தலைவனாகவும் இருக்கின்ற எம் முப்பாட்டன் முருகப்பெருமானின் சுறவக் கொடிறு (தைப்பூசம்) திருவிழா திருமுருகப் பெருவிழாவாகக் கொண்டாடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 285
impact_mechanism: Reinforces a specific cultural and historical narrative by officially renaming a major religious festival.

promise_components.component: Thaipusam festival will be celebrated as 'Thirumurugan Peruvizha'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a symbolic name change. The financial cost is related to administrative notifications and public communication, which cannot be calculated from the reference data but is expected to be minimal.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is an administrative action with negligible direct financial cost.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a symbolic act of cultural branding. It does not address any underlying economic or social issues, but rather changes the official name of a festival.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will announce separate forms of worship for the deities of each of the five traditional landscapes (Ainthinai): Seyon (Murugan) for Kurinji, Mayon (Kannan) for Mullai, Indran for Marutham, Varunan for Neithal, and Kotravai for Palai.
promise_text_ta: குறிஞ்சி நிலத்தின் இறையோனாக சேயோன் (முருகன்), முல்லை நிலத்தின் இறையோனாக மாயோன் (கண்ணன்), மருத நிலத்தின் இறையோனாக இந்திரன், நெய்தல் நிலத்தின் இறையோனாக வருணன், பாலை நிலத்தின் இறைவியாகக் கொற்றவை என ஐந்திணை நிலத்திற்கும் தனித்தனி இறை வழிபாட்டை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அறிவிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 285
impact_mechanism: Formalizes and promotes specific regional/traditional religious practices within the state's cultural policy.

promise_components.component: Announce separate forms of worship for the deities of the five traditional landscapes (Ainthinai).
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy declaration. The promise does not specify funding or construction, so its cost cannot be calculated. It is an act of state recognition for traditional worship.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. As a policy announcement without specified expenditure, there is no calculable cost.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a symbolic act of cultural recognition. It does not provide material benefits or address structural problems in society.

promise_text_en: In Kanyakumari, considered an extension of the Kumari Kandam, the Naam Tamilar government will build a 'Tamilar Koyil' (Tamil Temple). It will be established as a prime tourist destination with facilities including accommodation and an auditorium.
promise_text_ta: குமரிக்கண்டத்தின் நீட்சியாக விளங்கும் கன்னியாகுமரியில் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு, ‘தமிழர் கோயிலைக்’ கட்டியெழுப்பும். இங்கு தங்கும் விடுதிகள், கலையரங்கக்கூடம் உட்பட பல்வேறு வசதிகளோடு சிறந்த சுற்றுலாத்தலமாக நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 285
impact_mechanism: Creates a new major cultural and tourist landmark intended to generate local economic activity and promote a specific identity.

promise_components.component: Build a 'Tamilar Koyil' (Tamil Temple) in Kanyakumari with accommodation and an auditorium.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major capital construction project. The cost is not specified in the promise, and reference data does not contain figures for construction. Therefore, the cost is incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of building a large temple complex and tourist facility is unknown but would be a significant capital expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: The primary goal is symbolic and cultural branding through infrastructure. While it may create some tourism-related jobs, its core purpose is not to solve a structural economic or social problem.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are localized to the Kanyakumari tourism economy, not the general population.

promise_text_en: A grand memorial will be built in Udaiyalur near Thanjavur for our great ancestor Arunmozhi Cholan and his son Rajendra Cholan.
promise_text_ta: உலகத்தில் மூன்றாம் பெரும் வல்லரசை நிறுவிய நம் அருமைப் பெரும்பாட்டன்கள் அருண்மொழிச் சோழனுக்கும், அவரது அன்பு மகன் அரசேந்திரச் சோழனுக்கும் தஞ்சாவூர் அருகே உடையாளூரிலே மாபெரும் நினைவகம் கட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 285
impact_mechanism: Honors historical figures and reinforces regional pride through the creation of a physical monument.

promise_components.component: Build a grand memorial in Udaiyalur for Arunmozhi Cholan and Rajendra Cholan.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital construction project. The cost is not specified, and reference data does not contain figures for memorial construction. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of building a grand memorial is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Building a memorial is a symbolic act of historical reverence. It does not address any current socio-economic issues faced by the population.

promise_text_en: The statue of our great ancestor Arunmozhi Cholan, currently in the Sarabhai Museum in Gujarat, will be retrieved and placed in the memorial to be built for him in Udaiyalur.
promise_text_ta: குஜராத்தில் சாராபாய் அருங்காட்சியகத்தில் உள்ள நமது பெரும்பாட்டன் அருண்மொழிச் சோழன் சிலையை மீட்டுக் கொண்டு வந்து உடையாளூரில் அவருக்குக் கட்டப்படும் நினைவகத்தில் வைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 285
impact_mechanism: Aims to reclaim a cultural artifact for the state, reinforcing historical pride and correcting a perceived wrong.

promise_components.component: Retrieve the statue of Arunmozhi Cholan from a museum in Gujarat.
promise_components.analysis: This action is primarily political and diplomatic, requiring negotiation with another state government. The financial cost is negligible compared to the political complexity. Success is not guaranteed.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The primary cost is political capital, not financial resources.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a highly symbolic gesture of cultural reclamation. Its success is uncertain and it has no impact on the material conditions of the population.

promise_text_en: The statue of our great ancestor Arunmozhi Cholan, currently located outside the Thanjavur Big Temple which he built, will be installed inside the temple premises.
promise_text_ta: நம் பெரும்பாட்டன் அருண்மொழிச் சோழன் கட்டிய தஞ்சைப் பெருவுடையார் கோயிலுக்கு வெளியே வாசலில் உள்ள அருண்மொழிச் சோழன் சிலை அவன் கட்டிய கோயிலுக்குள்ளேயே நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 285
impact_mechanism: Corrects a perceived historical slight by giving a more prominent position to a historical figure at a key heritage site.

promise_components.component: Install the statue of Arunmozhi Cholan inside the Thanjavur Big Temple premises.
promise_components.analysis: The Thanjavur Big Temple is an Archaeological Survey of India (ASI) protected monument. Any modification, including installing a statue, requires permission from this central agency, which is a significant legal and administrative hurdle.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The primary barrier is regulatory approval from the central government's ASI, not the minor financial cost of moving a statue.
sustainability_reasoning: A symbolic act of repositioning a statue that depends on central government approval and does not alter the socio-economic landscape.

promise_text_en: In Kurinjankulam village near Kovilpatti, the issues faced by the native people will be resolved, and a temple will be built for Mother Kanthari.
promise_text_ta: கோவில்பட்டிக்கு அருகில் உள்ள குறிஞ்சான்குளம் எனும் ஊரில் நிலவி வரும் ஆதிக்குடி மக்களின் இடையூறுகளைக் களைந்து, இச்சிக்கல் தீர்க்கப்படும். அன்னை காந்தாரிக்குக் கோயில் கட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 287
impact_mechanism: Addresses a specific local grievance and provides a new place of worship for a community.

promise_components.component: Resolve issues faced by native people in Kurinjankulam village.
promise_components.analysis: This component is too vague to analyze financially. The nature of the 'issues' and the cost of their resolution are unknown.

promise_components.component: Build a temple for Mother Kanthari in the village.
promise_components.analysis: This is a construction project. The cost is not specified, and reference data does not contain figures for temple construction. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague ('resolve issues') and lacks cost details for the temple construction.
sustainability_reasoning: It aims to provide relief for a specific local problem, which is symptomatic relief. The temple component is symbolic. It does not create a systemic solution for such issues arising elsewhere.
coverage_gap_note: The solution is hyper-local and does not address similar issues that may exist in other villages.

promise_text_en: The Senji Fort, currently known as Desingu Raja Fort, will be reclaimed and legally renamed as Konerikkon Fort in honor of our ancestor.
promise_text_ta: செஞ்சிக் கோட்டை இன்று தேசிங்கு இராசன் கோட்டையாக அழைக்கப்படுவதை மாற்றி, அதை மீட்டு எம் பாட்டன் பெயரில் கோனேரிக்கோன் கோட்டை எனச் சட்டத்தின் மூலம் நிறுவுவோம்.

promise_components.component: Legally rename Senji Fort as Konerikkon Fort.

sustainability_reasoning: A symbolic name change for a historical site, with no impact on the material well-being of citizens. Its implementation may depend on central government approval.

promise_text_en: The life story of the great heroic queen Velu Nachiyar will be included as a lesson for students in schools and educational institutions.
promise_text_ta: வீரப்பெரும்பாட்டி வேலுநாச்சியார் அவர்களின் வாழ்க்கை வரலாறு பள்ளி, கல்விக்கூடங்களில் மாணவர்களுக்குப் பாடமாக வைக்கப்படும்.

promise_components.component: Include the life story of Velu Nachiyar as a lesson in school curricula.

promise_text_en: Separate memorials will be built to honor the valiant warriors Maruthu Pandiyar, Pulithevan, Veeran Azhagumuthu Kone, Veeran Sundaralingam, and Perumpidugu Mutharaiyar.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will honor our great ancestor V.O. Chidambaram, 'the Tamil who sailed ships', by conferring the 'Thamizh Thesiya Maamani' award.
promise_text_ta: எங்கள் பெரும்பாட்டன் கப்பலோட்டியத் தமிழன் வ.உ.சிதம்பரனாருக்கு நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ‘தமிழ்த் தேசிய மாமணி' விருது வழங்கி பெருமைப்படுத்தும்.

impact_mechanism: Creates a state-level honorific award to posthumously recognize a historical figure, reinforcing a specific political and cultural narrative.

promise_components.component: Confer the 'Thamizh Thesiya Maamani' award on V.O. Chidambaram.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will legally declare and celebrate the first day of the Tamil month of Thai as the Tamil New Year.
promise_text_ta: தை முதல்நாளை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு சட்டப்படி அறிவித்துத் தமிழ்ப் புத்தாண்டாகக் கொண்டாடப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: Changes the official date of a state-level cultural observance through legislative or executive action.

promise_components.component: Legally declare the first day of the Tamil month of Thai as the Tamil New Year.

promise_text_en: Starting from the first day of the month of Thai, a week-long Tamil National Festival will be celebrated as a grand event across Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: சுறவம் (தை) முதல் நாள் ஒரு கிழமைக்கு (வாரம்) தமிழ்த் தேசியத் திருவிழா தமிழ்நாடு முழுவதும் மாபெரும் விழாவாகக் கொண்டாடப்படும்.

promise_text_en: A public holiday will be requested and secured for the Tamil New Year in other states where Tamils reside. If other states refuse, the holiday granted in Tamil Nadu for their respective New Year celebrations will be cancelled.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்த் புத்தாண்டுக்குத் தமிழர்கள் வாழும் பிற மாநிலங்களில் விடுமுறைக் கோரிப் பெற்றுத் தரப்படும். பிற மாநிலங்கள் அதை மறுக்கும் நிலையில் அவர்கள் புத்தாண்டுக்குத் தமிழ்நாட்டில் விடப்படுகின்ற விடுமுறை நீக்கம் செய்யப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: Uses diplomatic and retaliatory measures to influence the public holiday schedules of other Indian states.

promise_components.component: Request and secure a public holiday for the Tamil New Year in other states where Tamils reside.
promise_components.analysis: This is an inter-state political action. The Tamil Nadu government has no authority to compel other states to declare a holiday.

promise_components.component: If other states refuse, the holiday granted in Tamil Nadu for their respective New Year celebrations will be cancelled.

promise_text_en: The 'Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department', which administers temples in Tamil Nadu, will be renamed the 'Tamil Religious Endowments Department'.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகக் கோயில்களை நிருவகிக்கும் துறை "இந்து சமய அறநிலையத்துறை" என்பதற்கு மாறாக "தமிழர் அறநிலையத்துறை" என்று பெயர் மாற்றம் செய்யப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: Changes the official name of a government department to align with a specific linguistic and cultural ideology.

promise_text_en: The scheme allowing people from all communities to become priests will be implemented immediately. Priesthood will be made a government job under the Tamil Religious Endowments Department, and the reservation system will be applied as it is for other government jobs.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துக் குடியினரும் பூசகர் ஆகலாம் என்ற திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உடனடியாக நிறைவேற்றும். பூசனைத் தொழிலைத் தமிழர் அறநிலையத் துறையின் கீழ் இயங்கும் அரசு வேலையாக மாற்றுவோம். மற்ற அரசு வேலைவாய்ப்புகளில் இடஒதுக்கீடு முறை பின்பற்றப்படுவதைப் போல் பூசகர் வேலையிலும் நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.

impact_mechanism: Formalizes the role of temple priests as government employees, bringing them under state service rules including reservation policies.

promise_components.component: The scheme allowing people from all communities to become priests will be implemented immediately.

promise_components.component: Priesthood will be made a government job under the Tamil Religious Endowments Department, with the reservation system applied.
promise_components.analysis: This would create a new cadre of government employees. The number of priests in temples under the HR&CE department is not available in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_text_en: The notice in temples stating 'worship can also be done in Tamil' will be replaced with 'worship will only be done in Tamil'. The Naam Tamilar government will pass a law mandating that worship be conducted exclusively in Tamil.
promise_text_ta: கோயில்களில் ‘தமிழிலும் வழிபாடு செய்யலாம்’ என்ற சொல்லை நீக்கிவிட்டு `இங்குத் தமிழில் மட்டுமே வழிபாடு செய்யப்படும்' என மாற்றப்படும். தமிழில் தான் வழிபாடு என்று நாம் தமிழர் அரசு சட்டம் இயற்றும்.

promise_text_en: The gradual transfer of village temples from Tamil priests to Sanskrit proponents under the guise of Vedas and Agamas must be stopped.
promise_text_ta: சிற்றூர் கோயில்கள் அனைத்தும், சிறுகச்சிறுகத் தமிழ் பூசாரிகளிடம் இருந்து வேதம், ஆகமம் என்ற பெயர்களில் சமற்கிருதத்தின் கைகளுக்கு மாற்றப்பட்டு வருகிறது. இந்த நிலையைத் தடுக்க வேண்டும்.

impact_mechanism: Halts a perceived administrative or cultural trend of changing ritualistic control in village temples through government policy.

promise_components.component: The gradual transfer of village temples from Tamil priests to Sanskrit proponents under the guise of Vedas and Agamas must be stopped.

promise_text_en: The right to manage clan deity temples will be officially granted to the priests who have traditionally managed them. Village priests will receive a monthly salary through the Tamil Nadu Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department. Pensions for elderly priests will be increased.
promise_text_ta: குலதெய்வக் கோயில்களையும் நிருவகிக்கும் உரிமை இதுவரை நிருவகித்து வந்த பூசாரிகளுக்கே உரியது என்று நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அறிவிக்கும். சிற்றூர் பூசாரிகளுக்கான மாத ஊதியம் தமிழர் அறநிலையத்துறை மூலமாக வழங்கப்படும். பணி செய்து அகவை முதிர்ந்த பூசாரிகளுக்கு ஓய்வூதியம் உயர்த்தப்படும்.

promise_text_en: A 'special force' will be established with full authority and freedom from political interference to retrieve stolen primary idols, paintings, and palm-leaf manuscripts.
promise_text_ta: முதன்மைத்தன்மை வாய்ந்த சிலைகள், ஓவியங்கள், ஓலைச்சுவடிகள் ஆகியவற்றைக் கடத்தியவர்களிடம் இருந்து மீட்கும் ‘தனிப்படையினருக்கு’, அப்பணிக்கான முழு அதிகாரமும், அரசியல் தலையீடற்ற நிலையும் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
