impact_mechanism: Establishes a dedicated, empowered body to recover stolen cultural artifacts, strengthening law enforcement in this specific domain.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'special force' to retrieve stolen primary idols, paintings, and palm-leaf manuscripts.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new enforcement unit. Costs would include salaries, training, and equipment. The size of this force is not specified, so a cost estimate is not possible.

promise_components.component: Grant the force full authority and freedom from political interference.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative or administrative change concerning the force's charter and has no direct, quantifiable cost.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the size, salaries, and equipment of the proposed force, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a specialized state institution is a structural change to law enforcement capacity. It is designed to be a permanent solution to the specific crime of heritage theft.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is on retrieval of stolen items; it does not explicitly mention measures for the prevention of theft at the source.

promise_text_en: Based on the principle of 'power to the sons of the soil', the Naan Tamilar government will restore the primary administrative role in the Palani temple to those of the Siddhar lineage.
promise_text_ta: மண்ணின் மக்களுக்கே அதிகாரம் என்ற கொள்கையின் அடிப்படையில், பழனி கோயிலின் நிருவாகத்தில் சித்தர் மரபினருக்குரிய முதன்மைப் பங்கினை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மீட்டெடுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 291
impact_mechanism: Changes the administrative and potentially religious leadership of a specific major temple based on a claimed historical lineage.

promise_components.component: Restore the primary administrative role in the Palani temple to those of the Siddhar lineage.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and administrative change specific to one temple. The direct fiscal cost is likely minimal, related to legal and administrative processes to amend the temple's governance structure.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost is negligible, as it is an administrative and governance change for a single institution and does not involve state expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a highly specific, symbolic act concerning the governance of one temple. It does not create a broad, sustainable change in public policy or address a systemic issue, making its impact primarily political.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is exclusive to one temple and one specific lineage, with no applicability to others.

promise_text_en: All fees for worship in temples will be completely abolished, and a uniform method of worship will be implemented for all devotees.
promise_text_ta: தெய்வ வழிபாட்டிற்கானக் கட்டணங்கள் முற்றிலுமாக நீக்கப்படும். அனைவருக்கும் ஒரே மாதிரியான வழிபாட்டு முறையே நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 291
impact_mechanism: Removes the cost barrier for special darshan and poojas in temples, making all forms of worship equally accessible to all devotees regardless of ability to pay.

promise_components.component: Abolish all fees for worship in temples.
promise_components.analysis: This would eliminate a revenue stream for temples. The total revenue from such fees across all temples is not available in the reference data. The state might have to compensate temples for this loss of revenue to cover their operational costs.

promise_components.component: Implement a uniform method of worship for all devotees.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural and religious policy change with no direct quantifiable cost, but it could face significant implementation challenges due to varying traditions across temples.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total revenue from temple fees is not provided, so the potential cost to the state exchequer to compensate for this loss is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides relief from a cost but creates a new financial dependency. Temples would become reliant on state grants to cover the revenue shortfall, making their operations dependent on the government's fiscal health.
coverage_gap_note: This may not affect private temples or those not under the Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department.

promise_text_en: New lodging facilities, comparable to private hotels, will be constructed at major temples for a very low fee, which will also help promote tourism.
promise_text_ta: முதன்மையான கோயில்களில் தங்கிச் செல்வதற்காக, மிகக் குறைந்த கட்டணத்தில், தனியார் தங்கும் விடுதிகளுக்கு நிகரான புதிய தங்கும் விடுதிகள் கட்டப்படும். இது நமது சுற்றுலாத்துறையை மேம்படுத்தவும் பயன்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 291
impact_mechanism: Increases the supply of affordable, quality accommodation for pilgrims and tourists at major religious sites, potentially boosting religious tourism.

promise_components.component: Construct new lodging facilities, comparable to private hotels, at major temples.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure project. The number of 'major temples,' the size of the lodging facilities, and the construction cost per facility are not specified in the reference data. A cost estimate is not possible.

promise_components.component: Offer these facilities at a 'very low fee'.
promise_components.analysis: This implies the lodging will be subsidized. The operational costs might not be fully covered by the low fees, requiring an ongoing subsidy from the state or temple funds. The amount of subsidy is not calculable.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise lacks specifics on the number of facilities, their scale, and construction costs. The ongoing operational subsidy is also unquantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: Constructing physical infrastructure like lodging facilities is a long-term, structural investment. It creates a permanent asset that serves public needs, addressing the lack of affordable accommodation for pilgrims.
coverage_gap_note: The benefit is limited to visitors of 'major temples,' leaving out pilgrims to smaller or more remote sites.

promise_text_en: The financial revenues of all temples in Tamil Nadu will be consolidated and brought under the direct control of the Tamil Nadu Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தின் அனைத்துக் கோயில்களிலும் தற்பொழுதுள்ள பொருளாதார வருவாய்களை ஒருநிலைப்படுத்தி அவை தமிழர் அறநிலையத்துறையின் நேரடிக் கட்டுப்பாட்டின் கீழ் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 291
impact_mechanism: Centralizes the financial management of all temples under a single government department, allowing for cross-subsidization and standardized financial oversight.

promise_components.component: Consolidate financial revenues of all temples in Tamil Nadu and bring them under the direct control of the HR&CE Department.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative and financial restructuring to pool revenue from wealthier temples to support poorer ones. The direct fiscal cost to the state budget is minimal; it is a change in how temple funds are managed, not an expenditure from the state exchequer.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a revenue-neutral administrative change for the state government. It does not involve expenditure from the state's discretionary budget but rather a reallocation of temple-generated funds.
sustainability_reasoning: This fundamentally alters the financial governance model for temples. By creating a centralized pool of funds, it establishes a permanent mechanism for resource redistribution, addressing the root cause of financial disparities among temples.
coverage_gap_note: This may not apply to temples of other religions or private trusts that successfully challenge the government's jurisdiction in court.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will establish a separate division for the Kannagi temple and create a path through the Tamil Nadu forest area. Furthermore, protection will be provided for the annual grand pilgrimage on Chitra Pournami, which will be declared a state festival.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு கண்ணகிக்குத் தனிக்கோட்டம் அமைத்துத் தமிழக வனப்பகுதி வழியாகவே பாதையை அமைத்துத் தரும். மேலும் பெரும்பாட்டி கண்ணகியின் நினைவைப் போற்றும் வகையில் ஒவ்வொரு ஆண்டும் சித்திரை முழுநிலவு நாளில் கண்ணகி கோயிலை நோக்கிப் பெரும் பயணம் மேற்கொள்வோருக்குப் பாதுகாப்பைத் தரும். இது அரசு விழாவாகவும் அறிவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 293
impact_mechanism: Enhances infrastructure and state recognition for a specific temple and pilgrimage, aiming to promote its cultural significance and facilitate devotee access.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate division for the Kannagi temple and create a path through the Tamil Nadu forest area.
promise_components.analysis: The path is a capital project whose cost is unknown as length and terrain are not specified. It would require complex environmental clearances. The separate division is an administrative change with minor, non-quantifiable costs.

promise_components.component: Provide protection for the annual grand pilgrimage and declare Chitra Pournami a state festival.
promise_components.analysis: Security costs would likely be absorbed into the existing police budget. Declaring a state festival is a symbolic act with minimal direct cost.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The primary cost is the construction of the forest path, but its specifications are unknown. Other costs are administrative or minor.
sustainability_reasoning: Building a permanent path is a structural infrastructure improvement. Declaring a state festival and creating a dedicated administrative division are also long-term institutional changes that address access and recognition issues.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are highly localized to one temple, one community of devotees, and one festival.

promise_text_en: Under the Naan Tamilar government, a temple will be built for Ravana. Memorial halls (Manimandapams) will also be constructed for Vallalar and Ayya Vaikundar to propagate their philosophical contributions and social reforms among the public.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழரின் ஆட்சியில் இராவணப் பாட்டனுக்குக் கோயில் கட்டப்படும். மேலும் வள்ளலார் பெருந்தகைக்கான மணிமண்டபமும், அய்யா வைகுந்தர் மணி மண்டபமும் கட்டப்பட்டு, மெய்யியல் தளத்திலான அவர்களின் சேவை, சமூகச் சீர்திருத்தங்கள் மக்கள் மத்தியில் பரப்பப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 293
impact_mechanism: Uses state funds to construct new monuments and temples aligned with a specific ideological or cultural viewpoint, promoting certain historical/mythological figures.

promise_components.component: Build a temple for Ravana.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure project. The scale, location, and cost of the temple are not specified and cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Construct memorial halls (Manimandapams) for Vallalar and Ayya Vaikundar.
promise_components.analysis: This involves two separate capital expenditure projects. The cost depends on the size and design of the halls, which are not specified and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise involves three separate construction projects of unspecified scale and cost.
sustainability_reasoning: While the structures are permanent, the primary purpose is political and ideological signaling. It does not solve a systemic problem or provide a sustainable service to address a public need, but rather promotes a particular narrative.
coverage_gap_note: This is an act of patronage for specific figures, which by its nature excludes countless others.

promise_text_en: All ancient temples in Tamil Nadu, including the Chidambaram Natarajar temple and temples for minor deities, will be brought under the control of the Tamil Nadu Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments Department.
promise_text_ta: சிதம்பரம் நடராசர் கோயில் உட்பட, தமிழகத்தின் தொன்மைக் கோயில்கள், சிறுதெய்வ வழிபாட்டுக் கோயில்கள் அனைத்துமே தமிழர் அறநிலையத் துறையின் கீழ் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 293
impact_mechanism: Extends state administrative control over all ancient temples, including those currently autonomous, to standardize governance and financial oversight.

promise_components.component: Bring all ancient temples, including the Chidambaram Natarajar temple and temples for minor deities, under the control of the HR&CE Department.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major legislative and administrative action. The direct cost is administrative, but the political and legal costs would be substantial, especially concerning the Chidambaram temple's history of litigation over its autonomy.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost to the state budget is minimal. It is an expansion of administrative jurisdiction, not a new spending program.
sustainability_reasoning: If successfully implemented, this would be a permanent and fundamental change to the governance of religious institutions, settling a long-standing dispute over state control versus temple autonomy.
coverage_gap_note: The focus on 'ancient' temples might leave newer but significant religious institutions outside its ambit.

promise_text_en: Illegally acquired temple properties, including 4,57,000 acres of land and buildings, will be brought under new lease agreements. Small shops and houses will be handed over to their current occupants under new fee regulations.
promise_text_ta: சட்டத்திற்குப் புறம்பாக கையகப்படுத்தப்பட்ட கோயிலுக்குச் சொந்தமான 4 இலக்கத்து 57 ஆயிரம் குறுக்கம் நிலங்கள், கட்டடங்கள் அனைத்தும் புதிய குத்தகை வாடகைக்கு உட்படுத்தப்படும். சிறு கடைகள் வீடுகள் மட்டும் பயன்பாட்டாளர்களின் பொறுப்பிலேயே புதிய கட்டண விதிகளோடு ஒப்படைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 293
impact_mechanism: Aims to recover illegally occupied temple assets and regularize existing tenancies under new terms to increase revenue for temples.

promise_components.component: Bring 4,57,000 acres of illegally acquired temple land and buildings under new lease agreements.
promise_components.analysis: This is a massive undertaking involving legal action, land surveys, and enforcement based on a specific claimed figure. The potential revenue increase is not calculable, but the administrative and legal costs would be very high.

promise_components.component: Hand over small shops and houses to their current occupants under new fee regulations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy of regularization for existing tenants. It aims to resolve disputes and create a stable revenue stream, though the financial outcome depends on the 'new fee regulations'.

fiscal_cost_note: This is intended to be a revenue-generating measure for the temples, not a cost to the state exchequer. However, it would require significant upfront state expenditure on legal and administrative machinery to execute, the amount of which is not calculable.
sustainability_reasoning: Successfully reclaiming and regularizing temple properties would fundamentally restore the financial base of these institutions. It's a permanent fix to their revenue model, addressing the loss of income from their historical endowments.
coverage_gap_note: The promise to hand over properties to current occupants might conflict with the goal of maximizing revenue for the temples.

promise_text_en: Respecting the sentiments of devotees, the Naan Tamilar government will relocate the proposed international research center from the Vadalur Peruveḷi to a different nearby location.
promise_text_ta: அடியவர்களின் உணர்வுகளுக்கு மதிப்பளித்து, இந்தப் பன்னாட்டு ஆய்வு மையத்தை வடலூர் பெருவெளியைத் தவிர்த்து, அருகிலுள்ள வேறு பகுதியில் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அமைத்திடும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 293
impact_mechanism: This changes a land-use decision to align with the sentiments of a specific religious group.

promise_components.component: Relocate the proposed international research center from the Vadalur Peruveḷi to a different nearby location.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative decision regarding a specific infrastructure project. The fiscal impact would be the one-time cost of acquiring new land and any sunk costs at the original site. Reference data contains no information on land values or project costs, so a cost estimate is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is a one-time capital expenditure for land acquisition and project relocation, which cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a response to a specific, localized sentiment rather than a systemic issue. It serves as a political signal to a particular community without addressing any underlying structural problems.

promise_text_en: Temple-owned lands and buildings will be leased to indigenous Tamil communities (Adithamizh Kudi) based on their population percentage, and similarly to other communities on a proportional basis.
promise_text_ta: கோயில்களுக்குச் சொந்தமான நிலங்கள் மற்றும் கட்டடங்கள் ஆகியவை ஆதித்தமிழ் குடிகளுக்கு உரிய விழுக்காட்டு அடிப்படையில் நேரடியாகவும், மற்ற சமூகத்தவர்களுக்கு விழுக்காட்டு அடிப்படையிலும் குத்தகைக்கு அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 293
impact_mechanism: This redistributes access to temple-owned land and property assets based on community population shares.

promise_components.component: Lease temple-owned lands and buildings to indigenous Tamil communities (Adithamizh Kudi) and other communities on a proportional population basis.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major policy change for managing assets under the Hindu Religious and Charitable Endowments (HR&CE) Department. Implementation requires a comprehensive survey of temple lands and a reliable caste-wise population census. Reference data contains no information on the extent of temple lands or community population percentages.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This policy does not have a direct cost to the state budget but would significantly impact the revenues and administration of temples. The net financial effect is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented, this would create a lasting change in the distribution of productive assets (land). It attempts to address historical inequities by using institutional resources for social and economic empowerment.
coverage_gap_note: The process of proportional allocation could be complex and contentious, potentially creating new disputes over land and community representation.

promise_text_en: Individuals from all castes who have a deep interest in philosophy and possess good moral character will be appointed as temple priests, alongside traditional Othuvars, Saiva and Vaishnava scholars, and Pandarams.
promise_text_ta: ஓதுவார்கள், சைவ வைணவ பெரியவர்கள், பண்டாரங்கள் ஆகியவர்களுடன் அனைத்துச் சாதியைச் சார்ந்த மெய்யியலில் அதீத ஈடுபாடு உடையவர்கள் ஒழுக்கத்தின் அடிப்படையில் பூசகர்களாகக் கோயில் பூசாரிகளாக பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 293
impact_mechanism: This policy opens the role of temple priest to all castes, breaking a traditional hereditary or caste-based monopoly.

promise_components.component: Appoint individuals from all castes with philosophical interest and good character as temple priests.
promise_components.analysis: This promise seeks to expand an existing state policy ('Archagar Anaiverum Agalam') that allows trained individuals from any caste to become priests. The reference data has no information on the number of priest positions in Tamil Nadu. The criteria of 'deep interest' and 'good moral character' are subjective and could be challenging to apply uniformly.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost is negligible, limited to administrative expenses for training and selection, which would be absorbed into existing departmental budgets. This is a policy change, not a new expenditure scheme.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy directly confronts caste-based exclusion in a significant religious and social institution. By formalizing and expanding access to the priesthood, it aims for a permanent change in social hierarchies.
coverage_gap_note: While the policy allows appointment, it does not guarantee social acceptance of the newly appointed priests by all devotees or within temple ecosystems.

promise_text_en: Just as Murugan is promoted as the deity of Tamils, the Naan Tamilar government will declare the great poet Valluvar, who gave the universal scripture Thirukkural, as the prophet of Tamils. A religion named "Tamizham" will be officially established by government decree, centered on the mother tongue, to eliminate caste and religious differences and reconstruct our original philosophy.
promise_text_ta: முருகனைத் தமிழர்களின் இறையோனாக முன்னிறுத்துவதைப்போல், தமிழர் மறையோனாக உலகப்பொதுமறை தந்த பெரும்பாட்டன் வள்ளுவப்பெருமகனாரை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அறிவிக்கும். சாதி மத வேறுபாடுகளைக் களைந்து, ஆதியில் இருந்த நமது மெய்யியலைக் கட்டமைக்கும். எனவே தாய்மொழியை முன்னிறுத்தி “தமிழம்” என்ற மதத்தினை அரசு ஆணையாக வெளியிடும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 295
impact_mechanism: This seeks to create a new, state-sanctioned secular identity and belief system to supersede existing caste and religious divisions.

promise_components.component: Declare Valluvar as the prophet of Tamils.
promise_components.analysis: This is a symbolic, legislative declaration.

promise_components.component: Officially establish a religion named 'Tamizham' by government decree.
promise_components.analysis: This involves the state creating a new religion. This action would face extreme legal and constitutional challenges, as the Indian Constitution provides for freedom of religion and state neutrality.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost is minimal, related to legislative and administrative actions. However, the proposal is legally and constitutionally fraught, making it practically undeliverable.
sustainability_reasoning: While the intent is to address the root cause of social division, the act of a government establishing a religion is highly questionable legally and practically. Therefore, it functions primarily as a powerful political statement rather than a feasible policy.
coverage_gap_note: This could alienate or be rejected by Tamils who are devout followers of existing religions and do not wish to adopt a state-created one.

promise_text_en: Priests who practice untouchability will be banned from conducting worship in any other temple.
promise_text_ta: தீண்டாமையைக் கடைபிடிக்கும் பூசாரிகளுக்கு வேறு எந்தக் கோயிலிலும் வழிபாட்டு முறையில் ஈடுபட தடைவிதிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 295
impact_mechanism: This introduces a professional penalty (a ban) for priests found guilty of practicing untouchability, reinforcing existing laws.

promise_components.component: Priests who practice untouchability will be banned from conducting worship in any other temple.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement measure that complements existing laws like the Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955. It adds a specific professional consequence to a criminal act. The main challenge is the evidentiary process required to prove the practice of untouchability.

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost is minimal, relating to enforcement and investigation mechanisms within existing administrative structures like the HR&CE department and police.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent, professional deterrent against a specific discriminatory practice. By attaching a career-ending penalty, it strengthens the legal framework against untouchability in a targeted domain.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness depends entirely on robust reporting and unbiased investigation, which are significant challenges.

promise_text_en: The term 'Adi Dravidar' will be banned in Tamil Nadu. Instead, the Naan Tamilar government will enact a law to integrate scheduled class communities and officially refer to them as "Adith(Pazhan)Thamizhar" (Ancient Tamils).
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் ஆதிதிராவிடர் என்று அழைக்கப்படுவது தடை செய்யப்பட்டு, அதற்கு மாற்றாக பட்டியல் வகுப்புச் சமூகங்களை ஒருங்கிணைத்து அவர்கள் “ஆதித்(பழந்)தமிழர்” என்று நாம் தமிழர் அரசு சட்டம் இயற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 297
impact_mechanism: This changes the official government terminology used to refer to Scheduled Caste communities.

promise_components.component: Ban the term 'Adi Dravidar' and enact a law to use 'Adith(Pazhan)Thamizhar' (Ancient Tamils) instead.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative and administrative act of changing nomenclature. It involves amending government records, forms, and official communications. The process is straightforward from a legal and administrative standpoint.

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost is negligible, consisting of one-time administrative expenses to update official documents and systems.
sustainability_reasoning: Changing a name does not alter the material conditions, social status, or economic opportunities of the community. It is a symbolic act of identity politics, not a structural solution to inequality.
coverage_gap_note: The proposed new name may not be universally accepted by all individuals and organizations within the communities it is intended to represent.

promise_text_en: The evils of untouchability, such as segregated living areas (Oor, Cheri), separate places of worship, and the two-tumbler system, will be completely eradicated to ensure a public life free of social inequality.
promise_text_ta: இரட்டை வாழ்விடம் (ஊர், சேரி), இரட்டை வழிபாட்டுத்தலங்கள், இரட்டைக்குவளை முறை போன்ற தீண்டாமைக் கொடுமைகள் அறவே நீக்கப்பட்டு, சமூக ஏற்றத்தாழ்வற்ற பொது வாழ்விடம் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 297
impact_mechanism: This promises to actively enforce laws against segregation and untouchability to create an integrated public sphere.

promise_components.component: Completely eradicate segregated living areas (Oor, Cheri), separate places of worship, and the two-tumbler system.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise for stringent enforcement of existing laws against untouchability. Eradicating these practices requires more than policing; it involves deep social reform, awareness campaigns, and potentially housing integration programs. The reference data does not provide metrics to quantify the scale of these practices.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of enhanced enforcement, social campaigns, and potential infrastructure changes (e.g., integrated housing) cannot be estimated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the direct, physical manifestations of caste discrimination. If successful, it would fundamentally alter social geography and daily interactions, representing a lasting structural change.
coverage_gap_note: Achieving 'complete eradication' of deeply entrenched social customs is a generational challenge that goes beyond the scope of a single government's term.

promise_text_en: The practice of having separate cremation and burial grounds for each caste will be abolished, and an improved, common cemetery infrastructure will be established.
promise_text_ta: சாதிக்கொரு இடுகாடு சுடுகாடு என்றிருப்பதை மாற்றி, பொது மயானக் கட்டமைப்பு மேம்பட்ட முறையில் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 297
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to enforce social equality even in death by creating mandatory, integrated public infrastructure for last rites.

promise_components.component: Abolish separate cremation and burial grounds for each caste.
promise_components.analysis: This involves a legislative ban on caste-based cemeteries.

promise_components.component: Establish improved, common cemetery infrastructure.
promise_components.analysis: This requires significant capital expenditure for land acquisition and construction across the state. The reference data has no information on the number of existing cemeteries or construction costs.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The capital cost for establishing a statewide network of common cemeteries is substantial but cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a powerful and persistent form of caste segregation. Creating common, mandatory infrastructure is a permanent measure that would break a key taboo and promote an egalitarian ethos.
coverage_gap_note: This may face strong opposition from communities who view separate final rites as a critical religious or customary practice, independent of caste hierarchy.

promise_text_en: Through these measures, the goal of the Naan Tamilar government is to achieve social liberation by creating an egalitarian and non-discriminatory society.
promise_text_ta: இதன்மூலம் ஏற்றத்தாழ்வற்ற, வேறுபாடற்ற ஒரு சமநிலைச் சமூகம் படைத்துச் சமூக விடுதலை அடைவதே நாம் தமிழர் அரசின் இலக்கு.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 297
impact_mechanism: This is a statement of the overarching vision that the preceding social reform promises aim to achieve.

promise_components.component: Achieve social liberation by creating an egalitarian and non-discriminatory society.
promise_components.analysis: This is not a specific, measurable policy but a declaration of a high-level goal. Its success is contingent on the implementation of other concrete promises related to social reform.

fiscal_cost_note: Not applicable. This is a vision statement, not a fiscally quantifiable program.
sustainability_reasoning: As a standalone statement, this is political rhetoric. Its substance and sustainability are entirely dependent on the successful execution of the specific, structural reforms it claims to represent.

promise_text_en: Reservation quotas in education and employment for Adithamizhar and Pazhanthamizh Kudi (indigenous communities) will be increased in proportion to their population.
promise_text_ta: ஆதித்தமிழர், பழந்தமிழ்க் குடியினர் மக்கள் தொகை விழுக்காட்டுக்கு ஏற்ப கல்வி, வேலைவாய்ப்புகளில் இடப்பகிர்வு உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 299
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to enhance representation in public education and employment for specific communities through affirmative action.

promise_components.component: Increase reservation quotas in education and employment for Adithamizhar and Pazhanthamizh Kudi in proportion to their population.
promise_components.analysis: This requires amending the state's reservation policy. Tamil Nadu's current 69% reservation is protected under the 9th Schedule of the Constitution, but any further increase would face legal challenges based on the Supreme Court's 50% ceiling. Implementation requires an up-to-date caste census to determine population proportions, which is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a policy change with no direct fiscal cost, as it reallocates existing opportunities rather than creating new ones. The primary challenges are legal and political, not financial.
sustainability_reasoning: Reservation is a proven, long-term policy tool for addressing historical disadvantage and ensuring representation. Adjusting it based on population data is a structural mechanism to enhance social mobility and equity.
coverage_gap_note: Increasing quotas for one set of communities could face legal and political opposition from other communities who may see their share of opportunities reduced.

promise_text_en: The Special Component Plan (SCP) fund allocated for the Adithamizhar community will be distributed in proportion to their population and will be used exclusively for their welfare.
promise_text_ta: ஆதித்தமிழர் சமூகத்திற்கென ஒதுக்கப்படும் சிறப்பு உட்கூறு குவை (நிதி), மக்கள் தொகை விழுக்காட்டிற்கு இணையாக பகிர்ந்தளிக்கப்படும். மேற்படி குவை (நிதி) ஆதித்தமிழர் நலன்களுக்கு மட்டுமே செலவிடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 299
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to ensure that financial resources allocated for a specific marginalized community are used exclusively for their benefit and in proportion to their population size.

promise_components.component: The Special Component Plan (SCP) fund for the Adithamizhar community will be distributed in proportion to their population.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change regarding fund allocation. The reference data does not contain the population size of the Adithamizhar community or the total SCP fund amount, so a quantitative analysis is not possible.

promise_components.component: The SCP fund will be used exclusively for the welfare of the Adithamizhar community.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance and enforcement commitment to prevent fund diversion. Its impact cannot be quantified financially.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct new fiscal cost; this is a change in the allocation and governance of existing funds. The cost is administrative and cannot be quantified from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the systemic failure of development funds to reach their intended beneficiaries. By creating a legally mandated, population-proportional allocation and ring-fencing its use, it addresses a root cause of persistent inequality.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is specific to the Adithamizhar community and does not address similar fund allocation issues for other marginalized groups.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar party promises that all Panchami lands belonging to Adithamizhars will be identified, reclaimed, and returned to their rightful owners. After an inquiry, appropriate legal action will be taken against those who illegally occupied the land.
promise_text_ta: ஆதித்தமிழர்களுக்குச் சொந்தமான பஞ்சமி நிலங்கள் எல்லாம் கண்டறியப்பட்டு, அந்த நிலங்கள் மீட்கப்பட்டு உரியவர்களிடம் ஒப்படைக்கப்படும் என்ற உறுதியை நாம் தமிழர் கட்சி அளிக்கின்றது. கையகப்படுத்தியோர் மீது உசாவுதலுக்குப் (விசாரணை) பின் உரிய சட்ட நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 299
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to restore historical land ownership to a marginalized community by identifying and reclaiming illegally occupied lands.

promise_components.component: Identify, reclaim, and return all Panchami lands to their rightful Adithamizhar owners.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and administrative process. The reference data does not contain information on the extent of Panchami lands or the number of original owners or their descendants. Therefore, a quantitative analysis is not possible.

promise_components.component: Take legal action against those who illegally occupied the land.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal enforcement action. The scale and cost are unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is primarily administrative and legal, involving land surveys, historical record verification, and extensive litigation. The total cost cannot be estimated as the extent of land in question is not provided in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Land ownership is a foundational economic asset. By restoring it, this promise addresses the root cause of landlessness and economic disenfranchisement for the affected families, creating a permanent structural change.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to Adithamizhars and Panchami lands, not addressing other forms of historical land alienation affecting other communities.

promise_text_en: Government-controlled temple lands will be surveyed and allocated to the indigenous people of the land on a percentage basis. Shops and commercial spaces will also be distributed in the same manner.
promise_text_ta: அரசின்கீழ் உள்ள கோயில் நிலங்கள் கணக்கெடுக்கப்பட்டு, விழுக்காட்டின் அடிப்படையில் மண்ணின் தொல்குடி மக்களுக்கு ஒதுக்கப்படும். கடைகள் மற்றும் வணிக நிறுவன இடங்களும் அவ்வாறே பகிர்ந்தளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 299
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to redistribute wealth and economic opportunity by allocating temple-controlled lands and commercial spaces to indigenous people.

promise_components.component: Government-controlled temple lands will be surveyed and allocated to the indigenous people of the land on a percentage basis.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy of land redistribution. The reference data does not contain the total area of temple lands or a definition/count of 'indigenous people'. Therefore, a quantitative analysis is not possible.

promise_components.component: Shops and commercial spaces on temple lands will be distributed in the same manner.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy of commercial asset redistribution. The number of such properties is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is administrative and legal. As it involves the transfer of existing assets rather than new spending, a direct fiscal cost cannot be calculated. The scale is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Transferring ownership of land and commercial properties provides a permanent source of wealth and income, addressing the root cause of economic marginalization for the beneficiaries.
coverage_gap_note: The definition of 'indigenous people' is crucial; depending on the definition, many other poor and landless groups could be excluded.

promise_text_en: Individuals who lost their lives in anti-caste struggles due to state violence or caste-based attacks will be declared "Social Justice Warriors," and their families will receive appropriate compensation and a government job.
promise_text_ta: சாதி எதிர்ப்புப் போரில் அரச வன்முறை மற்றும் சாதிவெறித் தாக்குதலில் பலியானோரைச் “சமூகநீதிப் போராளிகள்” என்று அறிவித்து அவர்தம் குடும்பத்தினருக்கு உரிய இழப்பீடும், அரசுப் பணியும் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 299
impact_mechanism: This provides financial and employment support to the families of individuals who died in specific circumstances, recognizing their loss as a sacrifice for social justice.

promise_components.component: Individuals who lost their lives in anti-caste struggles will be declared 'Social Justice Warriors'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a symbolic declaration with no direct financial cost.

promise_components.component: Their families will receive appropriate compensation.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'appropriate compensation' is not defined, and the number of potential beneficiaries is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: A government job will be provided to their families.
promise_components.analysis: This represents a long-term committed expenditure (salary and pension) for each beneficiary family. The number of beneficiaries is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable. It depends on the number of beneficiaries, the undefined 'appropriate compensation' amount, and the long-term salary and pension costs for each government job provided. This cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise offers compensation and a job, which are forms of relief for the symptoms of caste violence (loss of life and income). It does not implement measures to prevent such violence from occurring in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: This focuses on deaths and does not address the needs of those who are injured, disabled, or suffer property loss in similar struggles.

promise_text_en: The Tamil Nadu Adi Dravidar Housing and Development Corporation (TAHDCO) will be replaced by a new fund named after Ayothidasa Pandithar.
promise_text_ta: ஆதித்தமிழர் மேம்பாட்டுக்கென இயங்கும் தாட்கோ (TAHDCO)-விற்கு மாற்றாக அயோத்திதாசர் பெயரில் குவையம் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 299
impact_mechanism: This promise proposes to restructure a state development corporation by renaming it and possibly changing its operational framework.

promise_components.component: The Tamil Nadu Adi Dravidar Housing and Development Corporation (TAHDCO) will be replaced by a new fund named after Ayothidasa Pandithar.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative change. No new financial commitment or change in service delivery is specified. The impact is nominal without further details on changes to the fund's mandate or operations.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible fiscal cost, primarily administrative expenses for rebranding. It does not involve new program spending.
sustainability_reasoning: A name change alone does not alter the function, efficiency, or impact of a government body. It is a symbolic gesture that does not address any underlying structural or symptomatic issue.

promise_text_en: Full land titles (patta) will be granted to indigenous communities for the lands they currently use within forests, up to the maximum limit of 4 hectares as permitted by the Forest Rights Act, 2008.
promise_text_ta: சட்டம் அனுமதிக்கும் உச்சவரம்பான 4 வரம்பு (ஹெக்டேர்) வரை, தொல்குடியினர் பயன்பாட்டிலுள்ள நிலங்களுக்கு முழுமையான பட்டா வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 299
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide legal land ownership to forest-dwelling communities for the land they cultivate, as mandated by a central government act.

promise_components.component: Full land titles (patta) will be granted to indigenous communities for the lands they currently use within forests, up to the maximum limit of 4 hectares.
promise_components.analysis: This promise is about the implementation of the existing central Forest Rights Act, 2008. The number of potential beneficiaries and the total land area are not available in the reference data, so a quantitative analysis is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is administrative, for surveying land and processing claims, which is a state responsibility under the central Forest Rights Act. The total cost cannot be estimated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing legal title to land (patta) is a one-time, permanent change. It transforms the economic status of beneficiaries from tenants-at-will to landowners, addressing the root cause of tenure insecurity.
coverage_gap_note: The promise focuses on individual rights; implementation of community forest rights is equally critical and often more complex.

promise_text_en: Loans will be provided for mountain-specific agriculture.
promise_text_ta: மலை சார்ந்த வேளாண்மைக்கு வேண்டிய கடனும் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This provides targeted financial credit to support agricultural practices specific to mountainous regions.

promise_components.component: Loans will be provided for mountain-specific agriculture.
promise_components.analysis: This is a credit scheme. The promise does not specify the loan amount, interest rate, or the number of potential beneficiaries. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable. It would depend on the total loan portfolio size and the interest subsidy provided by the government, neither of which is specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Providing access to capital through targeted loans enables farmers to invest in better inputs, technology, and practices. This can lead to sustained improvements in productivity and income, addressing a root cause of agricultural stagnation.
coverage_gap_note: This is geographically specific and does not address credit needs for farmers in other challenging agro-ecological zones.

promise_text_en: Community Forest Rights, including the right to collect and protect forest produce, will be fully granted to the village councils (Grama Sabhas).
promise_text_ta: நில உரிமையுடன் சேர்த்து, வனப் பொருட்களைச் சேகரிக்கும் மற்றும் பாதுகாக்கும் ‘சமூக வன உரிமைகள்’ (Community Forest Rights) சிற்றூர் அவைகளுக்கே (கிராம சபை) முழுமையாக வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This empowers local village councils (Grama Sabhas) with the legal rights to manage, use, and protect their traditional forest resources.

promise_components.component: Community Forest Rights, including the right to collect and protect forest produce, will be fully granted to the village councils (Grama Sabhas).
promise_components.analysis: This promise is about implementing the Community Forest Rights component of the existing central Forest Rights Act, 2008. The number of eligible Grama Sabhas and the potential area of community forests are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is administrative, for mapping community boundaries and facilitating the claim process by Grama Sabhas. The total cost cannot be estimated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This transfers control over a productive resource base (the forest) to the community. This is a fundamental, structural shift in governance that can create sustainable livelihoods and promote conservation.

promise_text_en: Government schemes, land deeds, and housing pattas will be issued jointly in the names of both men and women.
promise_text_ta: அரசினால் வழங்கப்படும் திட்டங்கள், நிலங்கள், மனைப்பட்டாக்கள் ஆண், பெண் இருவர் பெயரிலும் கூட்டாக வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This aims to enhance women's property rights and economic security by ensuring their names are included on legal titles for government-provided assets.

promise_components.component: Government schemes, land deeds, and housing pattas will be issued jointly in the names of both men and women.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural change for all government asset-transfer schemes. It has no direct new cost but institutionalizes joint ownership, strengthening women's economic security.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is an administrative rule change applied to existing and future government schemes.
sustainability_reasoning: By legally mandating joint ownership of assets like land and housing, this promise directly tackles a root cause of gender inequality. Asset ownership provides women with economic security and bargaining power.
coverage_gap_note: This applies to new asset distributions and may not retroactively apply to assets already distributed solely in men's names.

promise_text_en: Houses built by the government will be of high quality.
promise_text_ta: அரசு கட்டித்தரும் வீடுகள் தரமானதாக வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve the living standards of beneficiaries of government housing schemes by ensuring the construction quality is high.

promise_components.component: Houses built by the government will be of high quality.
promise_components.analysis: This is a qualitative commitment. The term 'high quality' is not defined, and there is no data on the current cost or quality of government housing to benchmark against. Therefore, the additional cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise implies an increase in the unit cost of government housing schemes, but the amount is unquantifiable as 'high quality' is not defined. The total fiscal impact depends on the number of houses built annually.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses the quality of a provided benefit, which is a symptom of poor implementation or inadequate funding. It does not reform the underlying systems of procurement and oversight that lead to poor quality construction.

promise_text_en: Government subsidies will be provided to educated youth for starting businesses.
promise_text_ta: படித்துத் தொழில் தொடங்கும் இளைஞர்களுக்கு அரசு மானியம் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to foster entrepreneurship and reduce unemployment by providing financial support to educated young people.

promise_components.component: Provide government subsidies to educated youth for starting businesses.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is undefined. The term 'educated youth' is not specified, the number of potential beneficiaries is unknown, and the subsidy amount or percentage is not stated. Therefore, a cost calculation is not possible. Analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The annual cost cannot be estimated as key details like the subsidy amount, eligibility criteria, and the number of beneficiaries are not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented effectively, this policy could create self-sustaining enterprises and jobs, addressing the root cause of unemployment. However, its success is entirely dependent on the program's design, scale, and targeting, none of which are specified.
coverage_gap_note: This policy excludes uneducated youth and those not inclined or able to start a business.

promise_text_en: Reservations will be ensured for Adithamizhar and Pazhanthamizhar communities in revenue-generating buildings within commercial complexes of local bodies such as corporations, municipalities, and panchayats.
promise_text_ta: மாநகராட்சி, நகராட்சி, மாவட்ட, வட்டத் தலைநகரங்கள், பேரூராட்சி, ஊராட்சி ஆகிய உள்ளாட்சி அமைப்புகளின் வணிக வளாகங்களில் வருவாய் தரும் கட்டடங்களில் ஆதித்தமிழர், பழந்தமிழர் குடிமக்களுக்கு உரிய இடஒதுக்கீடு முறைப்படி உறுதியாக வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This policy seeks to provide economic opportunity and commercial presence to specific marginalized communities by reserving access to public assets.

promise_components.component: Ensure reservations for Adithamizhar and Pazhanthamizhar communities in revenue-generating buildings of local bodies.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory policy change involving the allocation of existing public commercial spaces. It does not involve direct government expenditure. The number of such commercial units is not available in the reference data, so the scale of impact cannot be quantified.

fiscal_cost_note: This promise has no direct fiscal cost to the state budget, as it involves the reallocation of existing assets rather than new spending.
sustainability_reasoning: By providing targeted communities with preferential access to commercial real estate, this policy creates a pathway for long-term income generation and business ownership. It addresses a root cause of economic disparity by reallocating productive assets.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to members of these communities who have the capital and skills to operate a business in these locations.

promise_text_en: The degrading practice of manual scavenging will be completely banned.
promise_text_ta: மாந்தக் கழிவை மாந்தனே அகற்றும் இழிநிலை முற்றாகத் தடை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This promise reaffirms the state's commitment to ending a dehumanizing practice by promising a complete ban.

promise_components.component: The practice of manual scavenging will be completely banned.
promise_components.analysis: This practice is already prohibited nationwide under the 'Prohibition of Employment as Manual Scavengers and their Rehabilitation Act, 2013'. The promise is a restatement of existing law. The real challenge lies in enforcement and rehabilitation, for which no specific new measures or funds are detailed.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise to 'ban' has no cost as the law already exists. The unstated costs relate to enforcement and rehabilitation of workers, which are not detailed in the promise.
sustainability_reasoning: Manual scavenging is already illegal. This promise is a political statement that adds no new legal power or specific resource commitment for enforcement or rehabilitation, which are the actual barriers to its eradication.
coverage_gap_note: The promise focuses on the 'ban' itself, not the critical components of providing alternative livelihoods and rehabilitation for affected individuals.

promise_text_en: Degrading practices of untouchability such as separate occupations, wells, living areas, and paths will be completely eradicated through strict measures.
promise_text_ta: தீண்டாமைக்கு உட்பட்ட மக்களுக்குத் தற்போது இருந்து வரும் தனித் தொழில்கள், தனிக்கிணறு, தனி வாழுமிடம், தனிப் பாதை போன்ற இழி முறைகள் முற்றிலுமாக ஒழிக்கப்படும். இதற்கான கடும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to enforce social equality by vowing to eliminate discriminatory practices through strict legal action.

promise_components.component: Completely eradicate degrading practices of untouchability through strict measures.
promise_components.analysis: Untouchability is already abolished by Article 17 of the Constitution and criminalized under existing laws like the Protection of Civil Rights Act, 1955. This promise is a commitment to stricter enforcement of these existing legal frameworks, not the creation of a new policy.

fiscal_cost_note: There is no new direct cost. The promise implies using existing state machinery (police, judiciary) more effectively, which is part of the government's core, ongoing expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: Eradicating untouchability is a fundamental constitutional duty, not a new policy promise. Stating an intent to enforce existing laws is political signalling, as it does not propose any new, specific mechanism or resource to tackle this deeply entrenched social issue.
coverage_gap_note: The promise of 'strict measures' is vague and does not specify what new actions will be taken that differ from current, often ineffective, enforcement efforts.

promise_text_en: The system of separate hostels for Adithamizhar and Backward Class students will be replaced, and all students will be accommodated in common hostels.
promise_text_ta: ஆதித்தமிழ்க்குடிகளுக்குத் தனி மாணவர் விடுதி, பிற்படுத்தப்பட்டோருக்குத் தனி மாணவர் விடுதி எனப் பிரித்து வைக்கப்பட்டிருக்கும் அமைப்பு மாற்றப்பட்டு அனைவரும் ஒரே விடுதியில் தங்கிப் படிக்க வைக்கப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 301
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to foster social integration and break down caste barriers by housing students from all communities together.

promise_components.component: Replace separate hostels for Adithamizhar and Backward Class students with common hostels for all students.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change to merge caste-based government hostels. The fiscal impact is unknown as the number of affected hostels and the strategy (merging existing buildings vs. constructing new ones) are not specified. Analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost cannot be estimated. It could range from minimal (if re-designating existing buildings) to substantial (if new, larger common hostels are constructed).
sustainability_reasoning: By dismantling a system of segregation in a formative educational environment, this policy directly addresses the root cause of caste prejudice. It creates a permanent change in the student experience to promote social harmony and integration.
coverage_gap_note: This policy only affects students residing in government-run hostels.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will ensure a proper reservation for the Arunthathiyar community.
promise_text_ta: அருந்ததியர்களுக்கான உரிய இடப்பகிர்வை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 302
impact_mechanism: This promise signals an intent to adjust affirmative action policies to better serve a specific community.

promise_components.component: Ensure a proper reservation for the Arunthathiyar community.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy statement. Tamil Nadu already provides a 3% sub-quota for the Arunthathiyar community within the Scheduled Caste reservation. The term 'proper' is subjective and not defined, making the promise's objective unclear. It could imply increasing the quota or improving its implementation.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a regulatory policy matter with no direct fiscal cost to the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: A reservation sub-quota for the Arunthathiyar community already exists. The promise to make it 'proper' is politically symbolic but lacks a specific, measurable commitment, rendering it a statement of intent rather than a concrete policy change.
coverage_gap_note: The vagueness of 'proper' leaves it unclear what specific change is being promised relative to the existing 3% sub-quota.

promise_text_en: The long-standing demand of the Devendra Kula Vellalar community to be removed from the Scheduled Caste list will be immediately fulfilled by the Naam Tamilar government.
promise_text_ta: தேவேந்திர குல வேளாளர் மக்களைப் பட்டியல் பிரிவிலிருந்து வெளியேற்றக் கோரும் நெடுநாள் கோரிக்கையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உடனடியாக நிறைவேற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 302
impact_mechanism: This promise aligns the party with a specific community's demand for reclassification of their social status.

promise_components.component: The demand of the Devendra Kula Vellalar community to be removed from the Scheduled Caste list will be immediately fulfilled.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative matter where the final authority rests with the Union Government and Parliament, not the state government. A state can only make a recommendation. The promise to 'immediately fulfill' this is not within the state's power to deliver.

fiscal_cost_note: This action has no direct cost to the state budget, as it is a legislative process handled at the central level.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government does not have the constitutional authority to unilaterally alter the Scheduled Caste list. Promising to 'immediately fulfill' this demand is a political gesture, as the power to do so lies with the central government, making it undeliverable by the state alone.
coverage_gap_note: This action is contentious, as it would remove the community's access to SC reservations and protections.

promise_text_en: A special law will be enacted against honor killings.
promise_text_ta: ஆணவப்படுகொலைக்கு எதிராக தனிச்சட்டம் இயற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 302
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to create a stronger legal deterrent against caste-based violence by enacting a dedicated law.

promise_components.component: A special law will be enacted against honor killings.
promise_components.analysis: This involves a legislative action to create a specific law for 'honor killings', which are currently prosecuted under general IPC sections like murder. A special law could introduce stricter penalties, faster trials, and a clearer definition of the crime. This is a legal reform, not a direct spending program.

fiscal_cost_note: Enacting a law has no direct program cost. Any associated costs would be absorbed into the existing budgets of the judiciary and law enforcement.
sustainability_reasoning: A special law creates a permanent, powerful legal instrument to combat a specific social crime. It strengthens the justice system's ability to prosecute these acts and acts as a formal deterrent, addressing the problem at a systemic level.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness of the law would depend heavily on police willingness to enforce it and societal change.

promise_text_en: If the family of a perpetrator of an honor killing is found to have encouraged the act, all government aid, government jobs, and welfare schemes for them will be permanently revoked for life.
promise_text_ta: கொலை செய்தவர் மட்டுமல்லாது, அந்த ஆணவப்படுகொலைக்கு அடிப்படையாக இருக்கக்கூடிய சாதியச் சிந்தனைகளை வளர்த்தெடுப்பதிலும், ஊக்கப்படுத்துவதிலும் குற்றவாளியின் குடும்பத்தினருடைய பங்கு இருப்பது உறுதிப்படுத்தப்பட்டால் அவர்கள் அனைவருக்குமான அரசு உதவிகள், அரசுப் பணி மற்றும் அரசின் நலத்திட்டங்கள் அனைத்தும் முற்றிலுமாக, வாழ்நாள் முழுவதும் மறுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 302
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to dismantle the social support system for honor killings by imposing severe economic consequences on complicit family members.

promise_components.component: Permanently revoke all government aid, jobs, and welfare schemes for life for family members found to have encouraged an honor killing.
promise_components.analysis: This is a punitive policy intended as a deterrent. It would create a fiscal saving for the government, not a cost. Its implementation would be legally complex, requiring a high standard of proof for 'encouragement' and facing potential constitutional challenges regarding collective punishment.

fiscal_cost_note: This policy has no cost and would result in minor, case-by-case savings for the state by revoking benefits.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy attempts to structurally alter the risk-reward calculation for families considering such crimes. By imposing lifelong economic sanctions, it aims to break the cycle of social and familial support for honor killings, addressing a key root cause.
coverage_gap_note: This policy could face significant legal challenges on the grounds of due process and collective punishment.

promise_text_en: Recording the student's mother tongue will be made mandatory during school admissions.
promise_text_ta: பள்ளிகளில் சேர்க்கைப் பதிவின் போது, அவரவர் தாய்மொழி பற்றிய பதிவும் கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 303
impact_mechanism: This policy creates a data collection system to better understand the linguistic landscape of the student population for future planning.

promise_components.component: Recording the student's mother tongue will be made mandatory during school admissions.
promise_components.analysis: This is a minor administrative change to school admission procedures and forms. The cost is negligible, limited to updating printed materials. It serves as a data-gathering tool for educational policy.

fiscal_cost_note: The fiscal cost is negligible, involving minor administrative and printing expenses for updated admission forms.
sustainability_reasoning: While minor, this is a structural change to administrative data collection. It creates a permanent and consistent dataset on the linguistic background of students, which can inform long-term language and education policies in a systematic way.

promise_text_en: Adithamizhar people will receive government aid designated for them even if they convert their religion; religious conversion will not be a factor for reservation.
promise_text_ta: ஆதித்தமிழர்கள் மதம் மாறினாலும் ஆதித்தமிழர்களுக்கான அரசு உதவிகளே வழங்கப்படும். இடப்பகிர்விற்கு மதமாற்றம் ஒரு பொருட்டாகக் கருதப்படாது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 303
impact_mechanism: Ensures continuous access to affirmative action benefits for a specific community by decoupling eligibility from religious affiliation.

promise_components.component: Government aid for Adithamizhar people will continue even if they convert their religion.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change concerning eligibility for existing aid schemes. The number of beneficiaries and the value of the aid are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Religious conversion will not be a factor for reservation for Adithamizhar people.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change affecting reservation status. The authority to make this change, especially concerning Scheduled Caste status, is a complex legal matter involving state and central jurisdiction and may face legal challenges.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct new expenditure. The promise modifies eligibility for existing schemes, so the cost is contained within current budgets. This represents a negligible portion of the discretionary budget and is fiscally feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy alters the fundamental rules of access to state support for a specific community, aiming to decouple social identity for welfare from religious identity. It addresses a structural barrier that can penalize personal choice and perpetuate disadvantage.
coverage_gap_note: The policy is specific to the Adithamizhar community and does not extend to other communities who may face similar issues related to religious conversion and reservation status.

promise_text_en: Reservation for Adithamizhar people will be mandated in private companies. Companies that do not comply will be denied government concessions, subsidies, and other aid.
promise_text_ta: அரசுத் துறைகளில் உள்ளதைப்போல், தனியார் நிறுவனங்களிலும் ஆதித் தமிழர்களுக்கான இடப்பகிர்வைக் கடைபிடிக்க உத்திரவிடப்படும். அவற்றை நடைமுறைப்படுத்தாத நிறுவனங்களுக்கு அரசின் சலுகைகள், மானியங்கள் மற்றும் இதர உதவிகள் மறுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 303
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase private sector employment for a specific community by mandating reservation and using government incentives as leverage.

promise_components.component: Mandate reservation for Adithamizhar people in private companies.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory measure. The number of private companies, their total employment, and the number of Adithamizhar people are not available in the reference data. The constitutionality of mandating private sector reservation is a highly contentious and legally unsettled issue.

promise_components.component: Deny government concessions, subsidies, and other aid to non-compliant companies.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement mechanism. The total value of government concessions and subsidies to the private sector is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure from the state budget. This is a regulatory policy, so a direct cost cannot be calculated. The indirect economic impact (e.g., on investment climate) is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy attempts to restructure private sector hiring practices to improve representation, directly targeting a root cause of economic inequality. However, its implementation faces immense legal and political hurdles, making it more of a structural ambition than a likely reality.
coverage_gap_note: This policy is exclusively for the Adithamizhar community, not other marginalized groups seeking private sector opportunities.

promise_text_en: The Forest Conservation Act will be reviewed and amended to give priority to hill tribes.
promise_text_ta: வனப் பாதுகாப்புச் சட்டம் மறு ஆய்வுக்குட்படுத்தப்பட்டு, அதில் மலைவாழ் தொல்குடிகளுக்கு முன்னுரிமை கொடுக்கும் வகையில் மாற்றங்கள் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 303
impact_mechanism: Seeks to change central legislation to prioritize the rights and needs of hill tribes in forest areas.

promise_components.component: The Forest Conservation Act will be reviewed and amended to give priority to hill tribes.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise to influence central government policy. The Tamil Nadu state government does not have the legislative power to amend a central act like the Forest Conservation Act unilaterally. It can only pass resolutions or lobby the Union Government.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state budget, as it is a legislative lobbying effort. The outcome is entirely dependent on the Union Government.
sustainability_reasoning: While the goal is to address a structural issue (conflict between conservation law and tribal rights), the state government lacks the authority to deliver the promise. It is a political statement of intent, signaling solidarity with hill tribes, rather than a deliverable state-level policy.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is on hill tribes, potentially excluding other traditional forest-dwelling communities who are not classified as tribes.

promise_text_en: Hill tribes who were displaced in the last 15 years will be resettled in their respective hilly regions.
promise_text_ta: கடந்த 15 ஆண்டுகளில் அப்புறப்படுத்தப்பட்ட மலைவாழ் தொல்குடிகள் அந்தந்த மலைப்பகுதிகளிலேயே மீண்டும் குடியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 303
impact_mechanism: Aims to provide land and housing to restore the livelihoods of specific hill tribes displaced over the last 15 years.

promise_components.component: Hill tribes who were displaced in the last 15 years will be resettled in their respective hilly regions.
promise_components.analysis: This requires identifying beneficiaries, acquiring land, and funding resettlement. The number of displaced hill tribes from the last 15 years is not available in the reference data, so the total cost for land, housing, and infrastructure cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of beneficiaries and the per-family cost of land and resettlement are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to reverse displacement by providing a permanent asset (land and home) in the community's native environment. This is a foundational solution that restores a basis for livelihood and cultural continuity, addressing the root cause of their precarity.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to those displaced in the 'last 15 years', potentially excluding families displaced earlier.

promise_text_en: All basic needs for hill tribes, including roads, drinking water, healthcare, and education, will be provided through special departments.
promise_text_ta: மலைவாழ் தொல்குடிகளுக்கான சாலை வசதி, குடிநீர், மருத்துவம், கல்வி உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்து அடிப்படைத் தேவைகளும் சிறப்புத் துறைகள் மூலம் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 303
impact_mechanism: Creates a dedicated administrative channel to deliver essential services like roads, water, healthcare, and education to hill tribes.

promise_components.component: Provide all basic needs for hill tribes (roads, drinking water, healthcare, education) through special departments.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating or empowering special departments and funding the required infrastructure and services. The scale of the current deficit in these services for hill tribes is not available in the reference data, so the total capital and operational cost cannot be estimated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The extent of the infrastructure deficit (km of roads, number of schools/clinics needed) is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: By promising comprehensive infrastructure and dedicated institutional mechanisms for service delivery, this addresses the structural neglect that is a root cause of poverty and poor human development indicators in tribal communities. It builds permanent assets and systems.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is exclusively on hill tribes, not other remote or similarly underserved rural populations.

promise_text_en: Self-sufficient economic zones will be established in every forest range to process and export value-added forest products. Land will be allocated for agriculture and livestock farms for the local people.
promise_text_ta: வனப்பகுதியில் கிடைக்கும் பொருட்களைக் கொண்டு, மதிப்புக்கூட்டிய பொருளாக மாற்றி விற்பனைக்கு ஏற்றுமதி செய்ய, ஒவ்வொரு வனச்சரகத்திலும் தகுந்த தற்சார்புப் பொருளாதார மண்டலம் அமைக்கப்படும். இப்பகுதி மக்களுக்கான வேளாண் மற்றும் ஆடு, மாடு பண்ணைகளுக்கான நிலங்கள் ஒதுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 303
impact_mechanism: Aims to create local economies in forest areas by processing local products and providing land for agriculture and livestock.

promise_components.component: Establish self-sufficient economic zones in every forest range to process and export value-added forest products.
promise_components.analysis: This requires capital investment for processing units and infrastructure. The number of forest ranges is not specified. This would also face legal hurdles under the Forest Conservation Act.

promise_components.component: Allocate land for agriculture and livestock farms for the local people.

sustainability_reasoning: The promise aims to create a self-sustaining economic ecosystem based on local resources, which is a structural approach to poverty alleviation. However, it is a very ambitious plan that faces major legal (land use in forests) and logistical (market linkages, capital) hurdles.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are localized to people living in and around forest ranges, excluding other rural poor.

promise_text_en: Educated youth from hill tribes will be trained in high-end hotel management and employed in luxury hotels in hilly areas.
promise_text_ta: படித்த மலைவாழ் தொல்குடி இளைஞர்களுக்கு, உயர்தர தங்கும் விடுதி மேலாண்மைக்குப் பயிற்சி வழங்கப்பட்டு, மலைவாழ் பகுதிகளில் உள்ள உயர்தர விடுதிகளில் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
