promise_components.component: Conduct awareness workshops on the consequences of sharing personal information online.
promise_components.analysis: This implies workshops for a target group, most likely the ~89 lakh government school students. Costs would involve developing materials and training facilitators. No specific cost data is available.

promise_components.component: Conduct awareness workshops on how to handle sexual harassment attempts online.
promise_components.analysis: This is part of the same digital safety initiative, requiring specialized content and trained personnel. Cost cannot be calculated from available data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs depend on the format (e.g., in-person, online) and scale of the workshops.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a modern root cause of harm: digital illiteracy. By teaching online safety, it provides a structural solution to a persistent and evolving set of risks, equipping individuals with lifelong skills.
coverage_gap_note: Does not explicitly cover adults or out-of-school youth who are also at risk online.

promise_text_en: The curriculum will be restructured based on the principles of Tolkappiyam, moving away from the Nannul framework. This will teach students not just the Tamil language, but also the Tamils' ecological lifestyle, ethics, and nature-integrated economic systems.
promise_text_ta: பாடத்திட்டத்தை நன்னூல் கட்டமைப்பில் இருந்து விடுவித்து, தொல்காப்பியத்தின் அடிப்படையில் மாற்றி அமைப்பதன் மூலம், தமிழ் மொழியோடு சேர்த்துத் தமிழர்களின் திணை சார்ந்த வாழ்வியல், அறநெறிகள் மற்றும் இயற்கையோடு இணைந்த பொருளாதார முறைகளை மாணவர்களுக்குக் கற்பிக்க முடியும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 325
impact_mechanism: Aims to reshape cultural identity and ecological understanding by restructuring the Tamil language curriculum around ancient Tolkappiyam principles.

promise_components.component: The curriculum will be restructured based on the principles of Tolkappiyam, moving away from the Nannul framework.
promise_components.analysis: This is a fundamental, academically intensive overhaul of the Tamil curriculum for all government school students (~89 lakh). It would require extensive work by expert panels and comprehensive retraining of all Tamil teachers. Cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost involves high-level academic consultation, textbook rewriting, and a massive teacher retraining program, but no figures are provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a deep, structural change to the very foundation of language and cultural education. It seeks to address what is perceived as a deviation from a more authentic cultural-linguistic framework.
coverage_gap_note: This is a universal change within the state curriculum; it has no coverage gap in that context.

promise_text_en: By incorporating the nuanced knowledge of the five landscapes (Ainthinai) as described in Tolkappiyam into textbooks, students will learn about the richness of their land and the methods to protect it.
promise_text_ta: தொல்காப்பியம் காட்டும் ஐந்திணை நிலங்களின் நுட்பமான அறிவை (நிலவியல் மற்றும் உயிரியல்) பாடநூல்களில் கொண்டு வருவதன் மூலம், மாணவர்கள் தங்கள் மண்ணின் வளத்தையும், அதைக் காக்கும் முறையையும் கற்றுக்கொள்வார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 325
impact_mechanism: Fosters environmental awareness and cultural pride by integrating the classical Tamil ecological framework of 'Ainthinai' into textbooks.

promise_components.component: Incorporate the nuanced knowledge of the five landscapes (Ainthinai) into textbooks.
promise_components.analysis: This is a specific content addition to the curriculum for ~89 lakh government school students, likely in Tamil or Social Studies. It is a smaller, more manageable version of the previous promise. Cost is for textbook revision and is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs would be minimal and likely absorbed into the regular cycle of textbook updates.
sustainability_reasoning: This structurally integrates a native ecological and cultural framework into the education system. It addresses a lack of localized environmental knowledge and aims to build a lasting connection between students and their land.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes out-of-school children.

promise_text_en: Primary school teachers will be given two years of training, along with special training in Tamil language proficiency.
promise_text_ta: தொடக்கக் கல்வி ஆசிரியர்களுக்கு இரண்டாண்டுப் பயிற்சிகளோடு தாய்மொழித் திறனில் (தமிழில்) தனிப் பயிற்சியும் அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 326
impact_mechanism: Improves student learning outcomes by enhancing the pedagogical and linguistic skills of primary school teachers.

promise_components.component: Primary school teachers will be given two years of training.
promise_components.analysis: The cost and feasibility depend on the number of primary school teachers and the per-teacher cost of a two-year training program. This data is not available in the reference material.

promise_components.component: Special training in Tamil language proficiency for teachers.
promise_components.analysis: The cost depends on the number of teachers requiring this training and the program's cost. This data is not available.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable. The number of primary school teachers and the cost per teacher for long-term training are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of poor learning outcomes by investing in teacher quality. Better-trained teachers can create a lasting improvement in the education system for years to come.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is limited to primary school teachers, excluding those at middle, high, and higher secondary levels.

promise_text_en: Teacher salary hikes will be reviewed every two years. Salaries will be made equivalent to those of teachers in central government educational institutions.
promise_text_ta: ஆசிரியர்களுக்கான ஊதிய உயர்வு என்பது இரண்டாண்டுகளுக்கு ஒரு முறை ஆய்வுக்குட்படுத்தப்படும். ஒன்றிய அரசு கல்வி நிறுவனங்களில் உள்ள ஆசிரியர்களுக்கு இணையான ஊதியம் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 326
impact_mechanism: Improves teacher morale and retention by increasing their compensation and making it competitive with central government standards.

promise_components.component: Teacher salary hikes will be reviewed every two years.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change for periodic review. The fiscal impact occurs only if a hike is approved.

promise_components.component: Teacher salaries will be made equivalent to those of central government teachers.
promise_components.analysis: The financial impact depends on the number of state government teachers and the salary differential between state and central pay scales. This data is not available.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable. The number of teachers and the current salary gap compared to central government teachers are not available in the reference data. This would increase the state's committed expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: While improving teacher welfare is important for motivation, this measure addresses the symptom of low morale through compensation rather than fixing structural issues in the education system itself. It creates a recurring financial commitment.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is for government school teachers only, excluding private school teachers and other government employees.

promise_text_en: Arrangements will be made for government school teachers' residences to be located near schools. Spouses will not be transferred to different towns; they will be posted in the same place or the same town.
promise_text_ta: அரசுப் பள்ளி ஆசிரியர்களுக்கான குடியிருப்புகள் பள்ளிகளுக்கு அருகிலேயே இருக்க வழிவகை செய்யப்படும். கணவன் மனைவிக்கு வெவ்வேறு ஊர்களில் பணிமாற்றம் இருக்காது. ஒரே இடத்தில் அல்லது ஒரே ஊரில் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 326
impact_mechanism: Reduces teacher absenteeism and improves focus by addressing personal hardships related to housing and spousal job transfers.

promise_components.component: Government school teachers' residences will be located near schools.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a massive capital outlay for construction. The number of teachers requiring housing and the cost of construction are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Spouses will be posted in the same place or the same town.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative policy change with minimal direct financial cost, but significant logistical complexity for the state's human resources management.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable for the housing component. The number of teachers and construction costs are unknown. The spousal posting policy has no direct cost.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses genuine hardships for teachers, which is a symptom of a geographically dispersed workforce. It does not change the fundamental structure of education delivery but may improve teacher well-being and retention.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to government school teachers, particularly those with spouses in government service or those in need of housing.

promise_text_en: Teachers will not be compelled to engage in non-teaching duties such as statistical surveys or election work.
promise_text_ta: ஆசிரியர்கள் புள்ளியியல் கணக்கெடுப்பது, தேர்தலுக்கான பணிகள் உள்ளிட்ட எந்த வேலைகளிலும் ஈடுபடச் சொல்லி கட்டாயப்படுத்தப்படமாட்டார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 326
impact_mechanism: Increases available teaching time and focus on core educational duties by relieving teachers of administrative burdens.

promise_components.component: Teachers will not be compelled to engage in non-teaching duties.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change. While it has no direct cost for the education department, it creates an indirect cost for the state, which must find and fund alternative personnel for tasks like surveys and election work. This cost is not calculable from the provided data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct cost, but the cost of hiring alternative personnel for census, election, and other duties is unknown and therefore unquantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of ineffective teaching: lack of time and focus. By ensuring teachers are dedicated to teaching, it structurally alters their role to better serve students, creating a lasting change.
coverage_gap_note: This policy change directly affects government school teachers; the impact on other departments that rely on this workforce is not addressed.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will establish one primary school in every hamlet, one high school for every three kilometers, and one higher secondary school for every five kilometers.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு சிற்றூருக்கும் ஒரு தொடக்கப்பள்ளி, மூன்று அயிரமாத்திரிக்கு (km) ஓர் உயர்நிலைப்பள்ளி, ஐந்து அயிரமாத்திரிக்கு (km) ஒரு மேல்நிலைப்பள்ளியை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அமைக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 326
impact_mechanism: Improves physical access to education by establishing a dense network of schools based on geographic proximity.

promise_components.component: Establish one primary school in every hamlet.
promise_components.analysis: The number of hamlets currently without a primary school is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Establish one high school for every three kilometers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of new high schools needed to meet this geographic density is not calculable from the provided data.

promise_components.component: Establish one higher secondary school for every five kilometers.
promise_components.analysis: The number of new higher secondary schools needed to meet this geographic density is not calculable from the provided data.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable. The number of new schools required, land acquisition costs, construction costs, and recurring salary costs for new staff are all unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses the fundamental barrier of physical access to education. Creating a permanent infrastructure of schools is a long-term, structural solution to ensure children can attend school.
coverage_gap_note: The promise focuses on school quantity and access, not the quality of education or resources within these new schools.

promise_text_en: Private schools that participate in social welfare activities—such as adopting lakes and ponds, contributing to road improvements, and helping maintain government-run orphanages and homes for the elderly—will receive the full cooperation of the government.
promise_text_ta: ஏரி, கண்மாய், குளங்கள் போன்ற நீர்நிலைகளைத் தத்தெடுத்துக்கொள்வது, சாலை வசதிகளின் மேம்பாட்டில் பங்கெடுப்பது, அரசு அமைக்கும் ஆதரவற்ற சிறுவர் முதியோர் இல்லங்கள் பேணுதலில் பங்கெடுப்பது உள்ளிட்ட சமூகநலனில் பங்கெடுத்துக் கொள்ளும் தனியார் பள்ளிகளுக்கு அரசின் முழு ஒத்துழைப்பு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 326
impact_mechanism: Incentivizes corporate social responsibility from private educational institutions by offering government support in return.

promise_components.component: Private schools participating in social welfare activities will receive the full cooperation of the government.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy statement of intent. 'Full cooperation' is not defined and has no quantifiable financial value. It promises administrative ease rather than a direct subsidy or grant.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. The promise is for administrative cooperation, not financial aid.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise has no clear, measurable mechanism or guaranteed outcome. It relies on the voluntary actions of private schools and offers an undefined 'cooperation' in return, making it primarily a political signal.
coverage_gap_note: Only benefits private schools that choose to and have the resources to engage in the specified activities.

promise_text_en: The student-teacher ratio will be fixed at 25:1 across Tamil Nadu. New teachers will be hired to fill the additional positions created.
promise_text_ta: 25 மாணவர்களுக்கு ஓர் ஆசிரியர் என்கிற அளவீடு தமிழ்நாடு முழுவதும் உறுதி செய்யப்படும். கூடுதல் இடங்களுக்கு மேலும் புதிய ஆசிரியர்கள் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 326
impact_mechanism: Improves the quality of classroom instruction and individual student attention by significantly lowering the student-teacher ratio.

promise_components.component: The student-teacher ratio will be fixed at 25:1.
promise_components.analysis: With ~89 lakh government school students, the total number of teachers required would be 89,00,000 / 25 = 3,56,000. The number of existing teachers is not provided, so the number of new hires cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: New teachers will be hired to fill the additional positions.
promise_components.analysis: The cost depends on the number of new hires and their salaries. Since the number of existing teachers is unknown, the cost is incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable. The number of new teachers to be hired is unknown as the current number of teachers is not in the reference data. This would be a major recurring salary expense.
sustainability_reasoning: The student-teacher ratio is a fundamental pillar of educational quality. Lowering it is a structural change that enables more effective teaching and learning, addressing a root cause of poor outcomes.
coverage_gap_note: This promise applies only to government schools, leaving out students in the private education system.

promise_text_en: A permanent Student Counsellor will be appointed in every school.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு பள்ளிக்கும் ஒரு நிலையான உளவியல் அறிவுரையாளர் (Student Counsellor) பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 327
impact_mechanism: Provides critical mental health and guidance support to students by embedding a dedicated professional in every school.

promise_components.component: A permanent Student Counsellor will be appointed in every school.
promise_components.analysis: This would require hiring one counsellor for each of the ~53,000 government schools. The total cost would be 53,000 multiplied by the annual salary of a counsellor. The salary figure is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable. It requires hiring ~53,000 new professionals, but their salary is not available in the reference data. This would create a significant new recurring expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: Integrating mental health and career guidance into the school system is a structural improvement that addresses a critical, often-neglected aspect of student development. It creates a permanent new capacity within schools.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is for government schools, leaving out students in private schools who may also need counselling services.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will fight to implement the equitable education system, which integrates private schools with government schools, a plan that is currently dormant.
promise_text_ta: அரசுப் பள்ளிகளுடன் தனியார் பள்ளிகளையும் இணைத்துக்கொண்டு, அனைவருக்குமான சமநிலைக் கல்விமுறை என்ற திட்டம் கிடப்பிலேயே உள்ளது. நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அதைப் போராடி நிறைவேற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 327
impact_mechanism: Signals a political commitment to reducing educational inequality by advocating for a Common School System.

promise_components.component: The government will fight to implement the equitable education system (integrating private and government schools).
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise of political advocacy, not direct implementation. It involves no direct action or expenditure. The policy itself, a Common School System, is a complex and legally contentious idea.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost. The promise is to 'fight for' a policy, which is an act of political advocacy and does not involve any expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is to 'fight for' a policy, not to implement it. This is political signalling without a concrete, deliverable action or allocation of resources. It addresses a structural issue in theory but offers no practical mechanism.
coverage_gap_note: This is a statement of intent and does not provide any tangible benefit to any group in the short or medium term.

promise_text_en: Compulsory computer training classes will be integrated into the curriculum from 1st to 10th grade.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றாம் வகுப்பில் இருந்து பத்தாம் வகுப்பு வரையிலும் கட்டாயக் கணினிப் பயிற்சி வகுப்பு இணைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 327
impact_mechanism: Builds foundational digital literacy for all government school students by integrating computer training into the core curriculum from an early age.

promise_components.component: Compulsory computer training classes will be integrated into the curriculum from 1st to 10th grade.
promise_components.analysis: This requires providing computer hardware, software, and trained instructors to all ~53,000 government schools for students in grades 1-10. The number of existing computer labs/teachers and the cost of new infrastructure and hiring are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable. It requires large capital expenditure for computers and recurring expenditure for teachers and maintenance. The scale of the existing gap is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Digital literacy is a fundamental skill for economic participation. Making it a compulsory part of basic education is a structural change that equips students for the modern world, addressing a key skills gap.
coverage_gap_note: The promise specifies grades 1-10, potentially leaving out higher secondary students (grades 11-12) from this specific initiative.

promise_text_en: Employment opportunities will be created for the approximately 60,000 unemployed computer science graduate teachers.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 327
impact_mechanism: Creates direct government employment for a specific group of unemployed graduates.

promise_components.component: Create employment opportunities for 60,000 unemployed computer science graduate teachers.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of employing 60,000 teachers depends on the salary scale, which is not provided in the reference data. Therefore, a cost estimate is not possible. Cost = 60,000 teachers × salary/teacher = data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unstated and cannot be calculated from the reference data as teacher salaries are not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a direct employment scheme that provides jobs and income to a specific cohort. It addresses their immediate unemployment but does not fix the structural reasons for the surplus of unemployed computer science graduates.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes all other categories of unemployed graduates and individuals.

promise_text_en: All existing student education loans will be completely waived.
promise_text_ta: இதுவரை மாணவர்கள் பெற்ற கல்விக் கடன் முற்றிலும் தள்ளுபடி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 327
impact_mechanism: Relieves a specific cohort of individuals from debt obligations through a one-time government buyout of their loans.

promise_components.component: All existing student education loans will be completely waived.
promise_components.analysis: The total outstanding amount of student education loans held by individuals in Tamil Nadu is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the total cost of the waiver cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The total value of outstanding student loans is unknown and not in the reference data, so the total fiscal impact cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: A loan waiver provides immediate financial relief to current debtors but does not address the root causes of student debt, such as the high cost of education or poor post-graduation employment prospects. It creates a moral hazard for future loans.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes future students who will take loans and individuals who have already repaid their loans.

promise_text_en: 10% of the state's total gross revenue will be allocated to the education sector.
promise_text_ta: மாநில அரசின் மொத்த ஆக்க வருவாயில் கல்வித் துறைக்கு 10 விழுக்காடு பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 327
impact_mechanism: Increases funding for the education sector by mandating a fixed percentage of state revenue for its budget.

promise_components.component: 10% of the state's total gross revenue will be allocated to the education sector.
promise_components.analysis: The state's total gross revenue is not provided in the reference data. Therefore, the absolute financial value of this 10% allocation cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is a percentage of an unknown base (total gross revenue), so the cost in rupees cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: Earmarking a fixed percentage of revenue for education creates a predictable, long-term funding mechanism. This allows for sustained investment in infrastructure, teacher training, and curriculum development, addressing root causes of poor educational quality.

promise_text_en: A student welfare board will be established to proactively monitor and swiftly resolve issues in schools and colleges, problems in hostels, and obstacles to students' rights.
promise_text_ta: பள்ளி, கல்லூரிகளில் ஏற்படும் குறைபாடுகள், விடுதிகளில் உள்ள சிக்கல்கள், அவர்களுக்கு வழங்கப்படும் உரிமைகளில் உள்ள தடைகள் உள்ளிட்ட பல குறைகளைக் கண்காணித்து உடனடியாகத் தீர்த்து வைப்பதில் இந்த நலவாரியம் முனைப்புடன் செயல்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 327
impact_mechanism: Creates a new government body to act as an ombudsman and problem-solving entity for students.

promise_components.component: A student welfare board will be established to monitor and resolve issues in schools, colleges, and hostels.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to establish and operate a new government board (including salaries, office space, and administrative expenses) is not specified and cannot be estimated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The administrative cost of a new board is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing a permanent institution for grievance redressal and welfare monitoring is a structural solution. If empowered, it can systemically address student issues rather than dealing with them on an ad-hoc basis.
coverage_gap_note: Does not cover students in informal education or private coaching centers.

promise_text_en: The best books published in world languages will be translated into Tamil, elevating Tamil to a research language. Computerized libraries with these Tamil books will be established in all districts.
promise_text_ta: உலக மொழிகளில் வெளியிடப்பட்டுள்ள சிறந்த நூல்கள் அனைத்தும் தமிழாக்கம் செய்யப்பட்டுத் தமிழ் ஓர் ஆய்வியல் மொழியாக உயர்த்தப்படும். அத்தகைய தமிழ் நூல்களைக் கொண்டு கணினிமயமாக்கப்பட்ட நூலகங்கள் அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களிலும் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 328
impact_mechanism: Enhances access to global knowledge in the local language through translation efforts and new library infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Translate best books from world languages into Tamil.
promise_components.analysis: The number of books to be translated and the cost per translation are not specified. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Establish computerized libraries with these books in all districts.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to establish and operate a computerized library is not specified. The number of districts is 38 (as of recent data, not in reference). Total cost is unknown. data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: The costs for translation and establishing multiple computerized libraries are not specified and cannot be estimated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a long-term investment in the state's intellectual infrastructure. Creating a corpus of translated knowledge and building permanent library facilities addresses the root problem of language barriers to information access.
coverage_gap_note: Practical access may be limited by geography and digital literacy.

promise_text_en: The state's education policy, which opposes the National Education Policy (NEP), will continue to be followed and further refined. We will ensure that the NEP is completely withdrawn.
promise_text_ta: தேசியக் கல்விக் கொள்கைக்கு எதிரான மாநிலக் கல்வி கொள்கை தொடர்ந்து கடைப்பிடிக்கப்படுவதோடு அவற்றினை மேலும் சீர்படுத்தி தேசியக் கல்விக் கொள்கை முற்றிலுமாகத் திரும்பப் பெறப்படுவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 328
impact_mechanism: Maintains the state's autonomy in education policy by resisting a national-level policy framework.

promise_components.component: The state's education policy will be followed and refined, opposing the National Education Policy (NEP).
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of policy and has no direct fiscal cost.

promise_components.component: We will ensure that the NEP is completely withdrawn.
promise_components.analysis: A state government does not have the authority to withdraw a national policy enacted by the Union Government. This is a political goal, not a deliverable action.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a policy stance. There may be indirect costs, such as forgoing central funds tied to NEP implementation, but this amount is not in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: While a state can refuse to implement a central policy, promising to ensure its complete withdrawal is not within its power. This makes the promise a form of political signalling about state autonomy rather than a feasible policy outcome.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar party will undertake efforts to have the National Education Policy 2020 fully repealed and to move education completely from the Concurrent List to the State List.
promise_text_ta: தேசியக் கல்விக் கொள்கை 2020ஐ முழுமையாகத் திரும்பப் பெறச் செய்து கல்வியைப் பொதுப் பட்டியலிலிருந்து முழுமையாக மாநிலப் பட்டியலுக்கு மாற்றம் செய்யும் முயற்சிகளை நாம் தமிழர் கட்சி மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 328
impact_mechanism: Seeks to fundamentally alter the constitutional framework governing education to grant the state full legislative power.

promise_components.component: Undertake efforts to have the National Education Policy 2020 fully repealed.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political objective requiring action by the Union Government, not a state action.

promise_components.component: Undertake efforts to move education completely from the Concurrent List to the State List.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a constitutional amendment, which is outside the power of a single state government.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. These are political goals requiring lobbying and constitutional change, not budgetary allocation.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise involves actions—repealing a national law and amending the constitution—that a state government cannot deliver. It is a statement of political ambition and ideology, not a practical or sustainable policy.

promise_text_en: As a temporary solution to compensate for the ₹2400 crore in funds withheld by the Union Government, the Naam Tamilar government will allocate funds from the state budget to ensure that essential expenditures like school development projects, basic facilities, and teacher salaries are not affected.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றிய அரசு நிறுத்தி வைத்துள்ள 2400 கோடி உருபாய் தொகையை ஈடுசெய்யும் தற்காலிகத் தீர்வாக மாநில அரசின் சொந்த வரவு செலவு அறிக்கையிலிருந்து ஒதுக்கி, அத்திட்டத்தின் கீழ் செயல்படுத்தப்படும் பள்ளி மேம்பாட்டுப் பணிகள், அடிப்படை வசதிகள் மற்றும் ஆசிரியர்களின் சம்பளம் போன்ற இன்றியமையாச் செலவுகள் பாதிக்கப்படாமல் இருப்பதை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 328
impact_mechanism: Plugs a specific funding gap in the education budget using state funds to ensure continuity of essential services.

promise_components.component: Allocate ₹2400 crore from the state budget to compensate for funds withheld by the Union Government for education.
promise_components.analysis: The cost is explicitly stated as ₹2400 crore.

fiscal_cost_note: The annual cost is ₹2400 crore. This is ₹2400 cr / ₹1,30,000 cr = 1.85% of the state's discretionary budget. This is a feasible allocation.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a reactive measure to fill a budget hole and maintain existing services. It treats the symptom (funding shortfall) but does not resolve the underlying structural issue of federal fiscal disputes.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address potential funding gaps in other sectors affected by withheld central funds.

promise_text_en: Entrance examination systems like the National Eligibility cum Entrance Test (NEET) and the National Eligibility Test (NET) will be completely abolished.
promise_text_ta: தேசியத் தகுதி மற்றும் நுழைவுத்தேர்வு (NEET) மற்றும் தேசியத் தகுதித்தேர்வு (NET) போன்ற தேர்வு முறைகள் முற்றிலுமாக நீக்கப்பட வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 329
impact_mechanism: Changes the admission criteria for higher education and eligibility for academic positions by removing national-level standardized tests.

promise_components.component: Entrance examination systems like NEET and NET will be completely abolished.
promise_components.analysis: NEET and NET are established under central laws and regulations. A state government does not have the authority to abolish them. It can only pursue legal and political routes to gain an exemption, which is not guaranteed.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a political and legal objective.
sustainability_reasoning: A state government cannot abolish a national examination system. This promise is not deliverable and serves as political signalling to an electorate concerned about the impact of these tests.

promise_text_en: National entrance exams like CUET will not be permitted for colleges under state control. Admissions will be based solely on 12th-grade marks.
promise_text_ta: மாநில அரசின் கட்டுப்பாட்டில் உள்ள கல்லூரிகளுக்கு எந்த வகையான தேசிய நுழைவுத் தேர்வும் (CUET) அனுமதிக்கப்படாது. பன்னிரெண்டாம் வகுப்பு மதிப்பெண் அடிப்படையில் மட்டுமே சேர்க்கை நடைபெறும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 329
impact_mechanism: Asserts state control over admission processes for its own colleges by rejecting a national entrance test in favor of state board exam results.

promise_components.component: National entrance exams like CUET will not be permitted for colleges under state control.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision within the state's jurisdiction for its own institutions.

promise_components.component: Admissions will be based solely on 12th-grade marks.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision on admission criteria for state-controlled colleges.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a policy decision regarding admission procedures.
sustainability_reasoning: This establishes a clear, durable rule for the state's higher education admission system. By setting a long-term policy framework, it provides stability and predictability, making it a structural choice about how the system operates.
coverage_gap_note: Does not apply to central universities in TN or private universities that may opt for CUET.

promise_text_en: The selection of assistant professors and staff in the higher education department will be transparent and, specifically, will be filled based on true social justice reservation percentages.
promise_text_ta: உயர்கல்வித்துறை உதவிப் பேராசியர் மற்றும் ஊழியர்கள் தேர்வு, வெளிப்படைத் தன்மையோடு இருக்கும். குறிப்பாக உண்மையான சமூகநீதி விழுக்காட்டு அடிப்படையில் நிரப்பப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 329
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve fairness and representation in public sector hiring by reforming recruitment procedures.

promise_components.component: Selection of assistant professors and staff in higher education will be made transparent.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance reform promise. Its impact depends on the specific changes to recruitment rules and oversight mechanisms. No financial cost can be calculated.

promise_components.component: Hiring will be filled based on true social justice reservation percentages.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy commitment to enforce or potentially reinterpret reservation rules. The term 'true' is subjective and could imply changes to current roster systems. No financial cost is associated with this policy change itself.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a policy and governance promise with no direct fiscal cost. Estimated annual cost: ₹0 crore.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the rules and procedures of public employment, which is a root cause of inequality of opportunity. If implemented effectively, it creates a lasting change in the hiring system rather than just addressing a symptom.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is limited to the higher education department and does not cover other government departments or the private sector.

promise_text_en: Job security for female professors will be guaranteed. They will be posted in the areas where they reside.
promise_text_ta: பெண் பேராசியர்களுக்கான பணிப் பாதுகாப்பு உறுதி அளிக்கப்படும். அவர்கள் வாழும் பகுதியிலேயே பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 329
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve working conditions for female professors by providing job security and reducing travel burdens.

promise_components.component: Job security for female professors will be guaranteed.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'job security' is ambiguous as government jobs already have high security. This may refer to protection against arbitrary transfers or contract renewals. Data on the number of female professors is unavailable.

promise_components.component: Female professors will be posted in the areas where they reside.
promise_components.analysis: This is a human resources policy change. Implementing this would be logistically complex, depending on vacancy availability, specialization requirements, and seniority rules. Data on the number and location of female professors is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a policy promise with no direct, calculable fiscal cost. Potential indirect costs from administrative complexity or suboptimal placements are not quantifiable. Fiscal viability is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a real hardship for women (the 'double burden' of work and home life). However, it treats the symptom (commute/relocation) rather than root causes like lack of safe transport or affordable housing near workplaces.
coverage_gap_note: This benefit is specific to female professors and does not extend to male colleagues, other staff, or women in other professions.

promise_text_en: Attendance records for college teachers and students will be converted to a computerized system.
promise_text_ta: கல்லூரி ஆசிரியர்கள் மற்றும் மாணவர்களின் வருகைப் பதிவுகள் கணினி வருகைப்பதிவாக மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 329
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase accountability and administrative efficiency in colleges through technological monitoring.

promise_components.component: Attendance records for college teachers and students will be converted to a computerized system.
promise_components.analysis: This is a technology implementation project. The cost would depend on the number of colleges, staff, and students, as well as the chosen technology (e.g., biometrics, software). This data is not available.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of higher education institutions, teachers, and students is not provided in the reference data, so the cost of hardware, software, and maintenance cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: Implementing a computerized system is a visible 'modernization' effort but does not address the underlying reasons for poor attendance. It is a tool for monitoring a symptom, not a solution for the root cause of disengagement.
coverage_gap_note: This applies only to colleges, not to the much larger government school system.

promise_text_en: Degrees awarded in a specific discipline in higher education will have the same name, quality, and curriculum across all universities, and will be made equivalent to degrees offered in foreign countries.
promise_text_ta: உயர் கல்விப்பாடத்தில் ஒரு துறையில் வழங்கப்படும் பட்டங்கள் மற்ற அனைத்துப் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களிலும் ஒரே பெயரில், ஒரே தரத்தில், ஒரே பாடத்திட்டத்துடனும் அயல் நாடுகளில் வழங்கப்படும் பட்டங்களுக்கு இணையாகவும் இருக்கும்படி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 329
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to enhance the value and recognition of Tamil Nadu's higher education degrees by standardizing quality.

promise_components.component: Degrees in a specific discipline will have the same name, quality, and curriculum across all universities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major academic reform requiring coordination and consensus among all state universities to standardize curricula. This is an administrative and academic exercise with no direct calculable cost.

promise_components.component: Degrees will be made equivalent to degrees offered in foreign countries.
promise_components.analysis: This is a highly ambitious goal. Equivalence is typically achieved through international accreditation bodies and bilateral university agreements, not by government decree. The process is long and requires substantial upgrades to meet international standards.

fiscal_cost_note: This is an academic and policy reform promise. While it would have significant long-term costs for upgrading infrastructure and faculty to meet international standards, these are not specified and cannot be calculated. Fiscal viability is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Standardizing curriculum and achieving international benchmarks would be a fundamental, lasting change to the state's higher education system. It addresses the root cause of variable quality and poor recognition of local degrees.
coverage_gap_note: This focuses on higher education and does not address the foundational quality of primary and secondary schooling.

promise_text_en: For the more than 5,000 professors in government-aided colleges who have not received promotions, and for other staff in these colleges, legal job security and rights will be ensured.
promise_text_ta: அரசு உதவி பெறும் கல்லூரிகளில் பணியாற்றும் 5000க்கும் மேற்பட்ட பேராசிரியர்களுக்குப் பணி மேம்பாடு வழங்கப்படாத நிலையில், கல்லூரிகளில் பணியாற்றும் ஊழியர்களுக்கான சட்டப்படியான பணிப் பாதுகாப்பும், உரிமைகளும் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 329
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to resolve long-standing employment grievances for a specific group of college staff.

promise_components.component: For 5,000+ professors in government-aided colleges without promotions, and for other staff, legal job security and rights will be ensured.
promise_components.analysis: This targets a specific cohort with grievances. The financial implication depends on the nature of the 'rights' to be ensured, such as promotion arrears or pension adjustments. The promise provides a beneficiary number (5,000+) but no financial data to calculate the cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the specific financial settlements (e.g., salary arrears, pension benefits) required for the 5,000+ affected staff, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides a resolution for a specific group's existing problems, which is a form of relief. However, it does not necessarily reform the administrative or legal processes that led to these promotion and rights issues in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: This addresses a specific past grievance and does not cover staff in private unaided colleges or prevent similar issues from arising in the future.

promise_text_en: Subsidiary and autonomous universities will be established under Thanjavur Tamil University. Special colleges for Tamil language education will be opened under them. Departments for Tamil history, art, philosophy, culture, and sports will be created to offer special degrees. Graduates from these colleges will be given priority in government employment.
promise_text_ta: தஞ்சைத் தமிழ்ப் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தின் கீழ் துணை மற்றும் தன்னாட்சிப் பல்கலைக்கழகங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும். அதன்கீழ் உள்ள கல்லூரிகளில் தமிழ் மொழிக் கல்விக்கான சிறப்புத் தனிக் கல்லூரிகள் திறக்கப்படும். தமிழர் வரலாறு, தமிழர் கலை, தமிழர் மெய்யியல், தமிழர் பண்பாடு, விளையாட்டு ஆகியவற்றுக்கான துறைகள் உருவாக்கப்பட்டுத் தனிச் சிறப்புப் பட்டங்கள் வழங்கப்படும். இக்கல்லூரியில் படித்த மாணவர்களுக்கு அரசு வேலை வாய்ப்புகளில் முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 331
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to promote Tamil language and culture by creating new dedicated educational institutions and linking their degrees to government jobs.

promise_components.component: Establish new universities and colleges for Tamil language, history, art, philosophy, culture, and sports.
promise_components.analysis: This involves significant capital and operational expenditure. The cost of establishing new universities and colleges is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Graduates from these colleges will be given priority in government employment.
promise_components.analysis: This policy of preferential hiring could face legal challenges based on constitutional principles of equal opportunity for all citizens in public employment.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of establishing multiple new universities and colleges is substantial but not specified. Fiscal viability is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating new, permanent institutions is a structural change. However, the 'job priority' component is legally risky, and creating new institutions is a very expensive, long-term endeavor that may not be sustainable.
coverage_gap_note: The job priority clause would actively disadvantage graduates from all other disciplines and universities when competing for government employment.

promise_text_en: Financial assistance will be provided by the Naam Tamilar government to establish chairs for Tamil language development and Tamil language departments in universities worldwide. Scholarships will be provided by the government to students studying Tamil in world universities.
promise_text_ta: உலகப் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களில் தமிழ்மொழி வளர்ச்சிக்கான இருக்கைகள் மற்றும் தமிழ் மொழித்துறையை நிறுவ நாம் தமிழர் அரசு சார்பில் பொருளுதவி வழங்கப்படும். உலகப் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களில் தமிழ் படிக்கும் மாணவர்களுக்கு அரசு சார்பில் ஊக்கத்தொகை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 331
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to elevate the global academic status of the Tamil language through international funding and support.

promise_components.component: Provide financial assistance to establish Tamil chairs and departments in universities worldwide.
promise_components.analysis: This is a cultural diplomacy initiative. The cost of endowing a single chair at a major international university can be very high, and this data is not available.

promise_components.component: Provide scholarships for students studying Tamil in world universities.
promise_components.analysis: The cost depends on the number of scholarships and their value. This data is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of endowing university chairs and funding an unspecified number of international scholarships is highly variable and not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing an endowed chair is a permanent investment that creates a lasting academic focus on a subject. It addresses the root issue of limited international academic infrastructure for Tamil studies.
coverage_gap_note: This is an external-facing promise that offers no direct, material benefit to students or institutions within Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: A higher education research department will be established. Through it, projects will be designed to create inventions for social use in medicine, science, agriculture, and technology. Research education will be enhanced with necessary funding, and world-class educational institutions will be started for this purpose.
promise_text_ta: உயர்கல்வி ஆராய்ச்சித் துறை உருவாக்கப்படும். அதன்மூலமாக மருத்துவம், அறிவியல், உழவு மற்றும் தொழில்நுட்பத் துறைகளில், சமூகப் பயன்பாட்டிற்கான கண்டுபிடிப்புகளை உருவாக்கும் திட்டங்கள் வடிவமைக்கப்படும். கண்டுபிடிப்புக்களுக்குத் தேவையான பொருளுதவியுடன் ஆராய்ச்சிக் கல்வி மேம்படுத்தப்படும். இதற்கென உலகத்தரம் வாய்ந்த கல்வி நிறுவனங்கள் தொடங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 331
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to build a state-level research and development ecosystem to drive innovation and create new technologies.

promise_components.component: Establish a higher education research department to fund and design projects for social use.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new government body for research funding. The administrative and grant-making budget is not specified.

promise_components.component: Start world-class educational institutions for research.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major capital-intensive project. The cost of establishing 'world-class' institutions is extremely high and not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of establishing new 'world-class' research institutions and a new funding agency is not specified and would be a massive, long-term financial commitment.
sustainability_reasoning: If successfully implemented, creating a state-funded R&D ecosystem and new research institutions is a fundamental, structural investment. It addresses the root cause of a weak innovation pipeline by building the necessary infrastructure.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits of such high-level research may take many years to materialize and may not be distributed evenly across the population.

promise_text_en: Separate universities will be established for forestry, oceanography, marine science, Tamil history, palm-leaf manuscript training, epigraphy, and archaeological studies.
promise_text_ta: காடுகள் வளர்ப்பு, பெருங்கடல் ஆய்வுகள், கடல்சார் அறிவியல், தமிழர்களின் வரலாறு, ஓலைச்சுவடிப் பயிற்சி, கல்வெட்டுப் பயிற்சி, தொல்லியல் ஆய்வுகளுக்கென்று தனியாகப் பல்கலைக்கழகங்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 331
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to promote specialized fields of study by creating dedicated universities for each.

promise_components.component: Separate universities will be established for forestry, oceanography, marine science, Tamil history, palm-leaf manuscript training, epigraphy, and archaeological studies.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes creating at least six new, highly specialized universities. This is a massive capital expenditure. An alternative could be creating specialized centers within existing universities, which is often more cost-effective.

fiscal_cost_note: Data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of establishing six new universities is not specified and would be extremely high, likely running into thousands of crores for construction and recurring operational costs.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise of creating many new universities sounds impressive but is likely fiscally and academically unviable. Creating entire universities for hyper-niche fields like 'epigraphy' is inefficient; strengthening departments in existing universities would be a more sustainable approach.
coverage_gap_note: This approach could divert massive funds that might otherwise be used to improve quality across all existing universities, potentially harming the majority of students.

promise_text_en: Firm action will be taken to secure the necessary fund allocation from the central government for Tamil researchers engaged in higher education research in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: ஆராய்ச்சிப் படிப்புகளுக்கான நடுவணரசு தொகைப் பங்கீட்டில், தமிழக உயர்கல்வி ஆராய்ச்சியில் ஈடுபடும் தமிழக ஆராய்ச்சியாளர்களுக்கு தேவையான தொகைப் பங்கீட்டைப் பெற்றுத்தர உறுதியான நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 331
impact_mechanism: This promise positions the state government as an advocate for its researchers in seeking funds from the central government.

promise_components.component: Firm action will be taken to secure necessary fund allocation from the central government for Tamil researchers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise of political lobbying. Its success is entirely dependent on the central government's decisions and funding policies. The state government has no direct control over the outcome.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a political promise with no direct cost to the state's discretionary budget. Estimated annual cost: ₹0 crore.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a political statement that costs nothing and delivers no guaranteed outcome. It frames the state as a champion against the Centre but creates no new funding or mechanism that the state government itself controls.
coverage_gap_note: This promise offers no solution or support for researchers who do not or cannot get central government funding.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will take steps to expedite court cases and ensure the proper implementation of the law vesting the Chancellor's authority in the Chief Minister, a decision proposed by the Tamil Nadu government and legalized by a 2025 Supreme Court verdict, which is currently under an interim stay by the High Court.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு அரசு முன்மொழிந்து 2025ஆம் ஆண்டு உச்ச நீதிமன்றத்தின் தீர்ப்பின் வழியே சட்டமாக்கப்பட்டு முதலமைச்சரிடமே வேந்தர் பொறுப்பு இருக்கும் என்கின்ற முடிவினை நாம் தமிழர் கட்சி கடைப்பிடிக்கும். இந்தச் சட்டங்கள் தற்போது உயர்நீதிமன்றத்தின் இடைக்காலத் தடையின் கீழ் இருக்கும் நிலையில் அந்த வழக்குகளை விரைந்து முடித்து இந்தச் சட்டங்கள் உரிய முறையில் நடைமுறைக்கு வருவதற்கான முயற்சிகளை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 332
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to centralize university governance under the state's elected executive, aiming to streamline appointments and policy decisions.

promise_components.component: Expedite court cases to ensure the Chief Minister holds the authority of University Chancellor.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and administrative action concerning the governance structure of state universities. It does not have a direct, calculable financial cost based on the provided reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a change in governance and legal procedure, not a spending program.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets a permanent change in the governance structure of state universities. By attempting to resolve the conflict over the Chancellor's role, it addresses a root cause of administrative friction and delays in a lasting manner.
coverage_gap_note: This governance change primarily affects state universities, not private or central universities within Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: As Tamil Nadu is a leading state in tourism, a separate university for tourism development will be established. Through this, studies will be conducted to retrieve the history of ancient significant places in Tamil Nadu and the history of Sangam-era cities submerged in the sea.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகம் சுற்றுலாத்துறையில் முதன்மை மாநிலங்களில் ஒன்றாக இருந்து வருகிறது. எனவே சுற்றுலா மேம்பாட்டிற்கென்று தனியே ஒரு பல்கலைக்கழகம் உருவாக்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் தமிழகத்தின் தொன்மையான சிறப்பு வாய்ந்த இடங்கள் குறித்த வரலாறு, கடலில் மூழ்கிய சங்ககால நகரங்கள் குறித்த வரலாறு அனைத்தையும் மீட்டெடுக்கும் ஆய்வுகள் நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 332
impact_mechanism: A specialized university would be created to build human capital and research capacity for the state's tourism sector.

promise_components.component: Establish a separate university for tourism development.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to establish a new university, including land, infrastructure, and recurring operational expenses, is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Conduct studies on ancient history and submerged Sangam-era cities.
promise_components.analysis: The cost for funding specific historical and archaeological research projects is not available in the reference data and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of establishing a new university is substantial but not specified in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a new university is a long-term investment in educational infrastructure and specialized knowledge. It builds permanent capacity for a key economic sector, addressing a potential gap in the state's higher education offerings.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are limited to students and faculty specializing in tourism and related historical fields.

promise_text_en: It will be ensured that the research fund allocation from the Tamil Nadu Science and Technology Corporation reaches all district universities and colleges, especially higher education institutions operating in rural areas.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாடு அறிவியல் தொழில்நுட்பக் கழகத்தின் ஆராய்ச்சிப் பணப் பங்கீடு அனைத்து மாவட்ட பல்கலைக்கழகங்கள், கல்லூரிகளுக்குக் குறிப்பாகச் சிற்றூர்களில் இயங்கும் உயர் கல்வி நிறுவனங்களுக்குச் சென்றுச் சேருவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 332
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to democratize access to research funding, potentially improving academic quality in underserved rural institutions.

promise_components.component: Ensure research funds from the Tamil Nadu Science and Technology Corporation reach all district universities and colleges, especially in rural areas.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy directive on the reallocation of existing funds. It does not involve new expenditure. The total size of the research fund is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No new fiscal cost is implied, as this is a promise to change the distribution criteria for an existing fund. The total value of the fund is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: By changing the rules of resource allocation, this policy creates a lasting shift in how research funds are distributed. It addresses the systemic imbalance between urban and rural institutions, which is a root cause of quality disparities.
coverage_gap_note: This policy reallocates existing funds but does not increase the total pool of research funding available statewide.

promise_text_en: An organization will be created to ensure the qualifications, selection, and salaries of professors in private university colleges, and the operations of private universities will be monitored by the government. A special eligibility test by the Tamil Nadu government will be a requirement for all teachers, and mandatory participation in government training at regular intervals will be enforced.
promise_text_ta: தனியார் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களின் கல்லூரிகளில் பணிபுரியும் பேராசிரியர்களின் தகுதி, தேர்வு, ஊதியம் போன்றவற்றை உறுதி செய்யும் அமைப்பு ஒன்றை உருவாக்கி அரசின் மேற்பார்வையில் தனியார் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களின் செயல்பாடுகள் கண்காணிக்கப்படும். அனைத்து ஆசிரியர்களுக்கும் தமிழக அரசின் சிறப்புத் தேர்ச்சி ஒரு தகுதியாக வைக்கப்படுவதோடு, குறிப்பிட்ட கால இடைவெளியில் அரசுப் பயிற்சியிலும் கலந்து கொள்வது கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 332
impact_mechanism: A state-level regulatory framework would be established to standardize quality, faculty qualifications, and employment conditions in private higher education.

promise_components.component: Create an organization to regulate qualifications, selection, and salaries of professors in private university colleges.
promise_components.analysis: This involves establishing a new regulatory body. The administrative cost for this organization is not calculable from the reference data.

promise_components.component: A special eligibility test and mandatory government training will be required for all teachers.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to develop and administer a new test and training programs for all private college teachers cannot be calculated as the number of teachers is not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The administrative costs for a new regulatory body, a statewide testing system, and mandatory training programs are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to build a permanent regulatory institution to address systemic issues of quality and labor practices in the private higher education sector. Such a framework would be a structural reform with long-term effects on the educational landscape.
coverage_gap_note: The regulations apply to private institutions, not the state's government-run colleges and universities.

promise_text_en: It will be ensured that private sector job opportunities for higher education graduates in Tamil Nadu are made available to Tamils with transparency through a coordinated government structure.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் உயர்கல்வி பயின்றோருக்கானத் தனியார் வேலைவாய்ப்புகள் ஒருங்கிணைக்கப்பட்ட அரசின் அமைப்பு மூலம் வெளிப்படைத்தன்மையுடன் தமிழர்களுக்குக் கிடைப்பது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 332
impact_mechanism: A government-coordinated structure would be created to facilitate private sector employment for local graduates through improved transparency and access.

promise_components.component: Ensure private sector job opportunities for higher education graduates are made available to Tamils with transparency through a coordinated government structure.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a government body or platform. The administrative cost of this 'coordinated structure' is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of the proposed government structure is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: The government cannot 'ensure' jobs in the private sector, as hiring decisions are made by companies. While a job portal is feasible, the core promise is practically undeliverable and legally questionable, making it primarily a political signal about prioritizing locals.
coverage_gap_note: This promise does not create new jobs; it only attempts to channel existing ones to a specific demographic.

promise_text_en: A committee of Tamil Nadu university Vice-Chancellors will finalize and ensure the implementation of syllabi incorporating world-class standards and current events across all universities and colleges. All syllabi will be comprehensively revised every three to four years.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகப் பல்கலைக்கழகத் துணைவேந்தர்கள் குழுவின் கூட்டம் உலகத்தரம் மற்றும் நடப்பு நிகழ்வுகளை உள்ளடக்கிய பாடத்திட்டங்களை இறுதி செய்து, அனைத்துப் பல்கலைக்கழகங்கள், கல்லூரிகள் ஆகியவற்றில் அறிமுகம் செய்து நடைமுறைப்படுத்துவதை உறுதி செய்யும். அனைத்துப் பாடத்திட்டங்களும் மூன்று அல்லது நான்கு ஆண்டுகளுக்கு ஒருமுறை செறிவாக மாற்றி அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 333
impact_mechanism: This policy centralizes syllabus design under a high-level committee to ensure quality, relevance, and regular updates across all universities.

promise_components.component: A committee of university Vice-Chancellors will finalize and ensure the implementation of syllabi incorporating world-class standards.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural and administrative reform. The cost is negligible, related to committee meetings and coordination.

promise_components.component: All syllabi will be comprehensively revised every three to four years.
promise_components.analysis: This establishes a recurring process. The direct financial cost is minimal.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible fiscal cost. This is a change in academic governance procedure with minimal administrative expenses.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating a formal, state-level mechanism for regular curriculum updates, this policy addresses the systemic problem of outdated syllabi. It establishes a permanent process for maintaining educational relevance, which is a structural improvement.
coverage_gap_note: A highly centralized approach might reduce the flexibility of autonomous colleges to design specialized curricula.

promise_text_en: All science laboratories will be upgraded. Students will be taken to training centers once a quarter to gain direct practical knowledge relevant to their field of study.
promise_text_ta: அறிவியல் ஆய்வுக்கூடங்கள் அனைத்தும் தரம் உயர்த்தப்படும். துறைசார் படிப்புக்கு ஏற்ற நேரடி செயலறிவைப் பெற்றுக்கொள்ள வேண்டி, காலாண்டிற்கு ஒருமுறை பயிற்சி இடங்களுக்கு அழைத்துச் செல்லப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 333
impact_mechanism: This initiative aims to improve practical skills and hands-on learning by upgrading lab infrastructure and providing regular external training.

promise_components.component: All science laboratories will be upgraded.
promise_components.analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of science labs across all higher education institutions and the cost per upgrade are not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Students will be taken to training centers once a quarter for direct practical knowledge.
promise_components.analysis: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of science students and the cost of transport and training fees are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The capital expenditure to upgrade 'all' labs and the recurring cost for quarterly training for all science students would be extremely high, likely consuming a very large share of the discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets fundamental inputs for quality science education: modern equipment and practical exposure. These are structural improvements that build lasting capacity, directly addressing a root cause of poor educational outcomes.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are focused exclusively on students in science and technology streams, excluding those in arts and humanities.

promise_text_en: Under Naam Tamilar rule, higher education will be made world-class. Syllabi, training, and research methods will be aligned with international educational principles, making a Tamil Nadu higher education degree acceptable in any country.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சியில் உயர்கல்வி உலகத்தரம் வாய்ந்ததாக மாற்றப்படும். பன்னாட்டுக் கல்விக் கோட்பாடுகளுக்கேற்ப பாடத்திட்டங்களும், பயிற்சிகளும், ஆராய்ச்சி முறைகளும் அளிக்கப்பட்டுத் தமிழக உயர்கல்விப் பட்டம் எந்த நாட்டிலும் ஏற்கக்கூடிய அளவில் மாற்றியமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 333
impact_mechanism: This is a broad vision to enhance the global recognition and quality of Tamil Nadu's higher education through alignment with international standards.

promise_components.component: Make higher education world-class and align syllabi, training, and research with international principles.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent, not a specific, measurable action. It lacks a concrete mechanism that can be costed. Achieving international degree recognition depends on external accreditation bodies and diplomatic efforts.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost can be calculated from this aspirational statement.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is a high-level vision statement that lacks specific, actionable components. 'World-class' is subjective and 'universal degree acceptance' is not within the state's unilateral control, making this more of a political slogan than a concrete policy.

promise_text_en: The practice of forcing researchers and professors to retire upon reaching retirement age will be changed. A 'Professor Emeritus' scheme will be introduced for qualified researchers, removing the barrier to acquiring their research knowledge and experience.
promise_text_ta: ஓய்வு அகவை வந்தவுடன் ஆராய்ச்சியாளர்களையும், பேராசிரியர்களையும் வெளியேற்றும் நடைமுறை மாற்றப்பட்டு, தகுதி வாய்ந்த ஆராய்ச்சியாளர்களுக்கு வாழ்நாள் ஆராய்ச்சியாளர் (professor emeritus) திட்டம் கொண்டுவரப்படும் அதன்மூலம் ஆராய்ச்சி அறிவையும், பட்டறிவையும் பெறுவதில் உள்ள தடை நீக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 333
impact_mechanism: This scheme retains experienced senior academics post-retirement, allowing the university system to continue benefiting from their research and mentorship.

promise_components.component: A 'Professor Emeritus' scheme will be introduced for qualified researchers, removing the age barrier to their continued contribution.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new scheme with an honorarium and/or facilities for a select number of retired professors. The number of eligible professors and the associated costs are not available in the reference data, but it is expected to be a small, targeted program.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. However, the cost is expected to be modest as it would apply to a small, select group of individuals, making it fiscally feasible.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy creates a permanent pathway for retaining senior academic talent within the university system. It addresses the structural issue of losing valuable expertise due to a fixed retirement age, thus preserving institutional knowledge.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are highly concentrated among a small number of elite, retiring academics and their research teams.

promise_text_en: The practice of appointing individuals as university Vice-Chancellors who are not affiliated with the university, academic experts, or researchers will be abolished.
promise_text_ta: பல்கலைக்கழகங்களுடன் தொடர்புடையவர்கள், கல்வி சார்ந்த மேதைகள் அல்லது ஆராய்ச்சியாளர்கள் தவிர மற்றவர்கள் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களின் துணை வேந்தர்களாக்கப்படும் நடைமுறை ஒழிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 333
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to improve university leadership and academic integrity by restricting Vice-Chancellor appointments to qualified academics and researchers.

promise_components.component: The practice of appointing individuals as university Vice-Chancellors who are not affiliated with the university, academic experts, or researchers will be abolished.
promise_components.analysis: This is a change in appointment criteria and governance policy. It has no direct financial cost and aligns with standard academic best practices and UGC guidelines.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost. This is a policy change regarding leadership qualifications.
sustainability_reasoning: By codifying the qualifications for Vice-Chancellors, this policy creates a structural safeguard for academic governance. It addresses the root cause of potential mismanagement that can arise from appointing leaders without relevant academic experience.

promise_text_en: A center with research journals and magazines will be established, enabling book borrowing from any university. The Naam Tamilar government will acquire research articles, journals, and books as free e-books.
promise_text_ta: ஆராய்ச்சி ஏடுகள் மற்றும் இதழ்கள் (Journals) கொண்ட மையம் ஒன்று தொடங்கப்பட்டு அதன்வழி எந்தப் பல்கலைகழகத்திலும் புத்தகம் கடன் பெறும் வாய்ப்பு ஏற்படுத்தப்படும். ஆராய்ச்சிக் கட்டுரைகள், இதழ்கள், புத்தகங்கள் கட்டணமில்லாமல் மின்னணுப் புத்தகமாக நாம் தமிழர் அரசு பெற்றுத்தரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 333
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve access to academic resources by creating a centralized digital and physical library system for higher education.

promise_components.component: Establish a center with research journals and magazines for inter-university book borrowing.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a physical or digital hub. The cost would be for infrastructure and administration. No data available to quantify.

promise_components.component: Acquire research articles, journals, and books as free e-books for the public.
promise_components.analysis: This requires negotiating and paying for statewide licenses from academic publishers. The cost of such licenses is highly variable and not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is entirely dependent on licensing fees from publishers and IT infrastructure costs, which are not specified. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates permanent educational infrastructure that improves access to knowledge, addressing a root cause of academic inequality. Its success depends on negotiating with numerous universities and publishers.
coverage_gap_note: This primarily benefits students and faculty in higher education, leaving out the general public and school students.

promise_text_en: Campus interviews for private sector jobs will be conducted for students from rural areas studying in Arts and Science colleges. Priority in these job opportunities will be given (based on merit) to students from very backward rural areas.
promise_text_ta: கலை மற்றும் அறிவியல் கல்லூரிகளில் பயிலும் சிற்றூர்களைச் சேர்ந்த மாணவர்களுக்குத் தனியார் வேலைவாய்ப்புகளுக்காக வளாகத் தேர்வுகள் நடத்தப்படும். இந்த வேலைவாய்ப்பில், மிகவும் பின்தங்கிய சிற்றூர்களில் இருந்து வரும் மாணவ, மாணவிகளுக்கு (தகுதியின் அடிப்படையில்) முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 333
impact_mechanism: This policy seeks to bridge the gap between education and employment for rural students by facilitating direct access to private sector recruiters.

promise_components.component: Conduct campus interviews for private sector jobs for rural students in Arts and Science colleges.
promise_components.analysis: This is a coordination and logistics effort. The cost would be administrative (organizing job fairs). The number of targeted students is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Give priority in job opportunities to students from very backward rural areas.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy directive for the organized campus interviews. Implementation depends on the cooperation of private companies.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost is for administration and event organization, which would be minimal and represent a negligible fraction of the discretionary budget. data unavailable — cannot calculate a precise figure.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a structural link between rural education and formal employment, addressing a key barrier to social mobility. However, its effectiveness hinges on private sector participation.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes urban students and those in professional courses like engineering or medicine.

promise_text_en: Graduates with law and medical degrees will be given the opportunity to become university teachers, thereby utilizing their professional knowledge and practical experience for educational development.
promise_text_ta: சட்டம், மருத்துவப் பட்டம் பெற்றவர்களுக்கும் பல்கலைக்கழகங்களில் ஆசிரியராகும் வாய்ப்பு அளிக்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் அத்துறைசார் வல்லுநர்களின் அறிவும், பயனறிவும் கல்வி வளர்சிக்குப் பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 335
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to enhance university teaching by allowing professionals with practical experience in law and medicine to become faculty.

promise_components.component: Law and medical degree graduates will be given the opportunity to become university teachers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory change to hiring qualifications for university faculty. It does not create new positions but changes eligibility for existing ones. It may conflict with national UGC guidelines which typically require postgraduate degrees and NET/SET/PhD qualifications.

fiscal_cost_note: There is no direct new fiscal cost associated with this promise, as it pertains to recruitment policy for existing or future vacancies.
sustainability_reasoning: This alters the qualification framework for educators, which is a structural change. However, it faces significant implementation risk due to potential conflict with national standards set by the University Grants Commission (UGC).
coverage_gap_note: This benefits only law and medical graduates and does not address broader issues of teacher shortages or quality.

promise_text_en: Anyone, regardless of their basic education, will be given the opportunity to study in any field through an entrance exam. This will enable educational freedom, allowing, for example, a doctor to study law or an engineer to study medicine.
promise_text_ta: அடிப்படையில் எந்தக் கல்வி பயின்றவருக்கும் எந்தத் துறையில் படிக்கவும் நுழைவுத்தேர்வு மூலம் வாய்ப்பளிக்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் மருத்துவரும் சட்டம் பயிலும் நிலையும், பொறியாளரும் சட்டத்துறை சார்ந்தவர்களும், மருத்துவம் படிக்கும் தடையற்ற நிலை ஏற்படுத்தப்பட்டுக் கல்விசார் விடுதலை நிலைநாட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 335
impact_mechanism: This policy seeks to democratize higher education by removing traditional prerequisite-based entry barriers in favor of an open entrance exam.

promise_components.component: Anyone, regardless of basic education, can study in any field through an entrance exam.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes a radical overhaul of university admissions, delinking it from prior schooling. For professional degrees like medicine, this would conflict with national regulatory bodies (e.g., National Medical Commission) that mandate specific pre-medical education.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise has no specified financial outlay. Costs would arise from designing, validating, and administering a new, universal entrance exam system. data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a transformative structural proposal to redefine educational access. Its feasibility is extremely low due to conflicts with national laws, professional body regulations, and the practical challenges of preparing students from diverse backgrounds for specialized fields.

promise_text_en: Special classes on Career Management will be introduced for students in the ninth and eleventh grades.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்பது மற்றும் பதினோராம் வகுப்புகளில் மாணவர்களுக்குத் தொழில்சார் மேலாண்மை (Career Management) பற்றிய சிறப்புப் பாடங்கள் வைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 335
impact_mechanism: This initiative aims to improve students' employability by integrating career planning and management skills into the secondary school curriculum.

promise_components.component: Introduce special classes on Career Management for students in ninth and eleventh grades.
promise_components.analysis: This involves curriculum development, production of teaching materials, and teacher training for government schools. It would target a subset of the ~89 lakh government school students across ~53,000 schools. The specific number of students in grades 9 and 11 is not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for curriculum development and teacher training is not specified and cannot be calculated. However, as an addition to the existing education budget, it is likely to be a manageable expense.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural improvement to the education system that addresses the critical need for career guidance. By building skills early, it helps students make more informed choices, tackling a root cause of underemployment.
coverage_gap_note: The promise appears to target government school students, potentially leaving out students in private schools.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will provide financial assistance on a contractual basis to those pursuing higher education abroad. Their employment will be guaranteed, and their research knowledge will be utilized for the nation, with a contract preventing them from working elsewhere after receiving government aid.
