promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will prioritize promoting industrial job growth based on our water and land resources.
promise_text_ta: நீர்வளமும், நிலவளமும் சார்ந்த தொழிற்சாலை வேலைவாய்ப்பு வளர்ச்சியைத்தான் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முதன்மையாக முன்னெடுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 351
impact_mechanism: Aims to create employment by leveraging the state's natural resource endowments for industrial development.

promise_components.component: Promote industrial job growth based on our water and land resources.
promise_components.analysis: This is a general statement of economic policy, not a specific, measurable promise. It lacks details on what industries, what policies, or what level of investment is planned. It is too vague to analyze financially.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a broad policy goal, not a program with a defined budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Without any specific policies, programs, or targets, this is a generic statement of intent. Any government would claim to support job growth, making this a non-binding platitude rather than a concrete plan.

promise_text_en: We will develop land-based industries originating from the villages. This will ensure balanced economic growth for the nation.
promise_text_ta: சிற்றூர்களில் இருந்து மண் சார்ந்த தொழிலை வளர்த்தெடுப்போம். அதுதான் ஒரு நாட்டின் பொருளாதார வளர்ச்சி சம விழுக்காட்டில் இருப்பதை உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 355
impact_mechanism: Aims to reduce rural-urban migration and create local employment by fostering industries in rural areas.

promise_components.component: Develop land-based industries originating from the villages.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad policy direction focused on rural development, likely involving agro-processing or local crafts. It lacks specific, measurable actions or funding commitments, making a cost analysis impossible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends entirely on the specific programs (e.g., subsidies, infrastructure) that are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: If successfully implemented with concrete policies, fostering a robust rural industrial base would be a fundamental solution to regional imbalance and rural unemployment. It addresses the root cause of economic migration.
coverage_gap_note: The focus on 'land-based' industries may not address the needs of non-agrarian rural populations or the urban poor.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will reverse the harmful trend of privatization and follow the path of a self-reliant green economic policy, which will serve as the backbone for the people of the state.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு இந்தக் கேடு விளைவிக்கும் [தனியார்மயமாக்கல்] போக்கைக் களைந்து, மாநில மக்களின் முதுகெலும்பாக அமையும் வகையில் தற்சார்புப் பசுமைப் பொருளாதாரக் கொள்கையின் வழி பயணிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 355
impact_mechanism: Shifts the economic model away from private sector dominance towards state control and environmental sustainability.

promise_components.component: Reverse the harmful trend of privatization.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major ideological statement. A literal reversal (e.g., nationalization) would involve immense and incalculable costs, legal battles, and economic disruption.

promise_components.component: Follow the path of a self-reliant green economic policy.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad, undefined goal for the entire economy. It lacks specific programs or targets to analyze.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of 'reversing privatization' would be astronomical and is not specified. It is not a feasible budget item.
sustainability_reasoning: While framed as a structural change, large-scale reversal of privatization is practically undeliverable and functions as a strong political signal. The 'green economy' goal is too vague to be considered a concrete plan.
coverage_gap_note: A policy of reversing privatization could negatively impact private sector investment, employment, and overall economic growth.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will ensure quality education, healthcare, employment, and livelihood for villagers, located near their own homes.
promise_text_ta: சிற்றூர் மக்களுக்கு அவர்களின் வாழ்விடத்திற்கு அருகிலேயே தரமான கல்வியையும், மருத்துவத்தையும், வேலைவாய்ப்பையும், வாழ்வாதாரத்தையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 359
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve the quality of life and economic opportunity in rural areas, making them more viable places to live and work.

promise_components.component: Ensure quality education, healthcare, employment, and livelihood for villagers, located near their own homes.
promise_components.analysis: This is a comprehensive but extremely general promise covering multiple core governance areas. Improving quality across ~53,000 government schools and an entire rural healthcare network, plus ensuring local employment, is a statement of ambition, not a specific plan. The costs are not specified but would be enormous.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a collection of broad, uncosted goals that would span multiple government departments and require massive, long-term investment.
sustainability_reasoning: These are foundational investments in human capital and local economies. If achieved, they would address the root causes of rural distress and inequality in a lasting way.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is explicitly focused on villagers and does not address parallel issues of quality of life and services in urban areas.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will institutionalize and declare as government work all major rural economic activities, including agriculture, livestock rearing, fisheries, poultry, sericulture, beekeeping, and various forms of weaving.
promise_text_ta: சிற்றூர்களின் பொருளாதாரத்தில் பெரும்பங்கான வேளாண்மை, ஆடு மாடு வளர்த்தல், மீன் வளர்த்தல், கோழி வளர்த்தல், பட்டுப்பூச்சி வளர்த்தல், தேனீக்கள் வளர்த்தல், பாய் பின்னுதல், கட்டில் பின்னுதல், கூடை முடைதல், நெசவு செய்தல் உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்தையும் நிறுவனமயமாக்கி அரசுப் பணியாக நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அறிவிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 359
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide income security to rural workers by making their primary economic activities a form of government employment.

promise_components.component: Institutionalize and declare as government work all major rural economic activities (agriculture, livestock, fisheries, etc.).
promise_components.analysis: This implies providing a state-guaranteed salary or wage to all workers in these sectors. The number of beneficiaries is vast, including at least 83 lakh farmer households, plus others in fisheries, weaving, etc. The definition of 'government work' and the associated pay scale are not defined, making a precise calculation impossible. A minimal, illustrative calculation for one worker per farmer household receiving the MGNREGS wage for 100 days would be: 83,00,000 people × ₹294/day × 100 days = ₹24,402 crore/year. The actual cost would be significantly higher.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is too vaguely defined to cost accurately. A highly conservative estimate for only a fraction of the target group already exceeds ₹24,402 crore, which is 18.8% of the discretionary budget. The true cost is likely unaffordable.
sustainability_reasoning: This attempts to fundamentally restructure the rural economy by replacing market-based farm income with a state-guaranteed income floor. It addresses the root cause of income volatility but involves unprecedented state intervention and enormous fiscal outlay.
coverage_gap_note: The promise focuses on primary production sectors, potentially leaving out rural workers in service, trade, or processing industries.

promise_text_en: By establishing factories in relevant regions, the domestic economy will be improved by creating value-added products such as coconut oil, processing and exporting tender coconut as a safe beverage, and making coir, cots, and mattresses from coconut fiber.
promise_text_ta: அந்தந்தப் பகுதிகளில் தொழிற்சாலைகளை நிறுவி தேங்காய் எண்ணெய் எடுப்பது, இளநீரைப் பதப்படுத்தி பாதுகாப்பான குளிர்பருகமாக மாற்றி ஏற்றுமதி செய்வது, தேங்காய் நாரைக் கொண்டு கயிறு திரிப்பது, கட்டில் செய்வது, படுக்கை செய்வது உள்ளிட்ட பல மதிப்புக்கூட்டப்பட்ட பொருள்களாக்கி உள்நாட்டுப் பொருளாதாரம் மேம்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 359
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to increase farmer incomes and create local employment by establishing state-supported agro-processing industries for coconut products.

promise_components.component: Establish factories in relevant regions for value-added coconut products (oil, beverages, coir).
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise to build industrial assets. The number, scale, and cost of these factories are not specified. Beneficiaries would be coconut farmers and factory workers in coconut-growing regions. Data on the number of coconut farmers or the cost of such factories is unavailable, so a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total fiscal impact depends on the number and size of factories to be established, which is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a key structural issue in agriculture: the lack of value addition at the local level. By creating processing infrastructure, it helps farmers capture a larger share of the final product's value, leading to more sustainable income.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in coconut-growing regions and for farmers of that specific crop, leaving out other agricultural communities.

promise_text_en: Rainwater harvesting and the rejuvenation of ponds, tanks, and lakes will be implemented as an integrated project. A water resource management committee will be formed in every village to ensure water is used without wastage.
promise_text_ta: மழைநீர்ச் சேகரிப்பு, ஊருணிகள், குளங்கள், ஏரிகள் சீரமைத்தல் ஆகியவை ஒருங்கிணைந்த திட்டமாகச் செயல்படுத்தப்படும். ஒவ்வொரு சிற்றூரிலும் நீர்வள மேலாண்மைக் குழு அமைக்கப்பட்டு, நீர் வீணாகாமல் பயன்படுவது உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 359
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve water security for agriculture and domestic use by restoring water bodies and creating local water governance structures.

promise_components.component: Implement an integrated project for rainwater harvesting and rejuvenation of ponds, tanks, and lakes.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital works for desilting, bund strengthening, and improving inlet channels for an unspecified number of water bodies across the state. The cost cannot be calculated without data on the number and condition of these water bodies.

promise_components.component: Form a water resource management committee in every village.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance reform with minimal direct financial cost, aimed at improving local management and equitable distribution of water resources. The number of villages is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of rejuvenating an unknown number of water bodies across the state cannot be estimated. The formation of committees has a negligible fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the fundamental issue of water scarcity and mismanagement. Restoring water bodies and creating local governance are long-term investments in natural infrastructure that create lasting benefits for agriculture and rural livelihoods.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is on rural water bodies; it does not directly address urban water management challenges.

promise_text_en: Every village will be transformed into a Digital Village with internet connectivity. E-governance services, digital payment systems, e-market access for farmers, and e-learning for students will be implemented.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு சிற்றூரும் இணைய வசதியுடன் கூடிய எண்மச் சிற்றூராக மாற்றப்படும். இணையவழி அரசு சேவைகள், எண்மக் கட்டண முறைகள், வேளாண் குடிகளுக்கான இணையவழிச் சந்தை அணுகல் (e-Market access), மாணவர்களுக்கான மின்னணுக் கற்றல் (e-learning) உள்ளிட்டவை நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 359
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to bridge the rural-urban divide by providing digital infrastructure and services to every village.

promise_components.component: Transform every village into a Digital Village with internet connectivity.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital-intensive infrastructure project. The number of villages requiring new or upgraded connectivity is not specified in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated. This would likely build upon existing central schemes like BharatNet.

promise_components.component: Implement e-governance, digital payments, e-market access, and e-learning.
promise_components.analysis: This involves developing and deploying software platforms and providing last-mile support for service delivery. The cost is dependent on the infrastructure rollout and is not calculable from the available data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of providing last-mile internet connectivity and digital services to an unspecified number of villages cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: Digital connectivity is foundational infrastructure for a modern economy. It addresses the root cause of information and opportunity asymmetry between rural and urban areas, enabling long-term improvements in education, market access, and governance.
coverage_gap_note: While aiming for all villages, gaps in digital literacy could exclude the elderly and less-educated from the benefits.

promise_text_en: The economic foundation of rural women will be strengthened through self-help groups, small business loans, and market linkages. A direct government procurement system will be established for businesses run by women.
promise_text_ta: சிற்றூர்களைச் சார்ந்த பெண்களின் கடின உழைப்பினை தன்னுதவிக் குழுக்கள், சிறு தொழில் கடன்கள், சந்தை இணைப்புகள் மூலம் பொருளாதார அடிப்படையில் வலுப்படுத்துதல் முதன்மையானது. இதன் தேவையைக் கருதி பெண்கள் நடத்தும் தொழில்களுக்கு அரசின் நேரடிக் கொள்முதல் (Government Procurement) முறை உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 361
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to boost the economic independence of rural women by strengthening the SHG ecosystem with credit and guaranteed market access.

promise_components.component: Strengthen rural women's economic foundation through self-help groups, small business loans, and market linkages.
promise_components.analysis: This builds on the existing network of ~4.7 lakh SHGs with ~63 lakh members. The promise implies expanding credit facilities and support services. The total quantum of loans or financial outlay is not specified, so the cost is incalculable.

promise_components.component: Establish a direct government procurement system for businesses run by women.
promise_components.analysis: This creates a dedicated market channel. The fiscal impact depends on the volume of goods procured, which is not defined. It would also have administrative setup costs.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The financial outlay for the loan program and the scale of the government procurement system are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise moves beyond simple support to creating structural enablers for women's entrepreneurship: access to capital (loans) and access to markets (procurement). This fosters economic independence, addressing a root cause of gender inequality and poverty.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are targeted at rural women involved in SHGs and small businesses, excluding urban women or those not in organized groups.

promise_text_en: Technical training, ITI/Skill Centers, and guidance for starting new businesses (Start-ups) will be provided to rural youth to control migration to cities in search of jobs.
promise_text_ta: தொழில்நுட்பப் பயிற்சி, ITI / Skill Centers, புதிய தொழில்கள் (Start-up) தொடங்குவதற்கான பயிற்சியும், அறிவுரைகளும் வழங்கப்படும். இதனால் வேலை தேடி நகரங்களை நோக்கிச் செல்லும் நிலை கட்டுப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 361
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to reduce rural-urban migration for jobs by equipping rural youth with locally relevant technical and entrepreneurial skills.

promise_components.component: Provide technical training, ITI/Skill Centers to rural youth.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital and operational expenditure to establish or expand skill development centers in rural areas. The number of centers or targeted trainees is not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Provide guidance for starting new businesses (Start-ups).
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating mentorship and incubation support systems. The cost is dependent on the scale and is not calculable from available data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost depends on the number of new skill centers, the number of trainees, and the scope of the start-up support programs, none of which are specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of unemployment and distress migration by tackling the skill gap. Providing skills and entrepreneurial support creates pathways to local employment and wealth creation, which is a sustainable, long-term solution.
coverage_gap_note: The success of this program depends on the local economy's ability to generate jobs that match the new skills, which is not guaranteed.

promise_text_en: To ensure farmers' incomes multiply through value addition activities like processing, packaging, and direct marketing, Agro-Processing Units will be established in all villages.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண்மை என்பது விளைச்சலுடன் நிற்காமல், அதனைப் பதப்படுத்துதல், பொதியிடுதல், நேரடியாகச் சந்தைப்படுத்துதல் போன்றவற்றைச் செய்தால் வேளாண் குடிகளின் வருமானம் பன்மடங்கு உயரும். அதை உறுதி செய்யும் வகையில் அனைத்துச் சிற்றூர்களிலும் வேளாண் செயலாக்க மையங்கள் (Agro-Processing Units) அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 361
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to significantly increase farmer incomes by creating a hyper-local network of processing facilities for value addition.

promise_components.component: Establish Agro-Processing Units in all villages.
promise_components.analysis: This is a massive capital expenditure promise. The number of villages in Tamil Nadu is not in the reference data (but is over 12,500). The cost per unit is also unknown. Establishing a unit in every single village, regardless of agricultural surplus or logistics, would be an immense undertaking. The cost cannot be calculated but would be extremely high.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of villages and cost per unit are unknown. However, given the scale ('in all villages'), the total cost would certainly run into thousands of crores, placing extreme stress on the state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Like other value-addition promises, this addresses a root cause of low farm income. However, the 'one-size-fits-all' approach of one unit per village is economically inefficient and risks creating non-viable assets, undermining the sustainability of the initiative.
coverage_gap_note: An 'all villages' approach may neglect the benefits of creating larger, more efficient processing hubs in strategic locations based on crop clusters.

promise_text_en: Traditional occupations like pottery and carpentry will be institutionalized and industries will be started. Model catalogs for these industries will be provided to buyers, and products will be manufactured on a contract basis according to their preferences.
promise_text_ta: மண்பானை செய்வது, தச்சு வேலை செய்வது போன்ற மரபுசார் தொழில்கள் நிறுவனமயமாக்கப்பட்டுத் தொழிற்சாலைகள் தொடங்கப்படும். அந்தத் தொழில்கள் தொடர்பான மாதிரிப் புத்தகங்கள் கொள்முதலாளர்களுக்கு வழங்கப்பட்டு, ஒப்பந்தத்தின் அடிப்படையில் அவர்களின் விருப்பத்திற்கேற்றவாரு பொருள்கள் உருவாக்கித் தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 361
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to revive and formalize traditional craft-based economies by creating organized industries and providing direct market linkages.

promise_components.component: Institutionalize traditional occupations like pottery and carpentry and start industries.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital investment to create organized production centers. The number of industries and their scale are not specified. The number of artisans is also not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Provide model catalogs and manufacture products on a contract basis for buyers.
promise_components.analysis: This positions the government as a market aggregator and facilitator, a role with administrative costs. The potential volume of business is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of establishing an unspecified number of industries and the administrative overhead of the marketing system cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the decline of traditional livelihoods by attempting to modernize their business model, from production to marketing. Creating organized industries and a formal order book provides a sustainable alternative to dwindling local markets.
coverage_gap_note: The promise names only pottery and carpentry, potentially leaving out numerous other traditional artisan communities.

promise_text_en: The weaving industry will be expanded beyond a specific community by establishing "weaving groves." Training and necessary raw materials will be provided to all people, and the government itself will market the products.
promise_text_ta: நெசவு ஒரு குறிப்பிட்டச் சமூகம் செய்யும் வேலை என்பதனை மாற்றி, அதனை விரிவுப்படுத்தி நெசவுச்சோலைத் தொடங்கப்படும். அனைத்து மக்களுக்கும் பயிற்சியும், தேவைப்படும் மூலப்பொருள்களும் வழங்கி நெசவுத் தொழில் வளர்க்கப்படும். அப்பொருள்களை அரசே சந்தைப்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 361
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to revitalize and expand the weaving industry by creating new training infrastructure and a state-led marketing channel.

promise_components.component: Establish 'weaving groves' to provide training to all people.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure for new centers and operational costs for training programs. The number of 'groves' and trainees is not specified.

promise_components.component: Provide necessary raw materials.
promise_components.analysis: This implies a subsidy or in-kind support scheme. The cost depends on the number of weavers supported and is not calculable.

promise_components.component: The government itself will market the products.
promise_components.analysis: This requires setting up a state-run procurement and retail operation, with significant administrative and logistical costs. The potential volume is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The scale of the 'weaving groves', the raw material subsidy, and the government marketing operation are all undefined.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise attempts a structural fix by creating a complete, state-supported value chain for the weaving industry. However, its success is highly dependent on the government's ability to manage training, production, and fashion-sensitive marketing effectively, which is a significant challenge.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is exclusively on the weaving industry, excluding other textile and craft sectors.

promise_text_en: Urbanization cannot be stopped without developing the rural economy. The Naam Tamilar government will focus on reviving the rural economy by creating employment opportunities using local resources within people's habitats.
promise_text_ta: சிற்றூர்களின் பொருளாதாரத்தை வளர்க்காமல் நகரமயமாதலைத் தடுக்க முடியாது. நகரமயமாதலைத் தடுக்காவிட்டால் நாடு முழுமையான வளர்ச்சியை அடையாது. இதனால், மக்களின் வாழ்விடங்களிலேயே உள்ள வளங்களைக் கொண்டு வேலைவாய்ப்பைப் பெருக்கிச் சிற்றூர்களின் பொருளாதாரத்தை மீட்டெடுப்பதில் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மிகுந்த கவனம் செலுத்திப் பணியாற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 361
impact_mechanism: This is a statement of governing philosophy that frames rural economic development as the primary tool to manage urbanization.

promise_components.component: Focus on reviving the rural economy by creating employment opportunities using local resources.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad statement of intent, not a specific, measurable action. It serves as the guiding principle for other, more concrete promises related to agriculture, skilling, and rural industry. It has no discrete components to analyze or cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Not applicable. This is a vision statement, not a costable program.
sustainability_reasoning: As a standalone item, this is a political statement of goals. Its substance and sustainability are entirely dependent on the specific, concrete policies (like establishing processing units or skill centers) implemented to achieve this vision. By itself, it has no material effect.

promise_text_en: Under the Naam Tamilar government, no permission will be granted to any industry that could harm soil and water resources.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சியில் மண் வளம், நீர் வளம் ஆகியவற்றைப் பாதிக்கக்கூடிய எந்தத் தொழிற்சாலைக்கும் அனுமதி கிடையாது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 363
impact_mechanism: Prevents future environmental degradation by using state licensing power to block polluting industries.

promise_components.component: Prohibit new industrial permits for any industry that could harm soil and water resources.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory policy change, not a direct spending program. Its enforcement would depend on the legal definition of 'harm' and the capacity of state environmental agencies. No direct fiscal cost can be calculated from the provided data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a regulatory policy with potential indirect economic impacts (foregone investment) that are not quantifiable from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy aims to change the fundamental rules for industrial development to prioritize environmental protection. If enforced, it creates a lasting structural shift away from polluting industries, addressing the root cause of future pollution.
coverage_gap_note: This policy is forward-looking and does not address pollution from existing industries.

promise_text_en: Priority will be given to industries based on land and natural resources, thereby ensuring employment and growth.
promise_text_ta: நிலமும் வளமும் சார்ந்தத் தொழிற்சாலைகளுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்பட்டு அதனைக்கொண்டு வேலைவாய்ப்பும் வளர்ச்சியும் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 363
impact_mechanism: Fosters local employment and economic self-reliance by directing state support towards industries that utilize local resources.

promise_components.component: Give priority to industries based on land and natural resources.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of industrial policy direction. The term 'priority' is not defined in financial terms (e.g., subsidies, tax breaks), so a cost cannot be calculated. It implies a strategic shift towards primary and secondary sectors linked to the state's resource base.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is too vague to calculate a cost as 'priority' is not defined in financial terms.
sustainability_reasoning: This represents a long-term strategic choice for the state's economic development model. It aims to build an economy based on local endowments, which is a structural approach to creating localized growth and employment.
coverage_gap_note: May neglect the development of sectors not based on natural resources, such as high-tech services, potentially limiting economic diversification.

promise_text_en: Upgraded Vocational Training Centers will be established in all districts to provide training in contemporary technologies. This will ensure the creation of a skilled youth workforce for all sectors of future Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்து மாவட்டங்களிலும் மேம்படுத்தப்பட்டத் தொழிற் பயிற்சி நிலையங்கள் (Vocational Training Centers) நிறுவப்பட்டு, அங்குச் சமகாலத் தொழில்நுட்பப் பயிற்சிகள் வழங்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் வருங்காலத் தமிழகத்தின் அனைத்துத் துறைகளிலும் ஆற்றல்மிக்க இளைஞர்கள் உருவாவதை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 363
impact_mechanism: Improves youth employability by providing modern, technology-focused skills training across the state.

promise_components.component: Establish upgraded Vocational Training Centers in all districts to provide training in contemporary technologies.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital and operational expenditure. The number of districts in Tamil Nadu and the cost to establish or upgrade a single training center are not available in the reference data. Therefore, a total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost per center and the total number of districts are not specified in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in human capital by upgrading skills is a foundational economic strategy. It addresses the root cause of structural unemployment (skills mismatch) and creates a long-term asset for the economy.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to youth who can access and complete the training; it does not directly help those already in low-skill jobs without time for retraining.

promise_text_en: A committee of experts will be formed to provide proper guidance and training to entrepreneurs.
promise_text_ta: தொழில் தொடங்குவோருக்குத் தகுந்த வழிகாட்டுதல்களும், பயிற்சிகளும் அளித்து நெறிப்படுத்தவும் சிறந்த வல்லுநர்கள் குழு ஒன்று அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 363
impact_mechanism: Supports new businesses by providing access to expert guidance and mentorship through a state-appointed body.

promise_components.component: Form a committee of experts to provide proper guidance and training to entrepreneurs.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action. The cost would involve minor administrative expenses and potentially stipends for committee members. The exact cost is not quantifiable from the data but would be negligible.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct quantifiable cost. The administrative expense of running a committee would be negligible, likely less than 0.01% of the discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Forming a committee is a common political action that signals intent but often has limited tangible impact on the ground. It provides a support function but does not address structural barriers like access to capital or regulatory hurdles.
coverage_gap_note: The committee's guidance would likely be accessible to only a small, well-connected fraction of entrepreneurs, not the majority.

promise_text_en: Requests from entrepreneurs that are fair and conducive to development will be fulfilled immediately. There will be no hindrances or delays at any level of government, and grievances will be resolved promptly.
promise_text_ta: தொழில்முனைவோர் அரசிடம் வைக்கும் கோரிக்கைகள் சரியானதாகவும், வளர்ச்சிக்கானதாகவும் இருப்பின் அது உடனடியாகச் செய்து கொடுக்கப்படும். அவர்களுக்கு அரசின் எந்த மட்டத்திலும் தடையோ தொய்வோ இருக்காது. குறைகள் உடனுக்குடன் தீர்க்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 365
impact_mechanism: Accelerates business setup and operations by mandating a responsive and efficient bureaucracy free from delays.

promise_components.component: Immediately fulfill fair and development-conducive requests from entrepreneurs, eliminating hindrances and delays.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise of administrative reform and good governance. It carries no direct fiscal cost but requires significant political will to change bureaucratic culture and processes.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a governance promise focused on administrative efficiency.
sustainability_reasoning: Bureaucratic red tape is a root cause of slow business growth. A fundamental reform to create an efficient, non-obstructive bureaucracy would be a lasting structural improvement to the state's business environment.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are for entrepreneurs and business owners, not the general populace or salaried employees.

promise_text_en: The industrial sector will be made transparent, with procedures allowing entrepreneurs to track the status of their applications online. All industry-related requests will be completed within one week.
promise_text_ta: தொழில் துறையில், அனைத்தும் வெளிப்படையானதாக மாற்றி அமைக்கப்படும். தொழில் முனைவோர்களின் கோரிக்கை மற்றும் வேண்டுகோள் விண்ணப்பம் அல்லது முறையீடுகள் எந்த நிலையில் இருக்கிறது என கணினியிலே அறிந்து கொள்ளுமாறு நடைமுறைகள் கொண்டு வரப்படும். தொழில்துறை சார்ந்த கோரிக்கைகள் அனைத்தும் ஒரு கிழமைக்குள் (வாரத்திற்குள்) முடிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 365
impact_mechanism: Reduces corruption and delays for businesses by creating a transparent, time-bound digital approval system.

promise_components.component: Make the industrial sector transparent with online application tracking.
promise_components.analysis: This is an e-governance initiative. The cost of developing and maintaining an IT portal is not specified in the reference data but is typically a manageable one-time and recurring expense for a state government.

promise_components.component: Complete all industry-related requests within one week.
promise_components.analysis: This is a service-level promise. A one-week timeline for all requests, including complex ones requiring multi-departmental clearance, is highly ambitious and poses a significant implementation challenge.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for the IT portal is not in the reference data, but such projects are generally a small part of the budget. The primary challenge is administrative, not fiscal.
sustainability_reasoning: A transparent, digital, and time-bound system for government-business interactions is a fundamental governance reform. It targets the root causes of corruption and delay, making it a structural change.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is specific to the 'industrial sector,' potentially leaving out service sector or other types of entrepreneurs.

promise_text_en: Strict action will be taken against any industry, including leather and chemical plants, that pollutes the environment by discharging harmful waste. Alternative measures will be implemented to ensure industrial effluents do not harm soil and water resources.
promise_text_ta: தோல் மற்றும் வேதிப்பொருள்கள் உள்ளிட்ட எந்தத் தொழிற்சாலைகள் கேடு விளைவிக்கும் கழிவுகளை வெளியேற்றி சுற்றுச்சூழலை மாசுபடுத்தினாலும் கடும் நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும். தொழிற்சாலைக் கழிவுகள் மண் வளத்தையும், நீர் வளத்தையும் பாதிக்காத அளவிற்கு மாற்று நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 365
impact_mechanism: Protects the environment and public health by enforcing anti-pollution laws on existing industries.

promise_components.component: Take strict action against any industry that pollutes the environment.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory enforcement promise. It implies increased activity for the state's pollution control board. The cost of enhanced enforcement is not specified.

promise_components.component: Implement alternative measures to ensure industrial effluents do not harm soil and water.
promise_components.analysis: This could involve funding for infrastructure like common effluent treatment plants. The cost for these measures is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of enhanced enforcement and the 'alternative measures' for effluent treatment are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Consistent, strong enforcement of environmental laws changes the long-term behavior of industries, addressing the root cause of ongoing pollution. It creates a new, sustainable equilibrium where compliance is the norm.
coverage_gap_note: Does not address non-industrial pollution sources like agricultural runoff or untreated municipal sewage.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will prioritize encouraging local entrepreneurs over foreign investment. Malpractices in state industrial corporations like ELCOT, TIDCO, and SIPCOT will be eliminated, and they will be transformed into platforms for fostering new technology-based entrepreneurs.
promise_text_ta: அயல்நாட்டு முதலீடுகளைவிட, உள்ளூர் மக்களின் தொழில் ஆர்வத்தை ஊக்குவிப்பதற்கும், புதிய தொழில்முனைவோரை உருவாக்குவதற்கும் ‘நாம் தமிழர் அரசு’ முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கும். தற்போது செயல்பாட்டில் உள்ள எல்காட் (ELCOT), டிட்கோ (TIDCO), சிப்காட் (SIPCOT) போன்ற அரசுத் தொழில் நிறுவனங்களில் நிலவும் முறைகேடுகளைக் களைந்து, அவை புதிய தொழில்நுட்பம் சார்ந்த தொழில்முனைவோரை உருவாக்குவதற்கான தளங்களாக மாற்றியமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 365
impact_mechanism: Fosters a self-reliant industrial base by redirecting state support from foreign to local businesses and reforming state agencies.

promise_components.component: Prioritize encouraging local entrepreneurs over foreign investment.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major shift in economic policy towards a more protectionist or nationalist model. It has no direct cost but carries significant indirect economic implications (e.g., potential reduction in FDI).

promise_components.component: Eliminate malpractices in state corporations (ELCOT, TIDCO, SIPCOT) and transform them into platforms for new tech entrepreneurs.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance reform promise targeting state-owned enterprises. The challenge is administrative and political, not financial.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a policy and governance promise with unquantifiable economic consequences.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a strategic reorientation of the state's entire industrial policy, moving from an FDI-friendly model to a local-first model. This is a deep, structural change with long-term consequences for the state's economy.
coverage_gap_note: The policy could inadvertently harm workers and consumers in sectors that currently benefit from foreign investment and technology.

promise_text_en: Under the Naam Tamilar government, a separate division will be created for young scientists and new inventors. This division will encourage their efforts and provide immediate assistance.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சியில் இளம் அறிவியலாளர்களுக்கும், புதிய கண்டுபிடிப்பாளர்களுக்கும் தனிப்பிரிவு ஒன்று தொடங்கப்படும். அந்தப் பிரிவு, புதிய கண்டுபிடிப்பாளர்களின் முயற்சிக்கு ஊக்கமளித்து உடனுக்குடனான உதவிகளைச் செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 365
impact_mechanism: Promotes innovation by creating a dedicated government body to support and fund young scientists and inventors.

promise_components.component: Create a separate division for young scientists and new inventors to provide encouragement and immediate assistance.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new government entity. The cost would include administrative overhead plus a fund for providing 'assistance'. The size of this fund is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The budget for the new division and its assistance fund is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: An institutionalized support system for R&D is a structural element of a modern, knowledge-based economy. It addresses the lack of early-stage support for innovators and aims to build a permanent capacity for innovation.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to those in science and technology fields, not other forms of innovation (e.g., social, business process).

promise_text_en: If an individual cannot start a business alone, a mechanism will be created to bring multiple investors together. If more capital is required, the government will provide a significant amount and become a shareholder to help run the industry successfully.
promise_text_ta: ஒருவரால் தொழில் தொடங்க இயலாது என்றால் பல முதலாளிகளைக் கூட்டாகச் சேர்த்து முதலீடு செய்ய வழிவகை செய்யப்படும். மேலும் பணம் தேவை என்றால் அரசே பெரும் தொகையைக் கொடுத்துத் தன்னையும் ஒரு பங்குதாரராக இணைத்துக் கொண்டு, தொழிற்சாலையை வெற்றியோடு நடத்த உதவியாக நிற்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 366
impact_mechanism: De-risks and enables larger-scale entrepreneurship by providing government equity funding when private capital is insufficient.

promise_components.component: Create a mechanism to bring multiple investors together.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative function to facilitate investment syndication.

promise_components.component: If more capital is required, the government will provide a significant amount and become a shareholder.
promise_components.analysis: This establishes a state-led co-investment fund. The amount of capital the government would commit is stated as 'significant' but not quantified, so the fiscal impact is unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise to provide a 'significant amount' of capital is not quantified. This could require a substantial capital fund of unknown size.
sustainability_reasoning: This establishes a new role for the state in the capital market, fundamentally altering the financing landscape for entrepreneurs. It is a structural intervention to fix a market failure (capital gaps for large projects).
coverage_gap_note: This model helps capital-intensive businesses but does not address the credit needs of micro-entrepreneurs or those in the informal sector.

promise_text_en: Encouragement and support, including loan facilities, will be provided to start businesses based on successfully developed new software.
promise_text_ta: வெற்றிகரமாக உருவாக்கப்பட்ட புதிய மென்பொருள்களுக்குக் கடன் வசதியுடன் தொழில் தொடங்க ஊக்கமும் ஆக்கமும் அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 367
impact_mechanism: Fostering entrepreneurship in the technology sector by providing financial support in the form of loans.

promise_components.component: Provide encouragement, support, and loan facilities to start businesses based on new software.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is to provide 'encouragement' and 'loan facilities'. The financial outlay is not specified. The cost is therefore not quantifiable from the promise text or reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost depends on the number of businesses supported and the average loan size, neither of which is specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative aims to build a self-sustaining ecosystem of technology companies by addressing a key barrier to entry: access to capital. It fosters long-term economic capacity rather than providing temporary relief.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are targeted at a small, highly-skilled group of software entrepreneurs, excluding other sectors and the general workforce.

promise_text_en: Renewable energy industries like solar power, wind power, and biogas will be promoted. In addition to power generation, ancillary industries such as solar panel manufacturing, maintenance, and storage technology will be developed to create employment for rural youth.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் சூரிய ஒளி மின்சாரம், காற்றாலை, உயிர் எரிகாற்று (Biogas) போன்ற புதுப்பிக்கத்தக்க ஆற்றல் சார்ந்த தொழில்கள் ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும். மின் உருவாக்கம் மட்டுமல்லாமல், சூரிய ஒளித் தகடு உருவாக்கம், பேணுதல், சேமிப்புத் தொழில்நுட்பம் போன்ற துணைத் தொழில்களும் வளர்த்தெடுக்கப்பட்டு ஊரக இளைஞர்களுக்கு வேலைவாய்ப்பு உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 367
impact_mechanism: Creating employment for rural youth by developing a domestic manufacturing and service industry for renewable energy.

promise_components.component: Promote renewable energy industries (solar, wind, biogas).
promise_components.analysis: The term 'promote' is not financially defined. The cost of incentives, subsidies, or investments is not specified and cannot be calculated from reference data.

promise_components.component: Develop ancillary industries (solar panel manufacturing, maintenance, storage).
promise_components.analysis: The cost to develop these capital-intensive industries is not specified. No data available to estimate the required investment.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of 'promoting' and 'developing' entire industrial sectors is not specified and would likely require massive public and private investment.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise aims to build long-term industrial capacity and create green jobs, addressing both economic and environmental challenges structurally. This is not a subsidy but an attempt to build a new economic sector.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in regions suitable for renewable energy generation and for individuals with the technical skills for this sector.

promise_text_en: Priority will be given to water management industries, including rainwater harvesting systems, wastewater treatment, and water recycling technology.
promise_text_ta: மழைநீர்ச் சேகரிப்பு அமைப்புகள், கழிவுநீர்த் தூய்மையாக்கம், நீர் மறுசுழற்சி தொழில்நுட்பம் போன்ற நீர் மேலாண்மை சார்ந்த தொழில்களுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 367
impact_mechanism: Improving long-term water security and creating a new industrial sector by prioritizing water technology businesses.

promise_components.component: Give priority to water management industries (rainwater harvesting, wastewater treatment, water recycling).
promise_components.analysis: The term 'priority' is not defined financially. It could mean policy support or financial incentives, but the cost is not specified and cannot be calculated from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The financial implications of giving 'priority' are not defined in the promise.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of water scarcity by building an industry around conservation and recycling. It's a long-term solution focused on infrastructure and technology, not temporary relief.
coverage_gap_note: Direct beneficiaries are entrepreneurs and workers in the water technology sector; the general population benefits indirectly from improved water management.

promise_text_en: Value-addition industries for organic agricultural produce, such as processing, storage, packaging, and marketing, will be promoted.
promise_text_ta: இயற்கை வேளாண் விளைச்சலுக்கான பதப்படுத்துதல், சேமிப்பு, பொதி கட்டுதல், சந்தைப்படுத்தல் போன்ற மதிப்புக் கூட்டல் தொழில்கள் ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 367
impact_mechanism: Increasing farmer income by creating local industries for processing and marketing agricultural products.

promise_components.component: Promote value-addition industries for organic agricultural produce (processing, storage, packaging, marketing).
promise_components.analysis: The cost of 'promotion' is not specified. The scale of support for processing units or marketing infrastructure is undefined and cannot be calculated from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks specific financial commitments for promoting these industries.
sustainability_reasoning: This aims to fix a structural problem in agriculture: low farm-gate prices. By helping farmers move up the value chain, it creates a sustainable path to higher incomes, rather than relying on subsidies.
coverage_gap_note: This initiative specifically targets organic farmers, potentially leaving out the vast majority of conventional farmers.

promise_text_en: Traditional industries such as handloom, pottery, woodwork, metal crafts, and products from palm and bamboo will be developed with improved designs to strengthen the local economy.
promise_text_ta: கைத்தறி, பானை, மரவேலை, மாளைக் (உலோக) கைவினை, பனை மற்றும் மூங்கில் பொருள்கள் போன்ற மரபுத் தொழில்கள் மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட வடிவமைப்புடன் வளர்த்தெடுக்கப்படும். இத்தொழில்கள் உள்ளூர் பொருளாதாரத்தை வலுப்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 367
impact_mechanism: Strengthening local economies and preserving cultural heritage by making traditional crafts economically viable.

promise_components.component: Develop traditional industries (handloom, pottery, etc.) with improved designs.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to 'develop' these industries through design improvement and other support is not specified. No data is available to estimate the cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is a statement of intent without specific, costable actions.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise seeks to address the economic decline of artisan communities by improving their products and market access. This is a structural attempt to make traditional livelihoods self-sustaining.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to artisan communities in specific traditional crafts, a small fraction of the total workforce.

promise_text_en: Industries that recycle materials such as plastic, electronic waste, and construction debris will be encouraged, thereby reducing the demand for new raw materials.
promise_text_ta: குழைமம், மின்னணுக் கழிவுகள், கட்டுமானக் கழிவுகள் போன்றவற்றை மறுசுழற்சி செய்யும் தொழில்கள் ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் புதிய மூலப்பொருள்களின் தேவை குறையும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 367
impact_mechanism: Creating a circular economy that generates employment while addressing waste management challenges.

promise_components.component: Encourage industries that recycle plastic, electronic waste, and construction debris.
promise_components.analysis: The financial value of the 'encouragement' (e.g., subsidies, tax breaks) is not specified. The cost cannot be calculated from the available data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise does not detail the financial mechanisms or scale of encouragement to be provided.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root problems of pollution and resource depletion by creating an economic structure to solve them. It aims to build a self-sustaining industry, not provide a temporary fix.
coverage_gap_note: The informal waste-picker community could be negatively impacted if not integrated into the formal recycling industry.

promise_text_en: Leveraging the state's abundant raw materials and favorable climate for silica, world-class glass and silica-based industries will be established to make Tamil Nadu a leading state in glass manufacturing.
promise_text_ta: மணலிலிருந்து பிரித்தெடுக்கப்படும் துகள்மண் (Silica)... இந்த வாய்ப்புகளைப் பயன்படுத்தி, உலகத் தரம் வாய்ந்த கண்ணாடி மற்றும் துகள் மண் சார்ந்த தொழிற்சாலைகளை நிறுவி, தமிழகத்தைக் கண்ணாடி உருவாக்கத்தில் ஒரு முன்னணி மாநிலமாக நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மாற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 369
impact_mechanism: Creating large-scale industrial employment by developing a major manufacturing sector based on local mineral resources.

promise_components.component: Establish world-class glass and silica-based industries.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to 'establish' world-class industries is not specified. This would involve immense capital, but the promise does not state the level of government investment versus private participation. No data available for estimation.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a high-cost industrial policy goal with no specified state budget allocation.
sustainability_reasoning: The goal is to create a new, durable pillar of the state's industrial economy. This is a classic structural approach to economic development, focused on building long-term productive capacity.
coverage_gap_note: Economic benefits would be concentrated in specific industrial zones and for those with relevant manufacturing skills.

promise_text_en: Industries producing Siddha medicine and traditional medicinal products will be developed based on Tamil Nadu's herbal resources. This will protect local resources and create opportunities for the global market.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் மூலிகை வளங்களை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்டு, சித்த மருத்துவம், மரபுசார் மருத்துவப் பொருள்கள் உருவாக்கும் தொழில்கள் வளர்க்கப்படும். இது உள்ளூர் வளங்களைப் பாதுகாத்து, உலகளாவிய சந்தைக்கும் வாய்ப்புகளை உருவாக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 369
impact_mechanism: Creating a niche global market and local jobs by commercializing Tamil Nadu's traditional herbal medicine.

promise_components.component: Develop industries producing Siddha medicine and traditional medicinal products.
promise_components.analysis: The cost to 'develop' this industry is not specified. The level of investment in manufacturing, branding, and certification is unknown and cannot be calculated from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is a statement of policy direction without a specific budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This aims to create a sustainable economic sector from an existing knowledge base. It focuses on building an industry, which is a long-term structural solution for creating value and jobs.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to those involved in the herbal and traditional medicine sector, a niche part of the economy.

promise_text_en: Priority will be given to advanced research in biotechnology to improve traditional Tamil medical systems and scientifically prove their effectiveness.
promise_text_ta: இத்துறையில் மேம்பட்ட ஆராய்ச்சிகள் மூலம் தமிழ் மரபுவழி மருத்துவ முறைகளை மேம்படுத்தவும், அவற்றின் செயல்திறனை அறிவியல் அடிப்படையில் மெய்ப்பிக்கவும் முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 369
impact_mechanism: Enhancing the economic potential of traditional medicine by providing scientific validation for its effectiveness.

promise_components.component: Give priority to advanced research in biotechnology to improve and scientifically prove traditional Tamil medical systems.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'priority' is not financially defined. The budget for R&D is not specified and cannot be calculated from reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise does not allocate a specific budget for research and development.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root barrier—lack of scientific validation—that limits the market for traditional medicine. Investing in R&D is a foundational, structural step to unlock long-term economic potential.
coverage_gap_note: Direct beneficiaries are researchers and the Siddha industry; wider economic benefits are contingent on successful research outcomes.

promise_text_en: Industries like rural tourism, eco-tourism, and cultural tourism will be promoted, as they provide direct income to local people.
promise_text_ta: ஊரகச் சுற்றுலா, இயற்கைச் சுற்றுலா, பண்பாட்டுச் சுற்றுலாப் போன்ற தொழில்கள் ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும். இது உள்ளூர் மக்களுக்கு நேரடி வருமானம் அளிக்கும் தொழில்களாக இருக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 369
impact_mechanism: Diversifying rural economies and providing direct income to local populations through tourism development.

promise_components.component: Promote rural, eco, and cultural tourism.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of 'promotion' is not specified. It could range from marketing campaigns to infrastructure investment, but no figures are provided or available in reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is a policy goal with no defined budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This seeks to create a new, sustainable service industry in rural areas, addressing the structural issue of over-reliance on agriculture. It aims to build a long-term source of income for local communities.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are geographically concentrated in areas with tourism potential, and may not reach all rural communities.

promise_text_en: A permanent ban will be imposed on environmentally harmful plastic products. To replace them, the production of natural alternatives from palm, areca, and coconut husks will be encouraged, and upgraded factories for this purpose will be established throughout the state.
promise_text_ta: சுற்றுச்சூழலைச் சீரழிக்கும் நெகிழிப் பொருட்களுக்கு (Plastics) நிலையான தடை விதிக்கப்பட்டு, அதற்கு மாற்றாகப் பனை, பாக்கு மற்றும் தென்னை மட்டையினாலான இயற்கை சார்ந்த பொருள்கள் உருவாக்க ஊக்குவிக்கப்படும். இதற்கான மேம்படுத்தப்பட்ட தொழிற்சாலைகள் மாநிலம் முழுவதும் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 369
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to reduce plastic pollution by banning harmful plastics and creating a state-supported industry for biodegradable alternatives.

promise_components.component: Impose a permanent ban on environmentally harmful plastic products.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory action. The cost is administrative and for enforcement, which cannot be calculated from the available data.

promise_components.component: Establish upgraded factories to produce natural alternatives from palm, areca, and coconut husks.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise. The number of factories and the cost per factory are not specified. Cost is incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of establishing an unspecified number of factories is unknown. Therefore, the promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy attempts a fundamental shift in material usage by replacing a polluting product with a sustainable alternative. It addresses the environmental problem at its source rather than managing waste, but success depends on the economic viability and scale of the alternatives.
coverage_gap_note: The policy could negatively impact workers and small businesses in the existing plastics industry if the transition is not supported with alternative employment or retraining.

promise_text_en: New technology parks will be established in cities including Tiruvannamalai, Coimbatore, Salem, Trichy, Madurai, and Nagercoil.
promise_text_ta: திருவண்ணாமலை, கோவை, சேலம், திருச்சி, மதுரை, நாகர்கோயில் ஆகிய நகரங்களில் புதிய தொழில்நுட்பப் பூங்காக்கள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 369
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to decentralize economic growth and create high-skill jobs by building technology infrastructure in tier-2 cities.

promise_components.component: Establish new technology parks in Tiruvannamalai, Coimbatore, Salem, Trichy, Madurai, and Nagercoil.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure for 6 technology parks. The cost per park is not specified in the reference data, so the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of establishing 6 technology parks is not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a long-term investment in physical infrastructure intended to attract private investment and create a self-sustaining ecosystem for high-value jobs. It is a structural approach to fostering regional economic development.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are geographically concentrated in the six specified cities and primarily target the educated, tech-focused workforce.

promise_text_en: New industrial parks will be established in various regions to create local jobs, reducing dependency on Chennai.
promise_text_ta: அந்தந்தப் பகுதியிலேயே வேலைகளைச் செய்ய புதிய தொழிற்பூங்காக்கள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 371
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to reduce regional economic disparity by creating industrial infrastructure and employment opportunities in areas outside of Chennai.

promise_components.component: Establish new industrial parks in various regions to create local jobs.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise. The number, locations, and scale of the industrial parks are not specified, making the cost incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: The scope and cost of the new industrial parks are undefined. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: By building industrial infrastructure in underserved regions, the government aims to create the conditions for private investment and local job creation. This is a structural solution to the problem of economic concentration in one metropolitan area.
coverage_gap_note: Rural and remote areas not selected for an industrial park will not see direct benefits from this specific initiative.

promise_text_en: The weaving industry will be revitalized with new technology to compete globally, and the art of weaving will be modernized with new standards and innovations.
promise_text_ta: நெசவைப் புதிய தொழில்நுட்பத்துடன் உலக நாடுகளோடு போட்டியிடக்கூடிய அளவிற்கு வளர்த்தெடுக்கும் நடவடிக்கைகளை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முன்னெடுக்கும். புதிய தரத்தில் புதுமைகளோடு நெசவுக்கலை மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 371
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to improve the economic viability of a traditional sector by investing in technology and modernizing production standards.

promise_components.component: Revitalize the weaving industry with new technology, standards, and innovations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy and investment promise. The terms 'revitalize' and 'modernize' are not quantified. The cost of technology investment, training, or R&D is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The specific programs or investments are not detailed, so a cost cannot be estimated. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: The focus on technology and innovation attempts to address the core problem of the weaving industry's declining competitiveness in a global market. This is a structural fix aimed at improving productivity and market access, not a temporary subsidy.
coverage_gap_note: May not benefit traditional weavers who are unable or unwilling to adopt new technologies or production standards.

promise_text_en: Textile technology parks will be established in Tiruppur, Erode, and Coimbatore. Weaving will be designated a government job, and handloom sector workers will be recognized as government employees.
promise_text_ta: திருப்பூர், ஈரோடு, கோவை ஆகிய பகுதிகளில் நெசவுத் தொழில்நுட்பப் பூங்காக்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். நெசவு அரசுப்பணியாக மாற்றப்பட்டு கைத்தறித் துறை தொழிலாளர்கள் அரசு ஊழியர்களாக ஏற்கப்படுவர்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 371
impact_mechanism: This policy seeks to support the textile sector by creating new infrastructure and providing absolute job security to handloom workers by absorbing them into the government workforce.

promise_components.component: Establish textile technology parks in Tiruppur, Erode, and Coimbatore.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure for 3 parks. The cost per park is not specified, so the total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Designate weaving as a government job and recognize handloom sector workers as government employees.
promise_components.analysis: This would create a massive, permanent recurring expenditure for salaries and pensions. The number of handloom workers is not available in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated, but it would be extremely high.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is uncosted as the number of handloom workers is unknown. However, making an entire sector government employees would create an enormous and likely unsustainable recurring fiscal liability, severely straining the state's discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides income security to workers but does not fix the underlying economic viability of the handloom sector. It treats the symptom (low income) by creating a permanent fiscal dependency on the state budget, rather than making the industry self-sustaining.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes powerloom workers and other employees in the broader textile industry who are not part of the handloom sector.

promise_text_en: Priority will be given to Tamil entrepreneurs over foreign and out-of-state capitalists. The government itself will provide low-interest loans and become a shareholder to support the success of these factories.
promise_text_ta: வெளிநாட்டு, வெளிமாநில பெருமுதலாளிகளுக்குப் போட்டியாக, தமிழ்நாட்டுத் தொழில் முனைவோருக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும். நாம் தமிழர் அரசே குறைந்த வட்டிக்குக் கடன் கொடுத்துத் தன்னையும் ஒரு பங்குதாரராக இணைத்துக்கொண்டு, தொழிற்சாலையை வெற்றிகரமாக நடத்தத் துணை நிற்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 371
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to foster a local industrial base by providing preferential access to state-backed capital for Tamil entrepreneurs.

promise_components.component: Give priority to Tamil entrepreneurs over foreign and out-of-state capitalists.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy directive with no direct calculable cost. 'Priority' is undefined.

promise_components.component: Provide low-interest loans and become a shareholder in factories run by Tamil entrepreneurs.
promise_components.analysis: This implies creating a new lending and equity investment fund. The total size of the fund, interest subsidy, and capital outlay are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The scale of the loan program and equity investments is not defined. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise aims to fix a capital access problem for local businesses, which is a structural barrier to growth. However, implementation carries high risks of favoritism, poor investment choices, and potential legal challenges.
coverage_gap_note: The definition of 'Tamil entrepreneur' is not provided and could be contentious. The policy explicitly excludes non-Tamil entrepreneurs within the state.

promise_text_en: The large-scale leather and footwear industries in Ambur, Vellore district, will be upgraded. Local entrepreneurs will be encouraged to create their own brands to compete with international companies.
promise_text_ta: வேலூர் மாவட்டம் ஆம்பூரில் உள்ள பெரும் அளவிலான தோல் மற்றும் காலணித் தொழிற்கூடங்கள் மேம்படுத்தப்படும். அங்கு உள்ளூர் முதலாளிகள், தங்கள் பெயரிலேயே சொந்தமாக உருவாக்கிப் பன்னாட்டு நிறுவனங்களோடு போட்டியிட ஊக்கப்படுத்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 371
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to move a key regional industry up the value chain by investing in upgrades and promoting local brand ownership.

promise_components.component: Upgrade the large-scale leather and footwear industries in Ambur, Vellore district.
promise_components.analysis: This is an investment promise. The term 'upgrade' is not defined, and the associated cost for infrastructure or technology is not specified.

promise_components.component: Encourage local entrepreneurs to create their own brands.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy support measure. The term 'encourage' is not defined, and any associated costs for marketing or subsidies are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The nature and scale of the 'upgrade' and 'encouragement' are not defined. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy focuses on improving the competitiveness and value capture of an existing industrial cluster. Shifting from contract manufacturing to brand ownership is a structural change that aims for higher, more sustainable economic returns.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are geographically concentrated in the Ambur/Vellore region and sectorally focused on the leather and footwear industry.

promise_text_en: All types of unhealthy soft drinks will be banned. To replace them, factories will be established to export beverages like tender coconut water, fruit juice, palm nectar (padhaneer), and palmyra fruit (nungu).
promise_text_ta: உடல்நலத்திற்குக் கேடான அனைத்து வகை குளிர்பருகங்களும் தடை செய்யப்படும். அதற்கு மாற்றாக இளநீர், பழச்சாறு, பதநீர், நுங்கு போன்ற பருகங்களை ஏற்றுமதி செய்தவற்கானத் தொழிற்சாலைகள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 372
impact_mechanism: This policy attempts to influence public health and promote local agriculture through a ban on certain beverages and state-led production of alternatives.

promise_components.component: Ban all types of unhealthy soft drinks.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory action. The term 'unhealthy soft drinks' is undefined. The cost is administrative and for enforcement.

promise_components.component: Establish factories to export beverages like tender coconut water, fruit juice, and palm nectar.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure promise. The number and cost of factories are not specified, making the cost incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of establishing an unspecified number of factories is unknown. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Banning a vaguely defined product category is a form of political signalling that is difficult to implement and enforce. While promoting local products is a structural goal, linking it to a populist ban makes the promise more about optics than a viable economic or health strategy.
coverage_gap_note: A ban would negatively impact the entire soft drink supply chain, from manufacturing to small retail shops, affecting existing jobs and businesses.

promise_text_en: Agro-food processing stations and training centers will be established near major cities, making the export of organically grown agricultural products a primary industry.
promise_text_ta: பெருநகரங்களை ஒட்டி வேளாண் உணவு பதப்படுத்தும் நிலையங்கள் மற்றும் பயிற்சி மையங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும். இதன்மூலம் இயற்கை முறையில் விளைவிக்கப்பட்ட வேளாண் பொருள்களின் ஏற்றுமதியை முதன்மைத் தொழிலாக நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மாற்றியமைக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 372
impact_mechanism: This policy seeks to increase farm incomes and export revenues by building critical post-harvest infrastructure and providing relevant skills training.

promise_components.component: Establish agro-food processing stations and training centers near major cities.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure and skill development promise. The number of stations and centers, and their associated costs, are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The number of facilities and their cost are not defined. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a fundamental weakness in the agricultural economy: the lack of a value chain for processing and marketing. Creating processing infrastructure and providing training helps farmers capture more value and access new markets.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are targeted at farmers, particularly organic growers, located near major cities, potentially leaving out those in more remote agricultural areas.

promise_text_en: Approvals for builders' project applications will be granted within fifteen days, with the entire process being online. The maximum time for granting approval will be one month.
promise_text_ta: கட்டுநர்கள் செயல்திட்ட விண்ணப்பங்களுக்கு பதினைந்து நாள்களுக்குள் அனுமதி வழங்கப்படும். விண்ணப்ப முறை அனைத்தும் இணைய வழியில் கண்காணிக்கப்படும். அதிக அளவாக ஒரு மாதத்திற்குள் கட்டுநர்களுக்கான அனுமதியை வழங்கியாக வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 372
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to stimulate the construction sector and improve the ease of doing business by mandating a rapid, online-only approval process.

promise_components.component: Grant approvals for builders' project applications within fifteen days, with a maximum time of one month, via an online process.
promise_components.analysis: This is a governance and process reform promise. The primary cost is for developing an IT portal, which is not specified but typically modest. There is no direct recurring annual expenditure.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a process reform with no significant direct annual cost. The one-time IT development cost is not specified but is expected to be manageable within the budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets bureaucratic red tape, a fundamental barrier to investment and a source of corruption. If implemented, a streamlined, time-bound approval system is a permanent structural reform that improves the business environment.
coverage_gap_note: The extreme focus on speed could risk compromising due diligence on environmental, safety, and planning regulations.

promise_text_en: A 'Completion Certificate' will be issued immediately for correctly constructed buildings. Strict action will be taken against officials who cause delays.
promise_text_ta: சரியான பணிகள் முடிந்த கட்டடத்திற்கு, ‘பணி நிறைவுச்சான்று’, உடனடியாக வழங்கப்பட வேண்டும். காலந்தாழ்த்தும் அதிகாரிகள் மீது கடுமையான நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 373
impact_mechanism: Reduces corruption and delays in the construction sector by enforcing timely issuance of completion certificates.

promise_components.component: A 'Completion Certificate' will be issued immediately for correctly constructed buildings.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural reform aimed at improving efficiency. Its impact is not directly quantifiable with the provided reference data.

promise_components.component: Strict action will be taken against officials who cause delays.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement measure to support the procedural reform. Costs are related to administrative oversight and are not quantifiable from the data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. Implementation involves administrative and enforcement changes within existing departmental budgets.
sustainability_reasoning: This reform addresses a systemic issue of bureaucratic inefficiency and potential corruption. If implemented effectively, it creates a more predictable and efficient regulatory environment for the construction industry.
coverage_gap_note: Does not directly benefit renters or those not involved in new construction.

promise_text_en: Cement manufacturing companies in Tamil Nadu will be regulated. The maximum price for a bag of cement will be fixed at ₹200.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் உள்ள பைஞ்சுதை உருவாக்க நிறுவனங்கள் கட்டுப்படுத்தப்படும். ஒரு மூட்டை பைஞ்சுதையின் அதிகளவு விலை 200 உருபாய் என வரையறுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 373
impact_mechanism: Lowers construction costs for individuals and businesses by imposing a price ceiling on a key raw material.

promise_components.component: The maximum price for a bag of cement will be fixed at ₹200.
promise_components.analysis: This is a price control measure. The reference data does not include the current market price of cement or consumption volumes, so the economic impact or potential subsidy cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The fiscal impact is uncosted as it depends on the market price vs. the ₹200 cap and whether the government would subsidize manufacturers, for which no data is available.
sustainability_reasoning: Price caps often create market distortions like shortages or quality degradation. It manages the symptom of high prices for the consumer but doesn't solve the underlying reasons for high prices, potentially harming the industry's long-term health.
coverage_gap_note: May negatively impact cement manufacturers, their employees, and supply chains if the price cap is below production cost.

promise_text_en: Construction materials made from industrial waste and thermal power plant fly ash (Geopolymers), as well as recycled construction materials, will be used as alternatives.
promise_text_ta: தொழிற்சாலைக் கழிவுகள், அனல்மின் நிலைய நிலக்கரிச் சாம்பல் இவற்றைக் கொண்டு உருவாக்கப்படும் கட்டுமானப் பொருள்கள் (Geopolymers), மறுசுழற்சி செய்யப்பட்ட கட்டுமானப் பொருள்கள், மாற்றுக் கட்டுமானப் பொருள்களாக பயன்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 373
impact_mechanism: Promotes environmental sustainability and potentially lowers construction costs by mandating the use of recycled and waste-based materials.

promise_components.component: Construction materials made from industrial waste and thermal power plant fly ash (Geopolymers), as well as recycled construction materials, will be used as alternatives.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy directive to promote sustainable construction. The fiscal impact is indirect, related to R&D, setting standards, and potential incentives, which are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost stated. Costs would be associated with creating a regulatory framework and potential incentives, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy encourages a shift towards a circular economy in construction, addressing long-term issues of resource depletion and waste management. It's a structural change in how the industry operates.
coverage_gap_note: Could initially increase costs or pose challenges for smaller builders unfamiliar with new materials and techniques.

promise_text_en: World-class training will be provided to construction workers from Tamil Nadu. Special training centers will be established to provide opportunities to about 10,000 youths annually, and the government will take responsibility for running these centers.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தைச் சேர்ந்த கட்டுமானத் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கு உலகத்தரம் வாய்ந்த பயிற்சிகள் அளிக்கப்படும். அதற்கேற்ப சிறப்புப் பயிற்சி மையங்கள் ஏற்படுத்தப்பட்டு, ஆண்டிற்குச் சற்றொப்ப 10,000 இளைஞர்களுக்கு வாய்ப்பளிக்கப்படும். இதற்கான தனிப் பயிற்சி மையத்தை அரசே பொறுப்பேற்று நடத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 373
impact_mechanism: Improves employability and wages for youth in the construction sector through government-funded vocational training.

promise_components.component: Establish special training centers to provide opportunities to about 10,000 youths annually.
promise_components.analysis: This is a skill development program targeting 10,000 youths per year. The cost of establishing and running these centers is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on capital and operational expenditure per training center and per trainee, which are not provided.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in skills is a structural solution. It enhances the earning potential of workers and improves the quality and efficiency of the construction sector, creating long-term benefits.
coverage_gap_note: The program is limited to 10,000 youths annually, leaving out many other unskilled workers in the sector.

promise_text_en: It will be mandatory for every IT worker to be a member of a local IT trade union, and for companies with more than 50 workers to have a trade union.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு தொழிலாளரும் அந்தப் பகுதியைச் சேர்ந்த தகவல் தொழில்நுட்பத் தொழிற்சங்கத்தில் உறுப்பினராதலும், ஐம்பதிற்கும் அதிகமான தொழிலாளர்களைக் கொண்ட நிறுவனங்களில் தொழிற்சங்கம் அமைப்பதும் கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 375
impact_mechanism: Strengthens collective bargaining power for IT workers by mandating union membership and formation.
