promise_components.component: It will be mandatory for every IT worker to be a member of a local IT trade union.
promise_components.analysis: A regulatory change with potential legal challenges regarding freedom of association.

promise_components.component: It will be mandatory for companies with more than 50 workers to have a trade union.
promise_components.analysis: A regulatory mandate to facilitate unionization in the IT sector.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a legislative/regulatory measure.
sustainability_reasoning: This attempts to create a permanent institutional framework (unions) for negotiating worker rights and conditions. It's a structural change to the employer-employee relationship in the sector.
coverage_gap_note: May not be welcomed by all IT workers, some of whom may prefer individual negotiations or not wish to be part of a union.

promise_text_en: A tripartite committee with company, trade union, and labor department representatives will be established for each company/region to implement welfare schemes and address grievances.
promise_text_ta: தொழிலாளர் நலன் சார்ந்த திட்டங்களைச் செயல்படுத்தவும் தொழிலாளர்களால் முன்வைக்கப்படும் குறைகளைச் சரி செய்யவும் நிறுவன நிகராளர்கள், தொழிற்சங்க நிகராளர்கள் மற்றும் தொழிலாளர் நலத்துறை அதிகாரிகளைக் கொண்டு ஒவ்வொரு நிறுவனம் / பகுதிக்கும் ஒரு முத்தரப்புக்குழு அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 375
impact_mechanism: Creates a formal, institutionalized channel for dispute resolution and welfare implementation in the IT sector.

promise_components.component: A tripartite committee with company, trade union, and labor department representatives will be established for each company/region.
promise_components.analysis: This is an institutional reform for labor relations. The cost to the government is the administrative time of labor department officials, which is absorbable within existing budgets.

fiscal_cost_note: No significant direct fiscal cost. The cost is the staff time of labor department officials, which is part of their existing duties.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating a permanent committee for dialogue, this promise builds a structural mechanism to manage labor relations proactively, rather than reacting to crises. It institutionalizes communication.
coverage_gap_note: Its effectiveness is contingent on the prior establishment of unions as per Promise 4.

promise_text_en: A separate tripartite committee will be created specifically for the safety and welfare of women workers.
promise_text_ta: பெண்கள் பாதுகாப்பு மற்றும் பெண் தொழிலாளர்கள் நலனுக்காக தனியான ஒரு முத்தரப்புக்குழு உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 375
impact_mechanism: Provides a dedicated forum to address the specific safety and welfare concerns of women in the workplace.

promise_components.component: A separate tripartite committee will be created specifically for the safety and welfare of women workers.
promise_components.analysis: This is a specialized version of the general tripartite committee, focusing on gender-specific issues. The cost is administrative and minimal.

fiscal_cost_note: No significant direct fiscal cost. The cost is the staff time of officials, which is part of their existing duties.
sustainability_reasoning: This establishes a permanent, specialized body to focus on systemic issues affecting women workers. It's a structural approach to ensure gender-specific concerns are not overlooked in general forums.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is on formal sector workers; it doesn't cover women in the informal economy.

promise_text_en: A minimum wage of ₹120 per hour will be ensured for all technology-related jobs.
promise_text_ta: அனைத்துத் தொழில்நுட்ப வேலைகளுக்கும் குறைந்தளவு ஊதியமாக ஒரு மணி நேரத்திற்கு 120 ரூபாய் உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 376
impact_mechanism: Establishes a wage floor for technology jobs, aiming to prevent exploitation and ensure a basic standard of pay.

promise_components.component: A minimum wage of ₹120 per hour will be ensured for all technology-related jobs.
promise_components.analysis: This sets a wage floor. ₹120/hour equals ₹960 for an 8-hour day. This is significantly higher than the MGNREGS wage (₹294/day), indicating it targets a skilled sector. The government's role is enforcement.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the government. The cost is borne by employers. The government's cost is limited to enforcement through the labor department.
sustainability_reasoning: A legally mandated wage floor is a structural tool that alters the market's default wage-setting mechanism. It aims to create a permanent, higher base for compensation.
coverage_gap_note: May not cover gig economy or freelance workers whose employment status is ambiguous.

promise_text_en: For layoffs, the company must inform the worker and the tripartite committee, provide a 3-month notice period, and give three months' salary as compensation.
promise_text_ta: வேலை நீக்கம் செய்ய வேண்டுமென்றால் அந்தத் தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும் தொழிற்சங்கத்துடன் அமைக்கப்பட்ட முத்தரப்புக் குழுவிற்கும் தெரியப்படுத்திவிட்டு அவர்களுக்கு 3 மாதக் காலக்கெடுவும் மூன்று மாத ஊதியமும் இழப்பீடாக வழங்க வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 376
impact_mechanism: Provides a financial cushion and transition time for laid-off IT workers by mandating notice periods and severance pay.

promise_components.component: For layoffs, the company must provide a 3-month notice period and give three months' salary as compensation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a labor protection regulation that increases the cost of layoffs for companies. The government's role is legislative and enforcement. No direct fiscal cost to the exchequer.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the government. Costs are borne by companies during layoffs.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy manages the consequences of job loss for the individual, which is important relief. However, it does not address the business or economic reasons why layoffs occur in the first place.
coverage_gap_note: Could make companies more hesitant to hire permanent employees, potentially encouraging more contract or gig work.

promise_text_en: The company must ensure security and transportation facilities for employees working between 8 PM and 9 AM and on holidays.
promise_text_ta: இரவு 8 மணி முதல் காலை 9 மணி வரையிலான நேரத்திலும் விடுமுறை நாள்களிலும் வேலை செய்பவர்களுக்குப் பாதுகாப்பு மற்றும் போக்குவரத்து வசதியை நிறுவனம் உறுதி செய்ய வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 376
impact_mechanism: Improves the safety and well-being of employees working late hours by mandating employer-provided transport and security.

promise_components.component: The company must ensure security and transportation facilities for employees working between 8 PM and 9 AM and on holidays.
promise_components.analysis: This is a labor welfare regulation. The cost is borne by employers. Many large companies already provide this, so implementation risk is low for them, but higher for smaller firms.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the government. Costs are borne by employers.
sustainability_reasoning: By making safe transport a mandatory condition of employment for night shifts, this policy structurally integrates employee safety into the company's operational responsibility, rather than leaving it to the individual.
coverage_gap_note: Does not apply to workers in sectors that do not or cannot provide such facilities, such as small retail or the informal sector.

promise_text_en: All women employees will be granted 12 days of menstrual leave per year.
promise_text_ta: பெண் தொழிலாளர்கள் அனைவருக்கும் ஆண்டிற்கு 12 நாள்கள் மாதவிடாய் விடுப்பு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 377
impact_mechanism: Improves women's health and well-being by providing paid leave for menstruation-related discomfort through a legislative mandate on employers.

promise_components.component: All women employees will be granted 12 days of menstrual leave per year.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative mandate imposing costs on employers, not a direct fiscal outlay from the state budget for private sector employees. The cost to the government for its own employees cannot be calculated as the number of women in government service is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The policy primarily imposes a regulatory cost on private and public employers. The direct fiscal impact on the state budget for its own employees is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides necessary relief from a recurring health issue but does not address deeper structural issues of gender inequality in the workplace or the lack of supportive health infrastructure. It treats a symptom of biological reality within a work context.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes the large number of women in the informal sector, agriculture, and self-employment who lack formal employer-employee relationships.

promise_text_en: All workers not covered by other leave policies will be given a two-week annual vacation each year.
promise_text_ta: மேற்கண்ட விடுப்பில் அடங்காத அனைத்து தொழிலாளர்களுக்கும் ஒவ்வோர் ஆண்டும் 2 கிழமை (வாரம்) ஆண்டு விடுமுறை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 377
impact_mechanism: Improves work-life balance for workers in the unorganized sector by mandating a two-week paid annual vacation.

promise_components.component: All workers not covered by other leave policies will be given a two-week annual vacation each year.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative mandate on employers, likely targeting the informal sector. There is no direct cost to the state budget, but enforcement would be extremely challenging. The number of such workers is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state, as the cost is borne by employers. The cost of creating an enforcement mechanism is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise provides a benefit to address the lack of paid leave, a symptom of informal employment. It does not fix the root causes of why employment is informal, such as lack of social security structures and pathways to formalization.
coverage_gap_note: Enforcement for millions of informal workers across countless small employers is practically impossible, meaning most intended beneficiaries may not receive the benefit.

promise_text_en: One year of maternity leave for women and three months of paternity leave for their husbands will be made mandatory.
promise_text_ta: பேறுகாலப் பெண்களுக்கு ஓர் ஆண்டும், அப்பெண்ணின் கணவருக்கு 3 மாதம் விடுப்பும் கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 377
impact_mechanism: Supports new parents and promotes gender equality in caregiving by mandating extended paid maternity and paternity leave.

promise_components.component: One year of maternity leave for women will be made mandatory.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative change extending the current 26-week mandate. The cost is borne by employers. The cost to the government for its own employees is not calculable as employee numbers and birth rates are not in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Three months of paternity leave for their husbands will be made mandatory.
promise_components.analysis: This introduces a new legislative mandate for paid paternity leave. The cost is borne by employers. The fiscal impact on the government as an employer cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a regulatory cost on employers. The increased cost to the state for its own employees is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides significant, necessary support for parents immediately after childbirth. However, it addresses the symptom (need for time to care for a newborn) and could inadvertently discourage hiring of women without addressing the root cause, which is the societal and economic undervaluation of care work.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to parents in the formal employment sector, excluding a large portion of the workforce.

promise_text_en: After maternity leave ends, both parents will be given 72 days of leave and the option to work from home for 50% of workdays until their child reaches the age of 4.
promise_text_ta: மகப்பேறு விடுப்பு முடிந்த பின்னர், பெற்றோர் இருவருக்கும் அவர்கள் குழந்தை 4 அகவையை எட்டும் வரை 72 நாள்கள் விடுப்பும், 50% வேலை நாள்களில் வீட்டிலிருந்து வேலை செய்யும் வாய்ப்பும் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 377
impact_mechanism: Provides extended flexibility for parents of young children to balance work and caregiving through additional leave and remote work options.

promise_components.component: After maternity leave ends, both parents will be given 72 days of leave.
promise_components.analysis: This legislative mandate on employers is ambiguous on whether the leave is paid or unpaid, and whether it is 72 days per parent or to be shared. The cost is borne by employers.

promise_components.component: Option to work from home for 50% of workdays until their child reaches the age of 4.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative mandate on employers. It is not feasible for many sectors like manufacturing, agriculture, retail, or in-person services.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a regulatory cost borne by employers, not a direct state expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise attempts to ease the burden of childcare, which is a symptom of a lack of affordable public childcare infrastructure. It places a complex and potentially unworkable burden on employers instead of creating a structural solution.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes parents in the informal sector and those in jobs that cannot be performed remotely.

promise_text_en: Companies must fill 80% of their technology positions with workers from Tamil Nadu before hiring from other states or countries.
promise_text_ta: நிறுவனங்கள் தங்கள் தொழில்நுட்ப பணியிடங்களில் 80 விழுக்காடு தமிழகத் தொழிலாளர்களை நிரப்பிய பிறகே பிற மாநில (அ) பிற நாட்டுத் தொழிலாளர்களை சேர்க்க வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 377
impact_mechanism: Attempts to secure local employment by imposing a hiring quota on technology companies through regulation.

promise_components.component: Companies must fill 80% of their technology positions with workers from Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a protectionist policy that would be implemented via legislation. Such a domicile-based reservation in the private sector is likely to be legally challenged as unconstitutional. It carries no direct fiscal cost but risks deterring investment.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. The potential economic cost from reduced corporate investment and brain drain is significant but not quantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy is likely unconstitutional and practically unenforceable. It serves as political signalling ('locals first') but does not address the root cause of unemployment, which may be a skills gap. It risks harming the business environment.
coverage_gap_note: The policy could backfire, leading to companies relocating or shrinking operations, thus reducing overall job availability.

promise_text_en: Based on information from companies about skill shortages, optional subjects will be planned in schools and colleges to meet technological demands.
promise_text_ta: எந்தெந்தத் தொழில்நுட்பங்களுக்குத் தேவை இருக்கிறது என்பதை அறிந்து பள்ளி கல்லூரிகளில் மாணவர்களுக்கு விருப்பப் பாடங்கள் திட்டமிடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 377
impact_mechanism: Improves graduate employability and economic competitiveness by aligning the state's educational curriculum with industry skill demands.

promise_components.component: Optional subjects will be planned in schools and colleges based on information from companies about skill shortages.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy reform for the education sector. It requires creating a formal, ongoing feedback mechanism between industry and educational institutions. Costs would be for curriculum development and teacher training, but are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The costs for curriculum redesign, teacher training, and new equipment are not specified but could potentially be phased into the existing education budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This directly addresses the root cause of structural unemployment: the mismatch between skills supplied by the education system and skills demanded by the economy. It creates a permanent mechanism for improving human capital.
coverage_gap_note: Success depends on the willingness of diverse industries to provide timely data and the education system's agility to adapt.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will start a new bank, in compliance with the rules and regulations of the Indian Reserve Bank.
promise_text_ta: இந்தியக் காப்பு வைப்பகத்தின் (Indian Reserve Bank) சட்ட திட்டங்களுக்கு உட்பட்டு நாம் தமிழர் அரசு புதிய வைப்பகத்தைத் தொடங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 378
impact_mechanism: Creates a new state-backed financial institution intended to serve specific economic development goals.

promise_components.component: The Naam Tamilar government will start a new bank, in compliance with the rules and regulations of the Indian Reserve Bank.
promise_components.analysis: Establishing a bank requires a license from the RBI and significant initial capital (e.g., ₹200-500 crore). This would be a direct, one-time cost to the state exchequer.

fiscal_cost_note: Estimated one-time cost of at least ₹200 crore for initial capital. This represents approximately 0.15% of the state's discretionary budget (₹200 cr / ₹1,30,000 cr). This does not include ongoing operational or potential recapitalization costs.
sustainability_reasoning: Announcing a state bank is a powerful political statement. However, the actual process of getting an RBI license is arduous, and running a bank profitably and professionally is a major challenge. This promise creates the vehicle, but its impact is entirely dependent on its subsequent mission and execution.

promise_text_en: The primary objective of the Thamizh National Bank will be to assist entrepreneurs and prevent them from suffering due to high-interest loans from private lenders.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்த்தேசிய வைப்பகத்தின் முதன்மை நோக்கம் தொழில் முனைவோருக்கு உதவியாய் நிற்பதும், தனியாரிடம் அதிக வட்டிக்குக் கடன் வாங்கி நலிந்து போவதைத் தடுப்பதும்தான்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 379
impact_mechanism: Fosters business growth and reduces reliance on predatory lenders by providing targeted, affordable credit to entrepreneurs via a new state bank.

promise_components.component: The primary objective of the Thamizh National Bank will be to assist entrepreneurs and prevent them from suffering due to high-interest loans from private lenders.
promise_components.analysis: This defines the mission for the proposed bank. It would operate as a development finance institution. The primary fiscal risk is not a direct budget outlay, but the potential for high Non-Performing Assets (NPAs) from lending to risky ventures, which could necessitate future recapitalization by the state government.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct annual cost, but carries significant contingent liability. If the bank incurs major losses from bad loans, the state government, as owner, would have to inject capital, creating a future drain on the budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of business failure and economic stagnation: the lack of access to affordable capital. If run successfully, it creates permanent financial infrastructure to support entrepreneurship, which is a structural solution.
coverage_gap_note: The bank's effectiveness will depend on its ability to operate without political interference in lending decisions.

promise_text_en: Low-interest business loans will be provided to farmers, persons with disabilities, transgender people, widows, fishermen, and women, with priority given to the agricultural sector.
promise_text_ta: வேளாண் பெருங்குடிகள், மாற்றுத் திறனாளிகள், திருநங்கைகள், கைம்பெண்கள், மீனவர்கள், பெண்கள் ஆகியோருக்கு மட்டும் தொழில் தொடங்க குறைந்த வட்டியில் கடன் வழங்கப்படும். குறிப்பாக வேளாண் தொழிலுக்கு முன்னுரிமை வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 379
impact_mechanism: Promotes livelihoods and economic inclusion by directing subsidized credit to vulnerable populations and priority sectors.

promise_components.component: Low-interest business loans will be provided to farmers, persons with disabilities, transgender people, widows, fishermen, and women, with priority given to the agricultural sector.
promise_components.analysis: This is an interest subvention scheme. The government would pay banks the difference between a market interest rate and the subsidized rate offered to beneficiaries. The total loan volume and subsidy percentage are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The annual cost is dependent on the total volume of loans disbursed and the size of the interest subsidy, neither of which is defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the structural barrier of inadequate access to affordable credit for marginalized groups. By building financial capacity and enabling investment in livelihoods, it helps address a root cause of poverty and exclusion.
coverage_gap_note: Effectiveness depends on the loan amounts being sufficient for viable business activity and reaching the truly needy without bureaucratic hurdles.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will prioritize new, eco-friendly alternative power generation methods. A new policy will be implemented with the aim of achieving self-sufficiency in power generation, which is the backbone of the nation's development.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு இயற்கையை பாதிக்காத புதிய மாற்று மின்சார உருவாக்க முறைகளுக்கு முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கும். நாட்டின் வளர்ச்சிக்கு முதுகெலும்பாய் இருக்கும் மின் உருவாக்கத்தில் தன்னிறைவைப் பெறும் நோக்கத்தோடு புதிய கொள்கையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு செயல்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 381
impact_mechanism: Aims to ensure long-term energy security and environmental sustainability by creating a new policy framework for renewable power generation.

promise_components.component: The government will prioritize new, eco-friendly alternative power generation methods.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent to focus on renewable energy sources like solar and wind.

promise_components.component: A new policy will be implemented with the aim of achieving self-sufficiency in power generation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a high-level strategic goal. Implementation could involve public investment, private sector incentives, or regulatory changes. No specific financial commitments are made.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This is a policy goal, not a costed program. The financial implications are potentially enormous but are completely undefined.
sustainability_reasoning: Energy is a foundational pillar of economic development. A policy to ensure a self-sufficient and sustainable energy supply addresses a critical, root-cause issue for the state's long-term prosperity and environmental health.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government announces its policy decision to permanently shut down nuclear power plants.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அணு உலைகளை நிலையாக மூடுவதைக் கொள்கை முடிவாக அறிவிக்கின்றது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 383
impact_mechanism: Reduces perceived risk of nuclear accidents and radioactive waste by eliminating the source of nuclear power generation.

promise_components.component: Permanently shut down nuclear power plants in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: The reference data does not include information on Tamil Nadu's current power generation from nuclear sources, the cost of decommissioning plants, or the cost of replacing the lost power capacity. Therefore, a quantitative analysis is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would involve decommissioning and replacing lost capacity, but cannot be quantified from the provided data.
sustainability_reasoning: Nuclear power is a subject under the Union List, meaning the central government has exclusive legislative power. A state government cannot unilaterally shut down these plants, making this promise a political statement rather than a feasible policy.

promise_text_en: Thermal power generation will be gradually phased out.
promise_text_ta: அனல் மின் உருவாக்க முறை படிப்படியாகக் குறைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 383
impact_mechanism: Reduces carbon emissions and air pollution from the power sector by eliminating fossil fuel-based generation over time.

promise_components.component: Gradually phase out thermal power generation.
promise_components.analysis: The reference data does not specify the current share of thermal power in Tamil Nadu's energy mix or the capital cost required for alternative energy sources to replace this baseload power. A cost calculation is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost of replacing the state's primary source of baseload power would be extremely high but cannot be quantified with the given data.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy addresses the root cause of pollution from power generation. If achieved, it would represent a fundamental, long-term shift in the state's energy infrastructure and environmental impact.

promise_text_en: Eco-friendly power generation methods such as hydropower, wind power, solar power, and waste-to-energy will be expanded.
promise_text_ta: நீர் மின் உருவாக்கம், காற்றாலை மின் உருவாக்கம், சூரியசக்தி மின் உருவாக்கம், திடக்கழிவுகளில் இருந்து மின் உருவாக்கம் ஆகிய உயிர்களுக்குப் பாதிப்பில்லா மின் உருவாக்க முறை பெருக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 383
impact_mechanism: Increases the supply of clean energy and reduces reliance on fossil fuels by investing in a portfolio of renewable sources.

promise_components.component: Expand hydropower, wind power, solar power, and waste-to-energy generation methods.
promise_components.analysis: This is a general statement of intent. The reference data does not provide current capacities, expansion targets, or per-megawatt installation costs for these technologies. Therefore, a quantitative analysis is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is entirely dependent on the scale of expansion, which is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in renewable energy infrastructure creates long-term, sustainable power sources. This is a foundational policy for a structural transition away from fossil fuels.

promise_text_en: A new method of generating electricity using Concentrated Solar Power (CSP) will be implemented. These projects will be carried out in districts with high direct solar radiation like Thoothukudi and Ramanathapuram.
promise_text_ta: புதிய வகை “சூரிய ஆற்றல் ஒளிக்கற்றை” (Concentrated Solar Power) கண்ணாடிகளைப் பயன்படுத்தி மின்சாரம் உருவாக்கும் முறை செயல்படுத்தப்படும். தமிழகத்தில் நேரடி சூரிய கதிர்வீச்சு அதிகமாக உள்ள தூத்துக்குடி, இராமநாதபுரம் மாவட்டங்களில் இத்திட்டங்கள் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 384
impact_mechanism: Introduces a solar technology capable of storing heat to generate electricity after sunset, improving grid stability.

promise_components.component: Implement Concentrated Solar Power (CSP) projects in districts with high solar radiation like Thoothukudi and Ramanathapuram.
promise_components.analysis: The reference data does not contain information on the cost per MW of CSP technology, the proposed capacity, or land requirements. A cost estimate is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: By addressing the intermittency of solar power, CSP technology can provide a more reliable renewable energy source. This represents a structural improvement for the state's power grid, enhancing its ability to integrate renewables.
coverage_gap_note: Direct economic benefits like land leasing and local jobs are concentrated in the specific districts where projects are built.

promise_text_en: Thousands of government schools, colleges, hospitals, and district collector's offices in Tamil Nadu will be converted into "power generation stations." New Concentrated Solar Power technology will be installed on the rooftops of these government buildings.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் உள்ள ஆயிரக்கணக்கான அரசுப் பள்ளிகள், கல்லூரிகள், மருத்துவமனைகள் மற்றும் மாவட்ட ஆட்சியர் அலுவலகங்கள் "மின் உருவாக்க நிலையங்களாக" மாற்றப்படும். புதியவகை சூரிய ஒளிக்கற்றை (Concentrated Solar Power) நுட்பம் அரசு கட்டடங்களின் மேல் தளங்களில் நிறுவப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 384
impact_mechanism: Utilizes existing public infrastructure for decentralized power generation by installing solar technology on government building rooftops.

promise_components.component: Install Concentrated Solar Power (CSP) technology on the rooftops of thousands of government buildings.
promise_components.analysis: The promise is technically flawed. Concentrated Solar Power (CSP) is a utility-scale technology requiring large land areas and is not suitable for rooftops. Rooftop installations use Photovoltaic (PV) panels. Due to this technical mismatch, a cost analysis is not feasible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The proposed application of the technology is technically infeasible as stated.
sustainability_reasoning: The specific technology mentioned (CSP) is inappropriate for the proposed location (rooftops), indicating a lack of technical grounding. This makes the promise more of a visionary statement than a workable plan.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is on public buildings, not private residential or commercial properties.

promise_text_en: To conserve water resources, recycled water will be used to clean solar panels instead of groundwater.
promise_text_ta: சூரிய மின் தகடுகளைச் சுத்தப்படுத்த நிலத்தடி நீரைப் பயன்படுத்துவதைத் தவிர்த்து, மறுசுழற்சி செய்யப்பட்ட நீரைப் பயன்படுத்துவதன் மூலம் நீர் ஆதாரங்கள் பாதுகாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 384
impact_mechanism: Conserves freshwater resources by mandating the use of treated wastewater for industrial maintenance of solar facilities.

promise_components.component: Use recycled water for cleaning solar panels, prohibiting the use of groundwater.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory policy, not a direct spending program. The cost is borne by power plant operators. The fiscal impact on the state budget is minimal, relating to enforcement. No direct cost calculation is applicable.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct cost to the state budget. This is a regulatory measure imposing costs on solar plant operators.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy creates a permanent, structural change in resource management by embedding water conservation into the operational standards of the growing solar industry. It addresses the root cause of water stress from industrial use.

promise_text_en: A new type of hydropower project will be implemented, which generates electricity by creating an artificial vortex in a cylindrical basin to turn a turbine.
promise_text_ta: நீரோட்டத்தைத் தடுத்து ஒரு உருளை வடிவத் தொட்டிக்குள் (Basin) செலுத்தி, அங்கு செயற்கையாக ஒரு 'சுழல்' (Vortex) உருவாக்கப்பட்டு, மின்சாரத்தை உருவாக்கும் புதிய வகை நீர்மின் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 384
impact_mechanism: Introduces a novel, small-scale hydropower technology to generate electricity from low-gradient water flows.

promise_components.component: Implement new hydropower projects using an artificial vortex to turn a turbine.
promise_components.analysis: This refers to a niche, emerging technology. The reference data contains no information on its cost, efficiency, scalability, or suitability for Tamil Nadu's water bodies. A quantitative analysis is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: Promoting a novel, largely unproven technology suggests a focus on innovation for its own sake rather than a practical, scalable energy solution. Its potential contribution to the state's power needs is highly speculative.

promise_text_en: 'Micro-hydro projects' will be established in canals and small rivers across Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் உள்ள வாய்க்கால்கள் மற்றும் சிற்றாறுகளில் ‘குறுமின் திட்டங்கள்’ நிறுவ முடியும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 385
impact_mechanism: Taps into the latent energy potential of existing water infrastructure for decentralized, small-scale power generation.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Micro-hydro projects' in canals and small rivers across Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: While this is a known concept, the reference data provides no information on the number of suitable sites, potential power capacity, or the cost per project. A quantitative analysis is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented systematically, this policy would create a distributed network of durable, small-scale power generation assets. It diversifies the energy mix by utilizing existing infrastructure, which is a structurally sound approach.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to areas with canals and rivers having sufficient year-round water flow.

promise_text_en: Technologies like 'bubble curtains' will be used to reduce noise during the installation of offshore wind turbines to prevent harm to marine life.
promise_text_ta: காற்றாலைகளை நிறுவும்போது உருவாகும் இரைச்சலைக் குறைக்க ‘குமிழித் திரைகள்' (Bubble curtains) போன்ற தொழில்நுட்பங்களைப் பயன்படுத்தி, கடல் உயிரினங்களுக்குப் பாதிப்பு ஏற்படாத வகையில் முன்னெடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 385
impact_mechanism: Mitigates the negative environmental impact of constructing offshore wind farms by mandating a specific noise-dampening technology.

promise_components.component: Use 'bubble curtains' to reduce noise during the installation of offshore wind turbines.
promise_components.analysis: This is a specific environmental mitigation measure. It is a regulatory requirement for developers, not a direct state expenditure. The cost would be part of the overall project cost for offshore wind. No cost can be calculated from the given data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct cost to the state budget. This is a regulatory cost passed on to project developers.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy integrates environmental protection directly into the process of building green infrastructure. It establishes a sustainable standard for future development, making it a structural improvement to the regulatory framework.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are marine ecosystems and the fishing communities that depend on them.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will establish and operate a vegetable waste-to-energy plant in every district.
promise_text_ta: காய்கறிக் கழிவுகளைக் கொண்டு மின்சாரம் உருவாக்கும் ஆலை ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உருவாக்கிச் செயல்பாட்டிற்குக் கொண்டு வரும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 385
impact_mechanism: Addresses urban waste management and energy needs simultaneously by creating a network of decentralized waste-to-energy facilities.

promise_components.component: Establish and operate one vegetable waste-to-energy plant in every district.
promise_components.analysis: Tamil Nadu has 38 districts, implying 38 plants. The reference data does not include the cost of a waste-to-energy plant, the volume of vegetable waste generated per district, or potential power output. Therefore, a cost analysis is not possible.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost would be 38 times the unit cost of a plant, which is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: If successful, this creates a permanent infrastructure for both waste management and energy production. However, success is heavily dependent on solving the notoriously difficult challenge of ensuring a consistent supply of segregated waste.
coverage_gap_note: The focus on 'vegetable waste' may exclude the bulk of municipal solid waste like plastics and paper, limiting the overall impact on waste management.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will implement a plan to generate electricity using the thousands of kilometers of railway tracks in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் ஓடும் பல்லாயிரம் அயிரமாத்திரி நீளமுள்ள தொடர்வண்டிப் பாதைகளைப் பயன்படுத்திக் மின் உருவாக்கம் செய்துகொள்ளும் திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு செயல்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 387
impact_mechanism: This proposes generating electricity through a novel, unspecified technology applied to railway infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Implement a plan to generate electricity using railway tracks.
promise_components.analysis: The promise relies on a technology (e.g., piezoelectric) that is not specified or proven for large-scale generation. Reference data contains no information on railway track length, potential power output, or technology cost. Therefore, the cost and benefit are not calculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is entirely dependent on a speculative technology for which no data is available.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is based on technology that is not yet viable for mass power generation. It serves more as a futuristic talking point than a practical plan, with no clear mechanism for implementation or material benefit.

promise_text_en: 24-hour uninterrupted power supply will be ensured for local small and large industries. Electricity tariffs for commercial and industrial establishments will be significantly reduced from current levels.
promise_text_ta: நமது மண்ணின் சிறு மற்றும் பெருந்தொழில் நிறுவனங்களுக்கு 24 மணிநேர தடையற்ற மின்சாரம் வழங்கப்படும். வணிக மற்றும் தொழிற்சாலைகளுக்கான மின்கட்டணம் தற்போதுள்ள நிலையை விடக் கணிசமாகக் குறைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 387
impact_mechanism: This aims to boost industrial activity by lowering a key operational cost (electricity) and ensuring its constant availability.

promise_components.component: Ensure 24-hour uninterrupted power supply for local small and large industries.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of upgrading generation and transmission infrastructure to guarantee 24/7 supply is not calculable from the provided reference data.

promise_components.component: Significantly reduce electricity tariffs for commercial and industrial establishments.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'significantly' is not quantified. The cost depends on the percentage reduction and the total electricity consumption by industries, for which data is unavailable. Therefore, the fiscal impact cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise involves both large capital expenditure for infrastructure and recurring revenue loss for the state electricity board, neither of which can be estimated with available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Reducing tariffs without a corresponding drop in generation cost is a subsidy that strains state finances. While ensuring 24/7 power is a structural improvement, the tariff cut treats the symptom (high costs) rather than the cause (generation/procurement costs).
coverage_gap_note: This promise excludes residential, agricultural, and other non-industrial consumers.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will provide 24-hour uninterrupted electricity to small and micro-enterprises and will also reduce their tariffs.
promise_text_ta: சிறு மற்றும் குறு தொழிலை நடத்துவோர்க்கு நாம் தமிழர் அரசு 24 மணி நேரமும் தடையற்ற மின்சாரத்தை வழங்குவதோடு அதற்கான கட்டணத்தை குறைத்து வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 388
impact_mechanism: This targets support to smaller businesses by reducing their electricity costs and improving supply reliability.

promise_components.component: Provide 24-hour uninterrupted electricity to small and micro-enterprises.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of infrastructure upgrades to ensure 24/7 supply for this specific sector is not calculable from the reference data.

promise_components.component: Reduce electricity tariffs for small and micro-enterprises.
promise_components.analysis: The quantum of tariff reduction is not specified. Data on the number of such enterprises and their power consumption is unavailable, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost in terms of revenue loss to the electricity board and capital expenditure for grid upgrades cannot be estimated from the provided data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a targeted subsidy. It provides financial relief to small enterprises but does not address the fundamental cost structure of power generation and distribution in the state.
coverage_gap_note: This excludes medium/large industries, agricultural, and residential consumers.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will establish a "Cooperative Power Farm" system from the town panchayat to the constituency level. The government will be a shareholder, and the public can also join as shareholders.
promise_text_ta: பேரூராட்சி முதல் தொகுதி வரை "கூட்டுறவு மின் பண்ணை" முறையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அமைக்கும். இதில் அரசு ஒரு பங்குதாரராக இருக்கும், மக்களும் பங்குதாரர்களாக தங்களை இணைத்துக் கொள்ளலாம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 388
impact_mechanism: This seeks to decentralize power generation by creating a new cooperative ownership model for local power projects.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'Cooperative Power Farm' system from town panchayat to constituency level.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy framework proposal. The cost to the government would be its shareholding contribution, which is undefined. The scale and technology of these farms are not specified, so a cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The government's financial commitment as a shareholder in these cooperatives is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This proposes a fundamental change in the power generation model from centralized to decentralized and community-owned. It addresses the root issue of grid dependency and could foster local energy independence.

promise_text_en: The per-unit price of electricity will be reduced for rural artisans, small-scale industries based on local resources like palm and coconut, private hospitals, and charitable organizations.
promise_text_ta: ஊர்புற கைவினை பொருள்கள், பனை மற்றும் தென்னை உள்ளிட்ட மண்ணின் வளம் சார்ந்த சிறு தொழில் அமைப்பினர், தனியார் மருத்துவமனைகள் மற்றும் தொண்டு மையங்களுக்கு ஒரு அலகு மின்சாரம் விலை குறைத்து வழங்கபடும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 388
impact_mechanism: This provides targeted financial relief to specific social and economic groups by lowering their electricity expenses.

promise_components.component: Reduce the per-unit price of electricity for rural artisans, small-scale industries (palm/coconut), private hospitals, and charitable organizations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a targeted subsidy. The cost depends on the number of beneficiaries, their consumption, and the unspecified reduction amount. This data is not available in the reference block, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total revenue loss from this targeted tariff reduction cannot be estimated without data on beneficiary numbers and consumption patterns.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a classic subsidy measure. It alleviates a cost burden for specific groups but does not alter the underlying economics of power generation or distribution.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes all other categories of consumers not explicitly mentioned.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will provide 24-hour, three-phase electricity for agriculture, free of cost.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு வேளாண்மைக்கு 24 மணி நேரமும் முன்முனை மின்சாரத்தைக் கட்டணமில்லாமல் வழங்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 388
impact_mechanism: This aims to eliminate a major input cost for farmers and improve irrigation capabilities by providing constant, free power.

promise_components.component: Provide 24-hour, three-phase electricity for agriculture, free of cost.
promise_components.analysis: The reference data does not contain the number of agricultural electricity connections or their average consumption. Therefore, the cost of providing this power for free cannot be calculated. The capital cost for upgrading infrastructure to 24-hour three-phase supply is also incalculable.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Providing free, 24/7 power to the entire agricultural sector would involve massive recurring subsidy costs and large capital expenditure, but the exact amount cannot be calculated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Free power is a recurring subsidy that can strain state finances and may encourage unsustainable groundwater extraction. It addresses the farmer's cost burden (a symptom) but not the systemic cost of power or water resource management.
coverage_gap_note: This benefits only farmers with electric pumpsets, leaving out those dependent on diesel or other irrigation methods.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will implement an underground power cable system. This will prevent power outages and accidents during rains and other natural disasters.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு தரை வழி மின்சார முறையை நடைமுறைப் படுத்தும். இதனால் மழை மற்றும் பிற பேரிடர் நேரும் காலங்களில் ஏற்படும் மின்வெட்டு மற்றும் நேர்ச்சிகள் தடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 388
impact_mechanism: This aims to create a more resilient and safe electricity grid by moving power lines underground, protecting them from weather.

promise_components.component: Implement an underground power cable system.
promise_components.analysis: This is a massive, long-term infrastructure project. The cost cannot be calculated as the reference data does not include the length of the existing power grid or the per-kilometer cost of underground cabling.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost would be exceptionally high, likely requiring a multi-decade plan and funding far exceeding the state's annual discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause of power outages and accidents by creating weather-resilient infrastructure. It is a permanent upgrade to the state's core electricity distribution network.

promise_text_en: To turn every village into a power generation hub, eco-friendly projects will be implemented to generate electricity from cow dung (biogas), hydrokinetic power, solar panels, and windmills based on local potential.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு சிற்றூரையும் மின் உருவாக்க மையமாக மாற்றும் வண்ணம் அந்தந்த ஊரில் மாட்டுச் சாணத்தில் இருந்து இயற்கை எரிகாற்று, நீரலை மின்சாரம், சூரியத் தகடு மற்றும் காற்றாலை மின் உருவாக்கம் என சூழலியல் பாதிப்பில்லாமல் திட்டங்கள் நிறைவேற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 388
impact_mechanism: This seeks to build energy self-sufficiency at the local level by promoting diverse, small-scale renewable power generation.

promise_components.component: Implement eco-friendly projects to generate electricity from cow dung, hydrokinetic power, solar panels, and windmills based on local potential.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy for decentralized generation. The cost is dependent on the number of projects, their scale, and technology mix, none of which are specified or available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total investment required is unknown as the scale and number of village-level projects are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative addresses the root cause of energy dependency by fostering local, renewable generation. It aims to create a sustainable and decentralized power ecosystem rather than just subsidizing consumption.

promise_text_en: A legal framework will be created to allow households, small industries, agricultural farms, and cooperative societies to sell their surplus electricity directly to the government.
promise_text_ta: வீடுகள், சிறு தொழில்கள், வேளாண் பண்ணைகள், கூட்டுறவுச் சங்கங்கள் தங்களது தேவைக்கு மேலாக உருவாக்கம் செய்யும் மின்சாரத்தை நேரடியாக அரசுக்கு விற்பனை செய்யும் சட்டவரைவு உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 389
impact_mechanism: This creates a market incentive for decentralized power generation by allowing small producers to sell surplus electricity.

promise_components.component: Create a legal framework to allow households, industries, farms, and societies to sell surplus electricity to the government.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory change, not a direct expenditure item. The cost of creating the legal framework itself is negligible. The future cost to the government for purchasing surplus power is indeterminate.

fiscal_cost_note: Policy change with indeterminate fiscal impact. The administrative cost is low, but the long-term cost of power purchase is unquantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural reform that changes consumers into producers ('prosumers'). It creates a market-based mechanism to encourage renewable energy adoption, addressing the root challenge of centralized power generation.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to those who can afford the upfront investment in generation capacity like solar panels.

promise_text_en: Energy storage centers (Battery Storage) will be established at village and city levels. This will ensure a stable power supply during nighttime and crisis periods.
promise_text_ta: சிற்றூர் மற்றும் நகர அளவில் மின்சாரச் சேமிப்பு மையங்கள் (மின்கலச் சேமிப்பு) அமைக்கப்படும். இதனால் இரவு நேரமும், நெருக்கடிக் காலங்களிலும் நிலையான மின் பகிர்வு உறுதி செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 389
impact_mechanism: This aims to stabilize the power grid by deploying energy storage, making intermittent renewable energy sources more reliable.

promise_components.component: Establish energy storage centers (Battery Storage) at village and city levels.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital-intensive infrastructure project. The cost cannot be calculated as the number of centers, their storage capacity (MWh), and the cost of battery technology are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of grid-scale battery storage is very high, implying a significant capital outlay that cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Energy storage is a critical component for a modern, renewable-based grid. It directly solves the root problem of intermittency from sources like solar and wind, enabling a more sustainable energy future.

promise_text_en: A system using technologies like smart meters and dynamic tariff mechanisms will be implemented to efficiently manage power consumption by monitoring demand and distribution.
promise_text_ta: சிறப்பு மின்னளவி, தேவையையும் பகிர்வையும் கண்காணித்து, நேரடிக் கட்டண விதிப்பு முறைப் போன்ற தொழில்நுட்பங்கள் கொண்டு மின் பயன்பாட்டைச் சீராக நிருவகிக்கும் முறை செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 389
impact_mechanism: Improves grid efficiency and manages peak load by using technology to align electricity consumption with real-time supply and demand.

promise_components.component: Implement smart meters for power consumption monitoring.
promise_components.analysis: The number of electricity connections (residential, commercial, industrial) is not available in the reference data. The cost per smart meter and installation is also not provided. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Implement dynamic tariff mechanisms to manage demand.
promise_components.analysis: The current tariff structure and the potential revenue impact of dynamic pricing are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the financial implications cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks specific numbers on beneficiaries or unit costs, and the reference data does not contain information on electricity consumers or infrastructure costs. Therefore, a cost estimate is not possible.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a fundamental infrastructure upgrade that changes the way electricity is managed, priced, and consumed. It addresses the root causes of grid inefficiency and demand-supply mismatch, creating a more resilient and responsive energy system.

promise_text_en: A main power generation station will be established in each constituency. All town panchayat-level power generation stations, including those in villages, will be connected to this main constituency station.
promise_text_ta: ஒவ்வொரு தொகுதியிலும் ஒரு தலைமை மின் உருவாக்க நிலையம் அமைக்கப்படும். சிற்றூர்களை உள்ளடக்கிய பேரூராட்சி மின் உருவாக்க நிலையங்கள் அனைத்தும் அந்தத் தொகுதி தலைமை மின் உருவாக்க நிலையத்துடன் இணைக்கப்பட்டிருக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 389
impact_mechanism: Aims to decentralize power generation to improve grid resilience and ensure local energy security.

promise_components.component: Establish one main power generation station in each constituency.
promise_components.analysis: The number of constituencies in Tamil Nadu is not provided in the reference data. The cost to build a power generation station (which varies significantly by type and capacity) is also unavailable. Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Connect all town panchayat and village power stations to the main constituency station.
promise_components.analysis: The number of town panchayats and villages, and the cost of creating such a grid network, are not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise lacks specifics on the number of constituencies, the type and capacity of power stations, and associated grid infrastructure costs. The reference data is insufficient for any estimation.
sustainability_reasoning: This proposes a fundamental redesign of the state's power generation and distribution architecture from a centralized to a decentralized model. If implemented, it would be a long-term structural change, though its technical and economic feasibility is highly uncertain.

promise_text_en: To promote new, eco-friendly power generation methods, the Naam Tamilar government will encourage young scientists and form new research groups under their leadership.
promise_text_ta: இயற்கையைப் பாதிக்காத புதிய மின்சார உருவாக்க முறைகளை ஊக்குவிக்க இளம் அறிவியலாளர்களை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ஊக்குவித்து அவர்கள் தலைமையிலேயே புதிய ஆய்வு குழுக்களை உருவாக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 389
impact_mechanism: Fosters innovation in the renewable energy sector by investing in local research and development capacity.

promise_components.component: Encourage young scientists and form new research groups for eco-friendly power generation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy statement without specific financial commitments. The cost of setting up research groups, providing grants, or funding stipends is not specified, and the reference data contains no information on R&D costs. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The promise is a statement of intent without a defined budget. Costs would depend on the scale of investment in grants, labs, and personnel, which is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in research and human capital is a long-term strategy to address the underlying need for technological advancement in sustainable energy. It builds the state's capacity for future innovation rather than just providing a temporary solution.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are a small group of scientists and researchers; immediate benefits for the general public are not part of the promise.

promise_text_en: The aim of the Naam Tamilar government is to cultivate the rare opportunity to make the art, literature, culture, way of life, worship, historical pride, civilization, and traditional medicinal greatness of the Tamil race known to the world.
promise_text_ta: தமிழினத்தின் கலை இலக்கியம், பண்பாடு, வாழ்வியல் முறை, வழிபாடு, வரலாற்றுப் பெருமை, நாகரீகம், மரபு சார்ந்த மருத்துவப் பெருமை ஆகியவற்றை உலகறியச் செய்யும் அரிய வாய்ப்பினை வளர்த்தெடுப்பதே நாம் தமிழர் அரசின் நோக்கம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 391
impact_mechanism: Aims to enhance Tamil Nadu's global cultural influence and recognition through broad promotional activities.

promise_components.component: Promote Tamil art, literature, culture, history, and traditional medicine to the world.
promise_components.analysis: This is a high-level, unquantifiable statement of intent. It does not specify any concrete actions, programs, or budgets. The reference data cannot be used to calculate a cost for such a broad goal.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. This is a broad declaration of goals with no specific, costable actions defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a statement of cultural pride and ambition rather than a concrete policy to address a material problem. It lacks a specific mechanism or measurable outcome, making it primarily a form of political signalling.
coverage_gap_note: The tangible material benefit to the average citizen is undefined and likely negligible.

promise_text_en: To attract Tamils living in 130 countries and other foreign nationals to visit Tamil Nadu, state tourism officers will be appointed to visit these countries and meet them.
promise_text_ta: உலகெங்கிலும் 130 நாடுகளில் பரவி வாழும் தமிழர்கள் மற்றும் வெளிநாட்டினரைத் தமிழகத்திற்குப் பார்வையிட வரச் செய்ய வேண்டும். தமிழகச் சுற்றுலா அலுவலர்கள் அந்தந்த நாடுகளுக்குச் சென்று அவர்களைச் சந்திக்கப் பணியமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 391
impact_mechanism: Increases international tourism outreach through direct, in-person promotion in a large number of foreign countries.

promise_components.component: Appoint state tourism officers to visit 130 countries to attract tourists.
promise_components.analysis: The promise specifies 130 countries. However, the reference data contains no information on the costs associated with stationing or sending personnel abroad (e.g., salary, travel, office expenses). Therefore, the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. While the number of countries is specified, the cost per officer/country is unknown and not available in the reference data, making a total cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: The scale of appointing officers in 130 countries is logistically and financially impractical for a state government and overlaps with central government functions. It serves more as a grand statement of intent than a feasible, targeted tourism strategy.
coverage_gap_note: This approach may not be as cost-effective as targeted digital marketing or participation in major international travel marts.

promise_text_en: Promotional advertisements will be released to inform potential visitors about Tamil Nadu's temples, cities, heritage sites, hill areas, waterfalls, national parks, traditional food, forest resources, wildlife, and numerous scenic locations.
promise_text_ta: கோயில்கள், நகரங்கள், பாரம்பரியத் தலங்கள், மலைப்பகுதிகள், அருவிகள், தேசியப் பூங்காக்கள், தமிழகப் பாரம்பரிய உணவு, வனவளம், விலங்குகள், இயற்கை எழில் கொஞ்சும் ஏராளமான இடங்கள் இங்கே இருப்பதை அவர்கள் அறியும்படி முன்னோட்ட விளம்பரங்கள் வெளியிடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 391
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase tourist arrivals by raising awareness of Tamil Nadu's attractions through advertising campaigns.

promise_components.component: Release promotional advertisements about Tamil Nadu's tourism destinations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a standard operational activity for a tourism department. The promise does not specify a budget, and the reference data has no information on advertising costs. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is entirely dependent on the scale, duration, and media channels of the advertising campaign, none of which are specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Advertising is a recurring operational expense to address the ongoing 'symptom' of needing to attract tourists. It does not create a permanent asset or fix a structural problem but is a routine part of managing a tourism-focused economy.

promise_text_en: Tourism centers will be opened to attract travelers during festivals such as Pongal, Mattu Pongal, Eru Thazhuvuthal, Thaipusam, Aadi Perukku, Chithirai Thiruvizha, and Karthigai Deepam.
promise_text_ta: பொங்கல், மாட்டுப்பொங்கல், ஏறுதழுவல், தைப்பூசம், ஆடிப்பெருக்கு, சித்திரைத் திருவிழா, கார்த்திகை தீபம் முதலிய திருவிழாக்களின் போது பயணிகளை வரவழைக்கச் சுற்றுலா மையங்கள் திறக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 391
impact_mechanism: Improves the tourist experience and manages visitor flow during peak festival seasons to encourage tourism.

promise_components.component: Open tourism centers to attract travelers during major state festivals.

coverage_gap_note: Benefits are localized to specific festival locations and time periods.

promise_text_en: Ancient traditional sports such as Jallikattu, Kabaddi, Malpor, Malyutham, Mallar Kambam, Silambu, cockfighting, chess, Kilithattu, and bullock cart racing will be conducted in major cities.
promise_text_ta: முதன்மை நகரங்களில், நமது பண்டைய மரபு விளையாட்டுகளான சல்லிக்கட்டு, கபடி, மற்போர், மல்யுத்தம், மள்ளர் கம்பம், சிலம்பு, சேவல் சண்டை, சதுரங்கம், கிளித்தட்டு, மாட்டுவண்டிப் பந்தயம் ஆகியவை நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 391
impact_mechanism: Promotes cultural heritage and potentially boosts local tourism by organizing traditional sporting events.

promise_components.component: Conduct traditional sports events in major cities.
promise_components.analysis: This involves event organization. The reference data contains no information on the costs of organizing sporting events (venue, prizes, logistics). Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is dependent on the frequency, scale, and location of the events, which are not defined.

promise_text_en: Cultural events such as Paraiyattam, Bommalattam, Therukoothu, and Villupattu will be organized with proper planning to attract tourists. Additionally, 200 varieties of special traditional Tamil cuisine will be served.
promise_text_ta: பறையாட்டம், பொம்மலாட்டம், தெருக்கூத்து, வில்லுப்பாட்டு ஆகிய பண்பாட்டுக் கலைநிகழ்ச்சிகள் புத்துணர்வுடன் சுற்றுலாப் பயணிகளைக் கவரும் வண்ணம், சரியான திட்டமிடலுடன் செயல்படுத்தப்படும். இதனுடன் தமிழ்நாட்டின் சிறப்பான 200 வகை இயற்கை வழி உணவுகளும் பரிமாறப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 393
impact_mechanism: Promotes cultural heritage and culinary tourism through organized, planned cultural and food events.

promise_components.component: Organize cultural events like Paraiyattam and Therukoothu.
promise_components.analysis: This involves event organization. The reference data has no information on the cost of staging cultural performances. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: Serve 200 varieties of traditional Tamil cuisine at these events.
promise_components.analysis: This is a detail of the event organization. The cost of procuring and serving food on this scale is not available in the reference data. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost depends entirely on the scale, frequency, and logistics of these events, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Similar to promoting traditional sports, this is an event-based activity. It provides a platform for artists and chefs but does not create lasting change. The specificity of '200 varieties' is a detail that lends an appearance of substance to what is essentially a cultural promotion exercise.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are temporary and localized to the event participants, artists, and audience.

promise_text_en: A special world tourism plan will be implemented to beautify and promote globally acclaimed sites such as Konerikone Fort, the Arupadai Veedu temples, Sittanavasal paintings, Adichanallur archaeological site, Thanjavur Big Temple, Mamallapuram monolithic chariots, Nilgiri Mountain Railway, Madurai Meenakshi Amman Temple, Tiruvannamalai Temple, and Kanchi Kamakshi Amman Temple.
promise_text_ta: உலகம் போற்றும் கோனேரிக்கோன் கோட்டை, அறுபடை வீடுகள், சித்தன்னவாசல் ஓவியம், ஆதிச்சநல்லூர் அகழ்வாராய்ச்சி இடம், தஞ்சைப் பெரியகோயில், மாமல்லபுரத்து ஒற்றைக்கல் தேர்கள், நீலமலைத் தொடர்வண்டி, மதுரை மீனாட்சி அம்மன் கோயில், திருவண்ணாமலை கோயில், காஞ்சி காமாட்சி அம்மன் கோயில் ஆகியவைகளுக்கான சிறப்பு உலகச் சுற்றுலாத் திட்டம் கொண்டு வரப்பட்டு, தலங்கள் பொலிவூட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 393
impact_mechanism: Enhances the value and appeal of key heritage sites through targeted investment in infrastructure and promotion.

promise_components.component: Implement a special world tourism plan to beautify and promote globally acclaimed sites.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure and marketing for specific locations. The reference data does not contain information on costs for infrastructure upgrades, beautification projects, or international marketing campaigns for heritage sites. Therefore, the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of beautification, infrastructure development, and global promotion for multiple major heritage sites would be substantial but cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise involves capital investment in permanent, high-value tourism assets. Improving the core infrastructure and appeal of sites like Mamallapuram or the Thanjavur Big Temple is a structural improvement to the state's tourism 'product', creating lasting value.
coverage_gap_note: The focus on globally acclaimed sites might divert resources from lesser-known but culturally significant heritage locations.

promise_text_en: Thousands of temples and major mosques will be renovated. Dargahs, churches, and saints' memorials will be redeveloped as philosophical tourism destinations. Coordination will be established with tourist sites in northern states to attract more visitors from North India.
promise_text_ta: ஆயிரக்கணக்கான கோயில்கள், முதன்மையான பள்ளி வாசல்கள் சீர்செய்யப்படும். தர்காக்கள், தேவாலயங்கள், புனிதர்களின் நினைவிடங்கள் ஆகியவை மெய்யியல் சுற்றுலாத் தலங்களாகப் புனரமைக்கப்படும். வடநாட்டுச் சுற்றுலாப் பயணிகளை மேலும் கவரும் வண்ணம் வடமாநிலங்களில் உள்ளச் சுற்றுலாத் தலங்களுடன் ஒருங்கிணைப்பு ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 393
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase tourist footfall and spending by enhancing the appeal and infrastructure of religious and cultural sites.

promise_components.component: Renovate thousands of temples and major mosques.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital expenditure for restoration and upgrades. The number of sites and cost per site are not specified. Cost cannot be calculated from reference data.

promise_components.component: Redevelop Dargahs, churches, and saints' memorials as philosophical tourism destinations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital investment and marketing initiative. The scope and cost are undefined. Cost cannot be calculated from reference data.

promise_components.component: Establish coordination with northern states to attract more visitors from North India.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative and marketing effort involving inter-state collaboration. The cost is likely related to promotional activities and is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost is undefined and cannot be calculated, as it depends on the number of sites and the scale of renovation. This would be a significant capital expenditure from the state's discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural investment in cultural assets. Renovating and promoting these sites can create a long-term revenue stream from tourism and preserve cultural heritage, addressing the underutilization of these assets.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated in areas with major religious sites and the tourism industry, with indirect economic spillovers.

promise_text_en: Tamil Nadu's most prominent Saivite, Vaishnavite, Islamic, Christian, and Buddhist places of worship will be designated as religious-cultural zones and brought under the joint administration of the Tourism, Culture, Archaeology, and Religious Endowments departments.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தின் முதன்மையான புகழ்பெற்ற சைவ, வைணவ, இசுலாமிய, கிருத்துவ, பௌத்த வழிபாட்டுத்தலங்கள் சமயப் பண்பாட்டுப் பகுதிகளாகக் தெரிவு செய்யப்பட்டு அந்த பகுதிகள் சுற்றுலா, பண்பாடு, தொல்லியல் மற்றும் சமய அறநிலையத் துறைகளின் கூட்டு நிர்வாகத்தின்கீழ் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 393
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve the management and promotion of major religious sites through administrative consolidation.

promise_components.component: Designate prominent religious sites as religious-cultural zones.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy designation with potential zoning and regulatory implications. No direct cost is specified.

promise_components.component: Bring these zones under the joint administration of Tourism, Culture, Archaeology, and Religious Endowments departments.
promise_components.analysis: This is a bureaucratic reorganization. It may incur administrative costs but does not involve direct capital spending. The goal is improved coordination.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost is likely minimal, related to administrative overhead. The promise is uncosted as no specific budget is allocated.
sustainability_reasoning: This aims to fix a structural problem of siloed departmental management. If successful, integrated administration can lead to better preservation, more effective promotion, and a better visitor experience, which are sustainable improvements.
coverage_gap_note: This is an administrative change affecting a specific set of institutions and government departments, not the general public directly.

promise_text_en: Tamil Nadu's forts and palaces will be converted into museums. At historically significant locations, Sangam-era plays will be staged in the evenings by folk artists with light and sound shows to attract tourists.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தின் கோட்டைக் கொத்தளங்கள், அரண்மனைகள் அருங்காட்சியகங்களாக மாற்றப்படும். வரலாற்றுச் சிறப்புமிக்க இடங்களில் சங்ககால நாடகங்கள் ஒளி ஒலி அமைப்புகளுடன் நாட்டுப்புறக் கலைஞர்களால் மாலை வேளைகளில் நடத்தப்பட்டு சுற்றுலா பயணிகளின் கவனம் ஈர்க்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 393
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create new cultural attractions to increase tourist engagement and promote local arts.

promise_components.component: Convert Tamil Nadu's forts and palaces into museums.
promise_components.analysis: This requires capital investment for restoration, curation, and setting up museum infrastructure. The number of forts/palaces and cost are not specified.

promise_components.component: Stage Sangam-era plays with light and sound shows by folk artists in the evenings.
promise_components.analysis: This involves recurring operational costs for artists' fees, production, and equipment maintenance. The number of locations and frequency of shows are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is undefined and cannot be calculated. It includes significant one-time capital costs for museum conversion and recurring operational costs for shows, to be funded from the discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates new, permanent cultural assets (museums) and recurring cultural events. It addresses the need for more diverse tourist attractions and provides a platform for folk artists, creating long-term economic and cultural value.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are localized to areas with historical forts and palaces and primarily support folk artists and the tourism sector.

promise_text_en: To further develop tourism, the government will establish nine tourism corridors, including Trichy-Tanjore-Kumbakonam, Madurai-Rameswaram, and Chennai-Kanchipuram-Vellore. The cultural, natural, and religious sites along these corridors will be systematically organized for tourist visits.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் சுற்றுலாத்துறை மேலும் வளர்ச்சியடைய திருச்சி - தஞ்சை - கும்பகோணம், மதுரை – இராமேசுவரம், மதுரை - கொடைக்கானல், சென்னை - காஞ்சிபுரம் - வேலூர், சென்னை - மாமல்லபுரம் - புதுச்சேரி - சிதம்பரம், கோவை - குன்னூர் – உதகமண்டலம் - ஏற்காடு – ஏலகிரி, கூடலூர் – தெப்பக்காடு – மசினாகுடி, கோவை - ஆழியாறு - திருமூர்த்தி அணை - டாப்ஸ்லிப் - வால்பாறை, தூத்துக்குடி - திருநெல்வேலி - நாகர்கோயில் - கன்னியாகுமரி ஆகிய சுற்றுலாத் தாழ்வாரங்களை அரசு அமைக்கும். இந்த வழித்தடங்களில் உள்ள தலங்கள் சுற்றுலாப் பயணிகளுக்குச் சுற்றிக் காட்டும் விதமாக முறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 393
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to boost regional tourism by creating integrated, well-marketed tourist circuits.

promise_components.component: Establish nine tourism corridors (e.g., Trichy-Tanjore-Kumbakonam).
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale infrastructure and planning project. It implies investment in roads, signage, and amenities across multiple districts. The cost is not specified.

promise_components.component: Systematically organize cultural, natural, and religious sites along these corridors for tourist visits.
promise_components.analysis: This involves planning, marketing, and potentially developing new facilities at various sites within the corridors. The cost is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is undefined and cannot be calculated, but establishing nine corridors would represent a very large capital investment from the state's discretionary budget, likely phased over several years.
sustainability_reasoning: Developing tourism corridors is a structural approach to regional economic development. It connects disparate attractions into a cohesive product, which can drive sustained tourism growth, create local jobs, and justify further infrastructure investment.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated within the specified corridors, potentially leaving out other regions of the state.

promise_text_en: New types of tourism facilities will be established, including trekking and trailing, mountain climbing, balloon tours, chopper tours, sky trams, skywalks, and camping.
promise_text_ta: மலைவாசிகள் வழியில் மலையேற்றம் (Trekking and Trailing), குன்றுகளில் பாறையேற்றம் (Mountain climbing), பலூன் பயணம் (Balloon Tours), உலங்கூர்திப் பயணம் (Chopper Tours), கயிறுவழி வான் பயணம் (Sky Trams), வான் நடை பயணம் (Sky walk), மலை முகாம் (Camping) போன்ற புதிய வகைச் சுற்றுலா வசதிகள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 395
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to diversify the state's tourism offerings by introducing niche and adventure tourism activities.

promise_components.component: Establish new tourism facilities including trekking, mountain climbing, balloon tours, chopper tours, sky trams, skywalks, and camping.
promise_components.analysis: This involves identifying suitable locations, creating safety regulations, and likely facilitating private investment (PPP model). The cost to the government is not specified but would involve regulatory and possibly initial infrastructure support.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost to the state is undefined and cannot be calculated. It would depend on the public-private partnership model adopted for these capital-intensive and specialized activities.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural attempt to diversify the state's tourism product beyond traditional cultural and religious tourism. By creating new, modern attractions, it can attract different tourist demographics and create new, specialized jobs in the long term.

promise_text_en: Measures will be taken to ensure simple fee structures, and travel plans will be created to suit tourists' budgets.
