coverage_gap_note: Direct economic benefits are limited to areas immediately surrounding these protected zones.

promise_text_en: Taking into account United Nations guidelines, the tourism department will adopt methods that do not harm biodiversity in protected forest areas. All decisions and action plans of this department will be designed to not adversely affect biodiversity.
promise_text_ta: ஐக்கிய நாடுகள் சபையின் வழிகாட்டுதல்களைக் கருத்தில் கொண்டு, பாதுகாக்கப்பட்ட வனப்பகுதிகளில் பல்லுயிர்ப் பெருக்கத்திற்கு பாதிப்பு ஏற்படாத வகையிலுமான வழிமுறைகள் சுற்றுலாத்துறையால் பின்பற்றப்படும். இத்துறையின் அனைத்து முடிவுகளும், செயல் திட்டங்களும் பல்லுயிர்ப் பெருக்கத்தைப் பாதிக்காத வண்ணம் வடிவமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 399
impact_mechanism: Establishes a guiding policy principle to ensure that tourism development does not compromise biodiversity.

promise_components.component: Adopt UN guidelines to prevent harm to biodiversity in protected forest areas from tourism.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy directive, not a direct expenditure item. It involves adopting a framework for decision-making. There is no direct financial cost that can be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a policy directive with no direct, calculable financial cost. Any costs would be indirect, arising from stricter project approval processes or modifications, and cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses the root cause of potential environmental degradation from tourism by embedding a protective principle into the governance framework. It creates a structural guardrail for all future development, aiming for long-term ecological sustainability.
coverage_gap_note: This policy primarily protects ecosystems; its direct human beneficiary scope is broad but indirect.

promise_text_en: In the Pichavaram mangrove forest area, appropriate measures will be taken to develop wellness tourism, including rejuvenation centers, traditional medicine methods, and traditional food.
promise_text_ta: பிச்சாவரம் சதுப்புநிலக் காடுகள் பகுதியில் புத்துணர்வு நடுவங்கள், மரபு மருத்துவ முறைகள், மரபு உணவு ஆகியவை உள்ளடக்கிய உடல்நலச் சுற்றுலாவை வளர்க்க உரிய நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 399
impact_mechanism: Aims to develop a niche wellness tourism hub in the Pichavaram mangrove area using traditional medicine and food.

promise_components.component: Take measures to develop wellness tourism in Pichavaram, including rejuvenation centers, traditional medicine, and traditional food.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of 'appropriate measures,' such as constructing rejuvenation centers or subsidizing traditional food stalls, is not specified. No cost data for such developments is available in the reference materials.

fiscal_cost_note: The annual cost cannot be estimated as the scale of investment in centers and other facilities is not defined and no cost data is available.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative seeks to create a new economic activity in a specific, ecologically sensitive area. The risk is high due to the fragile nature of mangrove ecosystems. It is a symptomatic approach to boosting local tourism rather than a structural solution to a problem.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are highly localized to the Pichavaram area and dependent on not damaging the fragile ecosystem.

promise_text_en: A 'preview documentary' about special tourist areas will be produced and published on tourism websites to promote them globally.
promise_text_ta: சிறப்புமிக்க இப்பகுதிகள் பற்றி, உலகறிய 'முன்னோட்ட ஆவணப் படமும்' சுற்றுலா வலைத்தளங்களில் வெளியிடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase international tourist arrivals by creating and distributing promotional video content online.

promise_components.component: A 'preview documentary' about special tourist areas will be produced.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of producing a documentary is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

promise_components.component: The documentary will be published on tourism websites to promote them globally.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of web hosting and promotion is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of documentary production and online promotion is not specified, but is likely to be a minor expenditure relative to the state's discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a standard marketing activity. It aims to increase tourist numbers, which is a symptom of needing economic activity, but does not create any new, lasting infrastructure or services.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are indirect, accruing mainly to tourism operators in the promoted areas.

promise_text_en: Boating activities will be introduced in the backwaters of the Vellaru and Kollidam rivers.
promise_text_ta: வெள்ளாறு, கொள்ளிடம் ஆறுகள் ஆகியவற்றின் காயல் பகுதி நீரில் படகு விளையாட்டுகள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to create new local economic activity and recreational options by introducing a new tourism service in two specific river areas.

promise_components.component: Boating activities will be introduced in the backwaters of the Vellaru river.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of purchasing boats, building jetties, and hiring staff is not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Boating activities will be introduced in the backwaters of the Kollidam river.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of purchasing boats, building jetties, and hiring staff is not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is dependent on the scale of the boating operations (number of boats, size of facilities), which is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a new attraction, which provides genuine economic opportunity and recreation. However, it is a new service rather than a change to the underlying economic or social structure of the region.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are highly localized to the communities along the Vellaru and Kollidam backwaters.

promise_text_en: Measures will be taken to develop the historic Pulicat Lake and its bird sanctuary into a prime tourist destination without altering its ecological nature.
promise_text_ta: வரலாற்றுச் சிறப்புமிக்க பழவேற்காடு ஏரி மற்றும் பறவைகள் சரணாலயம் அவற்றின் சூழலியல் தன்மை மாறாமல் சிறந்த சுற்றுலாத்தலமாக மாற்றுவதற்கான நடவடிக்கைகள் மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create a sustainable eco-tourism model that generates local income while preserving a key ecological asset.

promise_components.component: Measures will be taken to develop the historic Pulicat Lake and its bird sanctuary into a prime tourist destination.
promise_components.analysis: The scope and cost of 'development' are not specified. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

promise_components.component: Development will occur without altering its ecological nature.
promise_components.analysis: This adds complexity and potential costs for environmental impact assessments, specialized construction, and ongoing monitoring. Cost is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of ecologically sensitive development for a large area like Pulicat Lake is undefined but potentially very high.
sustainability_reasoning: If successfully implemented, this would establish a long-term, sustainable eco-tourism framework. It addresses the root challenge of creating economic growth that is not extractive but instead based on the preservation of natural assets.
coverage_gap_note: Direct benefits are concentrated in the local communities around Pulicat Lake.

promise_text_en: Untouched traditional villages will be selected and tourism centers will be established there to promote economic development and social interest.
promise_text_ta: பழமை மாறாத சிற்றூர்கள் தேர்ந்தெடுக்கப்பட்டு அங்குச் சுற்றுலா நடுவங்கள் அமைத்துப் பொருளாதார மேம்பாடு, சமூக ஆர்வம் பெருக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create new, sustainable income streams for rural communities by monetizing their cultural and traditional assets.

promise_components.component: Untouched traditional villages will be selected.
promise_components.analysis: The number of villages is not specified.

promise_components.component: Tourism centers will be established there to promote economic development.
promise_components.analysis: The cost and scale of a 'tourism center' are not defined. Data unavailable — cannot calculate.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost depends on the number of villages selected and the investment per tourism center, neither of which is specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative attempts to create a new, permanent economic base for selected rural communities, leveraging their unique cultural heritage. It addresses the root problem of limited economic opportunities in remote villages.
coverage_gap_note: The promise only benefits a few 'selected' villages, leaving out other similar villages.

promise_text_en: Historically significant port cities and submerged coastal areas like Mamallapuram and Poompuhar will be declared as protected heritage sites; tourist guides with historical knowledge will be trained and employed in these areas.
promise_text_ta: வரலாற்றுச் சிறப்புமிக்க துறைமுக நகரங்கள் மற்றும் கடலில் ஆழ்ந்த மாமல்லபுரம் மற்றும் பூம்புகார் கடற்பகுதிகள், வரலாற்று முதன்மை கொண்ட கடல்வாய் நகரங்களாகவும் பாதுகாக்கப்பட்ட பகுதிகளாகவும் அறிவிக்கப்படும்; இப்பகுதிகளில் வரலாற்று அறிவும் ஆர்வமும் கொண்ட சுற்றுலா வழிகாட்டிகள் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்பட்டு பணியமர்த்தப்படுவர்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve heritage preservation and enhance tourist experience by formalizing site protection and professionalizing guide services.

promise_components.component: Historically significant port cities and submerged coastal areas like Mamallapuram and Poompuhar will be declared as protected heritage sites.
promise_components.analysis: This is primarily an administrative and legal action. Associated costs for enforcement and preservation are not specified.

promise_components.component: Tourist guides with historical knowledge will be trained and employed in these areas.
promise_components.analysis: The number of guides to be trained and employed is not specified. Cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of training and employing an unspecified number of guides, plus any new preservation measures, is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a formal system for site protection and employing trained guides addresses the root causes of heritage degradation and poor visitor information. It establishes a permanent, higher-quality framework for cultural tourism.
coverage_gap_note: The focus is on a few major, well-known sites, potentially neglecting smaller heritage locations.

promise_text_en: In major hill stations, attractions such as rope bridges, golf courses, children's parks, water parks, zoological parks, and technology museums will be developed.
promise_text_ta: முதன்மையான மலைப் பகுதிகளில் கயிற்றுப் பாலங்கள், கோல் திடல்கள், குழந்தைகள் விளையாட்டுப் பூங்காக்கள், தண்ணீர்ப் பூங்காக்கள், உயிரியல் பூங்காக்கள், தொழில்நுட்ப அருங்காட்சியகங்கள் ஆகியவை வளர்த்தெடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase tourist footfall and spending in hill stations by adding new, modern entertainment attractions.

promise_components.component: In major hill stations, attractions such as rope bridges, golf courses, children's parks, water parks, zoological parks, and technology museums will be developed.
promise_components.analysis: These are large, capital-intensive projects. The number, location, and scale are not specified, so the cost is unknown but would be substantial.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of developing multiple large-scale attractions like golf courses and zoological parks is extremely high and not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This adds more amenities to attract tourists, which is a symptomatic treatment for boosting tourism revenue. It does not address root problems in hill stations like carrying capacity, traffic, or waste management.
coverage_gap_note: Development is focused on 'major' hill stations, potentially increasing environmental pressure on them while neglecting less-developed areas.

promise_text_en: International motor races will be conducted at the "Madras International Circuit" in Sriperumbudur, with arrangements made to attract sports enthusiasts.
promise_text_ta: திருப்பெரும்புதூர் “மெட்ராசு பன்னாட்டுப் பந்தய தளத்தில்” பன்னாட்டுப் பந்தயங்களை (Motor Race) நடத்தவும், அவற்றை பார்வையிட வரும் விளையாட்டு ஆர்வலர்களை ஈர்க்கும் வகையிலும் ஏற்பாடுகள் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to enhance the state's international profile and attract a niche group of tourists by facilitating a high-profile sporting event.

promise_components.component: International motor races will be conducted at the 'Madras International Circuit' in Sriperumbudur.
promise_components.analysis: This involves leveraging an existing private facility. The role of the government is facilitation.

promise_components.component: Arrangements will be made to attract sports enthusiasts.
promise_components.analysis: The nature and cost of government 'arrangements' (e.g., promotion, security, subsidies) are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost to the state for making 'arrangements' is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise leverages an existing private asset for a high-visibility event. Its primary benefit is political signalling and brand promotion for the state, rather than creating a new public good or service.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to a very niche group of motorsport fans and businesses in the immediate vicinity of the private circuit.

promise_text_en: Folk music and art performances such as Paraiyattam, Bommalattam, and Therukoothu will be organized to entertain tourists, which will also increase employment opportunities for local artists.
promise_text_ta: பறையாட்டம், பொம்மலாட்டம், தெருக்கூத்து போன்ற நாட்டிசை நிகழ்ச்சிகள் நடத்தப்பட்டுச் சுற்றுலா பயணிகளுக்கு ஓய்வு நேரங்களில் புத்துணர்ச்சி ஊட்டப்படும். இதுபோன்ற நிகழ்ச்சிகளால் பயணிகள் ஈர்க்கப்படுவதோடு உள்ளூர் கலைஞர்களுக்கு வேலைவாய்ப்பும் அதிகரிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 401
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide direct economic support and performance platforms for folk artists by integrating their art into the tourism ecosystem.

promise_components.component: Folk music and art performances will be organized to entertain tourists.
promise_components.analysis: This creates a mechanism for employing local artists. The number of artists, performance frequency, and remuneration are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost depends on the scale of the program (number of artists, frequency of shows, and payment rates), which is not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root problem of irregular income and lack of platforms for traditional folk artists. By creating a formal, state-supported channel for their employment, it provides a structural solution for this specific group.
coverage_gap_note: The program is limited to specific art forms and may not include all of Tamil Nadu's diverse folk traditions.

promise_text_en: To prevent rent gouging at lodges during festival seasons, a committee led by the tourism department will be formed to regulate and fix fair rents. Free transport will be provided from bus stands to tourist sites.
promise_text_ta: விழாக்காலங்களில் தங்கும் விடுதிகள் வாடகை ஏற்றம் செய்யப்படுவதைத் தடுக்கச் சுற்றுலாத் துறை தலைமையில் குழு அமைத்து சீரான வாடகை நிர்ணயிக்கப்படும். பேருந்து நிறுத்தத்திலிருந்து தலங்களுக்குக் கட்டணமற்ற ஊர்தி வசதி செய்து தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 403
impact_mechanism: This promise attempts to protect tourists from price gouging and improve local transit through direct government intervention.

promise_components.component: A committee will be formed to regulate and fix fair rents for lodges during festival seasons.
promise_components.analysis: Forming a committee has minimal cost. However, effective price regulation in a decentralized market is extremely difficult to implement.

promise_components.component: Free transport will be provided from bus stands to tourist sites.
promise_components.analysis: The scope of this service (which cities, which sites, for how long) is undefined. The cost cannot be calculated from available data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of a statewide 'free transport' system for tourists is undefined and potentially very large.
sustainability_reasoning: Price controls and 'free' services are politically popular promises but are notoriously difficult to implement effectively and sustainably. They address symptoms (high prices) but not the cause (supply/demand imbalance), making this more of a signalling exercise.
coverage_gap_note: The rent control is limited to festival seasons, and the free transport's coverage is vaguely defined.

promise_text_en: Museums will be swiftly established at archaeological sites to explain the true history of Tamils. The Keeladi museum will be equipped with an audio tour app to provide information about the artifacts.
promise_text_ta: உண்மையான வரலாற்றைத் தமிழர்களுக்கு விளக்கும் வகையில் தொல்லியல் சான்றுகள் கிடைக்கும் இடங்களில் விரைந்து அருங்காட்சியகம் அமைக்கப்படும். கீழடி அருங்காட்சியகம் முழுவதும் ஒலிச் சுற்றுலா செயலி மூலம் அருங்காட்சியகத்தில் சேகரிக்கப்பட்ட பொருட்கள் குறித்து விளக்கம் பெற வகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 403
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to preserve and disseminate Tamil history by creating permanent cultural institutions and leveraging modern technology.

promise_components.component: Museums will be swiftly established at archaeological sites.
promise_components.analysis: Constructing museums is a capital-intensive process. The number of museums and their budget are not specified.

promise_components.component: The Keeladi museum will be equipped with an audio tour app.
promise_components.analysis: Developing a mobile application is a relatively low-cost, high-impact measure to enhance visitor experience.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of building multiple museums is not specified but would be significant. The app is a minor cost in comparison.
sustainability_reasoning: Museums are permanent, structural institutions for preserving and interpreting cultural heritage for future generations. This addresses the root need to properly house and explain archaeological findings to the public.
coverage_gap_note: The primary benefit requires physical presence at the museum sites.

promise_text_en: In places where Sangam literature was composed, scenes from the literature will be recreated through sculptures, paintings, and video displays to inspire literary interest among young Tamils.
promise_text_ta: சங்ககால இலக்கியங்கள் இயற்றப்பட்ட இடங்களில் அந்த இலக்கியக் காட்சிகள் சிற்பங்களாகவும், சித்தன்னவாசலுக்கு இணையான ஓவியங்கள் மற்றும் காணொலி என காட்சிகள் வாயிலாக உருவாக்கப்பட்டு இளந்தமிழருக்கு இலக்கிய ஆர்வம் தூண்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 403
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to generate cultural interest and tourism by creating public art installations based on classical Tamil literature.

promise_components.component: Recreate scenes from Sangam literature through sculptures, paintings, and video displays in relevant historical locations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a capital expenditure project for the tourism and culture departments. The cost is dependent on the number of sites chosen, the scale of the installations, and the technology used. Reference data does not contain information on costs for public art or the number of designated 'Sangam' sites, so a cost estimate cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would be a one-time capital cost, not a recurring annual expense, though maintenance costs would be recurring.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a cultural beautification and educational project. While valuable for heritage promotion, it does not address a root cause of economic or social hardship and its impact on 'literary interest' is intangible and hard to measure.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to residents of and visitors to the specific locations where installations are placed.

promise_text_en: Specialized tourism circuits will be created for archaeological and historical sites, as well as separate philosophical tourism packages for Madurai, Kanchi, Kumari, and Rameswaram.
promise_text_ta: தொல்லியல் மற்றும் வரலாற்றுச் சிறப்பு மிக்க பகுதிகளுக்கெனத் தனிவடிவச் சுற்றுலாக்கள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும். மதுரை, காஞ்சி, குமரி, இராமேசுவரம் மெய்யியல் சுற்றுலாக்கள் என தனித்தனி சுற்றுலாக்கள் அறிமுகப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 403
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to increase tourist arrivals and spending by packaging existing heritage sites into defined, marketable circuits.

promise_components.component: Create specialized tourism circuits for archaeological and historical sites.
promise_components.analysis: This involves branding, marketing, and coordination, which are core functions of a state tourism department. The physical sites already exist.

promise_components.component: Create philosophical tourism packages for Madurai, Kanchi, Kumari, and Rameswaram.
promise_components.analysis: This is a product development and marketing initiative for specific cities, leveraging their religious and philosophical heritage.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is primarily for marketing and administration, likely representing a small portion of the tourism department's operational budget.
sustainability_reasoning: By creating new, marketable tourism products from existing assets, this initiative can create sustainable, long-term revenue streams for local economies in the circuit areas. It is a classic economic development strategy for the tourism sector.
coverage_gap_note: Economic benefits are concentrated in the specific towns and regions included in the new circuits.

promise_text_en: New historical tours will be created, such as 'Journey on the path of Vandhiyathevan', 'Journey to the massacre site of the Maruthu Pandiyar brothers', 'The sculpture and life of Mamallan', and 'How Pulithevan defeated the British at Nerkattumseval'.
promise_text_ta: வந்தியத்தேவன் பாதையில் பயணம், திருப்பத்தூர் மாமன்னர் மருதுபாண்டியர் படுகொலைப் பயணம், மாமல்லன் சிற்பமும் வாழ்வும், நெற்கட்டான் செவல் போர்க்களத்தில் பெரும்பாட்டன் பூலித்தேவன் ஆங்கிலேயனை வீழ்த்தியது எப்படி போன்ற புதிய வகை சுற்றுலாக்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 405
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to attract tourists by creating narrative-driven tours based on popular historical and literary figures.

promise_components.component: Create new historical tours such as 'Journey on the path of Vandhiyathevan' and others related to Maruthu Pandiyar, Mamallan, and Pulithevan.
promise_components.analysis: This is a niche tourism product development and marketing initiative. It requires historical research, route planning, and promotion. The costs are primarily administrative and promotional, falling within the tourism department's scope.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is expected to be minimal, related to planning and marketing materials.
sustainability_reasoning: Similar to creating tourism circuits, this establishes new, lasting tourism products that can generate income for local guides and businesses along the tour routes. It leverages cultural capital for sustainable economic activity.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are highly localized to the specific routes of the historical tours.

promise_text_en: Entertainment-focused tourism will be developed, featuring festivals for Tamil national beverages like palm wine, coconut toddy, and fruit juices, similar to international festivals, to boost agricultural income from palm and coconut products.
promise_text_ta: முழுக்க முழுக்க பொழுதுபோக்குக்கெனச் சுற்றுலாக்கள் உருவாக்கப்படும். வெளிநாடுகளில் உள்ளது போல தமிழர் தேசிய பானங்களான பனைப் பான விழா, தென்னைப் பான விழா, பழச்சாறு சுவைக்கும் விழா போன்ற விழாக்கள் நடத்தப்படும். இதன்மூலம் பனை மற்றும் தென்னை பொருட்கள் முதன்மை பெற்று வேளாண் வருவாய் அதிகரிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 405
impact_mechanism: This promise attempts to increase incomes for palm and coconut farmers by creating a new, high-value market for their products through tourism.

promise_components.component: Develop entertainment-focused tourism featuring festivals for palm wine, coconut toddy, and fruit juices.
promise_components.analysis: This involves event organization by the tourism department and, crucially, a policy change to the state's excise laws to permit the legal sale and consumption of toddy and palm wine. The implementation is contingent on this legal change.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Festival costs are unknown. The net fiscal impact is also unknown, as it could generate new excise revenue but also incur enforcement and public health costs.
sustainability_reasoning: If the significant legal and regulatory hurdles for selling toddy are overcome, this could create a new, permanent value chain linking agriculture to tourism. This would structurally improve income opportunities for palm and coconut farmers.
coverage_gap_note: This initiative would not benefit farmers who do not cultivate palm or coconut trees.

promise_text_en: In tourist accommodations, traditional Tamil beverages from palm and coconut trees will be served. Additionally, naturally grown mountain fruits, tubers, and country meat will be made available, boosting local employment and direct sales for farmers.
promise_text_ta: சுற்றுலாப் பகுதிகளில் தங்குமிடங்களிலேயே தமிழர் தேசிய பானங்களான பனை, தென்னை போன்ற மரங்களிலிருந்து கிடைக்கும் பானங்கள் வழங்கப்படும். மேலும் இயற்கையில் விளைந்த மலைப் பழங்கள், கிழங்குகள் போன்ற உணவுப் பொருட்கள் தோட்டப் பகுதிகளிலேயே வழங்கப்படும். மேலும் நாட்டு விலங்கின இறைச்சி வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 405
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to boost local agricultural income by creating direct supply chains from farmers and producers to tourist accommodations.

promise_components.component: Ensure traditional beverages from palm and coconut, mountain fruits, tubers, and country meat are served in tourist accommodations.
promise_components.analysis: This is a supply-chain and local sourcing initiative. The government's role would be to facilitate, regulate, and possibly incentivize this linkage. Serving palm/coconut beverages is subject to changes in excise laws. The cost is borne by the businesses, not the state.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state budget, other than minor administrative or promotional expenses. The cost of goods is borne by the hospitality businesses.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative aims to build a lasting economic link between local agricultural producers and the tourism industry. By creating a direct market, it can provide a sustainable income boost for farmers and reduce their reliance on intermediaries.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to farmers and producers located in or near tourist destinations with participating accommodations.

promise_text_en: Annual traditional, cultural, and regional festivals will be organized. The tourism department will lead in conducting these festivals, including regional food festivals featuring seafood, mountain food, forest food, Chettinad cuisine, and Karisal region food for all to experience.
promise_text_ta: ஆண்டுதோறும் பாரம்பரியத் திருவிழா, பண்பாட்டுத் திருவிழா மற்றும் மண்டலத் திருவிழாக்கள் நடத்தப்படும். மண்டலம்தோறும் உள்ள திருவிழாக்களை சுற்றுலாத்துறையே முன்னின்று நடத்தும். மேலும் மண்டல அளவில் உணவுத் திருவிழாக்கள் நடத்தப்பட்டு கடல் உணவு, மலை உணவு, வன உணவு, செட்டிநாட்டு உணவு, கரிசல் பகுதி உணவு போன்றவை அனைவரும் அறிந்து சுவைக்க ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 405
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to promote local culture and provide temporary economic opportunities for food vendors and artisans through state-organized festivals.

promise_components.component: Organize annual traditional, cultural, and regional festivals, including specific regional food festivals.
promise_components.analysis: This is an event management task for the state tourism department. The costs would depend on the number, scale, and duration of these festivals. Reference data does not provide costs for organizing such events.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. This would be a recurring annual expenditure for the tourism department.
sustainability_reasoning: Festivals provide a short-term platform for sales and cultural expression. However, they are periodic events and do not change the underlying economic conditions for food producers or artisans for the rest of the year.
coverage_gap_note: The economic benefits are temporary and limited to those who can participate in the festivals.

promise_text_en: Every evening at all tourist lodges, performances of traditional Tamil arts, music, drama, folk music, and martial arts such as Silambam, Karakattam, and Villupattu will be conducted with sound and light systems.
promise_text_ta: சுற்றுலா விடுதிகள் அனைத்திலும் நாள்தோறும் மாலை வேளைகளில் தமிழர் மரபுக் கலைகள், இயல் இசை நாடகங்கள், நாட்டுப்புறப் பண்ணிசை, தெருக்கூத்துக் கலை, பொம்மலாட்டம், மயிலாட்டம், ஒயிலாட்டம், வில்லுப்பாட்டு, பொய்க்கால் குதிரை, கரகாட்டம், சிலம்பக் காட்சி, மற்போர் காட்சி, குத்துவரிசை போன்ற நிகழ்ச்சிகள் ஒலி ஒளி அமைப்போடு நடத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 405
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide stable employment and income for traditional artists by creating a large-scale, regular performance program.

promise_components.component: Conduct nightly performances of traditional Tamil arts at all tourist lodges, with sound and light systems.
promise_components.analysis: The term 'all tourist lodges' is ambiguous. If it includes private lodges, implementation would be complex. The cost would involve hiring numerous artist troupes daily across the state. The number of lodges and required artists is not in the reference data, making a cost calculation impossible. This would be a significant recurring expense.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The potential annual cost could be substantial, involving daily payments to a large number of artists across the state.
sustainability_reasoning: If implemented, this would create a permanent, state-supported employment structure for folk artists, moving them from precarious gig work to a stable income source. This would fundamentally alter their economic reality, though the logistical and financial scale makes it very challenging.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to artists practicing the specific traditional forms selected for the program.

promise_text_en: Government advertisements for newspapers will be distributed without discrimination, based on equal allocation for all.
promise_text_ta: நாளேடுகளுக்கான அரசு விளம்பரம், அனைவருக்கும் சமமான எண்ணிக்கையின் அடிப்படையில் பாகுபாடில்லாமல் அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: This promise signals a policy shift in how government advertising funds are allocated among newspapers, aiming for fairness.

promise_components.component: Distribute government advertisements to newspapers based on 'equal allocation for all'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change for the Information & Public Relations department. The term 'equal allocation' is ambiguous and practically unworkable if interpreted literally (e.g., same ad revenue for a small local paper and a major state daily). It ignores standard advertising metrics like circulation and reach.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a reallocation of the existing government advertising budget, not new spending.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is a political statement against perceived favouritism in ad distribution. The mechanism of 'equal allocation' is ill-defined and impractical, suggesting the primary goal is signalling rather than creating a workable, transparent policy.
coverage_gap_note: This policy only addresses newspaper advertisements, excluding television, radio, and digital media.

promise_text_en: Arrangements will be made to provide necessary assistance from the government for the electricity tariffs of print and visual media, in a way that does not cause losses.
promise_text_ta: அச்சு, காட்சி ஊடகங்களுக்கான மின்கட்டணத்தில் இழப்பு ஏற்படாத வகையில் அரசிடம் இருந்து தேவைப்படும் உதவிகள் கிடைக்க ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: This promise provides a direct financial subsidy to media companies by reducing one of their key operational costs.

promise_components.component: Provide assistance for the electricity tariffs of print and visual media.
promise_components.analysis: This is a subsidy, likely administered as a discounted tariff or a rebate. The total cost depends on the number of eligible media houses, their electricity consumption, and the subsidy level. This data is not available in the reference materials.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would be a recurring annual subsidy paid by the government.
sustainability_reasoning: This subsidy provides financial relief for an operational cost. It alleviates a symptom (high costs) for a specific industry but does not address the underlying structural challenges facing the media business model, such as declining readership or advertising revenue.
coverage_gap_note: The promise excludes digital-only media organizations, which also have significant operational costs.

promise_text_en: To protect the welfare of print and visual media employees, guaranteed wage benefits will be ensured to protect their basic rights and livelihood.
promise_text_ta: அச்சு, காட்சி ஊடக ஊழியர்களின் நலனை முன்னிட்டு அவர்களின் ஊதியத்தில் அடிப்படை உரிமைகள், வாழ்வாதாரம் ஆகியவை பாதிக்காத வகையில் உறுதிபடுத்தப்பட்ட ஊதிய பலன்கள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve the livelihood of media workers by using the state's regulatory power to enforce better wages and benefits.

promise_components.component: Ensure guaranteed wage benefits for print and visual media employees.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory promise, not a direct expenditure. It implies stricter enforcement of existing national wage boards for journalists or the creation of a new state-level wage standard. The government's role is inspection and enforcement through the labour department.

fiscal_cost_note: Minimal direct fiscal cost, primarily for administrative and enforcement capacity within the labour department.
sustainability_reasoning: By enforcing a wage floor, this promise aims to permanently alter the terms of employment in the media industry. It is a regulatory intervention to correct a power imbalance between employers and employees, addressing the root cause of low or insecure pay.
coverage_gap_note: This may not cover the large number of freelancers, stringers, and contract workers who are not classified as formal employees.

promise_text_en: A full-body health check-up scheme will be implemented once a year at government expense for all print, visual, and web journalists, photographers, videographers, and other related media employees.
promise_text_ta: அச்சு, காட்சி, வலைத்தள இதழியலாளர்கள், ஒளிப்படக் கலைஞர்கள், காணொலிப் பதிவாளர்கள், துறை சார்ந்த ஊழியர்கள் அனைவருக்கும் ஆண்டிற்கு ஒரு முறை அரசு செலவில் முழு உடல் ஆய்வுத் திட்டம் செயல்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: Provides a preventative healthcare benefit to a specific professional group by covering the cost of an annual health screening.

promise_components.component: A full-body health check-up scheme once a year for all media employees.
promise_components.analysis: The number of eligible media employees (print, visual, web, etc.) is not available in the reference data. The cost per full-body health check-up is also not available. Therefore, the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost cannot be estimated as the number of beneficiaries and the unit cost per health check-up are not available in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides a valuable health benefit but does not address underlying issues like low pay, job insecurity, or stressful working conditions that may contribute to poor health. It treats a symptom (potential health issues) rather than the cause.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes freelance, part-time, or unaccredited media workers who may not be formally recognized as employees.

promise_text_en: A "Media Arts Training Center" will be established for print, visual, and web journalists, photographers, and videographers to provide training on new innovations.
promise_text_ta: அச்சு, காட்சி, வலைத்தள ஊடகவியலாளர்கள், புகைப்படக் கலைஞர்கள் மற்றும் காணொலிப் பதிவாளர்களுக்காக, “ஊடகக் கலைக்கூட பயிற்சி மையம்” ஒன்று ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: Enhances professional skills and employability for media workers by establishing a dedicated training institution.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'Media Arts Training Center' for journalists, photographers, and videographers.
promise_components.analysis: The promise involves a one-time capital cost for establishing the center and recurring operational costs for running it. No cost estimates are provided in the promise or available in the reference data. Therefore, the fiscal impact cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The capital and operational expenditure for a new training center are not specified and cannot be estimated from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses a root cause by tackling skill gaps and helping media professionals adapt to technological changes. Up-skilling provides a lasting benefit to both the individuals and the industry.
coverage_gap_note: Access may be limited by the center's physical location and intake capacity, potentially excluding those in remote areas.

promise_text_en: The current system, where visual media employees do not receive benefits from the information department despite the sector being 30 years old, will be changed. The government will ensure they are eligible for government schemes.
promise_text_ta: காட்சி ஊடகம் வந்து முப்பது ஆண்டுகள் கடந்துவிட்டது, ஆனாலும் அதில் உள்ளவர்களுக்குச் செய்தி ஒளிபரப்புத் துறையின் எந்த சலுகைகளும், உரிமைகளும் அளிக்கப்படுவதில்லை. இந்த முறையை மாற்றி, காட்சி ஊடகத்தில் இருப்பவர்களுக்கும் அரசின் திட்டங்கள் கிடைக்க நாம் தமிழர் அரசு வழிவகை செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: Expands the social safety net for a professional group by changing regulations to grant them access to existing government welfare schemes.

promise_components.component: Ensure visual media employees are eligible for government welfare schemes.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory change. The financial impact depends on the number of visual media employees and the specific schemes they would become eligible for. This data is not available in the reference materials, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The incremental cost depends on the number of new beneficiaries and the benefits of the schemes they join, neither of which is known.
sustainability_reasoning: Integrating a previously excluded group into the state's formal social safety net is a structural change. It provides a permanent improvement in their access to benefits and formal recognition by the state.
coverage_gap_note: The definition of 'visual media employee' may exclude freelancers or contract workers who lack formal proof of employment.

promise_text_en: The pension for journalists will be increased from ₹12,000 to ₹15,000 per month.
promise_text_ta: இதழியலாளர்களுக்கு கிடைக்கும் ஓய்வூதியம் மாதம் 12,000 உருபாய் என்பது 15,000 உருபாயாக உயர்த்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: Increases the monthly income for a specific group of retirees through a direct enhancement of their pension benefit.

promise_components.component: Increase the pension for journalists from ₹12,000 to ₹15,000 per month.
promise_components.analysis: The monthly increase per beneficiary is ₹3,000 (₹15,000 - ₹12,000). The annual increase per beneficiary is ₹36,000 (₹3,000 x 12). The total number of journalist pensioners is not available in the reference data, so the total annual cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The total cost cannot be calculated without knowing the number of journalists receiving the pension.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides direct financial relief to retired journalists, addressing the symptom of inadequate retirement income. It does not alter the professional or economic structures that lead to a need for state pensions.
coverage_gap_note: This only benefits journalists already eligible for the state pension, excluding those who do not meet the criteria.

promise_text_en: The process for providing family pension to the spouse of a deceased journalist will be simplified. A committee comprising the Public Relations Officer (PRO) and a senior journalist will be formed in each district to resolve pending applications.
promise_text_ta: ஓய்வூதியம் பெற்று வந்த இதழியலாளர் மறைந்த பிறகு, அவரது துணைவியாருக்குக் குடும்ப ஓய்வூதியம் வழங்கும் முறைகளில் உள்ள தடைகளைக் களைந்து எளிமையாக்கப்படும். ஒவ்வொரு மாவட்டத்திலும் செய்தி மக்கள் தொடர்பு அலுவலர் (PRO) மற்றும் மூத்த இதழியலாளர் அடங்கிய குழுவை அமைத்துத் தீர்வு காணப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: Reduces bureaucratic delays for bereaved families by creating a simplified, decentralized process for accessing an existing benefit.

promise_components.component: Simplify the family pension process for spouses of deceased journalists.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative reform. It proposes forming district-level committees to resolve pending applications. There is no direct financial outlay specified; the cost would be the administrative time of the committee members.

promise_components.component: Form a district committee with a PRO and a senior journalist to resolve applications.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural change with negligible direct cost, as it utilizes existing government staff and potentially volunteer time.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible direct cost. This is a procedural and administrative reform, not a new spending program.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to fix a broken administrative process. By simplifying procedures and creating a dedicated resolution body, it creates a lasting improvement in service delivery for a specific government benefit.
coverage_gap_note: This does not help families of journalists who were not eligible for the pension scheme to begin with.

promise_text_en: Action will be taken to bring employees of news portals and social media under the welfare board by providing them with proper accreditation.
promise_text_ta: தற்போது செய்தி இணையத்தளங்கள் (News Portals) மற்றும் சமூக ஊடகங்களில் பணியாற்றுபவர்களுக்கும் முறையான ஏற்பிசைவு வழங்கி, அவர்களையும் நல வாரியத்தின் கீழ் கொண்டு வருவதற்கான நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 407
impact_mechanism: Extends formal recognition and welfare benefits to digital media workers by including them in the state's accreditation system and welfare board.

promise_components.component: Bring employees of news portals and social media under the welfare board through accreditation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory expansion. The cost depends on the number of newly accredited digital media workers and the benefits provided by the welfare board. Neither of these figures is available in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The number of potential beneficiaries is large, undefined, and growing, and the costs of welfare board benefits are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural reform that attempts to adapt the state's social safety net to the modern digital economy. Granting formal recognition and benefits to a new class of precarious workers addresses a root cause of their insecurity.
coverage_gap_note: Defining and accrediting 'employees' of news portals and social media is extremely difficult and will likely exclude a vast number of freelancers and gig workers.

promise_text_en: To overcome the difficulty of obtaining service certificates, a system will be introduced to accept the 'Accreditation Card' or a confirmation from journalists' associations as proof of service for availing government benefits.
promise_text_ta: ‘மதிப்பிசைவு அட்டை' (Accreditation Card) அல்லது இதழியலாளர் சங்கங்களின் உறுதிமொழியை ஆதாரமாக ஏற்கும் நடைமுறை கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 409
impact_mechanism: Simplifies access to existing government benefits by allowing more flexible forms of proof of profession.

promise_components.component: Accept 'Accreditation Card' or a letter from journalists' associations as proof of service.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural simplification with no direct financial cost. It changes an administrative rule to make it easier for journalists to prove their professional status when applying for benefits.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is an administrative simplification, not a spending promise.
sustainability_reasoning: This fixes a procedural barrier ('red tape'), which is a type of structural problem in governance. It creates a lasting improvement in the ease of access to benefits for the target group.
coverage_gap_note: This does not help journalists who are neither accredited nor members of a recognized association.

promise_text_en: A 'Website Regulation Committee' will be formed to bring web media employees under the government's purview. A "Working Journalist" law will be enacted to identify and accredit full-time journalists who depend on the profession for their livelihood.
promise_text_ta: வலைத்தள ஊடக ஊழியர்களையும் அரசுச் செய்தி ஒளிபரப்புத் துறையின் வரம்பிற்குள் கொண்டு வர, ‘வலைத்தளங்கள் முறைப்படுத்தும் குழு’ ஒன்று அமைக்கப்படும். எனவே “பணிபுரியும் இதழியலாளர்” சட்டத்தின்படி, யாரெல்லாம் முழு நேர இதழியலாளர்களாக, அதையே வாழ்வாதாரத் தொழிலாகக் கொண்டிருக்கின்றார்களோ, அவர்களை எல்லாம் அக்குழு தேர்வு செய்து இசைவேற்பு பெற்றவர்களாக ஏற்றுக்கொள்ளும் என நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதியளிக்கின்றது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 409
impact_mechanism: Creates a formal legal and regulatory framework to define and recognize journalists in the digital age.

promise_components.component: Form a 'Website Regulation Committee'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory action with minimal direct cost, primarily administrative.

promise_components.component: Enact a 'Working Journalist' law to identify and accredit full-time journalists.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative action. The cost of implementation would be administrative, related to creating and managing the accreditation process. No direct spending is specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible direct cost. The promise involves creating a committee and enacting legislation, which are not significant line items in a state budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a legal definition of a 'working journalist' for the modern era is a foundational, structural change. It aims to solve the root problem of who qualifies for professional status and benefits in a rapidly changing media landscape.
coverage_gap_note: Any legal definition of a 'full-time working journalist' will inevitably exclude part-time, freelance, and citizen journalists.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will view cinema as the beautiful artistic face of the Tamil nation and as a powerful medium to showcase Tamil language, art, literature, culture, lifestyle, and aesthetics to the world.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு திரைக்கலையைத் தமிழ்த் தேசிய இனத்தின் அழகிய கலை முகமாகவும், தமிழ் மொழி, கலை, இலக்கியம், பண்பாடு, வாழ்வியல் மரபு, அழகியல் போன்றவற்றை உலகறியச் செய்வதற்கான வலிமைமிக்க ஊடகமாகவும் பார்க்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 411
impact_mechanism: Articulates a cultural policy vision for the film industry without proposing any specific action or resource allocation.

promise_components.component: View cinema as the artistic face of the Tamil nation and a medium to showcase Tamil culture globally.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent and cultural philosophy. It does not contain any measurable or costable actions. It is a declaration of values, not a policy commitment.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a philosophical statement.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a political statement about cultural values. It has no concrete mechanism, offers no material benefit, and does not address any specific problem within the film industry or society.

promise_text_en: The film industry will be transformed from a medium that instills addiction through the eyes into a library through the eyes. It will be changed from an art for mere pastime into an art that creates meaningful times.
promise_text_ta: கண் வழியே வெறிமத்தை (போதை) ஊட்டும் வகையில் இல்லாமல், கண்வழி நூலகமாகத் திரைத்துறை மாற்றி அமைக்கப்படும். வெறும் பொழுதைப் போக்குவதற்கான கலையாக இல்லாமல் நல்ல பொழுதை ஆக்குவதற்கான கலையாக மாற்றும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 411
impact_mechanism: Expresses an aspirational goal for the social and artistic role of cinema without outlining any policy to achieve it.

promise_components.component: Transform the film industry from a medium of 'addiction' to a 'library through the eyes'.
promise_components.analysis: This is an abstract, metaphorical statement about the desired quality and purpose of cinema. It is not a concrete, analyzable promise and has no associated actions or costs.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a statement of artistic and social goals.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a slogan, not a policy. It expresses a value judgment on the current state of cinema but proposes no mechanism, funding, or regulation to enact the desired change. It is purely for political signalling.

promise_text_en: The art of filmmaking will be included as a subject in primary education.
promise_text_ta: திரைப்படக்கலையைத் தொடக்கக் கல்வியில் ஒரு பாடமாக வைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 413
impact_mechanism: Integrates filmmaking into the state curriculum to foster creative skills from a young age.

promise_components.component: Include filmmaking as a subject in primary education.
promise_components.analysis: This would apply to the ~53,000 government schools. The cost for curriculum development, training teachers, and procuring equipment for this number of schools is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Cost is unquantifiable as it depends on the scale of teacher training and equipment procurement. No figures are provided in the promise or reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This aims to build a foundational skill set and creative aptitude within the public education system, a long-term structural change. However, its success depends heavily on the quality of implementation, including teacher training and equipment access.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes students in private schools.

promise_text_en: The "Tamil Nadu Film Development Corporation" will be established to facilitate the production of films for the upliftment of the Tamil people.
promise_text_ta: “தமிழ்நாடு திரைப்பட வளர்ச்சிக் கழகம்” தொடங்கித் தமிழ் மக்களின் வாழ்வியல் மேம்பாட்டுக்கான படங்களை எடுக்க ஏற்பாடு செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 413
impact_mechanism: Creates a state-run corporation to provide institutional support and financing for the film industry.

promise_components.component: Establish the 'Tamil Nadu Film Development Corporation'.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new public sector undertaking. The cost includes administrative setup (office, staff) and an operational budget for facilitating film production. The size of this operational budget is not specified and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The administrative cost is likely minor, but the core cost for 'facilitating production' (e.g., grants, loans) is undefined. The total fiscal impact cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing a permanent institution to support an industry is a structural intervention. Its effectiveness will depend entirely on its funding level, mandate, and ability to operate without political interference.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated within the film production community, not the general public.

promise_text_en: To continuously collect and preserve documents related to our cinema, the 'Tamil Nadu Film Archive' will be created.
promise_text_ta: நம் திரைக்கலையைக் குறித்த ஆவணங்களைத் தொடர்ந்து சேகரித்துப் பாதுகாக்க, ‘தமிழ்நாட்டு திரைப்பட ஆவணக் காப்பகம்’ உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 413
impact_mechanism: Establishes a state institution for the preservation of cinematic cultural heritage.

promise_components.component: Create the 'Tamil Nadu Film Archive' to collect and preserve film-related documents.
promise_components.analysis: This requires capital expenditure for a building with climate-controlled storage and digitization facilities, plus recurring costs for specialized staff. The scale and associated costs are not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for construction and operation of a specialized archive is not defined in the promise and cannot be calculated from reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This creates a permanent institution for cultural preservation, addressing the long-term risk of losing historical materials. It is a structural investment in cultural heritage infrastructure.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits researchers, historians, and future generations rather than providing immediate relief or opportunity to the current population.

promise_text_en: High-level awards will be given annually in the name of the great Tamilian Nataraja Mudaliar, who first created and directed a film in Tamil.
promise_text_ta: தமிழில் முதலாகத் திரைப்படம் உருவாக்கி இயக்கிய பெருந்தமிழர் நடராச முதலியார் பெயரில் ஒவ்வொரு ஆண்டும் உயரிய விருதுகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 413
impact_mechanism: Confers prestige and recognition within the film industry through a state-sponsored award.

promise_components.component: Give high-level annual awards in the name of Nataraja Mudaliar.
promise_components.analysis: The cost includes prize money, an awards ceremony, and administration. The term 'high-level' is subjective and the monetary value is not specified, so a cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is unquantifiable but likely to be a very small fraction of the discretionary budget. Cannot be calculated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Awards are a form of political and cultural signalling. They provide recognition to a few individuals but do not change the underlying economic or structural conditions of the film industry.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits only a handful of award recipients each year.

promise_text_en: Film colleges will be started in the five zones of Tamil Nadu in the names of Nataraja Mudaliar, Vincent Samikannu, Nadigar Thilagam Sivaji Ganesan, Kalaivanar N.S. Krishnan, and Aachi Manorama.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் ஐந்து மண்டலங்களிலும் நடராச முதலியார், வின்சென்ட் சாமிக்கண்ணு, நடிகர் திலகம் சிவாஜி கணேசன், கலைவாணர் என்.எஸ்.கிருஷ்ணன், ஆச்சி மனோரமா பெயரில் திரைப்படக் கல்லூரிகள் தொடங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 413
impact_mechanism: Expands access to formal film education by creating new public colleges across the state.

promise_components.component: Start five new film colleges in the five zones of Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major infrastructure project involving land acquisition, construction, and equipment for five institutions, plus significant recurring costs for faculty and operations. The cost is not specified and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The capital and operational costs for five new specialized colleges would be substantial, likely running into thousands of crores over several years. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating permanent educational institutions is a structural investment in human capital for the creative industries. It addresses a potential gap in accessible, specialized training.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits only aspiring film students and does not address immediate needs of the general population.

promise_text_en: A grand music college will be started in the name of Maestro Ilaiyaraaja. In this college, Tamil music, Western music, Indian music, Carnatic music, and folk music will all be taught.
promise_text_ta: இசைமேதை இளையராஜா பெயரில் மாபெரும் இசைக்கல்லூரி தொடங்கப்படும். அக்கல்லூரியில் தமிழ் இசை, மேற்கத்திய இசை, இந்திய இசை, கருநாடக இசை, நாட்டுப்புற இசை என அனைத்தும் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 413
impact_mechanism: Creates a premier state institution for advanced and diverse musical education.

promise_components.component: Start a grand music college in the name of Maestro Ilaiyaraaja.
promise_components.analysis: This involves significant capital expenditure for a 'grand' college with specialized facilities (e.g., concert halls, studios) and recurring costs for a diverse, expert faculty. The cost is not specified and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for a single, high-end 'grand' institution is undefined but would be significant. The promise is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Like the film colleges, this is a structural investment in educational infrastructure for the arts. It aims to build a center of excellence for musical training.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits only aspiring music students.

promise_text_en: A separate censor department will be established for Tamil Nadu. The Naam Tamilar government will negotiate with the Union government to establish a 'State Censor Department'.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டுக்கென்று தனித் தணிக்கைத் துறை ஏற்படுத்தப்படும். நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ஒன்றிய அரசுடன் பேசி, ‘மாநிலத் தணிக்கைத் துறை’ ஒன்றை ஏற்படுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Asserts state autonomy over cultural products by seeking to establish a state-level film certification body.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'State Censor Department' after negotiating with the Union government.
promise_components.analysis: Film censorship is under the Union List of the Indian Constitution. Implementation is contingent on the Union government ceding this power, which is a legal and political matter, not a financial one. The direct cost of running such a department would be minimal.

fiscal_cost_note: Fiscal cost is negligible. The primary barrier is legal and constitutional, as it requires the consent of the Union government.
sustainability_reasoning: This is primarily a political statement about state rights and cultural autonomy. Its implementation is outside the state's unilateral control, making it a promise of political intent rather than a deliverable policy.

promise_text_en: For Tamil films that promote Tamil language and culture, the government will provide financial assistance and tax exemption, and will also purchase and screen the best films.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்ப் படங்களில் தமிழ் மொழி, பண்பாட்டை மேம்படுத்தி எடுக்கும் படங்களுக்கு அரசு பொருளாதார உதவி செய்து வரி விலக்கு அளிப்பதோடு, அரசே சிறந்த திரைப்படங்களை வாங்கித் திரையிடச் செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Uses financial incentives and state purchasing power to promote films aligned with specific cultural values.

promise_components.component: Provide financial assistance and tax exemption for films promoting Tamil language and culture.
promise_components.analysis: The amount of financial aid is not specified. Tax exemption implies forgoing the state's portion of GST revenue on ticket sales, the value of which is unknown. The cost of purchasing and screening films is also undefined.

promise_components.component: The government will purchase and screen the best films.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of purchasing film rights and the screening mechanism are not specified and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The total cost, combining direct spending (assistance, purchasing) and revenue foregone (tax exemption), is undefined and cannot be estimated.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides subsidies and incentives, which is a form of relief or reward for certain producers. It does not alter the fundamental market structure or economics of the film industry.
coverage_gap_note: The criteria for 'promoting Tamil culture' are subjective and could exclude many filmmakers.

promise_text_en: Double tax will be imposed on films that are against these values and on films that do not have a Tamil title.
promise_text_ta: இவற்றுக்கு எதிராக இருக்கும் படங்களுக்கும், தமிழில் தலைப்பு இல்லாத படங்களுக்கும் இரட்டிப்பு வரி விதிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Uses punitive taxation to discourage films deemed culturally inappropriate or not having Tamil titles.

promise_components.component: Impose double tax on films against Tamil values or without a Tamil title.
promise_components.analysis: Under the GST regime, states cannot unilaterally levy such taxes on cinema tickets. This promise is likely legally unenforceable. The definition of 'against Tamil values' is subjective and open to legal challenge.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a revenue-generating promise, not a cost. However, its legal feasibility under the current GST framework is highly questionable.
sustainability_reasoning: Given the legal hurdles with GST, this promise functions as a political signal about cultural policy rather than a viable fiscal measure. It is likely unimplementable in its proposed form.

promise_text_en: 'Film Cities' will be established in scenic locations in Tamil Nadu, and studios will be set up and rented out for a reasonable price.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் உள்ள இயற்கை எழில் கொஞ்சும் இடங்களில் ‘திரைப்பட நகர்’ அமைத்தும், அரங்கங்கள் நிறுவியும் முறையான தொகைக்கு வாடகைக்கு விடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Reduces film production costs and attracts projects by providing state-owned, subsidized studio infrastructure.

promise_components.component: Establish 'Film Cities' with studios for rent at a reasonable price.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale capital project. The cost of acquiring land in 'scenic locations' and constructing multiple modern studios and facilities is not specified but would be very high.

fiscal_cost_note: The capital expenditure for even one 'Film City' would be substantial, likely in the thousands of crores. The promise is uncosted and would place a major strain on the budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating permanent, subsidized infrastructure is a structural intervention designed to alter the economics of film production in the state. Its success depends on a massive upfront investment and efficient management.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are limited to film production companies and crews.

promise_text_en: Strict action will be taken against those who release films on the internet without permission.
promise_text_ta: திரைப்படங்களை இணையத்தில் அனுமதியற்று வெளியிடுபவர்களுக்கு எதிராக கடுமையான நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Strengthens intellectual property rights enforcement to protect revenue for film producers and creators.

promise_components.component: Strict action will be taken against those who release films on the internet without permission.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory and law enforcement action, not a fiscal one. It would involve strengthening the state's cybercrime division to track and prosecute online piracy. The cost is administrative and not calculable from the provided reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is administrative and related to law enforcement capacity. The amount is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise targets the root cause of revenue loss for the film industry due to illegal online distribution. If implemented effectively, it would create a more secure and sustainable business environment for content creators, though enforcement is notoriously difficult.
coverage_gap_note: This benefits the film industry but does not address the consumer demand or affordability issues that may drive piracy.

promise_text_en: Cinema theatre ticket prices, parking fees, and the price of food items sold in theatres will be regulated.
promise_text_ta: திரையரங்கக் கட்டணம், ஊர்தி நிறுத்தக் கட்டணம், திரையரங்குகளில் விற்கப்படும் உணவுப்பொருள்கள் விலை ஆகியவை முறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Reduces the cost of entertainment for the public by imposing price controls on private businesses (theatres).

promise_components.component: Cinema theatre ticket prices will be regulated.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory measure to set a cap or a formula for ticket pricing. It does not involve direct government expenditure.

promise_components.component: Parking fees at theatres will be regulated.
promise_components.analysis: This extends price controls to ancillary services offered by cinemas.

promise_components.component: The price of food items sold in theatres will be regulated.
promise_components.analysis: This imposes price caps on food and beverages, which are a major source of revenue for exhibitors.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a regulatory promise with no direct fiscal cost to the state budget. The cost is borne by theatre owners in the form of reduced revenue.
sustainability_reasoning: This provides immediate financial relief to consumers by addressing the high cost of a cinema outing. However, it does not address the underlying business models of film exhibition. Price controls may lead to unintended consequences, such as reduced investment in theatre maintenance or legal challenges.
coverage_gap_note: This benefits the cinema-going public but may negatively impact the financial health of theatre owners and employees.

promise_text_en: For international film festivals held in various countries, the government will select and send films that uplift the lives of Tamils, designating their creators and directors as 'Art Ambassadors'.
promise_text_ta: பல்வேறு நாடுகளில் நடத்தப்படும் உலகத் திரைப்பட விழாக்களுக்குத் தமிழர்களின் வாழ்வியலை மேம்படுத்தும் தகுதியான திரைப்படங்களைத் தேர்வு செய்து அதை உருவாக்கிய, இயக்கிய கலைஞர்களை ‘கலைத் தூதுவர்களாக’ அனுப்பி வைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Promotes Tamil culture and cinema on a global stage by sponsoring participation in international film festivals.

promise_components.component: The government will select and send films that uplift the lives of Tamils to international film festivals.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a selection committee and a process for identifying suitable films.

promise_components.component: Their creators and directors will be designated as 'Art Ambassadors' and sponsored by the government.
promise_components.analysis: This involves providing financial support for travel, accommodation, and festival participation for a select number of individuals.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost would include travel, lodging, and festival fees for a small delegation. The total annual cost is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data, but it would likely be a minor expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative is primarily for cultural promotion and prestige. While it provides a valuable opportunity for a few filmmakers, it does not address any structural issues within the broader film industry or for the general public.
coverage_gap_note: The benefits are highly concentrated, available only to a few filmmakers selected by a government committee each year.

promise_text_en: Similar to the Cannes Film Festival, the government itself will conduct an international film festival every year to screen the best films released in various world languages.
promise_text_ta: கேன்ஸ் திரைப்பட விழா போன்று ஒவ்வோர் ஆண்டும் உலகின் பல்வேறு மொழிகளில் வெளியாகும் சிறந்த திரைப்படங்களைத் திரையிடும் வகையில் உலகத்திரைப்பட விழாவை அரசே நடத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Creates a state-sponsored cultural event to enhance Tamil Nadu's reputation as a film hub.

promise_components.component: The government will conduct an international film festival every year.
promise_components.analysis: This requires establishing a new, large-scale annual event. It would involve significant logistical, administrative, and financial resources for venues, programming, international travel for guests, and marketing.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of a major international film festival is substantial but not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data. It would be a recurring annual expense.
sustainability_reasoning: The primary goal is to build cultural prestige and brand value for the state, similar to other international festivals. While it could have positive economic spillovers for the hospitality and film industries, it does not solve a pressing problem for the public.
coverage_gap_note: The direct benefits are concentrated within the film industry, related service sectors, and urban cinephiles.

promise_text_en: A committee will be formed to purchase the television rights of films, and measures will be taken to ensure that artists and creators from both sides are not negatively affected.
promise_text_ta: திரைப்படங்களின் தொலைக்காட்சி உரிமை வாங்க ஒரு குழு அமைத்து இரு தரப்பினரையும் சார்ந்த கலைஞர்கள் மற்றும் ஆக்குநர்கள் பாதிக்கப்படாத வகையில் நடவடிக்கைகள் எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 414
impact_mechanism: Intervenes in the market for film television rights to ensure fairer outcomes for producers and artists.

promise_components.component: A committee will be formed to purchase the television rights of films.
promise_components.analysis: This suggests the government will enter the market for TV rights, either as a buyer, intermediary, or regulator. The mechanism is unclear and could involve substantial financial transactions.

fiscal_cost_note: The potential fiscal cost is enormous and cannot be calculated. If the government becomes a major purchaser of TV rights, the expenditure could run into hundreds or thousands of crores annually.
sustainability_reasoning: This proposes a radical and vague intervention into a complex commercial market. It risks market distortion, inefficiency, and politicization of commercial decisions without a clear mechanism to ensure better outcomes. The promise is more of a political signal about controlling the market than a feasible policy.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is vague, but its focus is on producers and broadcasters, not the viewing public.

promise_text_en: The heroic histories of our race's ancestors and the life stories of great Tamils who dedicated their lives to social change will be made into documentaries and released.
promise_text_ta: எம் இன முன்னோர்களின் வீர வரலாறுகளையும், சமூக மாற்றத்திற்குத் தன் வாழ்வை ஒப்படைத்த பெருந்தமிழர்களின் வாழ்க்கை வரலாற்றையும் ஆவணப்படமாக உருவாக்கி வெளியிடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Uses state resources to produce and disseminate cultural and historical content aligned with a specific narrative.

promise_components.component: Documentaries will be made on the heroic histories of our race's ancestors and the life stories of great Tamils who dedicated their lives to social change.
promise_components.analysis: This is a state-funded content production initiative. It requires a budget for research, filming, post-production, and distribution.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for documentary production is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data. It would likely be a recurring but manageable expense within the state's information and publicity budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a cultural project aimed at promoting a specific historical narrative. While potentially educational, its primary function is ideological and for political signalling, with no direct material impact on the lives of citizens.
coverage_gap_note: The selection of historical figures and events will inherently be political, excluding narratives that do not align with the government's perspective.

promise_text_en: The history of the language martyrs who died in the language struggle and the history of martyrs who gave their lives for the race will be made into documentaries and released.
promise_text_ta: மொழிப்போரில் இறந்த மொழிப்போர் ஈகியர்களின் வரலாறும், இனத்திற்காக உயிர்விட்ட ஈகியரின் வரலாறும் ஆவணப்படமாக எடுத்து வெளியிடப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Uses state resources to produce and disseminate historical content focused on specific political struggles.

promise_components.component: Documentaries will be made on the history of the language martyrs and martyrs who gave their lives for the race.
promise_components.analysis: Similar to the previous promise, this is a state-funded content production initiative with a specific focus on political martyrs.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for documentary production is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data. It would be a recurring expense within the state's information and publicity budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This project uses public funds to reinforce a specific political and historical narrative centered on martyrdom. Its purpose is primarily ideological and serves to strengthen a particular political identity, rather than addressing material concerns.
coverage_gap_note: The focus on specific martyrs reinforces a particular political identity, potentially marginalizing other historical struggles or figures.

promise_text_en: A board will be established for the television industry.
promise_text_ta: சின்னத்திரைக்கு வாரியம் ஏற்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Creates a new regulatory or development body to oversee the television industry.

promise_components.component: A board will be established for the television industry.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative action to create a new government body. Its function, powers, and purpose are not defined in the promise.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost would be administrative, covering salaries for board members and staff, and operational expenses. The exact amount is not specified and cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is to create a bureaucratic structure without defining the problem it is meant to solve. It is a promise of process, not outcome, and its impact is unknown until its mandate is clarified.
coverage_gap_note: It is unclear who benefits until the board's purpose (e.g., industry development, censorship, dispute resolution) is defined.

promise_text_en: Since entire families, including women and children, watch television programs extensively, the government will properly censor these programs and their advertisements before broadcast.
promise_text_ta: பெண்கள், குழந்தைகள் உட்பட குடும்பத்தினர் அனைவரும் தொலைக்காட்சி நிகழ்ச்சிகளை அதிகமாகப் பார்ப்பதால் அந்நிகழ்ச்சிகளையும் அதில் வரும் விளம்பரங்களையும் அரசு முறையாகத் தணிக்கை செய்து ஒளிபரப்ப வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Expands state censorship from films to all television content and advertising to enforce specific social or cultural norms.

promise_components.component: The government will properly censor television programs and their advertisements before broadcast.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes a pre-censorship system for all TV content, which is currently regulated by a central act. This would require establishing a new, large censorship body and could face legal challenges regarding jurisdiction and freedom of speech.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost would be administrative, for setting up and running a new censorship authority. The amount is not specified and cannot be calculated.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise signals a stance on moral policing but is legally and practically difficult to implement. Broadcasting is largely under central jurisdiction, and such a move would face significant legal hurdles and opposition on free speech grounds.
coverage_gap_note: This measure restricts the creative freedom of content creators and the viewing choices of the entire population.

promise_text_en: Similar to films, the government will provide financial assistance to television serials that promote Tamil language, culture, and philosophy.
promise_text_ta: திரைப்படத்தைப் போலவே தமிழ்மொழி, பண்பாடு, மெய்யியலை மேம்படுத்தும் தொலைக்காட்சித் தொடர்களுக்கு அரசு பொருளாதார உதவிகள் செய்யும்.

promise_components.analysis: This is a subsidy scheme that requires a budget and a selection committee to award grants based on subjective cultural criteria.

fiscal_cost_note: The total financial outlay is not specified and cannot be calculated from the reference data. The cost depends entirely on the number of grants and their value.
