promise_text_en: The government itself will produce and broadcast great epics like Silappathikaram and Manimekalai as long-running serials.
promise_text_ta: சிலப்பதிகாரம், மணிமேகலை போன்ற பெரும் காப்பியங்களை நெடுந்தொடராக அரசே உருவாக்கி ஒளிபரப்பு செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Uses state-controlled media to produce and disseminate cultural content intended to reinforce Tamil identity.

promise_components.component: The government will produce and broadcast long-running television serials based on Tamil epics like Silappathikaram and Manimekalai.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of production for a 'long-running serial' is not specified and cannot be determined from the reference data. Similarly, broadcast costs are unknown.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is unstated and cannot be estimated from the provided reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a cultural promotion project. It does not address a root cause of socio-economic hardship but serves as a vehicle for cultural and political messaging.

promise_text_en: Annual awards will be given to the best television artists.
promise_text_ta: சிறந்த சின்னத்திரை கலைஞர்களுக்கு ஆண்டுதோறும் விருதுகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Provides official state recognition to television artists through an annual awards ceremony.

promise_components.component: Annual awards will be given to the best television artists.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of establishing and running an awards ceremony, including prize money and event logistics, is not specified in the promise or available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost is unstated, but typically minor for state budgets. It cannot be estimated from the provided reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: An awards ceremony provides recognition but does not alter the underlying economic structure or working conditions of the television industry. It is a gesture of appreciation rather than a structural intervention.

promise_text_en: An environment will be created for the theatrical release of short films. The government itself will purchase and screen the best short films.
promise_text_ta: குறும்படங்களைத் திரையில் வெளியிடும் நிலை உருவாக்கப்படும். சிறந்த குறும்படங்களை அரசே வாங்கித் திரையிடச் செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Creates a state-supported market and distribution channel for short films, which typically lack commercial theatrical viability.

promise_components.component: Create an environment for the theatrical release of short films.
promise_components.analysis: This is a vague policy goal with no specific, measurable actions or costs attached.

promise_components.component: The government will purchase and screen the best short films.
promise_components.analysis: The number of films to be purchased, the price per film, and the cost of screening are all unspecified and cannot be calculated from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The costs associated with purchasing and screening an unknown number of films are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: This treats the symptom—a lack of a commercial market for short films—by creating a government-funded alternative. It provides relief for filmmakers but does not create a self-sustaining commercial ecosystem for their work.

promise_text_en: Short film festivals will be conducted in every district and awards will be given.
promise_text_ta: மாவட்டந்தோறும் குறும்படவிழாக்கள் நடத்தப்பட்டு விருதுகள் வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 415
impact_mechanism: Decentralizes cultural events by creating local platforms for short filmmakers to showcase their work and receive recognition.

promise_components.component: Short film festivals will be conducted in every district.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts in Tamil Nadu and the cost to run a festival (venue, logistics, jury, prizes) are not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of districts and the cost per festival are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Similar to other award promises, this offers a platform and recognition but does not create a sustainable economic model for the art form. It is primarily a promotional activity.

promise_text_en: Job opportunities will be created for many Tamil scholars at Thanjavur Tamil University. With them, steps will be taken to undertake advanced research in fields like palm-leaf manuscripts, epigraphy, and maritime studies, and to promote it globally.
promise_text_ta: தஞ்சைத் தமிழ்ப் பல்கலைக்கழகத்தில் பல தமிழ் அறிஞர்களுக்கு ஒரே இடத்தில் வேலைவாய்ப்பு உருவாக்கித் தரப்படும். அவர்களைக் கொண்டு, ஓலைச்சுவடிகள், கல்வெட்டு, கடலாய்வு போன்ற துறைகளில் உயர் ஆய்வுகளை மேற்கொள்ளவும், அதை உலகளவில் முன்னெடுத்துச் செல்லவும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 417
impact_mechanism: Builds institutional capacity for advanced research in specific Tamil humanities fields by creating funded academic positions.

promise_components.component: Create job opportunities for 'many' Tamil scholars at Thanjavur Tamil University for research in specific fields.
promise_components.analysis: The number of jobs to be created is not specified. The salary for a university scholar is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of new positions and their associated salaries are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating permanent, state-funded academic positions is a structural change. It builds lasting institutional capacity for research and knowledge production in targeted fields, addressing the root issue of limited resources for such scholarship.

promise_text_en: The government will take responsibility for and protect palm-leaf manuscripts currently with private individuals. The locked-up palm-leaf manuscripts in the Thanjavur Saraswathi Mahal Library will be brought under government control. A committee of scholars will be formed to study and bring to light the lakhs of unread palm-leaf manuscripts.
promise_text_ta: தனியார்களிடம் இருக்கும் ஓலைச்சுவடிகளை அரசே பொறுப்பேற்றுப் பாதுகாப்பை அளிக்கும். தஞ்சை சரசுவதி மகாலில் பூட்டப்பட்டுக் கிடக்கும் ஓலைச்சுவடிகள் அரசு கட்டுப்பாட்டிற்குள் கொண்டுவரப்படும். இதுவரை வாசிக்கப்படாமலே இருக்கின்ற இலக்கக்கணக்கான ஓலைச்சுவடிகளைப் படித்தாய்ந்து வெளிக்கொண்டுவர அறிஞர்கள் குழு அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 417
impact_mechanism: Establishes a formal state-led system for the preservation, consolidation, and academic study of historical manuscripts.

promise_components.component: The government will take responsibility for and protect palm-leaf manuscripts from private individuals and the Thanjavur Saraswathi Mahal Library.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of acquiring, cataloging, and preserving these manuscripts is not specified.

promise_components.component: A committee of scholars will be formed to study 'lakhs' of unread manuscripts.
promise_components.analysis: The cost of funding a committee of scholars is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The costs for acquisition, preservation, and scholarly review are undefined.
sustainability_reasoning: This initiative creates a permanent, state-backed framework to address the potential loss and neglect of historical artifacts. By institutionalizing their protection and study, it provides a structural solution for heritage preservation.

promise_text_en: To revive traditional arts like Paraiyisai, Therukoothu, Mayilattam, and Oyilattam, workshops and art events will be conducted in every district in collaboration with the Tamil Nadu Tourism Department to train the new generation of youth.
promise_text_ta: பறையிசை, தெருக்கூத்து, மயிலாட்டம், ஒயிலாட்டம் போன்ற மரபுக் கலைகள் எல்லாம் மீட்டுருவாக்கம் செய்ய, மாவட்டந்தோறும் தமிழகச் சுற்றுலாத் துறையோடு சேர்ந்து பட்டறைக் கலை நிகழ்ச்சிகளாக புதிய தலைமுறை இளைஞர்களுக்குப் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 419
impact_mechanism: Aims to transmit traditional art forms to a new generation by funding decentralized training workshops and performance events.

promise_components.component: Workshops and art events will be conducted in every district to train youth in traditional arts like Paraiyisai and Therukoothu.
promise_components.analysis: The number of districts and the cost per workshop/event are not available in the reference data. The number of youth to be trained is also not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Key cost drivers like the number of events and cost per event are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Workshops treat the symptom (fewer new artists) but not the root cause (lack of a sustainable livelihood for artists). While beneficial, they provide temporary support rather than creating a self-sustaining economic ecosystem for these arts.

promise_text_en: Tamil martial arts such as Silambam, sword fighting, Kalari, and Malpor will be revived. Special training centers for these will be set up separately in major cities.
promise_text_ta: தமிழனின் போர்க்கலைகளான சிலம்பாட்டம், வாள்வீச்சு, களரி, மற்போர் உள்ளிட்ட போர்க்கலைகள் மீட்டுருவாக்கம் செய்யப்படும். முதன்மைப் பெருநகரங்களில் இவற்றிற்கான சிறப்புப் பயிற்சிக்கூடங்கள் தனியாக அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 419
impact_mechanism: Creates dedicated physical infrastructure for the formal instruction and practice of traditional Tamil martial arts.

promise_components.component: Special training centers for martial arts like Silambam and Kalari will be set up in major cities.
promise_components.analysis: The number of 'major cities' is not specified. The cost to establish and operate a training center (land, construction, staff, equipment) is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The number of centers and the cost per center are unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Establishing permanent, dedicated training centers is a structural investment. It creates a lasting physical and institutional base for teaching these arts, moving beyond ad-hoc events to build long-term capacity.
coverage_gap_note: Excludes people living outside of the 'major cities' where the centers will be located.

promise_text_en: These traditional Tamil martial arts will be taught right from schools and colleges, for self-defense and physical health.
promise_text_ta: பள்ளி, கல்லூரிகளில் இருந்தே தமிழர்களின் இந்த மரபுவழிப் போர்க்கலைகள் கற்றுத்தரப்படும், தற்காப்பிற்கும் உடல் நலத்திற்காகவும் இது பயிற்றுவிக்கப்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 419
impact_mechanism: Integrates traditional martial arts into the mainstream education system, ensuring broad and systematic transmission to the next generation.

promise_components.component: Traditional Tamil martial arts will be taught in schools and colleges.
promise_components.analysis: This would apply to ~53,000 government schools with ~89 lakh students, plus an unknown number of college students. The cost would require hiring a vast number of instructors, but their required number and salary are not in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. While the target student population is large, the number of instructors needed and their salaries are unknown, making a cost estimate impossible.
sustainability_reasoning: Making a subject part of the official school curriculum is a fundamental structural change. It embeds the art form within the state's primary vehicle for education and socialization, ensuring its continuity and broad reach in a way that optional centers cannot.
coverage_gap_note: May not cover students in private schools unless the policy is mandated for all educational institutions.

promise_text_en: Every one of the Tamil arts must be brought to the international stage. The Naam Tamilar government will undertake all necessary structural measures for this.
promise_text_ta: தமிழர்களின் கலை ஒவ்வொன்றையும் பன்னாட்டளவிற்குக் களம் இறக்க வேண்டும். அதற்கு உரிய அனைத்துக் கட்டமைப்புகளையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 419
impact_mechanism: Expresses a high-level policy goal of using state resources to promote Tamil arts internationally.

promise_components.component: The government will undertake 'all necessary structural measures' to bring 'every one of the Tamil arts' to the international stage.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of intent, not a specific, measurable promise. The terms 'all necessary structural measures', 'every one of the Tamil arts', and 'international stage' are undefined and cannot be costed.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The promise is too vague and aspirational to be costed.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a vague, aspirational declaration with no concrete, verifiable commitments. The phrase 'all necessary structural measures' is a catch-all that commits to nothing specific, making this primarily a political signal.

promise_text_en: A special music festival will be held once a year in the name of the Tamil Music Trinity. The Naam Tamilar government will allocate sufficient funds and transform it into a high-level structure that includes music research.
promise_text_ta: தமிழிசை மூவர் பெயரில் ஆண்டுக்கு ஒரு முறை சிறப்பான இசைவிழா நடத்தப்படும். நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அதற்குப் போதிய பொருள் ஒதுக்கி இசை ஆய்வுகளுடன் கூடிய உயரிய கட்டமைப்பாக மாற்றி அமைக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 419
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to enhance cultural pride and support the arts community through a state-sponsored annual music festival and research initiative.

promise_components.component: A special music festival will be held once a year in the name of the Tamil Music Trinity.
promise_components.analysis: The cost would include event management, artist fees, and venue logistics. The scale and budget are not specified. No reference data is available to calculate the cost.

promise_components.component: Sufficient funds will be allocated to transform it into a high-level structure that includes music research.
promise_components.analysis: This implies funding for a research body, including staff and grants. The term 'sufficient funds' is not defined, making a cost estimate impossible.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is entirely dependent on the unspecified scale of the festival and research activities.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a cultural promotion initiative. While valuable for the arts, it does not address underlying socio-economic problems and primarily serves as a vehicle for cultural and political signalling.
coverage_gap_note: Benefits are concentrated within the music and academic communities, with limited direct impact on the general population.

promise_text_en: During temple festivals and Pongal festival events, a Tamil music festival will also be grandly conducted. A Tamil Music Research Center will be established by inviting music scholars specifically for the development of music.
promise_text_ta: கோயில்களில் நடக்கும் திருவிழாக்களிலும், பொங்கல் உள்ளிட்ட திருவிழா நிகழ்ச்சிகளிலும், தமிழ் இசை விழாவும் சிறப்பாக நடத்தப்படும். இசை அறிஞர்களை அழைத்து இசை வளர்ச்சிக்கென்றே தமிழ் இசை ஆராய்ச்சி நடுவம் அமைக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 419
impact_mechanism: This seeks to integrate traditional music into mainstream cultural events and foster academic development through a dedicated research center.

promise_components.component: During temple festivals and Pongal festival events, a Tamil music festival will also be grandly conducted.
promise_components.analysis: This involves adding a music component to existing festivals. Costs would be for artists and logistics, but the scale is undefined.

promise_components.component: A Tamil Music Research Center will be established by inviting music scholars specifically for the development of music.
promise_components.analysis: This requires capital and operational expenditure for a new institution (building, staff, research grants). No data is available to estimate the cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost for both the festival events and the research center is not specified and cannot be estimated from reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Similar to the previous promise, this is a cultural promotion policy. It enhances cultural visibility but does not alter the fundamental economic or social conditions of the populace.
coverage_gap_note: The direct beneficiaries are musicians, scholars, and festival attendees, not the broader public.

promise_text_en: Tamil-style worship will be made mandatory in 30,000 rural temples in Tamil Nadu. An organization will be created for them, through which Tamil worship methods, including Thirumurai and Nalayira Divya Prabandham, will be continuously taught.
promise_text_ta: தமிழகத்தில் உள்ள 30,000 சிற்றூர்க் கோயில்களில் தமிழ்முறையில் வழிபாடு என்பது கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும். அவர்களுக்கான அமைப்பு ஒன்றை உருவாக்கி, அதன் மூலம் தொடர்ந்து திருமுறைகளும், நாலாயிர தேம்பனுவல் (திவ்யப்பிரபந்தம்) உள்ளிட்ட தமிழ் வழிபாட்டு முறைகளும் பயிற்றுவிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 421
impact_mechanism: This policy aims to standardize and promote a specific form of religious practice in a large number of rural temples through a new state-backed organization.

promise_components.component: Tamil-style worship will be made mandatory in 30,000 rural temples in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory and cultural mandate targeting a specific number of temples. The implementation would be administrative and educational, not directly financial.

promise_components.component: An organization will be created for them, through which Tamil worship methods will be continuously taught.
promise_components.analysis: This requires creating a new government-funded body with staff and a budget for training programs. The cost is undefined.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The operational budget for the new organization and its training programs is not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: Mandating religious practices is legally and socially complex and could face significant resistance. The promise is primarily a strong political and cultural statement with a very challenging implementation path.
coverage_gap_note: This policy may face legal challenges and social opposition from temple trusts and communities with different traditions.

promise_text_en: A high-quality research journal about the Tamil people will be published monthly.
promise_text_ta: தமிழினம் குறித்த சிறந்த ஆய்வு நூல் ஒன்று மாதந்தோறும் வெளிக்கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 421
impact_mechanism: This aims to create an academic resource for the study of Tamil history and culture by launching a state-funded monthly journal.

promise_components.component: A high-quality research journal about the Tamil people will be published monthly.
promise_components.analysis: This involves costs for an editorial team, peer review management, printing, and distribution. The scale is relatively small.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted, but the cost is expected to be very low and would represent a negligible fraction of the state's discretionary budget.
sustainability_reasoning: While beneficial for the academic community, a research journal has a very limited direct impact on the general population's welfare. It is a cultural and intellectual initiative, not a solution to a widespread problem.
coverage_gap_note: The journal's audience and direct impact would be confined to a small circle of academics and researchers.

promise_text_en: All research papers published in various fields including mathematics, science, history, and computers will be brought out as research journals in Tamil.
promise_text_ta: கணிதம், அறிவியல், வரலாறு, கணினி உள்ளிட்ட பல்வேறு துறைகளிலும் வெளிவரும் ஆய்வுகள் அனைத்தும் தமிழிலேயே ஆய்விதழாகக் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 421
impact_mechanism: This policy seeks to make global scientific and academic knowledge accessible in the Tamil language by creating a series of translated research journals.

promise_components.component: All research papers published in various fields including mathematics, science, history, and computers will be brought out as research journals in Tamil.
promise_components.analysis: This implies a massive, ongoing translation and publication effort across numerous complex disciplines. It would require a large body of highly specialized translators and editors. The cost is undefined but potentially substantial.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The sheer volume of global research makes this project's scope and cost impossible to estimate without further details.
sustainability_reasoning: The ambition to translate 'all research papers' is practically undeliverable. The logistical and expertise challenges are immense, making this more of a statement of linguistic pride than a feasible policy.
coverage_gap_note: Maintaining the quality, accuracy, and timeliness of translations across diverse scientific fields would be a significant challenge.

promise_text_en: New information, research, special articles, and discoveries from various world languages will be promptly translated into Tamil. Subject matter experts will be appointed for this purpose.
promise_text_ta: உலகின் பல்வேறு மொழிகளில் வெளிவரும் புதிய தகவல்கள், ஆய்வுகள், சிறப்புக் கட்டுரைகள், கண்டுபிடிப்புகள் உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்தும் உடனுக்குடன் தமிழில் மொழிபெயர்க்கப்படும். இதற்கெனத் துறைசார் வல்லுநர்கள் அமர்த்தப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 421
impact_mechanism: This aims to create a state-run system for systematically translating significant global knowledge into Tamil to benefit local readers and researchers.

promise_components.component: New information, research, special articles, and discoveries from various world languages will be promptly translated into Tamil.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad mandate for a large-scale translation service. The volume of content is undefined.

promise_components.component: Subject matter experts will be appointed for this purpose.
promise_components.analysis: This implies creating a new cadre of state-employed or contracted expert translators, with associated salary and administrative costs. The number of experts is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost depends on the volume of translation and the number of experts hired, neither of which is defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Like the previous promise, this is a grand but logistically daunting vision. The challenge of 'promptly' translating a vast and continuous flow of global information makes it more of a symbolic goal than a practical plan.
coverage_gap_note: The process of selecting what to translate would be subjective and could become a bottleneck, limiting the scope and utility.

promise_text_en: A separate archaeology department will be established under the state government. Buried history will be recovered through excavations at various sites like Adichanallur and Keezhadi. All ancient Tamil inscriptions locked away in Mysore will be brought under the state government's control.
promise_text_ta: மாநில அரசின் கீழ் தனியே ஒரு தொல்லியல் துறை அமைக்கப்படும். தமிழ் மண்ணில் ஆதிச்சநல்லூர், கீழடி உள்ளிட்ட பல்வேறு இடங்களில் ஆய்வு செய்து புதைந்த வரலாற்றை மீட்டெடுப்போம். மைசூரில் பூட்டிக்கிடக்கும் பண்டைய தமிழ்க் கல்வெட்டுகள் அனைத்தும் மாநில அரசின் கட்டுப்பாட்டிற்குள் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 421
impact_mechanism: This seeks to assert state control over archaeological research and heritage by strengthening the state department and attempting to repatriate artifacts.

promise_components.component: A separate archaeology department will be established under the state government.
promise_components.analysis: The Tamil Nadu State Department of Archaeology already exists. This likely means upgrading it or increasing its autonomy and funding. The cost is not specified.

promise_components.component: Buried history will be recovered through excavations at various sites like Adichanallur and Keezhadi.
promise_components.analysis: This implies increasing funding for ongoing excavations at known sites. The cost depends on the scale of the new projects.

promise_components.component: All ancient Tamil inscriptions locked away in Mysore will be brought under the state government's control.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political and legal goal, not a financial one. It requires negotiation with the central government, as these are likely held by the Archaeological Survey of India (ASI).

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. Funding for departmental expansion and excavations would be required, but the amounts are not specified. The repatriation of inscriptions is a legal/political matter, not a direct fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: While funding excavations is a concrete action, the promise to 'bring back' inscriptions from a central institution is a politically charged goal that is not within the state's sole power to deliver. It serves as powerful political signalling.
coverage_gap_note: The repatriation of inscriptions is contingent on the approval and cooperation of the central government and its agencies.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will recognize and conduct Jallikattu (Eru Thazhuvuthal) as a state festival.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ஏறு தழுவுதலை அரசு விழாவாக ஏற்று நடத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 423
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide official state recognition and endorsement to a popular and culturally significant traditional sport.

promise_components.component: The Naan Tamilar government will recognize and conduct Jallikattu (Eru Thazhuvuthal) as a state festival.
promise_components.analysis: Jallikattu is already legally conducted in Tamil Nadu following state legislation. This promise involves a formal designation as a 'state festival', which is a symbolic act. Any associated costs for official events would be minimal.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted, but any associated costs would be negligible. This is primarily a declarative act.
sustainability_reasoning: This formalizes and celebrates an existing cultural practice. It has high symbolic value and aligns the state with popular sentiment but does not introduce any new material benefit or structural change.

promise_text_en: To protect Tamil culture, the Naan Tamilar government will encourage sports like cockfighting and ram fighting.
promise_text_ta: தமிழினத்தின் பண்பாட்டைக் காக்கும் வகையில் சேவல்ச் சண்டைகள் மற்றும் ஆட்டுக்கடாச் சண்டைகள் போன்ற விளையாட்டுகளை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ஊக்குவிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 423
impact_mechanism: This policy signals support for traditional practices, even those currently prohibited, as a means of cultural protection.

promise_components.component: To protect Tamil culture, the Naan Tamilar government will encourage sports like cockfighting and ram fighting.
promise_components.analysis: Cockfighting is banned under the central Prevention of Cruelty to Animals Act, 1960, a ban upheld by the Supreme Court. A state government cannot unilaterally 'encourage' or legalize a practice prohibited by national law.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. There are no fiscal implications as the promise is legally undeliverable under the current legal framework.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is legally non-viable. It serves only as a political signal to groups that support these banned activities, with no practical path to implementation without changes to central law.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is in direct conflict with existing national animal welfare laws and Supreme Court rulings.

promise_text_en: The arts, literature, culture, folk arts, and traditional occupations of Tamils will be revived. Vocational training schools based on traditional methods will be established.
promise_text_ta: தமிழர்களின் கலை இலக்கியம், பண்பாடு, நாட்டுப்புறக் கலைகள், மற்றும் மரபுவழித் தொழில்கள் மீட்டுருவாக்கம் செய்யப்படும். மரபு வழியிலான தொழிற்பயிற்சிக்கூடங்கள் அமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 423
impact_mechanism: This aims to create sustainable livelihoods by preserving traditional skills and occupations through a network of state-run vocational schools.

promise_components.component: The arts, literature, culture, folk arts, and traditional occupations of Tamils will be revived.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad statement of intent for cultural and economic revival.

promise_components.component: Vocational training schools based on traditional methods will be established.
promise_components.analysis: This is the core mechanism, involving the creation of educational institutions. Costs would include infrastructure, trainers, and curriculum development. The number of schools is not specified.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost is dependent on the number of schools established and the scope of their programs, which are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: By establishing institutions for skill transmission, this promise attempts to address the root cause of the decline in traditional occupations. It aims to build lasting capacity for economic self-sufficiency in these sectors, moving beyond mere preservation.
coverage_gap_note: The long-term success depends heavily on creating viable market linkages for the graduates; training alone may not guarantee employment.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will conduct a caste-wise and language-wise census and provide reservation based on the corresponding percentages. For non-Tamil linguistic groups, job reservation in Tamil Nadu will be provided at the same percentage that is allocated to Tamils in their respective home states.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு குடிகள் வாரியாக, மொழி வாரியாக கணக்கெடுப்பை நடத்தி அதற்கேற்ற விழுக்காட்டின் அடிப்படையில் இடப்பகிர்வு அளிக்கும். தமிழரல்லாத பிறமொழிக் குடிகளுக்கு, அந்தந்த மாநிலத்தில் தமிழர்களுக்கு ஒதுக்கப்படும் விழுக்காட்டின் அடிப்படையில் தமிழக வேலைவாய்ப்பில் இடப்பகிர்வு வழங்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 424
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to re-align reservation policies with updated demographic data through a new census, potentially changing the allocation of government jobs and educational seats.

promise_components.component: Conduct a caste-wise and language-wise census.
promise_components.analysis: The power to conduct a census is constitutionally with the Union Government. A state can conduct a socio-economic survey, which is a massive and costly administrative undertaking. The cost cannot be estimated from the reference data.

promise_components.component: Provide reservation based on the corresponding percentages from the new census.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy change contingent on the census results. The fiscal impact is indirect and cannot be calculated.

promise_components.component: For non-Tamil linguistic groups, job reservation in Tamil Nadu will be provided at the same percentage that is allocated to Tamils in their respective home states.
promise_components.analysis: This reciprocal policy requires complex data gathering from all other states and is legally novel. The fiscal impact is indirect and cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct cost of a state-wide survey is not specified and cannot be estimated from the reference data. The subsequent changes to reservation policy have indirect, non-quantifiable fiscal implications.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy aims to create a new, data-driven foundation for affirmative action, which is a structural element of governance. By linking reservation to current demographics, it seeks a more accurate distribution of opportunities, which is a long-term change.
coverage_gap_note: The policy's impact on different communities is unknown until the census is complete. The reciprocal reservation for non-Tamils could be complex and potentially disadvantageous for some groups.

promise_text_en: Tamil society will be restructured based on the principles of caste abolition, equality, equal rights, and self-respect.
promise_text_ta: சாதி ஒழிப்பு, சமத்துவம், சம உரிமை, தன்மான உணர்வு என்ற நோக்கில் புதிய வளர்ச்சியை அடிப்படையாகக் கொண்டு தமிழ்ச் சமூகம் கட்டியமைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 425
impact_mechanism: This is a statement of principle, not a specific, measurable action, aiming to guide governance with the ideals of social reform.

promise_components.component: Tamil society will be restructured based on the principles of caste abolition, equality, equal rights, and self-respect.
promise_components.analysis: This is a broad, aspirational goal. It is not a concrete policy with measurable actions, a specific implementation mechanism, or calculable costs.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost can be calculated as this is a statement of guiding principles.
sustainability_reasoning: While the goal is structural (caste abolition), the promise itself is a statement of values without a proposed mechanism. It functions as a political signal rather than a tangible policy.

promise_text_en: Government officials and officers who promote or act based on caste and religious discrimination will be dismissed from service without any benefits, regardless of their department.
promise_text_ta: சாதி, மத வேறுபாடு கற்பித்து அதன் அடிப்படையில் செயல்படும் அரசு அலுவலர்கள், அதிகாரிகள் எந்த வகைச் சலுகையுமின்றி பணி நீக்கம் செய்யப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 425
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to enforce anti-discrimination rules within the government bureaucracy by introducing a severe penalty (dismissal without benefits).

promise_components.component: Government officials and officers who promote or act based on caste and religious discrimination will be dismissed from service without any benefits.
promise_components.analysis: This is a change to civil service conduct rules. Existing rules already prohibit such discrimination, but this proposes a specific, harsher penalty. The fiscal impact is indirect and cannot be quantified.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. The policy is a punitive measure with non-quantifiable indirect fiscal effects, such as potential legal challenges.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy acts as a strong deterrent and a tool for accountability. While it doesn't eliminate underlying societal prejudice, it enforces a standard of conduct, managing the symptoms of discrimination in public service.
coverage_gap_note: This applies only to government officials, not discrimination in the private sector or wider society.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will ensure the right for all Tamil people to worship with equality in all places of worship.
promise_text_ta: வழிபாட்டு உரிமை என்ற வகையில் தமிழ் மக்கள் அனைவரும் சமத்துவத்துடன் அனைத்து வழிபாட்டுத் தலங்களிலும் சென்று வழிபடும் உரிமையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 425
impact_mechanism: This aims to enforce the right to entry and worship in all places of worship, a right that is often contested on grounds of caste.

promise_components.component: The Naan Tamilar government will ensure the right for all Tamil people to worship with equality in all places of worship.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement of existing constitutional rights (Article 25) and state laws. The promise implies more vigorous enforcement, with costs related to administrative and police action which cannot be estimated from the data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct, quantifiable cost. Costs would be embedded within existing law and order and administrative budgets for enforcement.
sustainability_reasoning: Successfully ensuring equal access to all places of worship would break down significant social and religious barriers rooted in the caste system. It is a direct intervention against a structural form of discrimination.
coverage_gap_note: The promise specifies 'Tamil people,' which might be interpreted to exclude non-Tamils.

promise_text_en: The valiant struggles, governance methods, discipline, and administrative skills of our ancestors will be included in the curriculum for our children.
promise_text_ta: எமது முன்னோர்களுடைய வீரம் செறிந்த போராட்டங்கள், ஆட்சிமுறை, ஒழுக்கம், நிருவாகத் திறன் போன்றவை எமது பிள்ளைகளுக்குப் பாடமாக வைக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 425
impact_mechanism: This seeks to shape cultural and historical identity by modifying the state school curriculum.

promise_components.component: The valiant struggles, governance methods, discipline, and administrative skills of our ancestors will be included in the curriculum for our children.
promise_components.analysis: This is a curriculum reform for the ~89 lakh government school students. The cost involves textbook revision and teacher training, which are part of the regular education budget cycle and cannot be isolated or quantified from the given data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost is part of routine curriculum updates within the education budget and cannot be estimated as a separate line item.
sustainability_reasoning: This is primarily a political and cultural signaling exercise. While curriculum changes are real, the promise's framing is about promoting a specific historical narrative rather than addressing a material problem.
coverage_gap_note: This applies only to students under the state board curriculum, not other educational boards.

promise_text_en: A committee including the court registrar will be formed to verify the mandatory 3-year experience for judicial service candidates.
promise_text_ta: 3 ஆண்டுகள் வழக்குரைஞராகப் பணியாற்றியிருப்பது குறித்து ஆய்வு செய்திட நீதிமன்ற பதிவாளரை உள்ளடக்கிய குழு உருவாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 426
impact_mechanism: This proposes an oversight mechanism to ensure the integrity of the experience requirement for judicial appointments.

promise_components.component: A committee including the court registrar will be formed to verify the mandatory 3-year experience for judicial service candidates.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural reform for judicial appointments. The cost of forming a committee is minimal and would be absorbed into administrative overheads. Implementation requires the cooperation of the judiciary.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible fiscal cost, absorbed into existing administrative budgets of the judiciary and law department.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a targeted procedural fix. It addresses a symptom of potential corruption or unfairness in the appointment process but does not change the fundamental structure of the judiciary or access to justice.

promise_text_en: The committee will ensure that poor and ordinary law students and lawyers can obtain the 3-year experience certificate in a fair and equitable manner, preventing its misuse by wealthy and influential lawyers.
promise_text_ta: ஏழை எளிய மாணவர்கள், வழக்கறிஞர்கள் அனைவரும் சரியான மற்றும் சமமான முறையில் 3 ஆண்டுக்கான சான்றினைப் பெறுவதை குழு உறுதி செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 426
impact_mechanism: This aims to level the playing field for judicial aspirants from non-privileged backgrounds by ensuring they can meet the experience requirement fairly.

promise_components.component: The committee will ensure that poor and ordinary law students and lawyers can obtain the 3-year experience certificate in a fair and equitable manner.
promise_components.analysis: This is the stated goal of the committee from the previous promise. It is a policy objective, not a separate action. The mechanism for 'ensuring' this is not detailed.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible fiscal cost, as it's the mandate of the committee proposed in the previous promise.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy attempts to dismantle a structural barrier (nepotism and influence) that prevents individuals from disadvantaged backgrounds from entering the judiciary. Creating a fair and verifiable pathway is a structural reform.
coverage_gap_note: This addresses only one specific barrier (experience certificate) for one specific profession (lower judiciary).

promise_text_en: Priority in judicial appointments will be given to lawyers who have honestly handled cases for public welfare at low fees.
promise_text_ta: மக்கள் நலனுக்காகக் குறைந்த கட்டணத்தில் நேர்மையுடன் வழக்குகளை நடத்தியிருக்கும் வழக்கறிஞர்களுக்கு நீதிபதிகள் நியமனத்தில் முன்னுரிமை அளிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 426
impact_mechanism: This seeks to change the criteria for judicial appointments to favor lawyers with a track record of public interest work.

promise_components.component: Priority in judicial appointments will be given to lawyers who have honestly handled cases for public welfare at low fees.
promise_components.analysis: This is a change in selection criteria. The state government has a limited role in judicial appointments, which are primarily managed by the High Court collegium. Imposing such criteria would likely be legally challenged as executive interference.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a change in appointment criteria that is likely outside the state government's power to implement.
sustainability_reasoning: The state executive has very little power to set criteria for judicial appointments. Proposing to do so is a statement of intent that is unlikely to be implemented, making it a form of political signaling.

promise_text_en: From the day of appointment, all judgments delivered by a judge will be reviewed and ranked based on integrity, legal acumen, and clarity. This ranking will be the basis for prioritizing promotions.
promise_text_ta: நீதிபதியாகப் பதவியேற்ற நாள் முதல் அவர்கள் வழங்கிய அனைத்துத் தீர்ப்புகளையும் ஆய்ந்து, அதன் அடிப்படையில் பதவி உயர்வுகளில் முன்னுரிமை அளிக்க வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 426
impact_mechanism: This proposes a performance management system for judges, linking their promotion to the quality of their judgments.

promise_components.component: All judgments delivered by a judge will be reviewed and ranked based on integrity, legal acumen, and clarity, with this ranking prioritizing promotions.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new judicial performance review system. This falls squarely within the purview of the judiciary (High Court). The executive cannot impose such a system due to the separation of powers.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost for the state executive. The policy itself is outside the state government's constitutional power.
sustainability_reasoning: The executive branch cannot dictate performance reviews or promotion criteria for the judicial branch. This promise ignores the separation of powers and is therefore undeliverable, making it a purely political statement.

promise_text_en: The number of courts will be increased and judicial jurisdiction will be defined to achieve the ratio of 50 judges per 10 lakh people.
promise_text_ta: 10 இலட்சம் மக்களுக்கு 50 நீதிபதிகள் என்ற எண்ணிக்கையை எட்டிட நீதிமன்ற ஆள்வரை வகுக்கப்பட்டு, நீதிமன்ற எண்ணிக்கையும் அதிகரிக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 427
impact_mechanism: This aims to improve access to justice and reduce case backlogs by increasing the number of judges and courts.

promise_components.component: Increase the number of courts and judicial jurisdiction to achieve the ratio of 50 judges per 10 lakh people.
promise_components.analysis: Target: 50 judges per 10 lakh people. For a population of 7.9 crore (790 lakh), the required number of judges is (790 / 10) * 50 = 3,950. The current number of judges and the cost per new judge (salary, staff, infrastructure) are not in the reference data, so the total cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: The target is 3,950 judges. The number of new judges required and the associated costs for salary and infrastructure cannot be calculated with the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: A low judge-to-population ratio is a core structural bottleneck in the justice delivery system. Expanding the judiciary's capacity is a direct and necessary structural solution to address case backlogs and improve access to justice.
coverage_gap_note: The promise depends on finding a sufficient number of qualified candidates to fill thousands of new judicial posts.

promise_text_en: Names recommended by the Chief Justice for High Court judgeships will be immediately reviewed and forwarded to the Union Government. The Naan Tamilar government will take all necessary steps to ensure the Union Government makes appointments without delay.
promise_text_ta: உயர் நீதிமன்றத்திற்கான நீதிபதிகளின் பெயர்கள் உடனடியாகப் பரிசீலிக்கப்பட்டு ஒன்றிய அரசுக்குத் தெரிவிக்கப்படும். கால தாமதமின்றி நீதிபதிகள் நியமிக்கப்பட தேவையான அனைத்து நடவடிக்கைகளையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 427
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to reduce delays in judicial appointments by expediting the state government's procedural role and advocating with the Union Government.

promise_components.component: Immediately review and forward Chief Justice's recommendations for High Court judgeships to the Union Government.
promise_components.analysis: This is a procedural commitment to expedite the state's consultative role in judicial appointments. The timeline is controlled by the judicial collegium and the Union Government.

promise_components.component: Take all necessary steps to ensure the Union Government makes appointments without delay.
promise_components.analysis: This is an advocacy role. The state government has limited power to compel the Union Government to act on judicial appointments.

fiscal_cost_note: This involves administrative effort, not direct financial outlay. The cost is not quantifiable from the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government's role in judicial appointments is limited and consultative. While expediting its part is good practice, the primary bottlenecks lie with the collegium and the Union Government, over which the state has no control. This makes the promise more of a political statement than a deliverable outcome.
coverage_gap_note: This process only impacts High Court appointments, not the subordinate judiciary where case backlogs are also significant.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will support the demands of lawyers and the public to implement a hybrid system that allows both online and in-person case filing.
promise_text_ta: இணையவழி மற்றும் நேரடி வழக்குப் பதிதல் என்கிற இரண்டும் கலந்த (Hybrid) முறையை செயல்படுத்த, வழக்கறிஞர் மற்றும் பொதுமக்களின் கோரிக்கைகளுக்கு நாம் தமிழர் அரசு துணை நிற்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 427
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve access to justice by supporting the implementation of a flexible case filing system for both online and physical submissions.

promise_components.component: Support the demands of lawyers and the public to implement a hybrid system (online and in-person) for case filing.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of support for an ongoing demand. The actual implementation and cost are detailed in subsequent promises. It requires coordination with the judiciary.

fiscal_cost_note: The promise is a statement of intent; fiscal costs are associated with the enabling infrastructure and training mentioned in other promises. On its own, the cost is not quantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: Implementing a hybrid filing system is a fundamental change to court procedure. It addresses the root cause of access barriers, both for those who are digitally savvy and those who are not, creating a more inclusive and permanent system.
coverage_gap_note: While hybrid, it still requires either digital access or physical travel to a court, potentially leaving out remote or digitally illiterate individuals without assistance.

promise_text_en: The government will take steps to provide robust IT infrastructure, comprehensive training for court staff, and simplify the mandatory e-filing process.
promise_text_ta: வலுவான தொழில்நுட்ப உள்கட்டமைப்பை வழங்குவதன் வழியிலும், நீதிமன்ற பணியாளர்களுக்கு விரிவான பயிற்சி வழங்கிடவும், கட்டாய இணையவழி வழக்குத் தாக்கல் செயல்முறையை எளிதாக்க அரசு நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 427
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to operationalize e-courts by providing the necessary hardware, staff skills, and user-friendly processes.

promise_components.component: Provide robust IT infrastructure for courts.
promise_components.analysis: This implies capital expenditure on servers, computers, and networking. The cost is unknown as the number of courts is not in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Provide comprehensive training for court staff.
promise_components.analysis: This implies recurring operational expenditure on training programs. The cost is unknown as the number of court staff is not in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Simplify the mandatory e-filing process.
promise_components.analysis: This involves process re-engineering and software development, which has associated costs.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost depends on the number of court locations and staff, which are not provided in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Investing in IT infrastructure and staff training builds permanent capacity within the judicial system. It addresses the foundational requirements for a modern, efficient e-filing system, which is a long-term structural improvement.
coverage_gap_note: The benefit is contingent on successful adoption by court staff and the legal community after training.

promise_text_en: Centers for e-filing will be established in every court to provide guidance to lawyers.
promise_text_ta: நீதிமன்றந்தோறும் இணையவழி வழக்குத் தாக்கல் முறைக்கான நடுவங்கள் நிறுவப்பட்டு வழக்கறிஞர்களுக்கு வழிகாட்டுதல்கள் வழங்கிட நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 427
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to bridge the digital divide in legal access by providing assisted digital services directly at court locations.

promise_components.component: Establish e-filing centers in every court to provide guidance to lawyers.
promise_components.analysis: This requires physical space, IT equipment, and trained staff at each court complex. The number of court complexes is not available in the reference data, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The total cost depends on the number of court complexes in the state, which is not specified in the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: These centers create a permanent support structure to ensure that e-filing is accessible even to those lacking digital skills or resources. This addresses the root cause of the digital divide in the context of judicial access.
coverage_gap_note: This helps people who can physically reach the court but still leaves a gap for those in remote areas.

promise_text_en: Unutilized infrastructure funds will be fully used to build additional court complexes.
promise_text_ta: பயன்படுத்தப்படாத உட்கட்டமைப்பு நிதி முழுமையாகப் பயன்படுத்தப்பட்டு கூடுதல் நீதிமன்ற வளாகங்கள் கட்டப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 429
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve judicial capacity by ensuring that already allocated funds for infrastructure are actually spent on building new court facilities.

promise_components.component: Fully use unutilized infrastructure funds to build additional court complexes.
promise_components.analysis: This is a fiscal management promise to improve budget execution. It does not involve new funding, but rather the effective use of existing, unspent allocations. The amount of unutilized funds is not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No new fiscal cost. The promise is to spend funds that are already budgeted but unutilized. The total amount is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Building physical court complexes is a permanent, structural enhancement of the judicial system's capacity. It directly addresses infrastructure deficits, which are a root cause of case backlogs and poor access to justice.
coverage_gap_note: The effectiveness depends on overcoming the original reasons for the funds being unutilized, such as land acquisition delays or bureaucratic hurdles.

promise_text_en: When a new law is enacted, provisions will be made to anticipate the resulting increase in court cases, appoint a corresponding number of judges, and recommend necessary legislative changes.
promise_text_ta: ஒரு புதிய சட்டத்தை சட்டமன்றத்தில் இயற்றும்போதே, அதற்கேற்ப நீதிபதிகளை நியமிக்கவும், சட்டத்தில் தேவையான மாற்றங்களை பரிந்துரைக்கவும் வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 429
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to prevent future judicial backlogs by integrating judicial capacity planning into the legislative process itself.

promise_components.component: When a new law is enacted, anticipate the resulting increase in court cases and appoint a corresponding number of judges.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes a policy change to proactively manage judicial workload. The state can create judicial posts, but the appointment process involves the High Court and Governor, and is not solely within the government's control.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. Costs would be recurring (salaries for new judges and staff) and depend on the volume and nature of future legislation, which is unpredictable.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a structural change to the policymaking process, aiming to prevent a root cause of judicial overload. However, its success is contingent on the difficult tasks of accurately predicting litigation and navigating the complex judicial appointments process.

promise_text_en: An amendment will be introduced to allow courts to impose severe penalties for frivolous petitions and unnecessary litigation filed solely for the purpose of causing delays.
promise_text_ta: காலதாமதத்தை மட்டுமே நோக்கமாகக் கொண்டு தாக்கல் செய்யப்படும் மனுக்கள் மற்றும் தேவையற்ற வழக்குகளுக்கு, நீதிமன்றம் மிகக் கடுமையான அபராதம் விதிக்க திருத்தம் கொண்டுவரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 429
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to reduce court congestion by deterring the filing of lawsuits intended merely to harass or delay proceedings.

promise_components.component: Introduce an amendment to allow courts to impose severe penalties for frivolous petitions and unnecessary litigation.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legislative action to strengthen the court's existing powers to discourage abuse of the legal process. It does not have a direct fiscal cost to the state.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a legislative change to procedural law.
sustainability_reasoning: Amending the law to penalize frivolous litigation is a permanent change to the rules governing court proceedings. It addresses a root cause of judicial delays by creating a disincentive for misuse of the system.
coverage_gap_note: There is a risk that if 'frivolous' is poorly defined, it could be used to deter legitimate public interest litigation.

promise_text_en: A 'Judicial Accountability & Research Committee' will be established, comprising retired judges and legal scholars.
promise_text_ta: நீதித்துறை பொறுப்புக்கூறல் மற்றும் ஆய்வுக் குழு (Judicial Accountability & Research Committee) ஒன்று அமைக்கப்படும். அக்குழுவில் ஓய்வு பெற்ற நீதிபதிகள் மற்றும் சட்ட அறிஞர்கள் நியமிக்கப்படுவார்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 429
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to enhance judicial integrity and performance by creating a dedicated oversight body composed of legal experts.

promise_components.component: Establish a 'Judicial Accountability & Research Committee' comprising retired judges and legal scholars.
promise_components.analysis: This involves creating a new state body. Costs would include honorariums, staff salaries, and administrative expenses. The scope and powers of such a committee relative to the independent judiciary would need to be carefully defined.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would be administrative and depend on the committee's size and staffing, which are not specified.
sustainability_reasoning: The creation of a permanent committee for accountability is a structural reform. It addresses the need for systematic oversight of the judiciary, which is a root element of ensuring justice quality and public trust.
coverage_gap_note: The committee's effectiveness is highly dependent on the powers granted to it and its acceptance by the independent judiciary.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will strive to bring a constitutional amendment to make the High Courts of respective states the highest authority for handling cases within those states, limiting the Supreme Court's jurisdiction to constitutional and inter-state issues.
promise_text_ta: அந்தந்த மாநிலங்களுக்குட்பட்ட வழக்குகளைக் கையாள அந்தந்த மாநிலங்களின் தலைமை நீதிமன்றங்களே உச்ச அதிகாரம் பெற்ற நீதிமன்றங்களாகச் செயல்படுவதற்குரிய சட்டத் திருத்தத்தை கொண்டுவர நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முயற்சிகள் மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 429
impact_mechanism: This promise proposes a fundamental restructuring of the national judiciary to empower state High Courts and reduce the burden on the Supreme Court.

promise_components.component: Strive to bring a constitutional amendment to make High Courts the highest authority for most cases within a state.
promise_components.analysis: This requires amending the Constitution of India, a process that requires a two-thirds majority in both houses of Parliament and ratification by half of the states. It is beyond the power of a single state government to enact.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state budget. The effort is political and diplomatic.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is to 'strive' for a constitutional amendment, a goal far outside the legislative competence of a state government. It functions as a statement of political principle rather than a feasible policy objective, making it primarily for optics.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will endeavor to create bodies like a 'Post-Conviction Review/Appeals Commission', 'Post-Conviction Exoneration Commission', or 'Innocence Commission' to prevent the punishment of innocent people.
promise_text_ta: ‘தண்டனைக்குப் பின்னரான மறு ஆய்வு / மேல்முறையீட்டு ஆணையம்', 'தண்டனைக்குப் பின்னரான விடுவித்தல் ஆணையம்' (Post-Conviction Exoneration Commission) அல்லது 'வாய்மைக்கான ஆணையம்' (Innocence Commission) போன்ற அமைப்புகளை உருவாக்க நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முயற்சிக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 430
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to create a new legal pathway to rectify miscarriages of justice by establishing a body to review potential wrongful convictions.

promise_components.component: Endeavor to create a 'Post-Conviction Exoneration Commission' or similar body.
promise_components.analysis: This involves establishing a new quasi-judicial or investigative body through state legislation. It would require funding for investigators, legal experts, and administrative staff to review cases of potential innocence.

fiscal_cost_note: data unavailable — cannot calculate. The cost would depend on the commission's size, staffing, and caseload, which are not defined.
sustainability_reasoning: Creating a permanent commission to review wrongful convictions is a structural addition to the justice system. It addresses the fundamental problem that the standard appeals process may not be sufficient to uncover factual innocence, providing a lasting new remedy.
coverage_gap_note: The commission's effectiveness will depend on its legal powers to access evidence and the weight its findings carry with the formal judiciary.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar party will endeavor to bring a legal amendment to ensure that the Chief Justices of state High Courts are 'sons of the soil' from that respective state.
promise_text_ta: அந்தந்த மாநில அரசின் தலைமை நீதியரசர்களாக அந்தந்த மண்ணின் மைந்தர்களைப் பணியமர்த்தும் வகையிலான சட்டத் திருத்தத்தை ஏற்படுத்த நாம் தமிழர் கட்சி முயற்சி மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 430
impact_mechanism: Aims to ensure the head of the state judiciary has local context by mandating they are from Tamil Nadu.

promise_components.component: Bring a legal amendment to ensure Chief Justices of state High Courts are 'sons of the soil'.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a constitutional amendment or a change in the Memorandum of Procedure for judicial appointments, which is outside the state government's power. Current national policy is to appoint Chief Justices from outside their home state to prevent conflicts of interest.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state. This is a matter of constitutional change and judicial appointment policy, which is determined at the national level.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is practically undeliverable by a state government as it contradicts established national judicial policy and requires constitutional changes beyond the state's purview. It serves as a political statement on regional representation.
coverage_gap_note: This would benefit only a small pool of senior judges from Tamil Nadu eligible for the Chief Justice position.

promise_text_en: Appropriate steps will be taken to implement Tamil, the state's mother tongue, as the language of argument and official language in the Tamil Nadu High Court.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டு உயர் நீதிமன்றத்தில், மாநிலத்தின் தாய்மொழியான தமிழை வழக்காடு மொழியாகவும், அலுவல் மொழியாகவும் நடைமுறைப்படுத்த உரிய நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 430
impact_mechanism: Enables legal proceedings and arguments in the state's primary language, increasing accessibility for litigants and the public.

promise_components.component: Implement Tamil as the language of argument and official language in the Tamil Nadu High Court.
promise_components.analysis: As per Article 348(2) of the Constitution, this can be done by the Governor with the prior consent of the President of India. The Tamil Nadu assembly has passed resolutions for this, but Presidential consent is pending.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost calculable from reference data. Implementation would involve costs for translation infrastructure and training, but the primary barrier is political, not financial.
sustainability_reasoning: This addresses the root cause of the language barrier in the higher judiciary, which limits access to justice for non-English speakers. If implemented, it creates a permanent, structural change in court proceedings.
coverage_gap_note: Non-Tamil speaking litigants and lawyers within the state would require robust translation and interpretation services.

promise_text_en: The Naan Tamilar government will insist that all languages in the Eighth Schedule of the Indian Constitution be immediately made the languages of argument and official languages of the Supreme Court.
promise_text_ta: இந்திய ஒன்றியத்தின் அரசமைப்புப் பட்டியல் மொழிகள் அனைத்தும் உச்ச நீதிமன்றத்தின் வழக்காடு மொழியாகவும், அலுவல் மொழியாகவும் உடனடியாக ஆக்கப்பட நாம் தமிழர் அரசு வலியுறுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 430
impact_mechanism: Aims to make the nation's highest court accessible in all major Indian languages, not just English.

promise_components.component: Insist that all languages in the Eighth Schedule be made official languages of the Supreme Court.
promise_components.analysis: Article 348(1) of the Constitution mandates English as the language of the Supreme Court until Parliament enacts a law to change it. A state government has no direct power to implement this and can only lobby the Union government.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost to the Tamil Nadu state budget. This is a matter for the Union Parliament.
sustainability_reasoning: While addressing a genuine structural issue of language accessibility at the national level, a state government has zero authority to implement this. The promise is therefore a form of political signalling about linguistic rights.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will strive to enact reforms that prohibit retired judges from holding government positions, governorships, or roles in political parties.
promise_text_ta: நீதிபதிகளாக இருந்து ஓய்வு பெறுபவர்கள் அரசுப் பதவிகளிலோ, ஆளுநராகவோ, அரசியல் கட்சியிலோ செயல்படுவதை அனுமதிக்காத வகையில் சீர்திருத்தம் செய்திட நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முயற்சி மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 431
impact_mechanism: Aims to secure judicial independence by removing the potential for a quid pro quo between the judiciary and the executive.

promise_components.component: Enact reforms prohibiting retired judges from holding government positions, governorships, or roles in political parties.
promise_components.analysis: This would require a constitutional amendment or a new central law governing the conduct of retired judges. A state government has no authority to enact such a nationwide prohibition.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost to the state budget. This requires a constitutional amendment or a central law.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise targets a valid structural concern about judicial independence. However, since a state government cannot implement it, the promise serves as a political statement rather than a deliverable policy.

promise_text_en: Action will be taken to change the Hindi names of the new criminal laws and to make amendments within these laws.
promise_text_ta: இந்தியில் இருக்கக்கூடிய இச்சட்டங்களின் பெயர்களை மாற்றியமைக்கவும், இச்சட்டங்களுக்குள்ளேயே திருத்தங்களை மேற்கொள்ளவும் நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 431
impact_mechanism: Resists perceived linguistic imposition by the central government by renaming central laws and amending their content.

promise_components.component: Take action to change the Hindi names of the new criminal laws and make amendments.
promise_components.analysis: A state government cannot unilaterally change the official name of a central act. While criminal law is on the Concurrent List, allowing states to amend laws (with Presidential assent), renaming is not within their power. 'Action' implies lobbying or legal challenges.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. The process involves political and legal efforts, not state budgetary allocation.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a symbolic gesture against perceived Hindi imposition. The core promise of renaming central laws is undeliverable by a state government, making it primarily a political signal.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will take firm and continuous action in all possible ways to create a law for Tamil Nadu similar to Article 370 of the Indian Constitution. Through this, union government laws will not apply to Tamil Nadu, the state legislature will have the right to create its own constitution, and legal recognition will be sought for a separate flag for Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: இந்திய ஒன்றிய அரசமைப்புச் சட்டத்தின் பிரிவு 370ஐ போன்றதொரு சட்டத்தைத் தமிழ்நாட்டிற்கு உருவாக்கிட அனைத்து வழிகளிலும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதியான, தொடர்ச்சியான நடவடிக்கைகளை எடுக்கும். இதன்மூலம் ஒன்றிய அரசின் சட்டங்கள் எவையும் தமிழ்நாட்டிற்குப் பொருந்தாது, தமிழ்நாட்டிற்கான அரசமைப்புச் சட்டத்தை சட்டமன்றமே உருவாக்கிக் கொள்ளும் உரிமைக்கும், நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உருவாக்கிய தமிழ்நாட்டிற்கான கொடிக்கும் சட்ட வழி இசைவேற்பு பெறப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 433
impact_mechanism: Seeks radical state autonomy, making Tamil Nadu largely independent of the Indian Union's legislative and constitutional framework.

promise_components.component: Create a law for Tamil Nadu similar to Article 370, establish a separate constitution, and seek a separate flag.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes a fundamental restructuring of Tamil Nadu's relationship with the Indian Union, which would require unprecedented constitutional amendments. It runs contrary to the 'basic structure' of the Constitution, including the unity and integrity of India, and is legally and politically unfeasible.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. This is a proposal for constitutional change of an extreme nature, far beyond budgetary considerations.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is so far outside the bounds of constitutional possibility that it cannot be considered a serious policy proposal. It functions purely as a political statement of maximalist state autonomy.

promise_text_en: The Concurrent List (List 7) in the Indian Constitution will be completely abolished.
promise_text_ta: இந்திய ஒன்றிய அரசமைப்புச் சட்டத்தின் பட்டியல் 7இல் உள்ள ஒத்திசைவுப் பட்டியல் (Concurrent List) முழுதாக நீக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 433
impact_mechanism: Radically enhances state legislative power by removing the domain where both Union and states can legislate.

promise_components.component: The Concurrent List in the Indian Constitution will be completely abolished.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a major constitutional amendment affecting the fundamental balance of power between the Union and all states. A single state government can only lobby for this; it has no power to implement it.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost to the state budget. This is a matter of constitutional amendment requiring national consensus.
sustainability_reasoning: A state government cannot deliver this promise. It is a statement of a desired political goal—radically increased federalism—that is practically unachievable, thus serving as political signalling.

promise_text_en: All subjects in the Union List, except for External Affairs, Defence, the Reserve Bank of India, and Telecommunications, will be completely transferred to the State List.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றியப் பட்டியலில் உள்ள வெளியுறவுத் துறை, பாதுகாப்புத் துறை, இந்திய ரிசர்வ் வங்கி, தொலைத்தொடர்பு ஆகியவைத் தவிர ஏனைய துறைகள் அனைத்தும் மாநிலப் பட்டியலுக்கு முழுதாக மாற்றப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 433
impact_mechanism: Drastically shifts power from the Union to the states, leaving the center with only a few core functions.

promise_components.component: All subjects in the Union List, except for External Affairs, Defence, RBI, and Telecommunications, will be transferred to the State List.
promise_components.analysis: This proposes to dismantle India's federal structure and create a loose confederation. It would require rewriting the Constitution and is politically and constitutionally impossible under the current framework.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost to the state budget. This is a proposal to fundamentally rewrite the Constitution.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a statement of a political ideology, not a deliverable promise. Its implementation is not feasible, so it serves only as a declaration of the party's maximalist stance on state rights.

promise_text_en: As a short-term measure, the Naam Tamilar government will take immediate action to seek a constitutional amendment to obtain special powers for Tamil Nadu under Article 371, similar to what some other states already have, in specific areas like education, health, taxation, agriculture, and environment to protect state rights.
promise_text_ta: குறுகிய காலத் தேவையாக இந்திய அரசமைப்புச் சட்டப் பிரிவு 371இன் கீழ் சில மாநிலங்கள் ஏற்கனவே பெற்றுள்ளதைப் போல தமிழ்நாட்டிற்கான உடனடித் தேவையாக உள்ள கல்வி, மருத்துவம், வரி விதிப்பு, வேளாண்மை, சுற்றுச்சூழல் உள்ளிட்ட குறிப்பிட்டத் துறைகளில் சிறப்பு அதிகாரங்களைப் பெற்று மாநில உரிமைகளைப் பேணிக் காத்திடும் வகையில் சட்டத் திருத்தம் மேற்கொள்ள நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உடனடி நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 433
impact_mechanism: Seeks greater state autonomy in specific policy areas by securing a special constitutional status similar to that of some other states.

promise_components.component: Seek a constitutional amendment to obtain special powers for Tamil Nadu under Article 371 in education, health, taxation, agriculture, and environment.
promise_components.analysis: This is a constitutionally plausible, though politically difficult, demand. Article 371 and its sub-clauses grant special provisions to several states. Achieving this would require a constitutional amendment passed by the Indian Parliament.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. The success of this promise depends entirely on political negotiation with the Union government to pass a constitutional amendment.
sustainability_reasoning: Unlike more extreme demands, this uses an existing constitutional mechanism (Article 371) to seek greater autonomy. If achieved, it would be a lasting structural change, though its success is highly dependent on central government agreement.

promise_text_en: A clear distinction will be established between "National Identity" and "Citizenship". "Tamil" is our national identity; we are citizens of the country of India.
promise_text_ta: “தேசிய இனம்” மற்றும் “குடியுரிமை” ஆகியவற்றுக்கு இடையேயான தெளிவான வேறுபாடு நிலைநாட்டப்படும். நாம் “தமிழர்” என்பது எங்களின் தேசிய இனம். நாங்கள் இந்திய நாட்டின் குடிமக்கள்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 436
impact_mechanism: Promotes a distinct linguistic-cultural identity ('Tamil nationalism') as separate from the political identity of Indian citizenship.

promise_components.component: A clear distinction will be established between 'National Identity' (Tamil) and 'Citizenship' (Indian).
promise_components.analysis: This is an ideological and semantic statement, not a policy with a legal or administrative implementation mechanism. The Constitution of India recognizes a single Indian citizenship and does not legally define 'national identity' in this manner.

fiscal_cost_note: No fiscal cost. This is a purely ideological declaration with no budgetary or financial implications.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise is a matter of political rhetoric and has no tangible, deliverable component. A government cannot 'establish' such a distinction through any formal administrative or legal action.
coverage_gap_note: This framing may alienate non-Tamil speaking citizens residing in Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: Due sovereignty will be secured for the Tamil language in the constitution and in the courts.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ் மொழிக்கு அரசியலமைப்புச் சட்டத்திலும், அறமன்றங்களிலும் உரிய இறையாண்மை பெற்றுத் தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 436
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to elevate the status of the Tamil language by pursuing constitutional and legal changes for its use in high-level official domains.

promise_components.component: Secure 'due sovereignty' for the Tamil language in the Indian constitution.
promise_components.analysis: This is a constitutional matter requiring an amendment to the Constitution of India, which is beyond the legislative power of a state government and requires a supermajority in the Indian Parliament.

promise_components.component: Secure use of Tamil in the courts.
promise_components.analysis: Authorising the use of a regional language in a High Court requires a legislative resolution by the state followed by the assent of the President of India. This is not solely within the state's power.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a legal and political promise, not a fiscal one. Any associated administrative costs are not quantifiable from the provided data.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government lacks the unilateral authority to amend the constitution or compel presidential assent for the use of Tamil in the High Court. This promise serves as a political statement of intent rather than a deliverable policy.
coverage_gap_note: This promise is contingent on the central government's approval, which is not within the state's control.

promise_text_en: A law will be strictly implemented to ensure that the signboards of all commercial establishments and offices in Tamil Nadu, as well as administrative files, are primarily in Tamil.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டின் அனைத்து வணிக நிறுவனங்கள் மற்றும் அலுவலகங்களின் பெயர்ப்பலகைகளும், நிருவாகக் கோப்புகளும் முதன்மையாகத் தமிழிலேயே இருக்கும்படியான சட்டம் உறுதியாக நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
