impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase the public visibility and administrative primacy of the Tamil language through stricter enforcement of existing regulations.

promise_components.component: Strictly implement law ensuring Tamil is primary on signboards of all commercial establishments and offices.
promise_components.analysis: This involves enforcing existing provisions of acts like the Tamil Nadu Shops and Establishments Rules. The promise is about enforcement intensity, not new legislation.

promise_components.component: Strictly implement law ensuring Tamil is primary in administrative files.
promise_components.analysis: This involves enforcing the Tamil Nadu Official Language Act, 1956. The focus is on compliance within the state bureaucracy.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost is negligible, relating to administrative monitoring and enforcement, which cannot be quantified with the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: If successfully enforced, this would create a lasting change in the state's linguistic landscape and administrative practices. However, it relies on sustained political will to overcome potential resistance from businesses and ensure bureaucratic compliance.
coverage_gap_note: May impose compliance costs on businesses and could be perceived as inconvenient by non-Tamil speaking residents and visitors.

promise_text_en: Knowledge of Tamil will be made mandatory for living and working in Tamil Nadu.
promise_text_ta: தமிழ்நாட்டில் வாழவும், பணியாற்றவும் தமிழ் மொழியறிவு கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 437
impact_mechanism: This promise attempts to make Tamil language proficiency a prerequisite for residence and employment within the state.

promise_components.component: Make knowledge of Tamil mandatory for living in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This would likely violate Article 19(1)(e) of the Indian Constitution, which guarantees all citizens the right to reside and settle in any part of the territory of India.

promise_components.component: Make knowledge of Tamil mandatory for working in Tamil Nadu.
promise_components.analysis: This would likely violate Article 19(1)(g) (right to practice any profession) and Article 16 (equality of opportunity in public employment). It would face immediate and strong legal challenges.

fiscal_cost_note: This is a legal and political promise with no direct fiscal cost. The potential indirect economic cost from deterring investment and migration is unquantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise is almost certainly unconstitutional and legally undeliverable. It functions as a strong political signal on cultural identity and migration rather than a feasible policy.
coverage_gap_note: This promise violates the fundamental rights of Indian citizens from other states to live and work anywhere in the country.

promise_text_en: Based on the principle "the resources of the land for the people of the land," an 85% job reservation for Tamils and a 15% quota for people from other states / open competition will be implemented.
promise_text_ta: மண்ணின் வளங்கள் மண்ணின் மக்களுக்கே என்ற கோட்பாட்டின் அடிப்படையில் தமிழர்களுக்கு 85 விழுக்காடு, பிற மாநிலத்தவர் / பொதுப் போட்டியாக 15 விழுக்காடு வேலைவாய்ப்பு என்கிற அளவில் நடைமுறைப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 437
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to guarantee employment for locals by mandating a high percentage of job reservations in all sectors.

promise_components.component: Implement an 85% job reservation for Tamils.
promise_components.analysis: This policy would face significant legal challenges. The Supreme Court has generally capped reservations at 50% and has been skeptical of domicile-based reservations in the private sector. Defining 'Tamils' for legal purposes would also be a complex and contentious issue.

promise_components.component: Implement a 15% quota for people from other states / open competition.
promise_components.analysis: This is the corollary to the 85% reservation, defining the scope of jobs open to all.

fiscal_cost_note: There is no direct fiscal cost to the government. The potential indirect economic impact on investment and business competitiveness is unquantifiable.
sustainability_reasoning: Given the significant constitutional hurdles and adverse court rulings on similar policies in other states, this promise is unlikely to be implemented in its stated form. It serves as a powerful political message addressing local unemployment anxieties.
coverage_gap_note: Such a policy would likely be struck down by courts as it infringes on constitutional rights of equality and freedom of movement.

promise_text_en: Measures will be taken to give priority to the people of the respective state in Union Government institutions such as the Railways and Neyveli Lignite Corporation (NLC).
promise_text_ta: தொடர்வண்டித் துறை, நெய்வேலி பழுப்பு நிலக்கரி நிறுவனம் (NLC) போன்ற ஒன்றிய அரசு நிறுவனங்களில் அந்தந்த மாநில மக்களுக்கே முன்னுரிமை அளிக்க வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 437
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to increase local employment in central government institutions located within Tamil Nadu by advocating for preferential hiring policies.

promise_components.component: Take measures to give priority to people of the respective state in Union Government institutions like Railways and NLC.
promise_components.analysis: Recruitment for Union Government institutions is governed by central government policy, which typically follows an all-India open competition model. A state government has no authority to legislate or enforce such a priority; it can only lobby the central government.

fiscal_cost_note: This promise has no fiscal cost as it involves advocacy, not expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government cannot deliver this promise, as it falls entirely within the jurisdiction of the central government. The promise is a statement of political intent and advocacy, not a directly implementable policy.
coverage_gap_note: Implementation is entirely dependent on the central government changing its national recruitment policy.

promise_text_en: Priority in employment for the sons of the soil will be made mandatory in both the public and private sectors.
promise_text_ta: வேலைவாய்ப்பில் மண்ணின் மக்களுக்கான முன்னுரிமை என்பது அரசு மற்றும் தனியார் ஆகிய இரு துறைகளுக்கும் கட்டாயமாக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 437
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to secure jobs for locals by making preferential hiring mandatory across both public and private sectors.

promise_components.component: Make priority in employment for 'sons of the soil' mandatory in the public sector.
promise_components.analysis: State public sector employment already has domicile requirements. This would be a reinforcement of that policy. Applying it to central public sector undertakings is not within the state's power.

promise_components.component: Make priority in employment for 'sons of the soil' mandatory in the private sector.
promise_components.analysis: This is legally contentious. Similar laws in other states have been challenged in court for violating constitutional rights to equality and freedom to conduct business. Enforcement would be difficult.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 437
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to provide official state sanction and support to traditional Tamil religious and cultural practices.

promise_components.component: Cherish and protect nature worship with government recognition.

promise_components.component: Cherish and protect ancestor worship with government recognition.
promise_components.analysis: Similar to nature worship, the form of 'recognition' is not specified. It could involve supporting community rituals or documenting traditions.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar party completely opposes the Draft Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) 2020 and is firm in its stance that it should not be implemented.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 439
impact_mechanism: This promise positions the state in opposition to a central government environmental policy perceived as detrimental.

promise_components.component: Completely oppose the Draft Environmental Impact Assessment (EIA) 2020.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of political opposition. The EIA notification is issued by the central government under the Environment (Protection) Act, 1986.

promise_components.component: Ensure the Draft EIA 2020 is not implemented.
promise_components.analysis: A state government cannot unilaterally prevent the implementation of a central law. It can challenge the law in court or refuse cooperation where possible, but it cannot block its legal applicability.

fiscal_cost_note: This promise has no fiscal cost.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government does not have the legal power to stop a central government notification from being in force. This promise is a political stance and an expression of dissent, not a deliverable action.
coverage_gap_note: The state lacks the constitutional authority to prevent the implementation of a central law.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government completely opposes the Dam Safety Act, 2021, brought by the Union Government. It will take measures to enable the state government to enact its own legislation regarding dam safety.
promise_text_ta: இந்திய ஒன்றிய அரசு கொண்டு வந்துள்ள அணைகள் பாதுகாப்புச் சட்டம், 2021ஐ நாம் தமிழர் அரசு முற்றிலுமாக எதிர்க்கிறது. அணைகள் பாதுகாப்பு குறித்து மாநில அரசே சட்டம் இயற்றிக்கொள்ளும் வகையிலான நடவடிக்கைகளை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மேற்கொள்ளும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 439
impact_mechanism: This promise asserts state authority over dam safety in opposition to a centralizing federal law.

promise_components.component: Completely oppose the Dam Safety Act, 2021.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political and legal stance against a central Act that gives the Union government powers over dam safety, which states see as an encroachment on their control over water resources.

promise_components.component: Take measures to enable the state government to enact its own legislation regarding dam safety.
promise_components.analysis: Under the constitution, a state law that is repugnant to a central law on a concurrent subject is void. The state would have to challenge the central Act's constitutionality in the Supreme Court, a process with an uncertain outcome.

fiscal_cost_note: This promise has no direct fiscal cost, though legal challenges would incur expenses.
sustainability_reasoning: A state cannot unilaterally override a central law. The promise to enact its own law is legally untenable without a successful Supreme Court ruling invalidating the central Act. It is primarily a statement of federalist opposition.
coverage_gap_note: The state cannot legislate in a field occupied by a central law; this requires a successful constitutional challenge.

fiscal_cost_note: The act of repealing a law has no direct fiscal cost.

promise_text_en: The power to arrest anyone in a state without its consent or prior permission is an infringement on state autonomy. The Naam Tamilar party will not only oppose the National Investigation Agency (NIA) but will also take firm action to dismantle it.

source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 441
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to assert state autonomy by politically opposing and legally challenging a central government law perceived as infringing on state rights.

promise_components.component: Oppose and take firm action to dismantle the National Investigation Agency (NIA).

sustainability_reasoning: The power to withdraw a central bill lies with the Union Government. The state government can only voice opposition, making the promise a statement of political intent rather than a guaranteed outcome.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will immediately repeal the Forest (Conservation) Amendment Act, 2023.
promise_text_ta: இந்தத் திருத்தச் சட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உடனடியாகத் திரும்பப் பெறும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 445
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to restore previous environmental protections by committing to the repeal of a recent central government amendment.

promise_components.component: Immediately repeal the Forest (Conservation) Amendment Act, 2023.
promise_components.analysis: A state government cannot repeal an act passed by the Parliament of India. This promise is constitutionally undeliverable. The state can, however, challenge the act in court or use its own administrative powers to limit its implementation where possible.

fiscal_cost_note: There is no fiscal cost for an action that the state government cannot legally perform. Potential legal costs for a court challenge would be minimal.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise to 'repeal' a central act is a political statement, as the state legislature lacks the power to do so. It signals an oppositional stance but cannot be implemented as worded.

promise_text_en: Although the Private University Act Amendment Draft 2025 is currently on hold due to opposition from teachers and students, the Naam Tamilar government will fully accept their demands and ensure the bill is withdrawn unconditionally.
promise_text_ta: ஆசிரியர்கள் மற்றும் மாணவர்களின் எதிர்ப்பின் காரணமாக இந்தச் சட்ட வரைவு தற்போது நிறுத்தி வைக்கப்பட்டிருந்தாலும் அவர்களின் கோரிக்கையை முழுமையாக ஏற்று தமிழ்நாடு அரசு இந்த “தனியார் பல்கலைக்கழகச் சட்டத் திருத்த வரைவு 2025”ஐ எந்த வகைக் கட்டுப்பாடுமின்றி திரும்பப் பெற வேண்டும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 445
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to prevent the privatization of higher education by ensuring a proposed state-level bill is permanently withdrawn.

promise_components.component: Ensure the Private University Act Amendment Draft 2025 is withdrawn unconditionally.
promise_components.analysis: Assuming this refers to a state-level bill, a new government has the full authority to withdraw proposed legislation that has not been passed. This is a straightforward legislative action.

fiscal_cost_note: There is zero fiscal cost associated with withdrawing a legislative bill. It is a policy decision.
sustainability_reasoning: By preventing a change in the legal framework, this action maintains the existing structure of higher education regulation in the state. It addresses the root concern about the potential negative impacts of the proposed bill.

promise_text_en: The 8-hour workday will be legally established as per International Labour Organization (ILO) rules, and trade union laws will be strengthened to protect workers' collective bargaining rights.
promise_text_ta: பன்னாட்டுத் தொழிலாளர் அமைப்பு (ILO) விதிகளின்படி 8 மணி நேர வேலையைச் சட்டத்தின் மூலமாக நிலைநிறுத்தும். தொழிலாளர்களின் கூட்டுப் பேரம் பேசும் உரிமையைப் (Collective Bargaining) பாதுகாக்கும் வகையில் தொழிற்சங்கச் சட்டங்கள் வலுப்படுத்தப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 445
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to improve working conditions and empower labor by legally mandating a standard workday and strengthening collective bargaining rights.

promise_components.component: Legally establish the 8-hour workday as per ILO rules.
promise_components.analysis: This can be implemented through amendments to state-level labor laws, such as the Factories Act rules and the Shops and Establishments Act. It is a regulatory action within the state's power.

promise_components.component: Strengthen trade union laws to protect collective bargaining rights.
promise_components.analysis: The state government can amend its own trade union regulations and industrial dispute rules to enhance protections and facilitate collective bargaining. This is a legislative and regulatory action.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost to the state budget is negligible, limited to administrative and legislative processes. The economic cost would be borne by employers, including state-owned enterprises.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise alters the fundamental legal rules governing the labor market and industrial relations. It addresses the root causes of worker exploitation and weak bargaining power by creating a lasting legal framework.
coverage_gap_note: Enforcement would be a major challenge, particularly in the large unorganized and informal sectors.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will block the potentially disastrous Kattupalli Adani port expansion project by denying it permission.
promise_text_ta: இத்தகைய பேராபத்தை விளைவிக்கக்கூடிய காட்டுப்பள்ளி அதானி துறைமுக விரிவாக்கத்திற்கு அனுமதி வழங்காது நாம் தமிழர் அரசு தடுத்து நிறுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 447
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to prevent potential environmental damage and displacement by using the state's regulatory power to block a major industrial project.

promise_components.component: Block the Kattupalli Adani port expansion project by denying it permission.
promise_components.analysis: The state government has significant authority to grant or deny permissions for such projects, including environmental clearances and land use approvals. This is a regulatory action within the state's purview.

fiscal_cost_note: There is zero direct fiscal cost to the state budget. This is a decision to forgo potential future investment and tax revenue, which is an opportunity cost, not a direct expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: By preventing the construction of a large-scale port, this action permanently avoids the associated environmental and social changes. It addresses the root concerns of local communities and environmental groups about the project's impact.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will properly demarcate the boundaries of the Pulicat bird sanctuary to block the Adani port expansion project and will also focus on the development of the sanctuary.
promise_text_ta: பழவேற்காடு பறவைகள் புகலிடத்தின் அளவை சரியாக உறுதி செய்து அதானி துறைமுக விரிவாக்கத் திட்டத்தினை தடுப்பதோடு, பழவேற்காடு பறவைகள் புகலிடத்தின் மேம்பாட்டிலும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு கவனம் செலுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 447
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to provide legal and physical protection to an ecologically sensitive area, using this as a tool to block industrial expansion.

promise_components.component: Properly demarcate the boundaries of the Pulicat bird sanctuary.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative and legal action that falls within the state government's authority. It involves surveying, public consultation, and official notification of the sanctuary's boundaries.

promise_components.component: Focus on the development of the sanctuary.
promise_components.analysis: This component is vague and its cost cannot be calculated. 'Development' could range from minor infrastructure like watchtowers to significant eco-restoration projects. Data is unavailable.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost of demarcation is typically small and part of departmental budgets. The cost for 'development' is not specified and cannot be estimated. Therefore, the total fiscal impact is uncosted.
sustainability_reasoning: Clearly demarcating and notifying a sanctuary boundary provides a permanent, legally enforceable protection for the ecosystem. This addresses the root cause of encroachment and environmental degradation threats.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will immediately scrap the Parandur airport project.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு பரந்தூர் வானூர்தி நிலையத் திட்டத்தை உடனடியாகத் திரும்பப் பெறும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 449
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to prevent the displacement of local communities and the conversion of agricultural land by cancelling a major infrastructure project.

promise_components.component: Immediately scrap the Parandur airport project.
promise_components.analysis: The state government is a key partner in this project, responsible for land acquisition. By withdrawing its consent and refusing to acquire land, it can effectively scrap the project. The ₹27,400 crore mentioned is the estimated project cost, not a cost incurred by the state for cancellation.

fiscal_cost_note: There is zero direct fiscal cost to scrapping the project. It is a decision to forgo a planned investment. Any sunk costs for preliminary studies are not specified in the available data.
sustainability_reasoning: This action prevents the permanent and irreversible conversion of land and displacement of communities. It addresses the root concerns of the protesting farmers and residents by stopping the project itself.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will ban the expansion projects of the Neyveli lignite mines and will also ensure that those whose lands were previously acquired but were not given proper employment are hired.
promise_text_ta: நெய்வேலி நிலக்கரி சுரங்கத்தின் விரிவாக்கத் திட்டங்களுக்குத் தடை விதிப்பதோடு, ஏற்கனவே நிலம் கையகப்படுத்தப்பட்டு உரிய வேலைவாய்ப்புகள் கிடைக்கப் பெறாதவர்களைப் பணியமர்த்த நாம் தமிழர் அரசு உறுதி செய்யும்.
scheme_name: நெய்வேலி பழுப்பு நிலக்கரி நிறுவனச் (NLC) சுரங்க விரிவாக்கம்
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 449
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to protect agricultural land and provide restitution by stopping a central PSU's mine expansion and mandating employment for previously displaced families.

promise_components.component: Ban the expansion projects of the Neyveli Lignite Corporation (NLC) mines.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision to halt a project run by a central public sector undertaking. The fiscal impact is indirect and not quantifiable from the provided data. Implementation would likely face legal and political challenges from the Union Government.

promise_components.component: Ensure employment for those whose lands were previously acquired but not given jobs.
promise_components.analysis: The number of affected families or individuals is not available in the reference data, so the cost of providing employment cannot be calculated. This would be a recurring salary expenditure.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of the employment component is unknown as the number of beneficiaries is not specified. The ban itself has no direct state expenditure.
sustainability_reasoning: The promise attempts to permanently halt land acquisition for mining in a specific region, addressing the root cause of land displacement. However, its success is contingent on overcoming significant legal and federal hurdles.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not address the state's overall power needs or the economic role of NLC.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will not accept the transfer of thousands of acres of agricultural land to multinational corporations. Instead of such projects on agricultural lands, we will implement a "decentralized power generation" system by installing solar panels on the rooftops of houses and public buildings without acquiring public land.
promise_text_ta: பன்னாட்டு நிறுவனங்களுக்கு ஆயிரக்கணக்கான குறுக்கம் வேளாண் நிலங்களைத் தாரை வார்ப்பதை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ஏற்காது. வேளாண் நிலங்களில் இது போன்ற திட்டங்களை முன்னெடுப்பதற்கு பதிலாக, “பரவலாக்கப்பட்ட மின் உற்பத்தி” முறையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு பின்பற்றும். பொது நிலங்களை கையகப்படுத்தாமல், வீடுகள் மற்றும் பொதுக் கட்டடங்களின் மேற்கூரைகளில் சூரிய ஒளித் தகடுகளை அமைத்து மின்சாரம் தயாரிக்கும் முறையை நடைமுறைப்படுத்துவோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 451
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to shift the state's energy strategy by preventing large-scale land acquisition for power projects and promoting distributed, renewable energy generation.

promise_components.component: Prohibit the transfer of agricultural land to multinational corporations for large projects.
promise_components.analysis: This is a land-use policy decision with no direct fiscal cost. It aims to protect agricultural resources from industrial conversion.

promise_components.component: Implement a 'decentralized power generation' system with solar panels on houses and public buildings.
promise_components.analysis: This implies a state-sponsored scheme. The scale (number of houses/buildings) and subsidy model are not defined. The reference data is insufficient to calculate the cost.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of the decentralized solar panel scheme is incalculable without details on the number of installations and the subsidy per unit.
sustainability_reasoning: This proposes a fundamental shift in energy infrastructure, moving from centralized, land-intensive projects to decentralized renewables. If implemented, it would create a lasting change in the state's energy and land-use model.
coverage_gap_note: Renters and those living in buildings unsuitable for solar panels would be excluded from the direct benefits.

promise_text_en: Permits for projects like the GAIL gas pipeline, IOCL pipeline, ONGC gas pipeline, and hydrocarbon extraction wells in the Cauvery delta region, which destroy agricultural land and livelihoods, will be completely revoked by the Naam Tamilar government.
promise_text_ta: கெயில் எரிவாயுக் குழாய்ப் பதிப்புத் திட்டம், IOCL-ன் குழாய்ப் பதிக்கும் திட்டம், ONGC- எரிவாயுக் குழாய்ப் பதிக்கும் திட்டம், இயற்கை எரிகாற்று மற்றும் நீரகக்கரிமம் (ஈத்தேன் மீத்தேன், ஹைட்ரோ கார்பன்), உள்ளிட்டவற்றை எடுக்கும் எண்ணெய்க் கிணறுகள் ஆகியவவைக் காவிரிப் படுகைப் பகுதியிலுள்ள வேளாண் நிலங்களைப் பாழாக்கி, அங்குள்ள மண் வளத்தைச் சிதைத்து, வேளாண் தொழிலை முற்றிலுமாக அழிக்கும் சிலை உள்ளது. இத்திட்டங்களுக்கான அனுமதிகளை நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சி முற்றாக நீக்கம் செய்யும்.
scheme_name: GAIL gas pipeline, IOCL pipeline, ONGC gas pipeline
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 451
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to protect agricultural lands and livelihoods in the Cauvery delta by using state power to revoke permits for central PSU energy infrastructure projects.

promise_components.component: Revoke permits for GAIL, IOCL, and ONGC gas pipelines and hydrocarbon extraction wells in the Cauvery delta region.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal and administrative action to cancel existing approvals for projects, many involving central government entities. This action would likely result in significant legal challenges and potential claims for compensation from the companies involved.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The potential financial liability from legal challenges and compensation claims for revoking permits for major infrastructure projects is unknown and could be substantial.
sustainability_reasoning: By revoking permits, the promise aims to permanently stop projects perceived as a threat to the agricultural ecology of the delta. This addresses the root cause (the projects themselves) but faces major legal and federal obstacles.
coverage_gap_note: The policy does not address potential job losses or the broader energy security implications of cancelling these projects.

promise_text_en: The Protected Special Agricultural Zone Act will be amended to halt currently operational hydrocarbon projects and gas refineries, as the existing law only prohibits new ones.
promise_text_ta: ஏற்கனவே செயல்பாட்டில் உள்ள கிணறுகள் தொடர்ந்து இயங்க இச்சட்டம் அனுமதி அளிக்கிறது. செயல்பாட்டில் உள்ள திட்டங்களையும், எரிவாயு சுத்திகரிப்பு நிலையம் அமைக்கும் திட்டங்களையும் தடை செய்யும் வகையில் பாதுகாக்கப்பட்ட வேளாண் மண்டலச் சட்டத்தில் திருத்தம் கொண்டு வரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 451
impact_mechanism: This promise intends to strengthen environmental protections in the Cauvery delta by amending state law to retroactively halt existing hydrocarbon operations.

promise_components.component: Amend the Protected Special Agricultural Zone Act to halt currently operational hydrocarbon projects and gas refineries.
promise_components.analysis: This involves changing state law to apply retroactively to existing, operational industrial facilities. This action would almost certainly trigger severe legal battles over vested rights and could lead to massive compensation claims for stranded assets.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The financial liability from shutting down operational refineries and hydrocarbon projects is potentially enormous and cannot be estimated from available data.
sustainability_reasoning: Amending the law to halt existing projects is a structural change that would fundamentally alter the industrial activity allowed in the protected zone. However, its legal viability is highly questionable and it carries extreme financial risk.
coverage_gap_note: This would lead to the immediate loss of jobs for those employed in the operational projects.

promise_text_en: The project to establish 20 hydrocarbon wells in Ramanathapuram district, currently shelved due to public opposition, will be formally withdrawn by the Naam Tamilar government.
promise_text_ta: 2025ஆம் ஆண்டில், இராமநாதபுரம் மாவட்டத்தில் 20 நீரகக்கரிமக் (ஹைட்ரோ கார்பன்) கிணறுகளை அமைக்க ஒன்றிய அரசு அனுமதி அளித்தது. மக்கள் எதிர்ப்பு காரணமாக, தற்போது கிடப்பில் உள்ள இத்திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு திரும்ப பெறும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 451
impact_mechanism: This promise provides legal certainty to a local community by formally cancelling a shelved hydrocarbon project.

promise_components.component: Formally withdraw the project to establish 20 hydrocarbon wells in Ramanathapuram district.
promise_components.analysis: The promise states the project is already 'shelved'. This action would change its status from dormant to officially cancelled. The direct fiscal cost is minimal, involving administrative procedures.

fiscal_cost_note: Negligible cost. The action is administrative and does not involve new expenditure or significant liability as the project is already dormant.
sustainability_reasoning: By formally withdrawing the project, it prevents its potential revival in the future. This provides a permanent resolution and addresses the root concern of the local population.

promise_text_en: We oppose the Sagarmala project, part of the 'Maritime India Vision 2030', which plans a 'Mega Port Cluster' from Chennai to Cuddalore. This project leads to the relaxation of CRZ rules and threatens to take over fishermen's habitats and boat docking areas.
promise_text_ta: ஒன்றிய அரசு 'Maritime India Vision 2030' என்பதன் ஒரு பகுதியாக, சென்னை - கடலூர் பகுதிகளை ஒரு 'Mega Port Cluster' மாற்றத் திட்டமிட்டுள்ளது. இத்திட்டத்தின் கீழ் புதிய துறைமுகங்கள் மற்றும் கடற்கரையோரச் சாலைகள் அமைப்பதால், கடலோர ஒழுங்குமுறை மண்டல (CRZ) விதிகளில் தளர்வுகள் ஏற்படுத்தப்படுகின்றன. இது மீனவர்களின் வாழ்விடங்கள் மற்றும் படகு நிறுத்துமிடங்களை கையகப்படுத்த வழிவகுக்கிறது. அதனால் இந்தத் திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு எதிர்க்கின்றது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 451
impact_mechanism: This promise signals political opposition to a central government infrastructure plan to protect coastal communities and habitats.

promise_components.component: Oppose the Sagarmala project and its 'Mega Port Cluster' from Chennai to Cuddalore.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of political opposition to a Union Government program. 'Opposing' can involve refusing state-level cooperation or permits. It does not guarantee the project will be stopped and has no direct, calculable cost.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost. The promise is to 'oppose' a project, which is a political stance, not a spending program.
sustainability_reasoning: Stating opposition is a political signal. It does not, by itself, constitute a concrete action that stops the project. The promise's fulfillment depends on the effectiveness of the opposition, which is uncertain against a central initiative.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not offer an alternative vision for port development or coastal economic growth.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will stop the Neutrino Observatory project in Pottipuram, Theni district, in all its forms, due to the immense danger it poses to the Western Ghats and the risk of damage to the ancient Mullaiperiyar Dam and other water bodies from the required excavation.
promise_text_ta: தேனி மாவட்டம் பொட்டிபுரத்தில் அமையவுள்ள அணுத்துகள் (நியூட்ரினோ) ஆய்வு மையத்தால் பேராபத்தை எதிர்கொள்ளவிருக்கிறது மேற்குத்தொடர்ச்சி மலைகள். பழமை வாய்ந்த முல்லைப்பெரியாறு அணை உட்பட, போடி மற்றும் சுற்றுவட்டாரத்தில் உள்ள பல்வேறு அணைகளும், நீர்நிலைகளும் சிதையும் வாய்ப்பு உள்ளதால் இத்திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அனைத்து வகையிலும் தடுத்து நிறுத்தும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 453
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to protect a sensitive ecosystem and water sources by stopping a centrally-funded national scientific research project.

promise_components.component: Stop the Neutrino Observatory project in Pottipuram, Theni district.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision to halt a major scientific project funded by the Union Government. A state government can attempt to stop it by denying permits, but this would lead to a direct conflict with the central government and would likely be challenged legally.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct fiscal cost to the state. The action involves blocking a project, not spending money.
sustainability_reasoning: If successful, stopping the project would permanently prevent the excavation and construction in the ecologically sensitive Western Ghats region. It directly addresses the perceived environmental threat.
coverage_gap_note: This action opposes the goals of the national scientific community seeking to advance particle physics research.

promise_text_en: Action will be taken against the Neutrino project by properly demarcating the boundary of the eco-sensitive zone of the Mathikettan Shola National Park, which is very close to the proposed project site.
promise_text_ta: மதிகெட்டான் சோலை தேசியப் பூங்காவின் சூழலியல் உணர்திறன் மண்டல எல்லையைச் சரிவர அளவீடு செய்வதன் மூலம் அணுத்துகள் ஆய்வுத் திட்டத்திற்கு எதிரான நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 453
impact_mechanism: This promise outlines a specific legal-environmental strategy to halt the Neutrino project by formally demarcating a protected area boundary.

promise_components.component: Demarcate the boundary of the eco-sensitive zone of Mathikettan Shola National Park near the Neutrino project site.
promise_components.analysis: This is a concrete administrative action that uses environmental law as a tool to block the project. Demarcating an Eco-Sensitive Zone (ESZ) is a power shared between state and central environmental bodies. If the project falls within the ESZ, it would face much stricter regulations, potentially making it unviable.

fiscal_cost_note: Minimal administrative cost for surveying and notification. No major expenditure is required.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a more sophisticated approach than simply 'stopping' the project. Creating a legally recognized eco-sensitive zone provides a durable, long-term barrier against this and future industrial or large-scale construction projects in the area.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will scrap the Sillahalla hydroelectric dam project in the Nilgiris, which violates environmental laws, would destroy 800 acres of forest and displace over 10,000 people.
promise_text_ta: சூழலியல் விதிகளுக்கு முரணாக, நீலகிரியில் 800 குறுக்கம் காடுகளையும், பல குறுக்கம் விளைநிலங்களையும் கையகப்படுத்தி 10,000க்கும் அதிகமான மக்கள் வாழ்வாதாரம் அழிந்து இடம்பெயரக் காரணமாக அமையப்போகும் சில்லகல்லா நீர் மின் அணைத் திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு நீக்கம் செய்யும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 453
impact_mechanism: This promise aims to prevent environmental damage and displacement by cancelling a state-level hydroelectric project.

promise_components.component: Scrap the Sillahalla hydroelectric dam project in the Nilgiris.
promise_components.analysis: This is a decision to cancel a state-level infrastructure project. The state government has the authority to do so. The primary fiscal impact would be from writing off sunk costs or paying contractual penalties, which are not specified in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of scrapping the project, including potential penalties and writing off sunk investments, is unknown.
sustainability_reasoning: Cancelling the project permanently prevents the destruction of 800 acres of forest and the displacement of 10,000 people. It is a direct and lasting solution to the specific threat posed by the dam.
coverage_gap_note: The promise does not address the electricity generation that would be lost by cancelling the project.

promise_text_en: We do not accept the current Chennai-Salem eight-lane expressway project. Land already surveyed and transferred for the project will be legally returned to the original owners. Compensation will be provided for felled trees, filled wells, and demolished houses, and a special fund will be allocated to restore the affected land for agriculture.
promise_text_ta: தற்போதைய சென்னை - சேலம் எட்டுவழிச் சாலை திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு ஏற்கவில்லை. இத்திட்டத்திற்காக நில அளவீடு செய்யப்பட்டு, ஆவணங்களில் மாற்றம் செய்யப்பட்ட நிலங்களை மீண்டும் பழைய நில உரிமையாளர்களின் பெயருக்கே மாற்றுவதைச் சட்டத்தின்மூலம் உறுதி செய்யும். ஏற்கனவே வெட்டப்பட்ட மரங்கள், மூடப்பட்டக் கிணறுகள் மற்றும் இடிக்கப்பட்ட வீடுகளுக்குத் தகுந்த இழப்பீடு வழங்குவதோடு, பாதிக்கப்பட்ட நிலங்களை மீண்டும் வேளாண்மைக்கு ஏற்றவாறு சீரமைக்க சிறப்பு நிதி ஒதுக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 453
impact_mechanism: This promise seeks to reverse the land acquisition for a central highway project and restore the land to its original owners and use.

promise_components.component: Legally return land acquired for the Chennai-Salem eight-lane expressway to the original owners.
promise_components.analysis: This is legally and administratively extremely difficult. Land acquired under the National Highways Act for a central project cannot be unilaterally returned by a state government. It would require the Union Government to denotify the acquisition.

promise_components.component: Provide compensation for damages and allocate a special fund to restore the land for agriculture.
promise_components.analysis: This implies a new state expenditure. The number of affected owners, extent of damages, and size of the restoration fund are not specified, so the cost cannot be calculated.

fiscal_cost_note: Uncosted. The cost of the compensation and land restoration fund is unknown. The primary obstacle is legal, not fiscal.
sustainability_reasoning: If it could be implemented, returning land and restoring it for agriculture would be a permanent, structural reversal of the project's impact. However, the state government lacks the legal authority to execute the core part of the promise on its own.
coverage_gap_note: This ignores the transportation and economic development goals that the expressway was intended to serve.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will oppose all types of qualifying and entrance exams for education and employment proposed by the Union government, as they usurp state rights and undermine social justice. We will not permit any entrance exams in Tamil Nadu for any course, including arts, science, law, and engineering, taking NEET as a precedent.
promise_text_ta: மாநில உரிமைகளைப் பறிக்கும், சமூகநீதியைப் புறந்தள்ளும் வகையில் ஒன்றிய அரசு முன்மொழியும் கல்வி மற்றும் வேலைவாய்ப்புக்கான அனைத்து வகை தகுதித் தேர்வுகளையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு எதிர்க்கும். மருத்துவப் படிப்புகளுக்கான நீட் தேர்வை மாதிரியாகக் கொண்டு, கலை, அறிவியல், சட்டம், பொறியியல் உள்ளிட்ட அனைத்து வகைப் படிப்புகளுக்கான நுழைவுத் தேர்வுகளையும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு தமிழ்நாட்டில் எக்காரணத்தைக் கொண்டும் அனுமதிக்காது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 453
impact_mechanism: Aims to restore the primacy of board exam scores for college admissions, arguing this promotes social justice over standardized tests.

promise_components.component: Oppose Union government qualifying and entrance exams like NEET.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy and legal challenge against a central government law. A state government cannot unilaterally abolish NEET but can refuse to implement it, leading to a constitutional conflict.

promise_components.component: Prohibit any entrance exams in Tamil Nadu for all courses, including arts, science, law, and engineering.
promise_components.analysis: This is a state-level policy decision. The government can pass legislation to ban state-conducted entrance exams and regulate admissions in state universities and colleges.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure. Costs would be administrative and legal, which are not quantifiable from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: This seeks to fundamentally alter the rules of access to higher education, shifting from a national standardized test model to one based on state board examinations. This is a structural change to the education system's selection mechanism.
coverage_gap_note: This policy change does not have a direct 'coverage gap' but may disadvantage students who perform better on standardized tests compared to board exams.

promise_text_en: We will undertake intense political and legal struggles to bring education back to the State List. To curb the influence of outsiders, priority and reservation will be given in all government jobs to students who have completed their education in the Tamil medium.
promise_text_ta: கல்வியை மீண்டும் மாநிலப் பட்டியலுக்குக் கொண்டு வருவதற்கான தீவிரமான அரசியல் மற்றும் சட்டப் போராட்டங்களை முன்னெடுக்கும். அனைத்துத் துறை வேலைவாய்ப்புகளிலும் தமிழ் வழியில் பயின்ற மாணவர்களுக்கு முன்னுரிமை மற்றும் இடப்பகிர்வை வழங்குவதன் மூலம் வெளிமாநிலத்தவரின் செல்வாக்கைத் தடுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 455
impact_mechanism: Aims to increase state autonomy over education policy and improve public sector employment prospects for Tamil-medium students.

promise_components.component: Undertake political and legal struggles to bring education back to the State List.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a constitutional amendment, which is beyond the power of a single state government. It is a statement of political intent.

promise_components.component: Provide priority and reservation in all government jobs for students educated in the Tamil medium.
promise_components.analysis: This is a state-level policy decision affecting public employment rules. The number of government jobs or applicants is not available in the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure. This is a policy change affecting constitutional structure and employment rules, not a spending program.
sustainability_reasoning: Moving 'Education' to the State List is a fundamental constitutional change. Creating a reservation category in public employment is a structural alteration of hiring rules, aiming to correct a perceived systemic disadvantage.
coverage_gap_note: Students who completed their education in English or other language mediums would be disadvantaged in competing for government jobs.

promise_text_en: Construction of new units (3 to 6) at the Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant will be halted, and the Naam Tamilar government will gradually reduce the state's dependence on nuclear energy. Under no circumstances will Tamil Nadu be allowed to become a nuclear waste storage site.
promise_text_ta: புதிய அலகுகள் (3 முதல் 6 வரை) அமைப்பதை நிறுத்துவதோடு, அணுமின்சாரத்தைச் சார்ந்திருக்கும் நிலையை நாம் தமிழர் அரசு படிப்படியாக கட்டுக்குள் கொண்டு வரும். தமிழ்நாட்டை அணுக்கழிவு சேமிப்பு மையமாக மாற்ற எக்காரணத்தைக் கொண்டும் நாம் தமிழர் அரசு அனுமதிக்காது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 455
impact_mechanism: Aims to prevent perceived environmental and safety risks by stopping the expansion of a nuclear power plant and reducing reliance on nuclear energy.

promise_components.component: Halt construction of new units (3 to 6) at the Kudankulam Nuclear Power Plant.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy of opposition to a Union Government project. A state government has limited direct power to halt it but can create administrative and legal hurdles.

promise_components.component: Prevent Tamil Nadu from becoming a nuclear waste storage site.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy stance on a sensitive issue. The state can use its regulatory powers over land and environment to oppose such a facility.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure. The indirect cost of replacing the foregone power generation capacity is not calculable from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: The state government has very limited legal authority to unilaterally halt a strategic central government project like KKNPP. The promise signals a strong political stance but its practical implementation is not fully within the state's control, making it largely a statement of intent.
coverage_gap_note: This policy does not directly exclude any group but has statewide implications for energy supply if successful.

promise_text_en: Under Naam Tamilar rule, new ecologically damaging thermal power projects will never be permitted. Instead, measures will be taken to reduce the use of existing thermal power plants in accordance with international regulations.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சியில், சூழலியல் சீர்கேடு விளைவிக்கும் புதிய அனல் மின் திட்டங்கள் எக்காலத்திலும் அனுமதிக்கப்படாது. மாறாக, பன்னாட்டு விதிமுறைகளைப் பின்பற்றி, ஏற்கனவே உள்ள அனல் மின் நிலையங்களின் பயன்பாட்டைக் குறைத்திட நடவடிக்கை மேற்கொள்ளப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 455
impact_mechanism: Aims to improve environmental quality and combat climate change by shifting the state's energy policy away from fossil fuels.

promise_components.component: New ecologically damaging thermal power projects will never be permitted.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision within the state's purview, as it controls environmental clearances and land allocation for such projects.

promise_components.component: Measures will be taken to reduce the use of existing thermal power plants.
promise_components.analysis: This requires a long-term strategy to replace existing capacity with alternative energy sources, which is a complex and costly transition.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure. The indirect costs of investing in and transitioning to alternative energy sources are massive but not calculable from the reference data.
sustainability_reasoning: Banning an entire category of power generation and planning a phase-out of existing plants represents a fundamental, structural shift in the state's long-term energy and environmental policy.

promise_text_en: The Sterlite Copper plant, which was finally shut down after prolonged protests by the people of Thoothukudi and the loss of many lives to state terrorism, will not be allowed to reopen under any circumstances by the Naam Tamilar government.
promise_text_ta: தூத்துக்குடி மக்களின் நீண்ட நெடியப் போராட்டத்திற்குப் பிறகு, அரசப் பயங்கரவாதத்தால் பல உயிர்களைப் பறிகொடுத்தப் பிறகு இறுதியாக இழுத்து மூடப்பட்ட ஸ்டெர்லைட் தாமிர ஆலை மீண்டும் செயல்பட எக்காரணத்தைக் கொண்டும் நாம் தமிழர் ஆட்சி அனுமதிக்காது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 455
impact_mechanism: Aims to prevent the reopening of a specific industrial plant perceived as a major polluter and source of social conflict.

promise_components.component: The Sterlite Copper plant will not be allowed to reopen under any circumstances.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise to maintain the current status quo, as the plant is already shut. The final decision on reopening rests with the Supreme Court, where the matter is sub-judice.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure. This is a legal and administrative policy stance.
sustainability_reasoning: The plant is already closed and the decision on its future is with the judiciary. This promise reaffirms a popular political position but does not introduce a new action or policy; it is contingent on a court ruling.

promise_text_en: We will oppose the recently proposed plan by Vedanta to build a new 'Green Copper Plant' as a replacement for the old Sterlite facility.
promise_text_ta: அண்மையில் வேதாந்தா நிறுவனம் பழைய ஆலைக்குப் பதிலாக ஒரு புதிய ‘பசுமைத் தாமிர ஆலை' (Green Copper Plant) அமைப்பதற்கான திட்டத்தை முன்மொழிவது குறித்துத் தகவல்கள் வெளியாகியுள்ளன.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 455
impact_mechanism: Aims to prevent the establishment of a new industrial facility by a company associated with past environmental and social conflict.

promise_components.component: Oppose the plan by Vedanta to build a new 'Green Copper Plant'.
promise_components.analysis: This is a policy decision. The state government can effectively block a new industrial project by denying necessary permits for land, water, and environmental clearance.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure. This is a regulatory decision.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a reactive measure that addresses a specific, proposed project from a controversial company. It provides relief from a potential threat but does not reform the underlying regulatory system for evaluating all future industrial projects.

promise_text_en: We will expedite pending court cases to reclaim the Sterlite plant land for the government. As per court orders, the plant's equipment and waste (Gypsum/Slag) will be removed within a deadline. The Naam Tamilar government will also launch long-term projects to provide special medical facilities to restore the health of the affected population and to purify the area's groundwater.
promise_text_ta: உச்சநீதிமன்றத்தில் நிலுவையில் உள்ள மற்ற சிறு வழக்குகளைத் விரைவுபடுத்தி, ஆலை நிலத்தை மீண்டும் அரசு வசமாக்க நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கப்படும். நீதிமன்ற உத்தரவுப்படி ஆலையின் கருவிகள் மற்றும் கழிவுகள் (Gypsum/Slag) குறிப்பிட்ட காலக்கெடுவுக்குள் அகற்றப்படும். மேலும், பாதிக்கப்பட்ட மக்களின் உடல்நலனைச் சீர்செய்ய சிறப்பு மருத்துவ வசதிகள் மற்றும் அப்பகுதியின் நிலத்தடி நீரைச் சுத்திகரிக்க நாம் தமிழர் அரசு நீண்டகாலத் திட்டங்களை முன்னெடுக்கும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 457
impact_mechanism: Aims to address the long-term environmental and public health damage caused by the Sterlite plant's operations through remediation and healthcare.

promise_components.component: Expedite court cases to reclaim the Sterlite plant land for the government.
promise_components.analysis: This is a legal action dependent on judicial outcomes.

promise_components.component: Launch long-term projects for special medical facilities for the affected population.
promise_components.analysis: This involves capital and operational expenditure. Cost is not calculable as the number of affected people and scale of facilities are not in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Launch long-term projects to purify the area's groundwater.
promise_components.analysis: This is a large-scale environmental engineering project with significant costs. Cost is not calculable from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for specialized medical facilities and large-scale groundwater purification is not calculable from the provided data, but would be substantial.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise addresses the lasting consequences of industrial pollution by proposing permanent solutions: land reclamation, environmental remediation, and public health infrastructure. These are structural interventions to restore the area.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will treat the Sterlite firing incident as an act of state terrorism, not just a departmental issue. Murder cases will be filed against all officials involved, and they will be immediately suspended. We will ensure the full implementation of the Justice Aruna Jagadeesan Commission report and bring all named individuals to justice.
promise_text_ta: நாம் தமிழர் அரசு, இச்சம்பவத்தை வெறும் துறை சார்ந்த விசாரணையாக பார்க்காமல், அரசப் பயங்கரவாதமாகக் கருதி நடவடிக்கை எடுக்கும். இந்த நிகழ்வில் தொடர்புடைய அனைத்து அதிகாரிகள் மீதும் கொலை வழக்குப் பதிவு செய்யப்பட்டு, அவர்கள் உடனடியாகப் பணியிலிருந்து நீக்கப்படுவார்கள். அருணா செகதீசன் ஆணைய அறிக்கையை முழுமையாக நடைமுறைப்படுத்தி, அதில் பெயரிடப்பட்ட அனைவருக்கும் உரிய தண்டனை பெற்றுத்தரப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 457
impact_mechanism: Aims to deliver justice and establish accountability for the 2018 Thoothukudi police firing by prosecuting officials identified in an inquiry commission report.

promise_components.component: File murder cases against all officials involved in the Sterlite firing incident and suspend them.
promise_components.analysis: This is an administrative and legal action. The state government has the authority to initiate criminal proceedings and suspend its employees.

promise_components.component: Ensure the full implementation of the Justice Aruna Jagadeesan Commission report.
promise_components.analysis: This is a commitment to act on the findings of a judicial commission of inquiry, which is a function of the executive.

fiscal_cost_note: Minimal fiscal impact, consisting of administrative and legal costs. This is feasible within the state's budget.
sustainability_reasoning: Enforcing legal accountability on state officials for alleged excesses is a fundamental structural change. It aims to dismantle impunity and alter the incentive structure for law enforcement, setting a new precedent for state conduct.

promise_text_en: To halt new industrial projects, a legal ban will be enacted to prevent the acquisition of fertile agricultural land for industrial use under any circumstances. Instead of acquiring agricultural land, measures will be taken to establish industries only on barren lands.
promise_text_ta: இத்தகைய புதிய திட்டங்களைத் தடுத்து நிறுத்த, வளமான வேளாண் நிலங்களை எக்காரணம் கொண்டும் தொழிற்சாலைகளுக்குக் கையகப்படுத்தக்கூடாது என்ற சட்டப்பூர்வ தடை கொண்டு வரப்படும். வேளாண் நிலங்களை கையகப்படுத்துவதற்குப் பதிலாக, தரிசு நிலங்களில் மட்டுமே தொழிற்சாலைகளை அமைக்க வழிவகைச் செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 457
impact_mechanism: Aims to protect agricultural land and food security by legally restricting land use conversion for industrial purposes.

promise_components.component: Enact a legal ban to prevent the acquisition of fertile agricultural land for industrial use.
promise_components.analysis: This is a major land-use policy change that the state legislature can enact. It would affect all future industrial land acquisition.

promise_components.component: Measures will be taken to establish industries only on barren lands.
promise_components.analysis: This directs industrial development towards non-agricultural land, a key component of the proposed land-use law.

fiscal_cost_note: No direct expenditure. This is a regulatory change with indirect economic consequences (e.g., on industrial investment patterns) that are not quantifiable from the data.
sustainability_reasoning: A legal ban on converting a specific type of land is a permanent, structural change to the state's development and land-use policies. It addresses the root cause of agricultural land loss directly.
coverage_gap_note: This may disadvantage farmers who wish to sell their fertile land to industries for a higher price.

promise_text_en: The Naam Tamilar government will implement a very strict monitoring system to remedy the severe environmental degradation in existing SIPCOT complexes like Cuddalore and Ranipet. The licenses of companies found releasing untreated toxic waste into water bodies will be immediately revoked.
promise_text_ta: ஏற்கனவே செயல்பாட்டில் உள்ள கடலூர், இராணிப்பேட்டை போன்ற SIPCOT வளாகங்களில் நிலவும் கடுமையான சூழலியல் சீர்கேடுகளைக் களைய நாம் தமிழர் அரசு மிகத் தீவிரமான கண்காணிப்பு முறையைப் பின்பற்றும். தொழிற்சாலைகளில் இருந்து வெளியேறும் நச்சுக் கழிவுகளை முறையாகச் சுத்திகரிக்காமல் நீர்நிலைகளில் கலக்கவிடும் நிறுவனங்களின் உரிமங்கள் உடனடியாக நீக்கப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 459
impact_mechanism: Aims to reduce industrial pollution in designated zones by strengthening the enforcement of environmental regulations.

promise_components.component: Implement a very strict monitoring system in existing SIPCOT complexes.
promise_components.analysis: This involves enhancing the capacity and mandate of the state's pollution control board, which is an administrative action.

promise_components.component: The licenses of companies found releasing untreated toxic waste will be immediately revoked.
promise_components.analysis: This is a promise of strict punitive action using existing regulatory powers, intended to create a strong deterrent.

fiscal_cost_note: The cost for enhanced monitoring equipment and personnel is not calculable from the data but is a manageable administrative expense.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise aims to fix a broken or weak enforcement system, which is a root cause of persistent pollution. By making enforcement credible and non-negotiable, it structurally alters the operating environment for polluting industries.
coverage_gap_note: The promise is specific to SIPCOT complexes and does not explicitly cover polluting industries located elsewhere.

promise_text_en: Strict regulations will be established based on the "Polluter Pays Principle," forcing companies to bear the full cost of restoring the land and water bodies they have damaged. Factories that violate rules, identified through continuous environmental audits, will be closed, and the areas will be redeveloped to establish clean and green small-scale industrial clusters.
promise_text_ta: “மாசுபடுத்துபவரே இழப்பீடு வழங்க வேண்டும்” (Polluter Pays Principle) என்ற அடிப்படையில், பாதிக்கப்பட்ட நிலங்களையும் நீர்நிலைகளையும் பழைய நிலைக்குக் கொண்டு வரும் செலவை அந்தந்த நிறுவனங்களே ஏற்குமாறு கடுமையான செயல்முறை விதிகள் வகுக்கப்படும். மேலும், தொடர்ச்சியான சுற்றுச்சூழல் தணிக்கை மூலம் விதிகளுக்குப் புறம்பாகச் செயல்படும் ஆலைகளை மூடிவிட்டு, அப்பகுதிகளில் தூய்மையான மற்றும் பசுமையான சிறுதொழில் கூடங்களை அமைக்க வழிவகை செய்யப்படும்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 459
impact_mechanism: Creates a financial disincentive for industrial pollution by enforcing the "Polluter Pays Principle" and redeveloping affected areas.

promise_components.component: Establish strict regulations based on the "Polluter Pays Principle," forcing companies to bear the full cost of restoring damaged land and water bodies.
promise_components.analysis: This is a regulatory change. The cost is borne by polluting companies, not the state. The cost of restoration is not quantifiable from the reference data.

promise_components.component: Close factories that violate rules, identified through continuous environmental audits.
promise_components.analysis: This is an enforcement action. The number of potential violating factories is not available in the reference data.

promise_components.component: Redevelop closed factory areas to establish clean and green small-scale industrial clusters.
promise_components.analysis: This involves land use change and industrial promotion. The cost of redevelopment and establishing new clusters is not quantifiable from the reference data.

fiscal_cost_note: The direct fiscal cost to the state is for increased regulatory enforcement (audits, legal staff), which is not quantifiable from the data but is expected to be low. The primary financial burden is shifted to private polluters.
sustainability_reasoning: This policy addresses the root cause of industrial pollution by making it economically unviable for companies to pollute. It shifts the cost of environmental damage from the public to the polluter, creating a long-term incentive for cleaner practices.

promise_text_en: We demand that a committee be formed to investigate the irregularities in the Electoral Bonds scheme and that political parties found to have engaged in malpractices be banned from contesting elections.
promise_text_ta: தேர்தல் நன்கொடைத் திட்டம் (Electoral Bonds) குறித்து நடைபெற்ற முறைகேடுகள் குறித்து ஒரு குழு அமைத்து விசாரணை நடத்தப்பட வேண்டும் மற்றும் முறைகேடுகளில் ஈடுபட்ட கட்சிகளைத் தேர்தலில் போட்டியிடத் தடை விதிக்க வேண்டும் என வலியுறுத்துகின்றது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 459
impact_mechanism: Aims to influence national policy on electoral finance transparency by demanding an investigation and punitive action against parties.

promise_components.component: Demand that a committee be formed to investigate the irregularities in the Electoral Bonds scheme.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political demand directed at the central government. A state government cannot form such a committee for a national scheme. No fiscal impact on the state.

promise_components.component: Demand that political parties found to have engaged in malpractices be banned from contesting elections.
promise_components.analysis: This is a demand for action by the Election Commission of India. A state government has no authority to ban political parties. No fiscal impact on the state.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero direct fiscal cost to the Tamil Nadu state budget. This is a political demand for action by central government bodies.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a political demand directed at the central government. The state government lacks the authority to form such an investigative committee or ban political parties, making this a statement of intent rather than a deliverable policy.

promise_text_en: We oppose the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls, which disenfranchises lakhs of native Tamils while allowing people from other states to register easily. We consider this a deliberate act to diminish the political power of Tamils.
promise_text_ta: சிறப்புத் தீவிர வாக்காளர் பட்டியல் திருத்தம் (SIR) என்பது ஒருபுறம் இலட்சக்கணக்கானத் தமிழர்களின் வாக்குரிமையைப் பறிக்கும் வேளையில், மறுபுறம் வெளிமாநிலத்தவர்கள் தாராளமாகத் தமிழக வாக்காளர் பட்டியலில் ஊடுருவ வழிவகை செய்கிறது. இது திட்டமிட்ட முறையில் தமிழர்களின் அரசியல் அதிகாரத்தைக் குறைக்க எடுக்கப்படும் நடவடிக்கையாகவே நாம் தமிழர் கட்சி கருதுகிறது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 459
impact_mechanism: Expresses political opposition to a specific electoral roll revision process, framing it as a threat to the political power of native Tamils.

promise_components.component: Oppose the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls.
promise_components.analysis: This is a statement of opposition to a process managed by the Election Commission of India (ECI), a constitutional body. The state government does not set the rules for electoral roll revisions.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero direct fiscal cost to the Tamil Nadu state budget. This is a political stance on a process governed by the ECI.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a statement of political opposition to a process managed by the Election Commission of India. The state government does not have the authority to alter electoral roll revision rules, making this a form of political signalling rather than a concrete policy proposal.
coverage_gap_note: The promise frames a conflict between "native Tamils" and "people from other states," potentially excluding citizens who have legally migrated to and reside in Tamil Nadu.

promise_text_en: The right to vote is a right of the soil. People from other states living here should vote in their home states; they have no moral right to decide the fate of Tamil Nadu. We strongly oppose this conspiracy to hand over the power of our land to people from other states.
promise_text_ta: வாக்குரிமை என்பது மண்ணின் உரிமை. இங்கு வாழும் பிற மாநிலத்தவர்கள் தங்கள் சொந்த மாநிலங்களில் வாக்களிக்க வேண்டுமே தவிர, தமிழகத்தின் தலையெழுத்தைத் தீர்மானிக்க அவர்களுக்கு எந்த அறமும் இல்லை. எம் நிலத்தின் அதிகாரத்தை வேற்று மாநிலத்தவர் கையில் ஒப்படைக்கும் இந்தச் சதித்திட்டத்தை நாம் தமிழர் கட்சி கடுமையாக எதிர்க்கிறது.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 459
impact_mechanism: Proposes a fundamental, unconstitutional change to voting rights, restricting them to "sons of the soil" at the state level.

promise_components.component: The right to vote is a right of the soil. People from other states living here should vote in their home states.
promise_components.analysis: This is a political assertion that contradicts the Constitution of India and the Representation of the People Act, which grant voting rights based on ordinary residence. A state government cannot implement this.

fiscal_cost_note: Zero fiscal cost. This is a political and constitutional assertion, not a government program with a budget.
sustainability_reasoning: This promise advocates for a change to voting rights that is unconstitutional. The Indian Constitution grants voting rights based on citizenship and ordinary residence, not on a "right of the soil" at the state level. A state government has no power to implement this.
coverage_gap_note: This explicitly excludes Indian citizens who are ordinarily resident in Tamil Nadu but were born elsewhere, denying them their constitutional right to vote.

promise_text_en: We will create a new nation free from hunger, famine, corruption, bribery, murder, robbery, caste-based indignity, untouchability, oppression, subjugation, misogyny, sexual violence, resource plunder, and the intoxication of alcohol and religion.
promise_text_ta: பசி, பஞ்சம், ஊழல், இலஞ்சம், கொலை, கொள்ளை, சாதிய இழிவு, தீண்டாமைக் கொடுமை, அடக்குமுறை, ஒடுக்குமுறை, பெண்ணிய அடிமைத்தனம், பாலியல் வன்கொடுமை, வளக்கொள்ளை, மது மத போதை இவை ஏதுமற்ற புதியதொரு தேசம் செய்வோம்.
source_notes: Gemini 2.5 Pro multimodal OCR + translation on pages 462
impact_mechanism: Articulates a utopian vision of a new, independent nation free from all social and economic problems.

promise_components.component: Create a new nation free from hunger, famine, corruption, bribery, murder, robbery, caste-based indignity, untouchability, oppression, subjugation, misogyny, sexual violence, resource plunder, and the intoxication of alcohol and religion.
promise_components.analysis: This is a secessionist and utopian statement, not a policy. It is unconstitutional and proposes to solve all complex societal problems simultaneously without any specified mechanism. It cannot be analyzed with fiscal or policy data.

fiscal_cost_note: Not applicable. The premise of creating a new nation is outside the scope of state governance and budgeting within the Indian Union.
sustainability_reasoning: This is a utopian and secessionist statement, not a governable policy promise. It is unconstitutional and lacks any concrete mechanism for achieving its impossibly broad goals, placing it firmly in the realm of political rhetoric.
